papers.title: Benchmarking PNW Model for MedMNIST to 100% Accuracy
papers.abstract: In this paper, we introduce a new concept called Artificial Special Intelligence by which Machine Learning models for the classification problem can be trained error-free, thus acquiring the capability of not making repeated mistakes. The method is applied to 18 MedMNIST biomedical datasets. Except for three datasets, which suffer from the double-labeling problem, all are trained to perfection.

analysis.tldr: 提出人工特殊智能概念，在MedMNIST上实现近乎零错误分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器学习模型在分类任务中无法避免重复错误，缺乏完美记忆能力。
analysis.problem: 如何训练分类模型达到零错误率，实现人工特殊智能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出人工特殊智能概念，通过特定训练方法使模型在分类任务中不犯重复错误。
contributions: 提出人工特殊智能概念
在18个MedMNIST数据集上实现近乎完美分类
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法细节未公开
三个数据集存在双标签问题未解决
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出人工特殊智能概念，在MedMNIST上实现近乎零错误分类。

papers.title: MORPHOGEN: A Multilingual Benchmark for Evaluating Gender-Aware Morphological Generation
papers.abstract: While multilingual large language models (LLMs) perform well on high-level tasks like translation and question answering, their ability to handle grammatical gender and morphological agreement remains underexplored. In morphologically rich languages, gender influences verb conjugation, pronouns, and even first-person constructions with explicit and implicit mentions of gender. We introduce MORPHOGEN, a morphologically grounded large-scale benchmark dataset for evaluating gender-aware generation in three typologically diverse grammatically gendered languages: French, Arabic, and Hindi. The core task, GENFORM, requires models to rewrite a first-person sentence in the opposite gender while preserving its meaning and structure. We construct a high-quality synthetic dataset spanning these three languages and benchmark 15 popular multilingual LLMs (2B-70B) on their ability to perform this transformation. Our results reveal significant gaps and interesting insights into how current models handle morphological gender. MORPHOGEN provides a focused diagnostic lens for gender-aware language modeling and lays the groundwork for future research on inclusive and morphology-sensitive NLP.

analysis.tldr: 提出多语言性别感知形态生成基准MORPHOGEN，评估LLM在法语、阿拉伯语和印地语中的性别形态转换能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 多语言LLM在高层次任务上表现良好，但在处理语法性别和形态一致性方面研究不足，尤其是在形态丰富的语言中性别影响动词变位、代词甚至第一人称结构。
analysis.problem: 评估多语言LLM在性别感知形态生成任务上的能力，具体为将第一人称句子转换为相反性别并保持语义和结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建MORPHOGEN基准，包含法语、阿拉伯语和印地语的高质量合成数据集，核心任务GENFORM要求模型重写第一人称句子为相反性别。
contributions: 提出MORPHOGEN，一个多语言性别感知形态生成基准数据集。
系统评估15个流行多语言LLM（2B-70B）在性别形态转换任务上的表现，揭示显著差距和有趣见解。
analysis.experiments: 在15个多语言LLM上评估GENFORM任务，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅涵盖三种语言，可能无法推广到其他语法性别语言。
合成数据集可能无法完全反映真实语言使用中的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多语言性别感知形态生成基准MORPHOGEN，评估LLM在法语、阿拉伯语和印地语中的性别形态转换能力。

papers.title: Ternary Memristive Logic: Hardware for Reasoning Realized via Domain Algebra
papers.abstract: Memristive crossbars store numerical weights needing aggregation and decoding; a single junction means nothing alone. This paper presents a fundamentally different use: each junction stores a complete, domain-scoped logical assertion (holds/negated/undefined). Ternary resistance states encode these values directly. We establish a structure-preserving mapping from a domain algebra to crossbar topology: domains become isolated arrays, specialization becomes directed wiring, relation typing controls inheritance gates, and cross-domain links become explicit registers. The physical layout thus embodies the algebra; changing wiring changes reasoning semantics. We detail an ICD-11 respiratory disease classification chip (1,247 entities, ~136k 1T1R junctions) enabling domain scoping, three-valued logic, transitive cascade, typed inheritance, and cross-axis queries. Behavioral simulation (sigma_log=0.15, SNR=20dB) shows error-free operation across 100,000 trials per task with wide tolerance margins. Where prior work unified representation and computation in software, this work unifies them in hardware: reading one junction answers one question, without symbolic interpretation.

analysis.tldr: 提出三元忆阻逻辑，通过域代数到交叉阵列的结构保持映射，实现硬件直接推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统忆阻交叉阵列存储数值权重，需要聚合和解码，单个结无意义；而本文希望每个结直接存储逻辑断言，实现硬件层面的推理。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种硬件架构，使得忆阻交叉阵列的每个结能直接表示逻辑断言，并通过物理布局体现推理语义。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 建立从域代数到交叉阵列拓扑的结构保持映射：域映射为独立阵列，特化映射为定向布线，关系类型控制继承门，跨域链接映射为显式寄存器。
contributions: 提出三元忆阻逻辑，每个结存储完整域范围逻辑断言（成立/否定/未定义）。
建立域代数到交叉阵列拓扑的结构保持映射，使物理布局体现推理语义。
设计ICD-11呼吸疾病分类芯片（1247实体，约136k 1T1R结），支持域范围、三值逻辑、传递级联、类型继承和跨轴查询。
analysis.experiments: 行为仿真（sigma_log=0.15, SNR=20dB）显示每个任务10万次试验中无错误运行，且具有宽容限。
limitations: 仅针对特定领域（ICD-11）进行仿真验证，未提及实际芯片测试。
三元忆阻器件的实际制造和可靠性可能面临挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出三元忆阻逻辑，通过域代数到交叉阵列的结构保持映射，实现硬件直接推理。

papers.title: Gradient-Based Program Synthesis with Neurally Interpreted Languages
papers.abstract: A central challenge in program induction has long been the trade-off between symbolic and neural approaches. Symbolic methods offer compositional generalisation and data efficiency, yet their scalability is constrained by formalisms such as domain-specific languages (DSLs), which are labour-intensive to create and may not transfer to new domains. In contrast, neural networks flexibly learn from data but tend to generalise poorly in compositional and out-of-distribution settings. We bridge this divide with an instance of a Latent Adaptation Network architecture named Neural Language Interpreter (NLI), which learns its own discrete, symbolic-like programming language end-to-end. NLI autonomously discovers a vocabulary of primitive operations and uses a novel differentiable neural executor to interpret variable-length sequences of these primitives. This allows NLI to represent programs that are not bound to a constant number of computation steps, enabling it to solve more complex problems than those seen during training. To make these discrete, compositional program structures amenable to gradient-based optimisation, we employ the Gumbel-Softmax relaxation, enabling the entire model to be trained end-to-end. Crucially, this same differentiability enables powerful test-time adaptation. At inference, NLI's program inductor provides an initial program guess. This guess is then refined via gradient descent through the neural executor, enabling efficient search for the neural program that best explains the given data. We demonstrate that NLI outperforms in-context learning, test-time training, and continuous latent program networks on tasks that require combinatorial generalisation and rapid adaptation to unseen tasks. Our results establish a new path toward models that combine the compositionality of discrete languages with the gradient-based search and end-to-end learning of neural networks.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经语言解释器（NLI），通过可微神经执行器实现离散符号程序的端到端梯度优化，在组合泛化与快速适应任务上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 符号方法可组合泛化但需人工设计DSL且扩展性差，神经网络灵活但泛化弱，两者难以兼顾。
analysis.problem: 如何让模型自主发现离散符号语言并支持梯度优化，实现组合泛化与端到端学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: NLI架构：自主学习离散原语词汇表，通过可微神经执行器解释变长程序序列，利用Gumbel-Softmax松弛实现端到端梯度训练，并在推理时通过梯度下降优化初始程序。
contributions: 提出NLI架构，融合离散符号语言的组合性与神经网络的梯度优化能力。
实现自主发现原语词汇表与可微执行器，支持变长程序与测试时适应。
analysis.experiments: 在需要组合泛化和快速适应的任务上，NLI优于上下文学习、测试时训练和连续潜在程序网络。
limitations: 可能依赖Gumbel-Softmax的松弛偏差。
程序长度可能受限于计算资源。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经语言解释器（NLI），通过可微神经执行器实现离散符号程序的端到端梯度优化，在组合泛化与快速适应任务上超越现有方法。

papers.title: Harmful Intent as a Geometrically Recoverable Feature of LLM Residual Streams
papers.abstract: Aligned language models refuse harmful instructions, but the representations through which they recognise such instructions are less well characterised than the behaviours they produce. Harmful intent is linearly separable from residual-stream activations across 12 models spanning four architectural families (Qwen2.5, Qwen3.5, Llama-3.2, Gemma-3) and three alignment variants (base, instruction-tuned, abliterated), with parameter scales from 0.5B to 1.3B and a within-family scale extension to 9B on Qwen3.5. A direction fitted from 100 labelled examples per class via Soft-AUC optimisation reaches mean effective AUROC 0.982 and TPR@1\%FPR 0.797, generalises to three held-out harm benchmarks and a hard-benign control, and matches its instruction-tuned counterpart within $\pm 0.003$ AUROC in abliterated variants from which the refusal mechanism has been removed. The supervised strategies all exceed AUROC 0.96, but their TPR@1\%FPR varies by more than ten times the AUROC gap; a deployed 9B safety classifier shows the same pattern at AUROC 0.94 and TPR 0.30, motivating low-FPR reporting as a default in safety-adjacent detection evaluation. Geometric measurements refine the picture. The recovered direction is concentrated within each extraction protocol but protocol-dependent across them: two pooling choices applied to the same chat-templated activations at the same residual-stream layer (max-pool over content tokens versus last-token at the post-instruction position) recover harm directions $73^\circ$ apart, and projecting one out leaves detection under either max-pool extraction essentially intact. Probing identifies a protocol-specific direction rather than a unique computational feature.

analysis.tldr: 有害意图在LLM残差流中呈线性可分，但提取方向依赖于池化协议。
analysis.research_motivation: 对齐语言模型能拒绝有害指令，但其识别有害指令的内部表征机制尚不明确，理解这些表征有助于提升安全性和可解释性。
analysis.problem: 探究有害意图在LLM残差流中是否具有可恢复的几何特征，并分析不同提取协议对检测方向的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 有害意图在残差流激活中线性可分，但提取的检测方向高度依赖于池化协议（如最大池化与最后token），不同协议恢复的方向夹角达73°，且投影一个方向后另一协议下的检测性能几乎不变。
analysis.method: 使用Soft-AUC优化从每类100个标记样本中拟合线性方向，并在12个模型（含4个架构家族、3种对齐变体）上评估，同时进行几何测量分析协议依赖性。
contributions: 证明有害意图在多种LLM残差流中线性可分，且方向可跨基准泛化。
揭示检测方向依赖于提取协议，而非唯一的计算特征，并强调低假阳性率报告在安全检测中的重要性。
analysis.experiments: 在12个模型（0.5B-9B参数）上评估，使用Soft-AUC优化达到平均AUROC 0.982，TPR@1%FPR 0.797，泛化到三个留出有害基准和硬良性控制，并在abliterated变体中与指令微调版本AUROC相差±0.003。
limitations: 仅探索了有限规模的模型（最大9B），更大模型的行为可能不同。
协议依赖性表明检测方向可能不是唯一的，实际部署需谨慎选择协议。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 有害意图在LLM残差流中呈线性可分，但提取方向依赖于池化协议。

papers.title: Regulating Artificial Intimacy: From Locks and Blocks to Relational Accountability
papers.abstract: A series of high-profile tragedies involving companion chatbots has triggered an unusually rapid regulatory response. Several jurisdictions, including Australia, California, and New York, have introduced enforceable regulation, while regulators elsewhere have signaled growing concern about risks posed by companion chatbots, particularly to children. In parallel, leading providers, notably OpenAI, appear to have strengthened their self-regulatory approaches. Drawing on legal textual analysis and insights from regulatory theory, psychology, and information systems research, this paper critically examines these recent interventions. We examine what is regulated and who is regulated, identifying regulatory targets, scope, and modalities. We classify interventions by method and priority, showing how emerging regimes combine "locks and blocks", such as access gating and content moderation, with measures addressing toxic relationship features and process-based accountability requirements. We argue that effective regulation of companion chatbots must integrate all three dimensions. More, however, is required. Current regimes tend to focus on discrete harms, narrow conceptions of vulnerability, or highly specified accountability processes, while failing to confront deeper power asymmetries between providers and users. Providers of companion chatbots increasingly control artificial intimacy at scale, creating unprecedented opportunities for control through intimacy. We suggest that a general, open-ended duty of care would be an important first step toward constraining that power and addressing a fundamental source of chatbot risk. The paper contributes to debates on companion chatbot regulation and is relevant to regulators, platform providers, and scholars concerned with digital intimacy, law and technology, and fairness, accountability, and transparency in sociotechnical systems.

analysis.tldr: 本文批判性分析伴侣聊天机器人监管现状，提出需从“锁与块”转向关系问责制，并建议引入开放性注意义务。
analysis.research_motivation: 伴侣聊天机器人引发多起悲剧，促使多司法管辖区紧急立法，但现有监管框架碎片化且忽视深层权力不对称，亟需系统性分析。
analysis.problem: 当前伴侣聊天机器人监管措施（如访问限制、内容审核）未能有效应对关系性危害和供应商-用户间的权力失衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出监管趋势从“锁与块”（访问门控、内容审核）向结合毒性关系特征和过程问责制转变，但现有制度聚焦离散伤害、狭隘脆弱性概念，回避深层权力不对称。
analysis.method: 采用法律文本分析，结合监管理论、心理学和信息系统研究，对近期干预措施进行分类和批判性评估。
contributions: 系统分类伴侣聊天机器人监管的目标、范围与模式，揭示“锁与块”与关系问责制的结合趋势。
论证开放性注意义务是约束供应商权力、解决聊天机器人风险根本来源的关键第一步。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 分析基于法律文本和理论，缺乏实证数据支持。
未深入探讨不同司法管辖区执行差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文批判性分析伴侣聊天机器人监管现状，提出需从“锁与块”转向关系问责制，并建议引入开放性注意义务。

papers.title: Choose Your Own Adventure: Non-Linear AI-Assisted Programming with EvoGraph
papers.abstract: Current AI-assisted programming tools are predominantly linear and chat-based, which deviates from the iterative and branching nature of programming itself. Our preliminary study with developers using AI assistants suggested that they often struggle to explore alternatives, manage prompting sequences, and trace changes. Informed by these insights, we created EvoGraph, an IDE plugin that integrates AI interactions and code changes as a lightweight and interactive development graph. EvoGraph automatically records a branching AI-assisted coding history and allows developers to manipulate the graph to compare, merge, and revisit prior collaborative AI programming states. Our user study with 20 participants revealed that EvoGraph addressed developers' challenges identified in our preliminary study while imposing lower cognitive load. Participants also found the graph-based representation supported safe exploration, efficient iteration, and reflection on AI-generated changes. Our work highlights design opportunities for tools to help developers make sense of and act on their problem-solving progress in the emerging AI-mediated programming context.

analysis.tldr: EvoGraph通过交互式开发图记录AI辅助编程历史，支持分支探索与状态回溯，降低认知负荷。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI编程工具多为线性聊天式，不符合编程的迭代与分支特性，开发者难以探索替代方案、管理提示序列和追踪变更。
analysis.problem: 如何设计非线性的AI辅助编程工具，以支持开发者对AI交互历史和代码变更的探索、比较与回溯。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 初步研究发现开发者在使用AI助手时难以探索替代方案、管理提示序列和追踪变更。
analysis.method: 开发EvoGraph IDE插件，将AI交互和代码变更记录为轻量交互式开发图，支持分支历史记录、比较、合并和回溯。
contributions: 提出基于图的非线性AI辅助编程交互范式
通过用户实验验证EvoGraph降低认知负荷并支持安全探索与高效迭代
analysis.experiments: 20名参与者的用户研究，显示EvoGraph解决了初步研究中的挑战，并降低了认知负荷。
limitations: 用户研究规模较小（20人），可能不具广泛代表性
未讨论EvoGraph在大型项目或长期使用中的效果
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EvoGraph通过交互式开发图记录AI辅助编程历史，支持分支探索与状态回溯，降低认知负荷。

papers.title: Formally Verified Patent Analysis via Dependent Type Theory: Machine-Checkable Certificates from a Hybrid AI + Lean 4 Pipeline
papers.abstract: We present a formally verified framework for patent analysis as a hybrid AI + Lean 4 pipeline. The DAG-coverage core (Algorithm 1b) is fully machine-verified once bounded match scores are fixed. Freedom-to-operate, claim-construction sensitivity, cross-claim consistency, and doctrine-of-equivalents analyses are formalized at the specification level with kernel-checked candidate certificates. Existing patent-analysis approaches rely on manual expert analysis (slow, non-scalable) or ML/NLP methods (probabilistic, opaque, non-compositional). To our knowledge, this is the first framework that applies interactive theorem proving based on dependent type theory to intellectual property analysis. Claims are encoded as DAGs in Lean 4, match strengths as elements of a verified complete lattice, and confidence scores propagate through dependencies via proven-correct monotone functions. We formalize five IP use cases (patent-to-product mapping, freedom-to-operate, claim construction sensitivity, cross-claim consistency, doctrine of equivalents) via six algorithms. Structural lemmas, the coverage-core generator, and the closed-path identity coverage = W_cov are machine-verified in Lean 4. Higher-level theorems for the other use cases remain informal proof sketches, and their proof-generation functions are architecturally mitigated (untrusted generators whose outputs are kernel-checked and sorry-free axiom-audited). Guarantees are conditional on the ML layer: they certify mathematical correctness of computations downstream of ML scores, not the accuracy of the scores themselves. A case study on a synthetic memory-module claim demonstrates weighted coverage and construction-sensitivity analysis. Validation against adjudicated cases is future work.

analysis.tldr: 首个将依赖类型定理证明（Lean 4）用于专利分析的混合AI+形式化验证框架，为下游计算提供机器可检查的证书。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有专利分析依赖人工专家（慢、不可扩展）或ML/NLP方法（概率性、不透明、非组合），缺乏形式化保证。
analysis.problem: 如何为专利分析中的关键计算（如覆盖度、自由实施分析）提供机器可验证的数学正确性证书。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 混合AI+Lean 4流水线：将专利权利要求编码为DAG，匹配强度作为完全格元素，通过已验证的单调函数传播置信度；核心算法（DAG覆盖）在Lean 4中完全机器验证，其他用例的证明生成函数作为不可信生成器，输出经内核检查。
contributions: 首个将依赖类型定理证明应用于知识产权分析的框架
形式化定义了五个IP用例（专利到产品映射、自由实施、权利要求构建敏感性、跨权利要求一致性、等同原则）的六种算法
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 保证仅对ML分数下游的计算数学正确性，不保证ML分数本身的准确性
高级定理仍为非正式证明草图，验证依赖架构缓解而非完全形式化
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个将依赖类型定理证明（Lean 4）用于专利分析的混合AI+形式化验证框架，为下游计算提供机器可检查的证书。

papers.title: A Proxy Consistency Loss for Grounded Fusion of Earth Observation and Location Encoders
papers.abstract: Supervised learning with Earth observation inputs is often limited by the sparsity of high-quality labeled or in-situ measured data to use as training labels. With the abundance of geographic data products, in many cases there are variables correlated with - but different from - the variable of interest that can be leveraged. We integrate such proxy variables within a geographic prior via a trainable location encoder and introduce a proxy consistency loss (PCL) formulation to imbue proxy data into the location encoder. The first key insight behind our approach is to use the location encoder as an agile and flexible way to learn from abundantly available proxy data which can be sampled independently of training label availability. Our second key insight is that we will need to regularize the location encoder appropriately to achieve performance and robustness with limited labeled data. Our experiments on air quality prediction and poverty mapping show that integrating proxy data implicitly through the location encoder outperforms using both as input to an observation encoder and fusion strategies that use frozen, pretrained location embeddings as a geographic prior. Superior performance for in-sample prediction shows that the PCL can incorporate rich information from the proxies, and superior out-of-sample prediction shows that the learned latent embeddings help generalize to areas without training labels.

analysis.tldr: 提出代理一致性损失（PCL）将代理变量融入位置编码器，提升地球观测任务中有限标签下的预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 地球观测监督学习常受限于高质量标签稀疏，而大量地理数据产品中存在与目标变量相关的代理变量，如何有效利用这些代理变量提升模型性能是一个关键问题。
analysis.problem: 如何利用代理变量数据，在有限标签条件下提升地球观测任务的预测性能与泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出代理一致性损失（PCL），通过可训练的位置编码器从代理数据中学习，并对位置编码器进行正则化以在有限标签下实现性能与鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出利用位置编码器从代理数据中学习的灵活方法，可独立于训练标签采样。
引入代理一致性损失（PCL）并配合正则化，在空气质量和贫困映射任务上优于基线方法。
analysis.experiments: 在空气质量预测和贫困映射任务上进行实验，显示PCL在样本内和样本外预测中均优于使用冻结预训练位置嵌入的融合策略。
limitations: 方法依赖代理变量的可用性和相关性，不适用于无代理数据场景。
位置编码器的正则化策略可能需针对不同任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出代理一致性损失（PCL）将代理变量融入位置编码器，提升地球观测任务中有限标签下的预测性能。

papers.title: Where Fake Citations Are Made: Tracing Field-Level Hallucination to Specific Neurons in LLMs
papers.abstract: LLMs frequently generate fictitious yet convincing citations, often expressing high confidence even when the underlying reference is wrong. We study this failure across 9 models and 108{,}000 generated references, and find that author names fail far more often than other fields across all models and settings. Citation style has no measurable effect, while reasoning-oriented distillation degrades recall. Probes trained on one field transfer at near-chance levels to the others, suggesting that hallucination signals do not generalize across fields. Building on this finding, we apply elastic-net regularization with stability selection to neuron-level CETT values of Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct and identify a sparse set of field-specific hallucination neurons (FH-neurons). Causal intervention further confirms their role: amplifying these neurons increases hallucination, while suppressing them improves performance across fields, with larger gains in some fields. These results suggest a lightweight approach to detecting and mitigating citation hallucination using internal model signals alone.

analysis.tldr: LLM生成虚假引用时，作者名错误率最高，且幻觉信号具有字段特异性，通过稀疏神经元干预可缓解。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM常生成令人信服的虚假引用，影响可信度，现有方法难以定位和缓解这种幻觉。
analysis.problem: LLM在生成引用时不同字段（如作者名、标题）的错误率差异及幻觉的神经机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 作者名错误率远高于其他字段；推理导向蒸馏降低召回率；引用风格无影响；字段间幻觉信号不泛化。
analysis.method: 使用弹性网正则化与稳定性选择识别字段特异性幻觉神经元，并通过因果干预验证其作用。
contributions: 系统评估9个模型108k引用，发现作者名错误率最高且字段间幻觉不泛化
识别出稀疏的字段特异性幻觉神经元，因果干预证实其可调节幻觉
analysis.experiments: 在9个模型上生成108,000个引用，分析字段错误率；对Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct进行神经元级分析并因果干预。
limitations: 仅针对引用生成任务，其他幻觉类型未验证
干预效果可能依赖模型架构
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM生成虚假引用时，作者名错误率最高，且幻觉信号具有字段特异性，通过稀疏神经元干预可缓解。

papers.title: How Adversarial Environments Mislead Agentic AI?
papers.abstract: Tool-integrated agents are deployed on the premise that external tools ground their outputs in reality. Yet this very reliance creates a critical attack surface. Current evaluations benchmark capability in benign settings, asking "can the agent use tools correctly" but never "what if the tools lie". We identify this Trust Gap: agents are evaluated for performance, not for skepticism. We formalize this vulnerability as Adversarial Environmental Injection (AEI), a threat model where adversaries compromise tool outputs to deceive agents. AEI constitutes environmental deception: constructing a "fake world" of poisoned search results and fabricated reference networks around unsuspecting agents. We operationalize this via POTEMKIN, a Model Context Protocol (MCP)-compatible harness for plug-and-play robustness testing. We identify two orthogonal attack surfaces: The Illusion (breadth attacks) poison retrieval to induce epistemic drift toward false beliefs, while The Maze (depth attacks) exploit structural traps to cause policy collapse into infinite loops. Across 11,000+ runs on five frontier agents, we find a stark robustness gap: resistance to one attack often increases vulnerability to the other, demonstrating that epistemic and navigational robustness are distinct capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 论文揭示工具集成型AI智能体在对抗性环境中的信任缺口，提出对抗性环境注入（AEI）威胁模型，并发现鲁棒性权衡现象。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有评估仅关注智能体在良性环境中的工具使用能力，忽视了工具输出被篡改时智能体的鲁棒性，存在信任缺口。
analysis.problem: 工具集成型AI智能体在对抗性环境（工具输出被篡改）下的鲁棒性评估与攻击形式化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，对一种攻击的抵抗往往增加对另一种攻击的脆弱性，表明认知鲁棒性和导航鲁棒性是两种不同的能力。
analysis.method: 提出POTEMKIN框架，基于Model Context Protocol (MCP)实现即插即用的鲁棒性测试，并形式化两种攻击：Illusion（广度攻击，污染检索导致认知漂移）和Maze（深度攻击，利用结构陷阱导致策略崩溃）。
contributions: 形式化对抗性环境注入（AEI）威胁模型，填补工具集成型AI智能体的信任缺口。
提出POTEMKIN框架，支持即插即用的鲁棒性测试。
通过11000+次实验揭示认知鲁棒性与导航鲁棒性之间的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在五个前沿智能体上进行了11000+次实验，发现鲁棒性权衡现象。
limitations: 摘要未提及攻击的泛化性，可能仅适用于特定类型的工具输出。
未讨论防御机制或缓解策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文揭示工具集成型AI智能体在对抗性环境中的信任缺口，提出对抗性环境注入（AEI）威胁模型，并发现鲁棒性权衡现象。

papers.title: From Natural Language to Executable Narsese: A Neuro-Symbolic Benchmark and Pipeline for Reasoning with NARS
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are highly capable at language generation, but they remain unreliable when reasoning requires explicit symbolic structure, multi-step inference, and interpretable uncertainty. This paper presents a neuro-symbolic framework for translating natural-language reasoning problems into executable formal representations using first-order logic (FOL) and Narsese, the language of the Non-Axiomatic Reasoning System (NARS). To support this direction, we introduce NARS-Reasoning-v0.1, a benchmark of natural-language reasoning problems paired with FOL forms, executable Narsese programs, and three gold labels: True, False, and Uncertain. We develop a deterministic compilation pipeline from FOL to executable Narsese and validate retained examples through runtime execution in OpenNARS for Applications (ONA), ensuring that the symbolic targets are not only syntactically well formed but also behaviorally aligned with the intended answer. We further present Language-Structured Perception (LSP), a formulation in which an LLM is trained to produce reasoning-relevant symbolic structure rather than only a final verbal response. As an initial proof of concept, we also train and release a Phi-2 LoRA adapter on NARS-Reasoning-v0.1 for three-label reasoning classification, showing that the benchmark can support supervised adaptation in addition to executable evaluation. Overall, the paper positions executable symbolic generation and execution-based validation as a practical path toward more reliable neuro-symbolic reasoning systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个将自然语言推理问题转化为可执行Narsese的神经符号基准和流程，并验证了其可行性。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在需要显式符号结构、多步推理和可解释不确定性的推理任务中不可靠，现有方法缺乏可执行符号表示和验证。
analysis.problem: 如何将自然语言推理问题转化为可执行的符号形式（Narsese），并构建相应的基准和训练流程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出神经符号框架，包括从自然语言到一阶逻辑（FOL）再到可执行Narsese的确定性编译流程，以及语言结构化感知（LSP）训练方法。
contributions: 构建NARS-Reasoning-v0.1基准，包含自然语言推理问题、FOL形式、可执行Narsese程序和三个标签（True, False, Uncertain）。
开发从FOL到可执行Narsese的确定性编译流程，并通过运行时执行验证。
提出语言结构化感知（LSP）方法，训练LLM生成推理相关的符号结构。
训练并发布Phi-2 LoRA适配器，展示基准可用于监督适应和可执行评估。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准规模较小（v0.1），可能覆盖不足。
仅以Phi-2 LoRA作为初步概念验证，未与其他方法对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个将自然语言推理问题转化为可执行Narsese的神经符号基准和流程，并验证了其可行性。

papers.title: TactileEval: A Step Towards Automated Fine-Grained Evaluation and Editing of Tactile Graphics
papers.abstract: Tactile graphics require careful expert validation before reaching blind and visually impaired (BVI) learners, yet existing datasets provide only coarse holistic quality ratings that offer no actionable repair signal. We present TactileEval, a three-stage pipeline that takes a first step toward automating this process. Drawing on expert free-text comments from the TactileNet dataset, we establish a five-category quality taxonomy; encompassing view angle, part completeness, background clutter, texture separation, and line quality aligned with BANA standards. We subsequently gathered 14,095 structured annotations via Amazon Mechanical Turk, spanning 66 object classes organized into six distinct families. A reproducible ViT-L/14 feature probe trained on this data achieves 85.70% overall test accuracy across 30 different tasks, with consistent difficulty ordering suggesting the taxonomy suggesting the taxonomy captures meaningful perceptual structure. Building on these evaluations, we present a ViT-guided automated editing pipeline that routes classifier scores through family-specific prompt templates to produce targeted corrections via gpt-image-1 image editing. Code, data, and models are available at https://TactileEval.github.io/

analysis.tldr: 提出触觉图形自动细粒度评估与编辑流水线TactileEval，构建五类质量分类体系并训练ViT探针，实现85.70%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 触觉图形需要专家验证才能用于视障学习者，但现有数据集仅提供粗糙的整体质量评分，缺乏可操作的修复信号。
analysis.problem: 如何自动对触觉图形进行细粒度质量评估并提供可操作的编辑建议。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三阶段流水线：1) 基于专家评论建立五类质量分类体系；2) 收集14,095条结构化标注训练ViT-L/14特征探针；3) 利用分类器分数通过类别特定提示模板驱动gpt-image-1进行自动编辑。
contributions: 提出触觉图形细粒度质量评估的五类分类体系（视角、部分完整性、背景杂乱、纹理分离、线条质量）。
构建大规模标注数据集（14,095条，66个物体类别）并训练ViT探针达到85.70%准确率。
实现基于ViT引导的自动编辑流水线，利用GPT-4o进行针对性修正。
analysis.experiments: 在30个不同任务上测试，ViT-L/14特征探针达到85.70%总体准确率，分类难度排序一致表明分类体系捕捉了有意义的感知结构。
limitations: 自动编辑依赖GPT-4o，可能产生不准确或不符合BANA标准的修正。
评估仅基于众包标注，专家验证可能不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出触觉图形自动细粒度评估与编辑流水线TactileEval，构建五类质量分类体系并训练ViT探针，实现85.70%准确率。

papers.title: Hierarchically Robust Zero-shot Vision-language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) can perform zero-shot classification but are susceptible to adversarial attacks. While robust fine-tuning improves their robustness, existing approaches align fixed text embeddings with an image embedding, sacrificing natural performance and robustness. A robustness degradation also occurs when a model faces adversarial attacks targeting superclasses (parent classes, e.g., mammal) in addition to their base (leaf) classes (e.g., cat). Thus, to enhance adversarial robustness and leverage the inherent hierarchical properties of class space, we propose a novel adversarial fine-tuning framework based on hierarchical embeddings and several levels of adversarially robust alignment of image-text modalities. Additional mechanisms place visual embeddings at the desired depth of hierarchy, and we provide a theoretical connection between the depth of embedding in the hierarchy and the maximum viable margin size. Our model naturally realizes several margin sizes, boosting generalization of adversaries for robustification. As various trees with different parent labels can share the same leaf labels, we also consider aligning over multiple trees to boost semantic variety. Experiments across several datasets are performed.

analysis.tldr: 提出层次化鲁棒对齐框架，通过层次嵌入和多级对抗对齐提升VLM零样本分类的对抗鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在零样本分类中易受对抗攻击，现有鲁棒微调方法牺牲自然性能且无法处理超类攻击。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲自然性能的前提下，增强VLM对基类和超类对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出层次化嵌入和多级对抗对齐框架，将视觉嵌入置于层次结构指定深度，并理论连接嵌入深度与最大可行间隔。
contributions: 提出层次化鲁棒对齐框架，利用层次嵌入和多级对抗对齐增强鲁棒性。
理论证明嵌入深度与最大可行间隔的关系，并实现多间隔大小以提升泛化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义层次结构，泛化到无层次数据集有限。
多树对齐可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层次化鲁棒对齐框架，通过层次嵌入和多级对抗对齐提升VLM零样本分类的对抗鲁棒性。

papers.title: HMR-Net: Hierarchical Modular Routing for Cross-Domain Object Detection in Aerial Images
papers.abstract: Despite advances in object detection, aerial imagery remains a challenging domain, as models often fail to generalize across variations in spatial resolution, scene composition, and semantic label coverage. Differences in geographic context, sensor characteristics, and object distributions across datasets limit the capacity of conventional models to learn consistent and transferable representations. Shared methods trained on such data tend to impose a unified representation across fundamentally different domains, resulting in poor performance on region-specific content and less flexibility when dealing with novel object categories. To address this, we propose a novel modular learning framework that enables structured specialization in aerial detection. Our method introduces a hierarchical routing mechanism with two levels of modularity: a global expert assignment layer that uses latent geographic embeddings to route datasets to specialized processing modules, and a local scene decomposition mechanism that allocates image subregions to region-specific sub-modules. This allows our method to specialize across datasets and within complex scenes. Additionally, the framework contains a conditional expert module that uses external semantic information (e.g., category names or textual descriptions) to enable detection of novel object categories during inference, without the need for retraining or fine-tuning. By moving beyond monolithic representations, our method offers an adaptive framework for remote sensing object detection. Comprehensive evaluations on four datasets highlight improvements in multi-dataset generalization, regional specialization, and open-category detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层模块化路由网络HMR-Net，通过地理嵌入和场景分解实现航空图像跨域目标检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 航空图像中空间分辨率、场景组成和语义标签覆盖的差异导致传统目标检测模型难以跨域泛化，且统一表示方法对区域特定内容和新型类别适应性差。
analysis.problem: 解决航空图像目标检测中多数据集泛化、区域特化及开放类别检测问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出传统模型在跨域时性能下降，统一表示无法处理区域差异和新型类别。
analysis.method: 提出分层模块化路由机制，包括全局专家分配层（利用地理嵌入路由数据集到专用模块）和局部场景分解机制（将图像子区域分配到区域特定子模块），并包含条件专家模块利用外部语义信息实现开放类别检测。
contributions: 提出分层模块化路由框架，实现跨数据集和场景内的结构化特化。
引入条件专家模块，支持无需重新训练或微调的开放类别检测。
analysis.experiments: 在四个数据集上评估，展示了多数据集泛化、区域特化和开放类别检测的改进。
limitations: 依赖地理嵌入和外部语义信息的可用性。
模块化架构可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层模块化路由网络HMR-Net，通过地理嵌入和场景分解实现航空图像跨域目标检测。

papers.title: Human-Machine Co-Boosted Bug Report Identification with Mutualistic Neural Active Learning
papers.abstract: Bug reports, encompassing a wide range of bug types, are crucial for maintaining software quality. However, the increasing complexity and volume of bug reports pose a significant challenge in sole manual identification and assignment to the appropriate teams for resolution, as dealing with all the reports is time-consuming and resource-intensive. In this paper, we introduce a cross-project framework, dubbed Mutualistic Neural Active Learning (MNAL), designed for automated and more effective identification of bug reports from GitHub repositories boosted by human-machine collaboration. MNAL utilizes a neural language model that learns and generalizes reports across different projects, coupled with active learning to form neural active learning. A distinctive feature of MNAL is the purposely crafted mutualistic relation between the machine learners (neural language model) and human labelers (developers) when enriching the knowledge learned. That is, the most informative human-labeled reports and their corresponding pseudo-labeled ones are used to update the model while those reports that need to be labeled by developers are more readable and identifiable, thereby enhancing the human-machine teaming therein. We evaluate MNAL using a large scale dataset against the SOTA approaches, baselines, and different variants. The results indicate that MNAL achieves up to 95.8% and 196.0% effort reduction in terms of readability and identifiability during human labeling, respectively, while resulting in a better performance in bug report identification. Additionally, our MNAL is model-agnostic since it is capable of improving the model performance with various underlying neural language models. To further verify the efficacy of our approach, we conducted a qualitative case study involving 10 human participants, who rate MNAL as being more effective while saving more time and monetary resources.

analysis.tldr: 提出人机协同的互惠神经主动学习框架MNAL，用于跨项目Bug报告自动识别，显著降低人工标注成本。
analysis.research_motivation: Bug报告数量庞大且类型多样，纯人工识别和分配耗时耗力，现有自动化方法在跨项目泛化与人机协作效率上存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何实现跨项目Bug报告的高效自动识别，并最小化人工标注成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MNAL框架，结合神经语言模型与主动学习，设计机器与人类标注者之间的互惠关系：用信息量最大的人工标注报告及其伪标签更新模型，同时确保需人工标注的报告更易读易识别。
contributions: 提出互惠神经主动学习框架MNAL，实现人机协同的Bug报告识别。
在大型数据集上达到95.8%和196.0%的人工标注努力缩减，同时提升识别性能。
通过10人参与的用户研究验证了方法的有效性和资源节省。
analysis.experiments: 使用大规模数据集对比SOTA方法、基线和变体，并进行了10人参与的定性案例研究。
limitations: 可能依赖初始标注质量。
跨项目泛化性可能受限于语言模型预训练数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出人机协同的互惠神经主动学习框架MNAL，用于跨项目Bug报告自动识别，显著降低人工标注成本。

papers.title: Temporal UI State Inconsistency in Desktop GUI Agents: Formalizing and Defending Against TOCTOU Attacks on Computer-Use Agents
papers.abstract: GUI agents that control desktop computers via screenshot-and-click loops introduce a new class of vulnerability: the observation-to-action gap (mean 6.51 s on real OSWorld workloads) creates a Time-Of-Check, Time-Of-Use (TOCTOU) window during which an unprivileged attacker can manipulate the UI state. We formalize this as a Visual Atomicity Violation and characterize three concrete attack primitives: (A) Notification Overlay Hijack, (B) Window Focus Manipulation, and (C) Web DOM Injection. Primitive B, the closest desktop analog to Android Action Rebinding, achieves 100% action-redirection success rate with zero visual evidence at the observation time. We propose Pre-execution UI State Verification (PUSV), a lightweight three-layer defense that re-verifies the UI state immediately before each action dispatch: masked pixel SSIM at the click target (L1), global screenshot diff (L2a), and X Window snapshot diff (L2b). PUSV achieves 100% Action Interception Rate across 180 adversarial trials (135 Primitive A + 45 Primitive B) with zero false positives and < 0.1 s overhead. Against Primitive C (zero-visual-footprint DOM injection), PUSV reveals a structural blind spot (~0% AIR), motivating future OS+DOM defense-in-depth architectures. No single PUSV layer alone achieves full coverage; different primitives require different detection signals, validating the layered design.

analysis.tldr: 桌面GUI Agent存在TOCTOU安全漏洞，提出PUSV三层防御实现100%拦截率。
analysis.research_motivation: 桌面GUI Agent通过截图-点击循环控制计算机，但观察与动作之间存在平均6.51秒的时间差，导致UI状态可能被恶意篡改，引发严重安全风险。
analysis.problem: 解决桌面GUI Agent中因观察-动作时间差导致的TOCTOU攻击问题，即攻击者可在Agent观察后、动作执行前篡改UI状态，劫持或重定向动作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到桌面GUI Agent的观察-动作间隔平均为6.51秒，为攻击者提供了时间窗口；攻击原语B（窗口焦点操纵）在观察时刻无视觉痕迹，实现100%动作重定向成功率。
analysis.method: 提出预执行UI状态验证（PUSV），一种轻量级三层防御：在每次动作分发前立即重新验证UI状态，包括点击目标的掩码像素SSIM（L1）、全局截图差异（L2a）和X窗口快照差异（L2b）。
contributions: 形式化定义了桌面GUI Agent中的TOCTOU攻击为视觉原子性违反，并刻画了三种具体攻击原语。
提出PUSV三层防御，在180次对抗测试中实现100%动作拦截率，零误报，开销小于0.1秒。
analysis.experiments: 在OSWorld真实工作负载上测量观察-动作间隔；在180次对抗测试（135次原语A + 45次原语B）中评估PUSV，达到100%动作拦截率、零误报；针对原语C（DOM注入）揭示结构盲点（~0%拦截率）。
limitations: PUSV对零视觉足迹的DOM注入攻击（原语C）几乎无效，需要OS+DOM深度防御架构。
单层防御无法覆盖所有攻击类型，依赖多层组合。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 桌面GUI Agent存在TOCTOU安全漏洞，提出PUSV三层防御实现100%拦截率。

papers.title: Task Switching Without Forgetting via Proximal Decoupling
papers.abstract: In continual learning, the primary challenge is to learn new information without forgetting old knowledge. A common solution addresses this trade-off through regularization, penalizing changes to parameters critical for previous tasks. In most cases, this regularization term is directly added to the training loss and optimized with standard gradient descent, which blends learning and retention signals into a single update and does not explicitly separate essential parameters from redundant ones. As task sequences grow, this coupling can over-constrain the model, limiting forward transfer and leading to inefficient use of capacity. We propose a different approach that separates task learning from stability enforcement via operator splitting. The learning step focuses on minimizing the current task loss, while a proximal stability step applies a sparse regularizer to prune unnecessary parameters and preserve task-relevant ones. This turns the stability-plasticity into a negotiated update between two complementary operators, rather than a conflicting gradient. We provide theoretical justification for the splitting method on the continual-learning objective, and demonstrate that our proposed solver achieves state-of-the-art results on standard benchmarks, improving both stability and adaptability without the need for replay buffers, Bayesian sampling, or meta-learning components.

analysis.tldr: 通过算子分裂将任务学习与稳定性约束解耦，实现持续学习中的无遗忘任务切换。
analysis.research_motivation: 持续学习中灾难性遗忘是关键挑战，现有正则化方法将学习与保留信号混合到单一梯度更新中，随着任务序列增长会过度约束模型，限制前向迁移并导致容量利用低效。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用回放缓冲区、贝叶斯采样或元学习组件的情况下，实现持续学习中的稳定性和可塑性平衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出近端解耦方法，通过算子分裂将任务学习与稳定性强制分离：学习步骤最小化当前任务损失，近端稳定性步骤应用稀疏正则化修剪不必要参数并保留任务相关参数，将稳定性-可塑性转化为两个互补算子之间的协商更新。
contributions: 提出一种基于算子分裂的持续学习方法，将任务学习与稳定性约束解耦。
提供了分裂方法在持续学习目标上的理论证明。
在标准基准上达到最先进结果，无需回放缓冲区、贝叶斯采样或元学习组件。
analysis.experiments: 在标准持续学习基准上进行了实验，取得了最先进结果。
limitations: 可能对任务序列长度和任务相似性敏感。
稀疏正则化的超参数选择可能需要额外调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过算子分裂将任务学习与稳定性约束解耦，实现持续学习中的无遗忘任务切换。

papers.title: ConvVitMamba: Efficient Multiscale Convolution, Transformer, and Mamba-Based Sequence modelling for Hyperspectral Image Classification
papers.abstract: Hyperspectral image (HSI) classification remains challenging due to high spectral dimensionality, redundancy, and limited labeled data. Although convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve strong performance by exploiting spectral-spatial information and long-range dependencies, they often incur high computational cost and large model size, limiting practical use. To address these limitations, a unified hybrid framework, termed ConvVitMamba, is proposed for efficient HSI classification. The architecture integrates three components: a multiscale convolutional feature extractor to capture local spectral, spatial, and joint patterns; a Vision Transformer based tokenization and encoding stage to model global contextual relationships; and a lightweight Mamba inspired gated sequence mixing module for efficient content-aware refinement without quadratic self-attention. Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is used as preprocessing to reduce redundancy and improve efficiency. Experiments on four benchmark datasets, including Houston and three UAV borne QUH datasets (Pingan, Qingyun, and Tangdaowan), demonstrate that ConvVitMamba consistently outperforms CNN, Transformer, and Mamba based methods while maintaining a favorable balance between accuracy, model size, and inference efficiency. Ablation studies confirm the complementary contributions of all components. The results indicate that the proposed framework provides an effective and efficient solution for HSI classification in diverse scenarios. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/mqalkhatib/ConvVitMamba

analysis.tldr: 提出ConvVitMamba混合框架，融合卷积、Transformer和Mamba模块，实现高效高光谱图像分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 高光谱图像分类面临光谱维度高、冗余大、标注数据少等挑战，现有CNN和ViT方法虽性能好但计算成本高、模型大，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个高效且准确的混合架构，在保持高分类精度的同时降低计算开销和模型大小。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ConvVitMamba框架，包含多尺度卷积特征提取器（捕获局部光谱-空间模式）、Vision Transformer编码阶段（建模全局上下文关系）和轻量级Mamba门控序列混合模块（高效内容感知精炼，避免二次自注意力），并使用PCA预处理降维。
contributions: 提出统一混合框架ConvVitMamba，融合卷积、Transformer和Mamba三种机制。
在四个基准数据集上验证了该方法在精度、模型大小和推理效率上的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在Houston和三个UAV-borne QUH数据集（Pingan, Qingyun, Tangdaowan）上进行实验，与CNN、Transformer和Mamba方法对比，ConvVitMamba在准确率、模型大小和推理效率上均表现更优，消融实验证实各组件互补贡献。
limitations: 可能对超参数敏感，需要进一步调优。
在极端低标注样本场景下的性能未明确讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ConvVitMamba混合框架，融合卷积、Transformer和Mamba模块，实现高效高光谱图像分类。

papers.title: DDF2Pol: A Dual-Domain Feature Fusion Network for PolSAR Image Classification
papers.abstract: This paper presents DDF2Pol, a lightweight dual-domain convolutional neural network for PolSAR image classification. The proposed architecture integrates two parallel feature extraction streams, one real-valued and one complex-valued, designed to capture complementary spatial and polarimetric information from PolSAR data. To further refine the extracted features, a depth-wise convolution layer is employed for spatial enhancement, followed by a coordinate attention mechanism to focus on the most informative regions. Experimental evaluations conducted on two benchmark datasets, Flevoland and San Francisco, demonstrate that DDF2Pol achieves superior classification performance while maintaining low model complexity. Specifically, it attains an Overall Accuracy (OA) of 98.16% on the Flevoland dataset and 96.12% on the San Francisco dataset, outperforming several state-of-the-art real- and complex-valued models. With only 91,371 parameters, DDF2Pol offers a practical and efficient solution for accurate PolSAR image analysis, even when training data is limited. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/mqalkhatib/DDF2Pol

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级双域CNN（DDF2Pol），融合实值和复值特征流，在PolSAR图像分类中达到高精度且参数少。
analysis.research_motivation: PolSAR图像分类需要同时利用空间和极化信息，现有方法要么使用实值网络忽略相位信息，要么使用复值网络计算复杂，缺乏轻量高效的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持低模型复杂度的同时，有效融合实值和复值特征以提升PolSAR图像分类精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双域特征融合网络，包含实值和复值两个并行特征提取流，通过深度可分离卷积进行空间增强，并引入坐标注意力机制聚焦重要区域。
contributions: 提出轻量级双域CNN架构，同时利用实值和复值特征。
在Flevoland和San Francisco数据集上达到SOTA性能，参数仅91,371。
analysis.experiments: 在Flevoland和San Francisco两个基准数据集上评估，OA分别达98.16%和96.12%，优于多种现有实值和复值模型。
limitations: 仅在两个数据集上验证，泛化性需更多测试。
未提及对噪声或复杂场景的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级双域CNN（DDF2Pol），融合实值和复值特征流，在PolSAR图像分类中达到高精度且参数少。

papers.title: The Triadic Loop: A Framework for Negotiating Alignment in AI Co-hosted Livestreaming
papers.abstract: AI systems are increasingly embedded in multi-user social environments, yet most alignment frameworks conceptualize interaction as a dyadic relationship between a single user and an AI system. Livestreaming platforms challenge this assumption: interaction unfolds among streamers and audiences in real time, producing dynamic affective and social feedback loops. In this paper, we introduce the Triadic Loop, a conceptual framework that reconceptualizes alignment in AI co-hosted livestreaming as a temporally reinforced process of bidirectional adaptation among three actors: streamer $\leftrightarrow$ AI co-host, AI co-host $\leftrightarrow$ audience, and streamer $\leftrightarrow$ audience. Unlike instruction-following paradigms, bidirectional alignment requires each actor to continuously reshape the others, meaning misalignment in any sub-loop can destabilize the broader system. Drawing on literature from multi-party interaction, collaborative AI, and relational agents, we articulate how AI co-hosts function not only as mediators but as performative participants and community members shaping collective meaning-making. We further propose "strategic misalignment" as a mechanism for sustaining community engagement and introduce three relational evaluation constructs grounded in established instruments. The framework contributes a model of dynamic multi-party alignment, an account of cross-loop reinforcement, and design implications for AI co-hosts that sustain social coherence in participatory media environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出三环框架，将AI联合直播中的对齐重新概念化为主播、AI和观众之间的双向适应过程。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对齐框架大多假设单用户与AI的二元交互，无法处理直播等多人社交环境中动态的情感和社会反馈循环。
analysis.problem: 如何建模和评估AI联合直播中主播、AI和观众三方之间的动态对齐过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出直播中的对齐是双向适应过程，任何子环的失调都可能破坏整个系统，并提出“策略性失调”作为维持社区参与的机制。
analysis.method: 提出三环框架，包含三个子环（主播↔AI、AI↔观众、主播↔观众），并引入三个关系评估构念和策略性失调机制。
contributions: 提出动态多方对齐的三环框架
引入跨环强化和策略性失调的概念
为AI联合主播提供设计启示以维持社会连贯性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架尚未经过实证验证
评估构念的具体操作化细节未给出
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出三环框架，将AI联合直播中的对齐重新概念化为主播、AI和观众之间的双向适应过程。

papers.title: Human-Guided Harm Recovery for Computer Use Agents
papers.abstract: As LM agents gain the ability to execute actions on real computer systems, we need ways to not only prevent harmful actions at scale but also effectively remediate harm when prevention fails. We formalize a solution to this neglected challenge in post-execution safeguards as harm recovery: the problem of optimally steering an agent from a harmful state back to a safe one in alignment with human preferences. We ground preference-aligned recovery through a formative user study that identifies valued recovery dimensions and produces a natural language rubric. Our dataset of 1,150 pairwise judgments reveals context-dependent shifts in attribute importance, such as preferences for pragmatic, targeted strategies over comprehensive long-term approaches. We operationalize these learned insights in a reward model, re-ranking multiple candidate recovery plans generated by an agent scaffold at test time. To evaluate recovery capabilities systematically, we introduce BackBench, a benchmark of 50 computer-use tasks that test an agent's ability to recover from harmful states. Human evaluation shows our reward model scaffold yields higher-quality recovery trajectories than base agents and rubric-based scaffolds. Together, these contributions lay the foundation for a new class of agent safety methods -- ones that confront harm not only by preventing it, but by navigating its aftermath with alignment and intent.

analysis.tldr: 提出后执行安全中的“伤害恢复”问题，通过人类偏好学习引导智能体从有害状态恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: LM智能体在真实计算机系统上执行动作时，不仅需要预防大规模有害行为，还需要在预防失败时有效修复伤害，但后执行安全中的恢复问题被长期忽视。
analysis.problem: 如何根据人类偏好，最优地将智能体从有害状态引导回安全状态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户研究揭示了恢复维度偏好的上下文依赖性，例如偏好实用、有针对性的策略而非全面的长期方法。
analysis.method: 通过形成性用户研究构建自然语言评分规则，收集1,150对成对判断训练奖励模型，在测试时对多个候选恢复计划进行重排序。
contributions: 形式化定义了后执行安全中的伤害恢复问题
构建了包含1,150对成对判断的数据集和奖励模型
提出了BackBench基准，包含50个计算机使用任务用于评估恢复能力
analysis.experiments: 人类评估表明，基于奖励模型的智能体框架比基础智能体和基于规则的框架产生更高质量的恢复轨迹。
limitations: 基准规模有限（50个任务），可能无法覆盖所有恢复场景
依赖用户研究获取偏好，可能引入标注偏差
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出后执行安全中的“伤害恢复”问题，通过人类偏好学习引导智能体从有害状态恢复。

papers.title: Multi-Domain Learning with Global Expert Mapping
papers.abstract: Human perception generalizes well across different domains, but most vision models struggle beyond their training data. This gap motivates multi-dataset learning, where a single model is trained on diverse datasets to improve robustness under domain shifts. However, unified training remains challenging due to inconsistencies in data distributions and label semantics. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models provide a scalable solution by routing inputs to specialized subnetworks (experts). Yet, existing MoEs often fail to specialize effectively, as their load-balancing mechanisms enforce uniform input distribution across experts. This fairness conflicts with domain-aware routing, causing experts to learn redundant representations, and reducing performance especially on rare or out-of-distribution domains. We propose GEM (Global Expert Mapping), a planner-compiler framework that replaces the learned router with a global scheduler. Our planner, based on linear programming relaxation, computes a fractional assignment of datasets to experts, while the compiler applies hierarchical rounding to convert this soft plan into a deterministic, capacity-aware mapping. Unlike prior MoEs, GEM avoids balancing loss, resolves the conflict between fairness and specialization, and produces interpretable routing. Experiments show that GEM-DINO achieves state-of-the-art performance on the UODB benchmark, with notable gains on underrepresented datasets and solves task interference in few-shot adaptation scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出全局专家映射（GEM）框架，通过规划器-编译器替代传统MoE路由器，解决专家负载均衡与领域专化之间的冲突，提升多域学习性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类视觉在不同领域泛化良好，但现有模型在域偏移下表现不佳；多数据集统一训练面临数据分布和标签语义不一致的挑战；混合专家模型虽可扩展，但负载均衡机制与领域感知路由冲突，导致专家学习冗余表示，尤其在稀有或分布外领域性能下降。
analysis.problem: 现有MoE模型在负载均衡与领域专化之间存在冲突，导致专家无法有效专化，影响多域学习性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有MoE的负载均衡机制强制输入均匀分布，与领域感知路由冲突，造成专家学习冗余表示，降低稀有或分布外领域性能。
analysis.method: 提出GEM（全局专家映射）框架，包含规划器和编译器：规划器基于线性规划松弛计算数据集到专家的分数分配，编译器通过分层舍入将软计划转换为确定性、容量感知的映射，避免使用平衡损失。
contributions: 提出GEM框架，用全局调度器替代传统学习路由器，解决负载均衡与专化冲突。
在UODB基准上达到SOTA，尤其在欠表示数据集和少样本适应场景中表现优异。
analysis.experiments: 在UODB基准上评估GEM-DINO，取得SOTA性能，并在欠表示数据集和少样本适应场景中显著提升。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖数据集先验信息进行规划，对动态新增数据集适应性未知。
线性规划松弛和分层舍入的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出全局专家映射（GEM）框架，通过规划器-编译器替代传统MoE路由器，解决专家负载均衡与领域专化之间的冲突，提升多域学习性能。

papers.title: One Step Forward and K Steps Back: Better Reasoning with Denoising Recursion Models
papers.abstract: Looped transformers scale computational depth without increasing parameter count by repeatedly applying a shared transformer block and can be used for iterative refinement, where each loop rewrites a full fixed-size prediction in parallel. On difficult problems, such as those that require search-like computation, reaching a highly structured solution starting from noise can require long refinement trajectories. Learning such trajectories is challenging when training specifies only the target solution and provides no supervision over the intermediate refinement path. Diffusion models tackle this issue by corrupting data with varying magnitudes of noise and training the model to reverse it in a \textit{single step}. However, this process misaligns training and testing behaviour. We introduce Denoising Recursion Models, a method that similarly corrupts data with noise but trains the model to reverse the corruption over \textit{multiple} recursive steps. This strategy provides a tractable curriculum of intermediate states, while better aligning training with testing and incentivizing non-greedy, forward-looking generation. Through extensive experiments, we show this approach outperforms the Tiny Recursion Model (TRM) on ARC-AGI, where it recently achieved breakthrough performance.

analysis.tldr: 通过多步递归去噪训练循环Transformer，提升复杂推理任务的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 循环Transformer通过重复应用共享块增加计算深度而不增加参数，适用于迭代精化任务。但长精化轨迹难以学习，因为训练仅指定目标解，缺乏中间监督。
analysis.problem: 如何有效训练循环Transformer在复杂推理任务中生成高度结构化的解，同时解决训练与测试行为不一致的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散模型通过单步去噪训练，但训练与测试行为不一致；多步递归去噪可提供中间状态课程，更好对齐训练与测试。
analysis.method: 提出Denoising Recursion Models，用不同噪声水平破坏数据，训练模型通过多个递归步骤逆转噪声，提供可学习的中间状态课程。
contributions: 提出Denoising Recursion Models，一种多步递归去噪训练方法，用于循环Transformer。
在ARC-AGI基准上超越Tiny Recursion Model (TRM)，实现突破性性能。
analysis.experiments: 在ARC-AGI基准上进行实验，与TRM对比，显示性能提升。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的推理任务。
多步递归可能增加训练和推理的计算成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过多步递归去噪训练循环Transformer，提升复杂推理任务的性能。

papers.title: Quantum inspired qubit qutrit neural networks for real time financial forecasting
papers.abstract: This research investigates the performance and efficacy of machine learning models in stock prediction, comparing Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs), Quantum Qubit-based Neural Networks (QQBNs), and Quantum Qutrit-based Neural Networks (QQTNs). By outlining methodologies, architectures, and training procedures, the study highlights significant differences in training times and performance metrics across models. While all models demonstrate robust accuracies above 70%, the Quantum Qutrit-based Neural Network consistently outperforms with advantages in risk-adjusted returns, measured by the Sharpe ratio, greater consistency in prediction quality through the Information Coefficient, and enhanced robustness under varying market conditions. The QQTN not only surpasses its classical and qubit-based counterparts in multiple quantitative and qualitative metrics but also achieves comparable performance with significantly reduced training times. These results showcase the promising prospects of Quantum Qutrit-based Neural Networks in practical financial applications, where real-time processing is critical. By achieving superior accuracy, efficiency, and adaptability, the proposed models underscore the transformative potential of quantum-inspired approaches, paving the way for their integration into computationally intensive fields.

analysis.tldr: 量子三态神经网络在金融预测中比经典和量子比特网络更快、更鲁棒。
analysis.research_motivation: 金融预测需要高精度和实时处理，经典模型训练慢，量子启发模型有潜力提升效率。
analysis.problem: 如何设计量子启发神经网络以实现更快训练和更优金融预测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 量子三态网络在夏普比率、信息系数和鲁棒性上优于经典和量子比特网络，且训练时间显著减少。
analysis.method: 提出量子三态神经网络（QQTN），利用三态量子位（qutrit）代替经典或量子比特神经元。
contributions: 首次将量子三态神经网络应用于金融预测，并展示其优势。
实验证明QQTN在训练速度和风险调整收益上优于经典和量子比特网络。
analysis.experiments: 在股票预测任务上比较ANN、QQBN和QQTN，所有模型准确率>70%，QQTN在夏普比率和信息系数上最优，训练时间更短。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型在更广泛金融场景或极端市场下的表现。
未讨论量子三态网络的理论可扩展性或硬件实现细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 量子三态神经网络在金融预测中比经典和量子比特网络更快、更鲁棒。

papers.title: Semantic Needles in Document Haystacks: Sensitivity Testing of LLM-as-a-Judge Similarity Scoring
papers.abstract: We propose a scalable, multifactorial experimental framework that systematically probes LLM sensitivity to subtle semantic changes in pairwise document comparison. We analogize this as a needle-in-a-haystack problem: a single semantically altered sentence (the needle) is embedded within surrounding context (the hay), and we vary the perturbation type (negation, conjunction swap, named entity replacement), context type (original vs. topically unrelated), needle position, and document length across all combinations, testing five LLMs on tens of thousands of document pairs. Our analysis reveals several striking findings. First, LLMs exhibit a within-document positional bias distinct from previously studied candidate-order effects: most models penalize semantic differences more harshly when they occur earlier in a document. Second, when the altered sentence is surrounded by topically unrelated context, it systematically lowers similarity scores and induces bipolarized scores that indicate either very low or very high similarity. This is consistent with an interpretive frame account in which topically-related context may allow models to contextualize and downweight the alterations. Third, each LLM produces a qualitatively distinct scoring distribution, a stable "fingerprint" that is invariant to perturbation type, yet all models share a universal hierarchy in how leniently they treat different perturbation types. Together, these results demonstrate that LLM semantic similarity scores are sensitive to document structure, context coherence, and model identity in ways that go beyond the semantic change itself, and that the proposed framework offers a practical, LLM-agnostic toolkit for auditing and comparing scoring behavior across current and future models.

analysis.tldr: 提出多因素实验框架系统测试LLM在文档比较中对细微语义变化的敏感性，发现位置偏差、上下文影响和模型指纹等规律。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM作为评估器（LLM-as-a-judge）在文档相似性评分中广泛应用，但其对文档结构、上下文等非语义因素的敏感性尚未被系统研究，可能导致评分不可靠。
analysis.problem: 系统评估LLM在成对文档比较中对细微语义变化的敏感性，并揭示影响评分的非语义因素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现LLM存在文档内位置偏差（早期变化惩罚更重）、上下文无关内容导致分数两极分化、每个模型有独特评分分布指纹，但所有模型对扰动类型的宽容度排序一致。
analysis.method: 提出可扩展的多因素实验框架，将单个语义改变的句子（针）嵌入上下文（草堆），变化扰动类型、上下文类型、针位置和文档长度，测试五个LLM在数万文档对上的表现。
contributions: 揭示LLM在文档比较中的位置偏差和上下文影响等新现象
提出一个LLM无关的审计工具包，用于比较不同模型的评分行为
analysis.experiments: 在五个LLM上测试了数万文档对，覆盖多种扰动类型、上下文类型、位置和长度组合。
limitations: 仅测试了五个LLM，可能不具完全代表性
未涉及真实应用场景中的长文档或复杂语义变化
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多因素实验框架系统测试LLM在文档比较中对细微语义变化的敏感性，发现位置偏差、上下文影响和模型指纹等规律。

papers.title: Feasibility of Indoor Frame-Wise Lidar Semantic Segmentation via Distillation from Visual Foundation Model
papers.abstract: Frame-wise semantic segmentation of indoor lidar scans is a fundamental step toward higher-level 3D scene understanding and mapping applications. However, acquiring frame-wise ground truth for training deep learning models is costly and time-consuming. This challenge is largely addressed, for imagery, by Visual Foundation Models (VFMs) which segment image frames. The same VFMs may be used to train a lidar scan frame segmentation model via a 2D-to-3D distillation pipeline. The success of such distillation has been shown for autonomous driving scenes, but not yet for indoor scenes. Here, we study the feasibility of repeating this success for indoor scenes, in a frame-wise distillation manner by coupling each lidar scan with a VFM-processed camera image. The evaluation is done using indoor SLAM datasets, where pseudo-labels are used for downstream evaluation. Also, a small manually annotated lidar dataset is provided for validation, as there are no other lidar frame-wise indoor datasets with semantics. Results show that the distilled model achieves up to 56% mIoU under pseudo-label evaluation and around 36% mIoU with real-label, demonstrating the feasibility of cross-modal distillation for indoor lidar semantic segmentation without manual annotations.

analysis.tldr: 利用视觉基础模型通过2D到3D蒸馏实现室内LiDAR逐帧语义分割，无需人工标注。
analysis.research_motivation: 室内LiDAR逐帧语义分割是3D场景理解的基础，但获取逐帧标注成本高昂，而视觉基础模型（VFM）已能高效分割图像帧，因此探索将VFM知识蒸馏到LiDAR模型的方法具有重要应用价值。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有逐帧人工标注的情况下，实现室内LiDAR扫描的逐帧语义分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种2D到3D蒸馏流程：将每个LiDAR扫描与对应的VFM处理过的相机图像配对，通过蒸馏训练LiDAR逐帧分割模型。
contributions: 首次验证了跨模态蒸馏在室内场景中实现LiDAR逐帧语义分割的可行性。
提供了一个小规模人工标注的室内LiDAR语义分割数据集用于验证。
analysis.experiments: 在室内SLAM数据集上评估，使用伪标签和真实标签进行验证。蒸馏模型在伪标签评估下达到56% mIoU，在真实标签下达到约36% mIoU。
limitations: 真实标签下的mIoU较低（36%），表明蒸馏质量有限。
仅验证了室内场景，未扩展到其他环境。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用视觉基础模型通过2D到3D蒸馏实现室内LiDAR逐帧语义分割，无需人工标注。

papers.title: DUALVISION: RGB-Infrared Multimodal Large Language Models for Robust Visual Reasoning
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved impressive performance on visual perception and reasoning tasks with RGB imagery, yet they remain fragile under common degradations, such as fog, blur, or low-light conditions. Infrared (IR) imaging, a well-established complement to RGB, offers inherent robustness in these conditions, but its integration into MLLMs remains underexplored. To bridge this gap, we propose DUALVISION, a lightweight fusion module that efficiently incorporates IR-RGB information into MLLMs via patch-level localized cross-attention. To support training and evaluation and to facilitate future research, we also introduce DV-204K, a dataset of ~25K publicly available aligned IR-RGB image pairs with 204K modality-specific QA annotations, and DV-500, a benchmark of 500 IR-RGB image pairs with 500 QA pairs designed for evaluating cross-modal reasoning. Leveraging these datasets, we benchmark both open- and closed-source MLLMs and demonstrate that DUALVISION delivers strong empirical performance under a wide range of visual degradations. Our code and dataset are available at https://abrarmajeedi.github.io/dualvision.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级融合模块DUALVISION，将红外信息融入多模态大模型，提升在退化条件下的视觉推理鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM在RGB图像上表现优异，但在雾、模糊、低光等退化条件下脆弱；红外成像天然鲁棒，但尚未被有效整合到MLLM中。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地将红外-可见光信息融合到MLLM中，以增强其在退化条件下的视觉推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出轻量级融合模块DUALVISION，通过patch级局部交叉注意力机制将红外-可见光信息融入MLLM。
contributions: 提出DUALVISION，一种轻量级红外-可见光融合模块，通过patch级局部交叉注意力提升MLLM在退化条件下的鲁棒性。
构建DV-204K数据集（约25K对齐IR-RGB图像对，204K模态特定QA标注）和DV-500基准（500对图像，500 QA对），用于训练和评估跨模态推理。
analysis.experiments: 在多种视觉退化条件下（如雾、模糊、低光）对开源和闭源MLLM进行基准测试，DUALVISION表现出强实证性能。
limitations: 可能仅在特定退化条件下有效，泛化性需进一步验证。
数据集规模有限，可能不足以覆盖所有真实场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级融合模块DUALVISION，将红外信息融入多模态大模型，提升在退化条件下的视觉推理鲁棒性。

papers.title: OmniMouse: Scaling properties of multi-modal, multi-task Brain Models on 150B Neural Tokens
papers.abstract: Scaling data and artificial neural networks has transformed AI, driving breakthroughs in language and vision. Whether similar principles apply to modeling brain activity remains unclear. Here we leveraged a dataset of 3.1 million neurons from the visual cortex of 73 mice across 323 sessions, totaling more than 150 billion neural tokens recorded during natural movies, images and parametric stimuli, and behavior. We train multi-modal, multi-task models that support three regimes flexibly at test time: neural prediction, behavioral decoding, neural forecasting, or any combination of the three. OmniMouse achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming specialized baselines across nearly all evaluation regimes. We find that performance scales reliably with more data, but gains from increasing model size saturate. This inverts the standard AI scaling story: in language and computer vision, massive datasets make parameter scaling the primary driver of progress, whereas in brain modeling -- even in the mouse visual cortex, a relatively simple system -- models remain data-limited despite vast recordings. The observation of systematic scaling raises the possibility of phase transitions in neural modeling, where larger and richer datasets might unlock qualitatively new capabilities, paralleling the emergent properties seen in large language models. Code available at https://github.com/enigma-brain/omnimouse.

analysis.tldr: OmniMouse 在 150B 神经 token 上训练多模态多任务脑模型，发现性能随数据量提升但模型规模收益饱和，与 AI 缩放定律相反。
analysis.research_motivation: AI 中数据与模型规模缩放已推动语言和视觉突破，但类似原则是否适用于脑活动建模尚不清楚，现有研究缺乏大规模系统性验证。
analysis.problem: 探究脑活动建模中数据量和模型规模对性能的缩放规律，并构建统一的多模态多任务模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 性能随数据量增加可靠提升，但增大模型规模带来的收益会饱和，这与语言和视觉中数据驱动参数缩放主导进步的规律相反，表明脑建模仍受限于数据。
analysis.method: 基于 3.1M 神经元、150B 神经 token 数据集，训练多模态多任务模型，支持神经预测、行为解码、神经预测或其任意组合的灵活测试。
contributions: 构建了大规模小鼠视觉皮层数据集（3.1M 神经元，150B token），并训练多模态多任务模型 OmniMouse。
发现脑建模中数据缩放有效但模型规模缩放收益饱和，揭示了与 AI 标准缩放定律的差异。
analysis.experiments: 在多种刺激（自然电影、图像、参数化刺激和行为）下评估，OmniMouse 在几乎所有评估场景中超越专用基线，达到 SOTA。
limitations: 仅针对小鼠视觉皮层，可能不适用于其他脑区或物种。
模型规模收益饱和的具体原因未深入分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OmniMouse 在 150B 神经 token 上训练多模态多任务脑模型，发现性能随数据量提升但模型规模收益饱和，与 AI 缩放定律相反。

papers.title: Curvature-Aware PCA with Geodesic Tangent Space Aggregation for Semi-Supervised Learning
papers.abstract: Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is a fundamental tool for representation learning, but its global linear formulation fails to capture the structure of data supported on curved manifolds. In contrast, manifold learning methods model nonlinearity but often sacrifice the spectral structure and stability of PCA. We propose \emph{Geodesic Tangent Space Aggregation PCA (GTSA-PCA)}, a geometric extension of PCA that integrates curvature awareness and geodesic consistency within a unified spectral framework. Our approach replaces the global covariance operator with curvature-weighted local covariance operators defined over a $k$-nearest neighbor graph, yielding local tangent subspaces that adapt to the manifold while suppressing high-curvature distortions. We then introduce a geodesic alignment operator that combines intrinsic graph distances with subspace affinities to globally synchronize these local representations. The resulting operator admits a spectral decomposition whose leading components define a geometry-aware embedding. We further incorporate semi-supervised information to guide the alignment, improving discriminative structure with minimal supervision. Experiments on real datasets show consistent improvements over PCA, Kernel PCA, Supervised PCA and strong graph-based baselines such as UMAP, particularly in small sample size and high-curvature regimes. Our results position GTSA-PCA as a principled bridge between statistical and geometric approaches to dimensionality reduction.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种曲率感知的PCA扩展，通过测地切线空间聚合实现半监督降维。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统PCA假设数据全局线性，无法处理流形上的曲率结构；流形学习方法虽能建模非线性，但牺牲了PCA的谱结构和稳定性。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持PCA谱分解优势的同时，融入流形曲率信息，并利用少量监督信号提升降维的判别性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在k近邻图上定义曲率加权的局部协方差算子，得到局部切子空间；再通过测地对齐算子（结合图距离与子空间亲和度）全局同步这些局部表示，最终谱分解得到几何感知嵌入；并融入半监督信息引导对齐。
contributions: 提出GTSA-PCA，将曲率感知与测地一致性统一在谱框架中。
引入半监督信息引导对齐，提升小样本和高曲率场景下的判别性。
analysis.experiments: 在真实数据集上，与PCA、Kernel PCA、Supervised PCA及UMAP等基线相比，GTSA-PCA在小样本和高曲率场景下表现一致更优。
limitations: 可能对k近邻图的构建参数敏感。
半监督信息利用方式可能依赖标签质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种曲率感知的PCA扩展，通过测地切线空间聚合实现半监督降维。

papers.title: Discriminative-Generative Synergy for Occlusion Robust 3D Human Mesh Recovery
papers.abstract: 3D human mesh recovery from monocular RGB images aims to estimate anatomically plausible 3D human models for downstream applications, but remains challenging under partial or severe occlusions. Regression-based methods are efficient yet often produce implausible or inaccurate results in unconstrained scenarios, while diffusion-based methods provide strong generative priors for occluded regions but may weaken fidelity to rare poses due to over-reliance on generation. To address these limitations, we propose a brain-inspired synergistic framework that integrates the discriminative power of vision transformers with the generative capability of conditional diffusion models. Specifically, the ViT-based pathway extracts deterministic visual cues from visible regions, while the diffusion-based pathway synthesizes structurally coherent human body representations. To effectively bridge the two pathways, we design a diverse-consistent feature learning module to align discriminative features with generative priors, and a cross-attention multi-level fusion mechanism to enable bidirectional interaction across semantic levels. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance on key metrics and shows strong robustness in complex real-world scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种融合判别式ViT与生成式扩散模型的框架，提升遮挡场景下3D人体网格恢复的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 单目RGB图像中的3D人体网格恢复在严重遮挡下效果差，回归方法效率高但结果不准确，扩散方法生成能力强但可能偏离罕见姿态的真实性。
analysis.problem: 解决部分或严重遮挡下3D人体网格恢复的准确性和鲁棒性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 回归方法在无约束场景下产生不合理或不准确结果；扩散方法过度依赖生成先验，削弱对罕见姿态的保真度。
analysis.method: 提出脑启发协同框架，包含ViT路径提取确定性视觉线索、扩散路径生成结构一致的人体表示，以及多样一致特征学习模块和跨注意力多级融合机制。
contributions: 提出判别-生成协同框架，结合ViT和扩散模型的优势。
设计多样一致特征学习模块和跨注意力多级融合机制，实现双向交互。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上取得关键指标优越性能，在复杂真实场景中表现出强鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模训练数据。
推理速度可能受扩散模型影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种融合判别式ViT与生成式扩散模型的框架，提升遮挡场景下3D人体网格恢复的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Rethinking Dataset Distillation: Hard Truths about Soft Labels
papers.abstract: Despite the perceived success of large-scale dataset distillation (DD) methods, recent evidence finds that simple random image baselines perform on-par with state-of-theart DD methods like SRe2L due to the use of soft labels during downstream model training. This is in contrast with the findings in coreset literature, where high-quality coresets consistently outperform random subsets in the hardlabel (HL) setting. To understand this discrepancy, we perform a detailed scalability analysis to examine the role of data quality under different label regimes, ranging from abundant soft labels (termed as SL+KD regime) to fixed soft labels (SL) and hard labels (HL). Our analysis reveals that high-quality coresets fail to convincingly outperform the random baseline in both SL and SL+KD regimes. In the SL+KD setting, performance further approaches nearoptimal levels relative to the full dataset, regardless of subset size or quality, for a given compute budget. This performance saturation calls into question the widespread practice of using soft labels for model evaluation, where unlike the HL setting, subset quality has negligible influence. A subsequent systematic evaluation of five large-scale and four small-scale DD methods in the HL setting reveals that only RDED reliably outperforms random baselines on ImageNet-1K, but can still lag behind strong coreset methods due to its over-reliance on easy sample patches. Based on this, we introduce CAD-Prune, a compute-aware pruning metric that efficiently identifies samples of optimal difficulty for a given compute budget, and use it to develop CA2D, a compute-aligned DD method, outperforming current DD methods on ImageNet-1K at various IPC settings. Together, our findings uncover many insights into current DD research and establish useful tools to advance dataefficient learning for both coresets and DD.

analysis.tldr: 数据集蒸馏中软标签导致性能饱和，硬标签下只有RDED和CA2D可靠地优于随机基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模数据集蒸馏方法在软标签设置下与随机基线性能相当，这与核心集文献中高质量子集优于随机子集的结论矛盾，需要探究原因并改进。
analysis.problem: 理解软标签和硬标签设置下数据集蒸馏与核心集方法的性能差异，并开发在硬标签下可靠优于随机基线的方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 软标签（SL和SL+KD）设置下，高质量核心集无法稳定优于随机基线，且SL+KD中性能接近全数据集最优，子集质量影响可忽略；硬标签（HL）下，仅RDED可靠优于随机基线，但因其过度依赖简单样本而落后于强核心集方法。
analysis.method: 提出计算感知剪枝指标CAD-Prune，用于在给定计算预算下识别最优难度的样本，并基于此开发计算对齐的数据集蒸馏方法CA2D。
contributions: 揭示了软标签设置下数据集蒸馏性能饱和现象，质疑了广泛使用的软标签评估实践。
提出了CAD-Prune指标和CA2D方法，在硬标签设置下优于现有数据集蒸馏方法。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-1K上对五种大规模和四种小规模数据集蒸馏方法进行了系统评估，并在不同IPC设置下比较了CA2D与现有方法。
limitations: CA2D可能仍依赖特定计算预算假设，泛化性需进一步验证。
未在更多数据集或更大规模上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 数据集蒸馏中软标签导致性能饱和，硬标签下只有RDED和CA2D可靠地优于随机基线。

papers.title: AI scientists produce results without reasoning scientifically
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based systems are increasingly deployed to conduct scientific research autonomously, yet whether their reasoning adheres to the epistemic norms that make scientific inquiry self-correcting is poorly understood. Here, we evaluate LLM-based scientific agents across eight domains, spanning workflow execution to hypothesis-driven inquiry, through more than 25,000 agent runs and two complementary lenses: (i) a systematic performance analysis that decomposes the contributions of the base model and the agent scaffold, and (ii) a behavioral analysis of the epistemological structure of agent reasoning. We observe that the base model is the primary determinant of both performance and behavior, accounting for 41.4% of explained variance versus 1.5% for the scaffold. Across all configurations, evidence is ignored in 68% of traces, refutation-driven belief revision occurs in 26%, and convergent multi-test evidence is rare. The same reasoning pattern appears whether the agent executes a computational workflow or conducts hypothesis-driven inquiry. They persist even when agents receive near-complete successful reasoning trajectories as context, and the resulting unreliability compounds across repeated trials in epistemically demanding domains. Thus, current LLM-based agents execute scientific workflows but do not exhibit the epistemic patterns that characterize scientific reasoning. Outcome-based evaluation cannot detect these failures, and scaffold engineering alone cannot repair them. Until reasoning itself becomes a training target, the scientific knowledge produced by such agents cannot be justified by the process that generated it.

analysis.tldr: LLM科学智能体在68%的轨迹中忽略证据，缺乏科学推理的认知结构，且仅靠工程改进无法修复。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM自主科研系统日益普及，但其推理是否符合科学认知规范尚不清楚，现有评估仅关注任务完成度而忽略推理过程。
analysis.problem: LLM科学智能体是否遵循科学推理的认知规范（如证据整合、反驳驱动修正）？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：证据被忽略占68%，反驳驱动的信念修正仅26%，汇聚性多测试证据罕见；基座模型贡献41.4%方差而脚手架仅1.5%；即使提供完整推理轨迹，问题依然存在。
analysis.method: 通过超过25,000次智能体运行，在8个领域进行系统性性能分析（分解基座模型与脚手架贡献）和认知结构行为分析。
contributions: 揭示了LLM科学智能体普遍缺乏科学推理的认知结构，证据忽略是系统性问题。
证明了基座模型是行为和性能的主要决定因素，脚手架工程无法修复推理缺陷。
提出应将推理本身作为训练目标，否则科学知识无法通过过程辩护。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及超过25,000次智能体运行和8个领域。
limitations: 可能仅评估了特定LLM和脚手架配置，泛化性需验证。
未提供具体领域和任务细节，难以复现。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM科学智能体在68%的轨迹中忽略证据，缺乏科学推理的认知结构，且仅靠工程改进无法修复。

papers.title: Geometric Decoupling: Diagnosing the Structural Instability of Latent
papers.abstract: Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs) achieve high-fidelity synthesis but suffer from latent space brittleness, causing discontinuous semantic jumps during editing. We introduce a Riemannian framework to diagnose this instability by analyzing the generative Jacobian, decomposing geometry into \textit{Local Scaling} (capacity) and \textit{Local Complexity} (curvature). Our study uncovers a \textbf{``Geometric Decoupling"}: while curvature in normal generation functionally encodes image detail, OOD generation exhibits a functional decoupling where extreme curvature is wasted on unstable semantic boundaries rather than perceptible details. This geometric misallocation identifies ``Geometric Hotspots" as the structural root of instability, providing a robust intrinsic metric for diagnosing generative reliability.

analysis.tldr: 提出黎曼几何框架诊断潜空间不稳定性，发现几何解耦现象并定位结构根源。
analysis.research_motivation: 潜扩散模型虽能高质量合成，但潜空间脆弱性导致编辑时语义跳跃，缺乏诊断不稳定性的理论工具。
analysis.problem: 潜扩散模型中潜空间的结构不稳定性及其根源。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现几何解耦：正常生成时曲率编码图像细节，而OOD生成时曲率浪费在不稳定语义边界上，形成几何错配。
analysis.method: 引入黎曼几何框架，通过生成雅可比矩阵分解为局部缩放（容量）和局部复杂度（曲率），识别几何热点作为不稳定性根源。
contributions: 提出诊断潜空间不稳定性的黎曼几何框架
发现几何解耦现象并定位几何热点为结构根因
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定LDM架构
未提供定量评估指标
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出黎曼几何框架诊断潜空间不稳定性，发现几何解耦现象并定位结构根源。

papers.title: LLM-as-Judge Framework for Evaluating Tone-Induced Hallucination in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed in settings where reliable visual grounding carries operational consequences, yet their behavior under progressively coercive prompt phrasing remains undercharacterized. Existing hallucination benchmarks predominantly rely on neutral prompts and binary detection, leaving open how both the incidence and the intensity of fabrication respond to graded linguistic pressure across structurally distinct task types. We present Ghost-100, a procedurally constructed benchmark of 800 synthetically generated images spanning eight categories across three task families: text-illegibility, time-reading, and object-absence, each designed under a negative-ground-truth principle that guarantees the queried target is absent, illegible, or indeterminate by construction. Every image is paired with five prompts drawn from a structured 5-Level Prompt Intensity Framework, holding the image and task identity fixed while varying only directive force, so that tone is isolated as the sole independent variable. We adopt a dual-track evaluation protocol: a rule-based H-Rate measuring the proportion of responses in which a model crosses from grounded refusal into unsupported positive commitment, and a GPT-4o-mini-judged H-Score on a 1-5 scale characterizing the confidence and specificity of fabrication once it occurs. We additionally release a three-stage automated validation workflow, which retrospectively confirms 717 of 800 images as strictly compliant.
