Evaluating nine open-weight VLMs, we find that H-Rate and H-Score dissociate substantially across model families, reading-style and presence-detection subsets respond to prompt pressure in qualitatively different ways, and several models exhibit non-monotonic sensitivity peaking at intermediate tone levels: patterns that aggregate metrics obscure.

analysis.tldr: 提出Ghost-100基准和5级提示强度框架，系统评估VLM在渐进式胁迫提示下的幻觉行为，发现不同模型和任务对提示压力的响应模式存在显著差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有幻觉基准多使用中性提示和二元检测，忽略了提示语气（如胁迫性）对VLM幻觉发生率和强度的梯度影响，而实际部署中提示可能具有不同强度的指令性。
analysis.problem: 如何系统量化VLM在不同强度胁迫性提示下的幻觉行为，包括幻觉发生率和虚构置信度/具体性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：H-Rate和H-Score在不同模型家族间解耦；阅读风格和存在性检测子集对提示压力的响应方式定性不同；部分模型在中等语气水平表现出非单调敏感性峰值，这些模式被聚合指标掩盖。
analysis.method: 构建Ghost-100基准（800张合成图像，8个类别，3个任务族，负真值原则），配合5级提示强度框架（固定图像和任务，仅改变指令力度），采用双轨评估协议：基于规则的H-Rate（测量从有根据拒绝到无根据肯定承诺的比例）和GPT-4o-mini评判的H-Score（1-5分，表征虚构的置信度和具体性），并发布三阶段自动验证流程。
contributions: 提出Ghost-100基准，包含800张合成图像和5级提示强度框架，用于系统评估VLM在胁迫性提示下的幻觉。
引入双轨评估协议（H-Rate和H-Score），分别量化幻觉发生率和虚构强度。
通过评估9个开源VLM，揭示不同模型和任务对提示压力的差异化响应模式，包括非单调敏感性。
analysis.experiments: 在9个开源VLM上评估，发现H-Rate和H-Score解耦、任务子集响应差异、非单调敏感性等模式。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅使用合成图像，可能无法完全代表真实世界分布。
仅评估开源VLM，未涵盖闭源模型。
H-Score依赖GPT-4o-mini评判，可能存在自动评估偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Ghost-100基准和5级提示强度框架，系统评估VLM在渐进式胁迫提示下的幻觉行为，发现不同模型和任务对提示压力的响应模式存在显著差异。

papers.title: CrossPan: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Cross-Sequence Pancreas MRI Segmentation and Generalization
papers.abstract: Automatic pancreas segmentation is fundamental to abdominal MRI analysis, yet deep learning models trained on one MRI sequence often fail catastrophically when applied to another-a challenge that has received little systematic investigation. We introduce CrossPan, a multi-institutional benchmark comprising 1,386 3D scans across three routinely acquired sequences (T1-weighted, T2-weighted, and Out-of-Phase) from eight centers. Our experiments reveal three key findings. First, cross-sequence domain shifts are far more severe than cross-center variability: models achieving Dice scores above 0.85 in-domain collapse to near-zero (<0.02) when transferred across sequences. Second, state-of-the-art domain generalization methods provide negligible benefit under these physics-driven contrast inversions, whereas foundation models like MedSAM2 maintain moderate zero-shot performance through contrast-invariant shape priors. Third, semi-supervised learning offers gains only under stable intensity distributions and becomes unstable on sequences with high intra-organ variability. These results establish cross-sequence generalization-not model architecture or center diversity-as the primary barrier to clinically deployable pancreas MRI segmentation. Dataset and code are available at https://crosspan.netlify.app/.

analysis.tldr: CrossPan 基准揭示跨序列胰腺 MRI 分割中，序列间域偏移比跨中心变异更严重，现有域泛化方法几乎无效，而基础模型因形状先验保持一定零样本性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 胰腺 MRI 分割中，深度学习模型在不同 MRI 序列间泛化失败的问题缺乏系统研究，阻碍临床部署。
analysis.problem: 解决跨序列胰腺 MRI 分割中的域偏移问题，量化其严重性并评估现有方法的有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 跨序列域偏移远大于跨中心变异；域内 Dice >0.85 的模型跨序列后几乎失效（<0.02）；域泛化方法无效，基础模型 MedSAM2 因对比不变形状先验保持中等零样本性能；半监督学习仅在稳定强度分布下有效。
analysis.method: 构建包含 1,386 个 3D 扫描（T1、T2、Out-of-Phase 序列）的多机构基准，系统评估域内、跨序列和域泛化方法。
contributions: 提出 CrossPan 基准，包含 1,386 个 3D 扫描，覆盖三个常规序列和八个中心。
揭示跨序列域偏移是临床部署的主要障碍，并量化其严重性。
评估现有域泛化、基础模型和半监督学习方法，发现基础模型因形状先验具有优势。
analysis.experiments: 在 1,386 个 3D 扫描上进行了域内、跨序列和域泛化实验，报告了 Dice 分数等指标。
limitations: 仅针对胰腺 MRI，可能不适用于其他器官或模态。
未探索更复杂的域适应或数据增强策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CrossPan 基准揭示跨序列胰腺 MRI 分割中，序列间域偏移比跨中心变异更严重，现有域泛化方法几乎无效，而基础模型因形状先验保持一定零样本性能。

papers.title: HELM: Harness-Enhanced Long-horizon Memory for Vision-Language-Action Manipulation
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models fail systematically on long-horizon manipulation tasks despite strong short-horizon performance. We show that this failure is not resolved by extending context length alone in the current reactive execution setting; instead, it stems from three recurring execution-loop deficiencies: the memory gap, the verification gap, and the recovery gap. We present HELM, a model-agnostic framework that addresses these deficiencies with three components: an Episodic Memory Module (EMM) that retrieves key task history via CLIP-indexed keyframes, a learned State Verifier (SV) that predicts action failure before execution from observation, action, subgoal, and memory-conditioned context, and a Harness Controller (HC) that performs rollback and replanning. The SV is the core learning contribution: it consistently outperforms rule-based feasibility checks and ensemble uncertainty baselines, and its effectiveness depends critically on access to episodic memory. On LIBERO-LONG, HELM improves task success rate by 23.1 percentage points over OpenVLA (58.4% to 81.5%), while extending the context window to H=32 yields only a 5.4-point gain and same-budget LoRA adaptation remains 12.2 points below HELM. HELM also improves long-horizon performance on CALVIN and substantially boosts recovery success under controlled perturbations. Ablations and mechanism analyses isolate the contribution of each component, and we release LIBERO-Recovery as a perturbation-injection protocol for evaluating failure recovery in long-horizon manipulation.

analysis.tldr: HELM通过记忆、验证和恢复三模块框架解决VLA模型在长时程操作任务中的系统性失败。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA模型在短时程任务上表现良好，但在长时程操作中系统性失败，且单纯扩展上下文窗口无法解决，需要针对执行循环缺陷设计专用机制。
analysis.problem: VLA模型在长时程操作任务中因记忆缺口、验证缺口和恢复缺口导致执行失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出VLA模型在长时程任务中失败并非仅因上下文长度不足，而是源于三个执行循环缺陷：记忆缺口（历史信息丢失）、验证缺口（无法提前预测失败）和恢复缺口（失败后无法恢复）。
analysis.method: HELM框架包含三个组件：Episodic Memory Module (EMM) 通过CLIP索引关键帧检索任务历史；State Verifier (SV) 基于观测、动作、子目标和记忆条件预测动作失败；Harness Controller (HC) 执行回滚和重规划。
contributions: 提出HELM框架，通过记忆、验证和恢复三模块解决VLA长时程操作中的系统性失败
验证State Verifier依赖记忆访问的有效性，并超越规则基和集成不确定性基线
在LIBERO-LONG上提升23.1个百分点，并发布LIBERO-Recovery扰动注入协议
analysis.experiments: 在LIBERO-LONG上，HELM将OpenVLA的成功率从58.4%提升至81.5%，而扩展上下文窗口至H=32仅提升5.4个百分点，同预算LoRA适配仍低12.2个百分点。在CALVIN上提升长时程性能，并在受控扰动下显著提升恢复成功率。
limitations: 可能依赖CLIP索引质量，对视觉变化敏感
State Verifier的泛化性可能受限于训练数据分布
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HELM通过记忆、验证和恢复三模块框架解决VLA模型在长时程操作任务中的系统性失败。

papers.title: EfficientPENet: Real-Time Depth Completion from Sparse LiDAR via Lightweight Multi-Modal Fusion
papers.abstract: Depth completion from sparse LiDAR measurements and corresponding RGB images is a prerequisite for accurate 3D perception in robotic systems. Existing methods achieve high accuracy on standard benchmarks but rely on heavy backbone architectures that preclude real-time deployment on embedded hardware. We present EfficientPENet, a two-branch depth completion network that replaces the conventional ResNet encoder with a modernized ConvNeXt backbone, introduces sparsity-invariant convolutions for the depth stream, and refines predictions through a Convolutional Spatial Propagation Network (CSPN). The RGB branch leverages ImageNet-pretrained ConvNeXt blocks with Layer Normalization, 7x7 depthwise convolutions, and stochastic depth regularization. Features from both branches are merged via late fusion and decoded through a multi-scale deep supervision strategy. We further introduce a position-aware test-time augmentation scheme that corrects coordinate tensors during horizontal flipping, yielding consistent error reduction at inference. On the KITTI depth completion benchmark, EfficientPENet achieves an RMSE of 631.94 mm with 36.24M parameters and a latency of 20.51 ms, operating at 48.76 FPS. This represents a 3.7 times reduction in parameters and a 23 times speedup relative to BP-Net, while maintaining competitive accuracy. These results establish EfficientPENet as a practical solution for real-time depth completion on resource-constrained edge platforms such as the NVIDIA Jetson.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级双分支深度补全网络，在KITTI上以36.24M参数和48.76 FPS实现实时深度补全。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度补全方法精度高但模型庞大，无法在嵌入式设备上实时部署，限制了机器人等实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持高精度深度补全的同时，大幅降低模型参数量和计算延迟，使其能在资源受限的边缘平台实时运行。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用ConvNeXt骨干替代ResNet，深度流使用稀疏不变卷积，RGB流使用ImageNet预训练ConvNeXt块，通过CSPN细化预测，多尺度深度监督解码，以及位置感知测试时增强。
contributions: 提出EfficientPENet，一种轻量级双分支深度补全网络，使用ConvNeXt骨干和稀疏不变卷积。
引入位置感知测试时增强，在水平翻转时校正坐标张量，一致降低推理误差。
在KITTI基准上实现参数减少3.7倍、速度提升23倍，同时保持竞争精度。
analysis.experiments: 在KITTI深度补全基准上评估，RMSE为631.94 mm，参数量36.24M，延迟20.51 ms，帧率48.76 FPS。
limitations: 仅在KITTI数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未与其他轻量级方法在更多边缘设备上比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级双分支深度补全网络，在KITTI上以36.24M参数和48.76 FPS实现实时深度补全。

papers.title: ARES: Adaptive Red-Teaming and End-to-End Repair of Policy-Reward System
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) is central to aligning Large Language Models (LLMs), yet it introduces a critical vulnerability: an imperfect Reward Model (RM) can become a single point of failure when it fails to penalize unsafe behaviors. While existing red-teaming approaches primarily target policy-level weaknesses, they overlook what we term systemic weaknesses cases where both the core LLM and the RM fail in tandem. We present ARES, a framework that systematically discovers and mitigates such dual vulnerabilities. ARES employs a ``Safety Mentor'' that dynamically composes semantically coherent adversarial prompts by combining structured component types (topics, personas, tactics, goals) and generates corresponding malicious and safe responses. This dual-targeting approach exposes weaknesses in both the core LLM and the RM simultaneously. Using the vulnerabilities gained, ARES implements a two-stage repair process: first fine-tuning the RM to better detect harmful content, then leveraging the improved RM to optimize the core model. Experiments across multiple adversarial safety benchmarks demonstrate that ARES substantially enhances safety robustness while preserving model capabilities, establishing a new paradigm for comprehensive RLHF safety alignment.

analysis.tldr: ARES通过系统性发现并修复策略模型与奖励模型的共同漏洞，显著提升RLHF安全对齐的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: RLHF中奖励模型的不完美可能成为安全漏洞的单点故障，现有红队方法仅关注策略层弱点，忽视了策略与奖励模型同时失效的系统性风险。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地发现并修复LLM策略模型与奖励模型共同存在的安全漏洞。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出存在系统性弱点，即核心LLM和奖励模型同时失效的情况，现有方法无法覆盖。
analysis.method: ARES框架：1) 使用安全导师动态组合主题、角色、策略、目标等组件生成对抗提示，同时攻击策略和奖励模型；2) 两阶段修复：先微调奖励模型以更好检测有害内容，再利用改进的奖励模型优化核心模型。
contributions: 提出系统性发现策略与奖励模型双重漏洞的框架ARES
设计两阶段修复流程，先修复奖励模型再优化策略模型
analysis.experiments: 在多个对抗性安全基准上验证，ARES显著增强安全鲁棒性同时保持模型能力。
limitations: 可能依赖安全导师的组件类型设计，泛化性需进一步验证
两阶段修复的计算开销可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ARES通过系统性发现并修复策略模型与奖励模型的共同漏洞，显著提升RLHF安全对齐的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Experiments or Outcomes? Probing Scientific Feasibility in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Scientific feasibility assessment asks whether a claim is consistent with established knowledge and whether experimental evidence could support or refute it. We frame feasibility assessment as a diagnostic reasoning task in which, given a hypothesis, a model predicts feasible or infeasible and justifies its decision. We evaluate large language models (LLMs) under controlled knowledge conditions (hypothesis-only, with experiments, with outcomes, or both) and probe robustness by progressively removing portions of the experimental and/or outcome context. Across multiple LLMs and two datasets, providing outcome evidence is generally more reliable than providing experiment descriptions. Outcomes tend to improve accuracy beyond what internal knowledge alone provides, whereas experimental text can be brittle and may degrade performance when the context is incomplete. These findings clarify when experimental evidence benefits LLM-based feasibility assessment and when it introduces fragility.

analysis.tldr: LLM评估科学可行性时，提供结果证据比实验描述更可靠，实验文本在不完整时可能降低性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学可行性评估对AI辅助研究至关重要，但LLM如何利用实验与结果证据尚不明确，现有方法可能因上下文不完整而表现脆弱。
analysis.problem: 探究LLM在科学可行性评估中，实验描述与结果证据对模型性能的影响及鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 结果证据通常比实验描述更可靠；实验文本在不完整时可能降低性能，而结果证据能提升超出内部知识的准确性。
analysis.method: 将可行性评估建模为诊断推理任务，在受控知识条件下（仅假设、含实验、含结果、两者皆有）评估LLM，并通过逐步移除实验/结果上下文测试鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出将科学可行性评估作为诊断推理任务，并设计受控实验框架。
发现结果证据比实验描述更可靠，且实验文本不完整时可能损害性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于两个数据集，可能缺乏泛化性。
未探讨不同LLM架构或规模的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM评估科学可行性时，提供结果证据比实验描述更可靠，实验文本在不完整时可能降低性能。

papers.title: CAHAL: Clinically Applicable resolution enHAncement for Low-resolution MRI scans
papers.abstract: Large-scale automated morphometric analysis of brain MRI is limited by the thick-slice, anisotropic acquisitions prevalent in routine clinical practice. Existing generative super-resolution (SR) methods produce visually compelling isotropic volumes but often introduce anatomical hallucinations, systematic volumetric overestimation, and structural distortions that compromise downstream quantitative analysis and diagnostic safety. To address this, we propose CAHAL (Clinically Applicable resolution enHAncement for Low-resolution MRI scans), a hallucination-robust, physics-informed resolution enhancement framework that operates directly in the patient's native acquisition space. CAHAL employs a deterministic bivariate Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture routing each input through specialised residual 3D U-Net experts conditioned on both volumetric resolution and acquisition anisotropy, two independent descriptors of clinical MRI acquisition. Experts are optimised with a composite loss combining edge-penalised spatial reconstruction, Fourier-domain spectral coherence matching, and a segmentation-guided semantic consistency constraint. Training pairs are generated on-the-fly via physics-based degradation sampled from a large-scale real-world database, ensuring robust generalisation. Validated on T1-weighted and FLAIR sequences against generative baselines, CAHAL achieves state-of-the-art results, improving the best related methods in terms of accuracy and efficiency.

analysis.tldr: CAHAL提出一种幻觉鲁棒、物理信息驱动的MRI超分辨率框架，通过混合专家架构和复合损失函数，在临床各向异性扫描上实现高保真各向同性重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床常规MRI扫描多为厚层、各向异性采集，限制了大规模自动形态测量分析；现有生成式超分辨率方法虽能产生视觉上各向同性的体素，但常引入解剖幻觉、系统性体积高估和结构畸变，影响下游定量分析和诊断安全性。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持解剖真实性的前提下，将低分辨率各向异性临床MRI扫描可靠地增强为高分辨率各向同性体素，避免幻觉和结构失真。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有生成式超分辨率方法在临床MRI上会产生解剖幻觉、系统性体积高估和结构畸变，导致下游定量分析不可靠。
analysis.method: 提出CAHAL框架，采用确定性双变量混合专家（MoE）架构，根据体素分辨率和采集各向异性两个独立描述符路由输入到专门的残差3D U-Net专家；使用复合损失函数，包括边缘惩罚空间重建、傅里叶域频谱一致性匹配和分割引导语义一致性约束；训练时通过基于物理的退化模型从大规模真实数据库实时生成配对数据。
contributions: 提出一种幻觉鲁棒的物理信息分辨率增强框架CAHAL，直接操作在患者原生采集空间。
设计双变量MoE架构，利用分辨率和各向异性两个临床采集描述符进行专家路由。
引入复合损失函数，结合空间、频谱和语义约束以保持解剖真实性。
在T1加权和FLAIR序列上实现最先进结果，优于生成式基线方法。
analysis.experiments: 在T1加权和FLAIR序列上验证，与生成式基线方法比较，CAHAL在准确性和效率上达到最先进结果。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于脑MRI，对其他解剖部位或序列的泛化性未验证。
依赖大规模真实数据库进行退化建模，数据获取可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CAHAL提出一种幻觉鲁棒、物理信息驱动的MRI超分辨率框架，通过混合专家架构和复合损失函数，在临床各向异性扫描上实现高保真各向同性重建。

papers.title: Mango: Multi-Agent Web Navigation via Global-View Optimization
papers.abstract: Existing web agents typically initiate exploration from the root URL, which is inefficient for complex websites with deep hierarchical structures. Without a global view of the website's structure, agents frequently fall into navigation traps, explore irrelevant branches, or fail to reach target information within a limited budget. We propose Mango, a multi-agent web navigation method that leverages the website structure to dynamically determine optimal starting points. We formulate URL selection as a multi-armed bandit problem and employ Thompson Sampling to adaptively allocate the navigation budget across candidate URLs. Furthermore, we introduce an episodic memory component to store navigation history, enabling the agent to learn from previous attempts. Experiments on WebVoyager demonstrate that Mango achieves a success rate of 63.6% when using GPT-5-mini, outperforming the best baseline by 7.3%. Furthermore, on WebWalkerQA, Mango attains a 52.5% success rate, surpassing the best baseline by 26.8%. We also demonstrate the generalizability of Mango using both open-source and closed-source models as backbones. Our data and code are open-source and available at https://github.com/VichyTong/Mango.

analysis.tldr: Mango通过多臂老虎机优化起始URL选择，结合情景记忆，显著提升多智能体网页导航效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有网页代理从根URL开始探索，在深层网站中效率低下，易陷入导航陷阱或探索无关分支，导致在有限预算内无法到达目标信息。
analysis.problem: 如何为多智能体网页导航动态选择最优起始URL，并利用历史经验提高导航成功率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将URL选择建模为多臂老虎机问题，使用汤普森采样自适应分配导航预算；引入情景记忆组件存储导航历史，使智能体从先前尝试中学习。
contributions: 提出Mango，一种利用网站结构动态确定最优起始点的多智能体网页导航方法。
将URL选择形式化为多臂老虎机问题，并采用汤普森采样进行预算分配。
引入情景记忆组件，使智能体能够从历史导航中学习。
analysis.experiments: 在WebVoyager上，Mango使用GPT-5-mini达到63.6%成功率，超过最佳基线7.3%；在WebWalkerQA上达到52.5%成功率，超过最佳基线26.8%。同时验证了在开源和闭源模型上的泛化性。
limitations: 可能依赖网站结构信息的可用性。
情景记忆的存储和检索效率可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Mango通过多臂老虎机优化起始URL选择，结合情景记忆，显著提升多智能体网页导航效率。

papers.title: Multi-Level Temporal Graph Networks with Local-Global Fusion for Industrial Fault Diagnosis
papers.abstract: Fault detection and diagnosis are critical for the optimal and safe operation of industrial processes. The correlations among sensors often display non-Euclidean structures where graph neural networks (GNNs) are widely used therein. However, for large-scale systems, local, global, and dynamic relations extensively exist among sensors, and traditional GNNs often overlook such complex and multi-level structures for various problems including the fault diagnosis. To address this issue, we propose a structure-aware multi-level temporal graph network with local-global feature fusion for industrial fault diagnosis. First, a correlation graph is dynamically constructed using Pearson correlation coefficients to capture relationships among process variables. Then, temporal features are extracted through long short-term memory (LSTM)-based encoder, whereas the spatial dependencies among sensors are learned by graph convolution layers. A multi-level pooling mechanism is used to gradually coarsen and learn meaningful graph structures, to capture higher-level patterns while keeping important fault related details. Finally, a fusion step is applied to combine both detailed local features and overall global patterns before the final prediction. Experimental evaluations on the Tennessee Eastman process (TEP) demonstrate that the proposed model achieves superior fault diagnosis performance, particularly for complex fault scenarios, outperforming various baseline methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出多级时序图网络融合局部与全局特征，提升工业故障诊断性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业过程中传感器间存在非欧几里得结构，传统GNN难以捕捉大规模系统中局部、全局和动态的多级关系，导致故障诊断效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何有效建模传感器间的局部、全局和动态多级关系，提升工业故障诊断的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 动态构建皮尔逊相关系数图，通过LSTM提取时序特征，图卷积学习空间依赖，多级池化机制逐步粗化图结构以捕获高层模式，最后融合局部和全局特征进行预测。
contributions: 提出结构感知的多级时序图网络，融合局部与全局特征用于工业故障诊断。
在田纳西-伊斯曼过程上验证了模型在复杂故障场景下的优越性能。
analysis.experiments: 在田纳西-伊斯曼过程（TEP）上进行实验，模型在复杂故障场景下优于多种基线方法。
limitations: 可能依赖皮尔逊相关系数构建图，对非线性关系捕捉有限。
多级池化机制可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多级时序图网络融合局部与全局特征，提升工业故障诊断性能。

papers.title: REVEAL: Multimodal Vision-Language Alignment of Retinal Morphometry and Clinical Risks for Incident AD and Dementia Prediction
papers.abstract: The retina provides a unique, noninvasive window into Alzheimer's disease (AD) and dementia, capturing early structural changes through morphometric features, while systemic and lifestyle risk factors reflect well-established contributors to disease susceptibility long before clinical symptom onset. However, current retinal analysis frameworks typically model imaging and risk factors separately, limiting their ability to capture joint multimodal patterns critical for early risk prediction. Moreover, existing methods rarely incorporate mechanisms to organize or align patients with similar retinal and clinical characteristics, constraining the learning of coherent cross-modal associations. To address these limitations, we introduce REVEAL (REtinal-risk Vision-Language Early Alzheimer's Learning), a framework that aligns color fundus photographs with individualized disease-specific risk profiles for predicting incident AD and dementia, on average 8 years before diagnosis (range: 1-11 years). Because real-world risk factors are structured questionnaire data, we translate them into clinically interpretable narratives compatible with pretrained vision-language models (VLMs). We further propose a group-aware contrastive learning (GACL) strategy that clusters patients with similar retinal morphometry and risk factors as positive pairs, strengthening multimodal alignment. This unified representation learning framework substantially outperforms state-of-the-art retinal imaging models paired with clinical text encoders, as well as general-purpose VLMs, demonstrating the value of jointly modeling retinal biomarkers and clinical risk factors. By providing a generalizable and noninvasive approach for early AD and dementia risk stratification, REVEAL has the potential to enable earlier intervention and improve preventive care at the population level.

analysis.tldr: 提出REVEAL框架，通过视网膜形态与临床风险因素的跨模态对齐，提前8年预测阿尔茨海默病和痴呆。
analysis.research_motivation: 视网膜成像和风险因素通常被分开建模，无法捕捉联合多模态模式，且缺乏对齐相似患者的机制，限制了早期风险预测能力。
analysis.problem: 如何有效对齐视网膜形态特征与临床风险因素，实现早期AD和痴呆的预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法分别建模成像和风险因素，未能利用跨模态关联；缺乏患者聚类对齐机制，导致多模态表征学习受限。
analysis.method: 将结构化风险问卷转化为临床可解释的文本，利用预训练VLM；提出组感知对比学习（GACL），聚类相似患者作为正样本对，增强多模态对齐。
contributions: 提出REVEAL框架，首次将视网膜照片与个性化风险因素对齐用于AD早期预测。
设计GACL策略，通过患者聚类强化跨模态对齐。
在平均提前8年的预测任务上超越现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到在预测AD和痴呆任务上显著优于现有视网膜模型和通用VLM。
limitations: 依赖结构化问卷数据，可能受限于数据质量。
GACL聚类策略的鲁棒性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出REVEAL框架，通过视网膜形态与临床风险因素的跨模态对齐，提前8年预测阿尔茨海默病和痴呆。

papers.title: Towards Understanding the Robustness of Sparse Autoencoders
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) remain vulnerable to optimization-based jailbreak attacks that exploit internal gradient structure. While Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) are widely used for interpretability, their robustness implications remain underexplored. We present a study of integrating pretrained SAEs into transformer residual streams at inference time, without modifying model weights or blocking gradients. Across four model families (Gemma, LLaMA, Mistral, Qwen) and two strong white-box attacks (GCG, BEAST) plus three black-box benchmarks, SAE-augmented models achieve up to a 5x reduction in jailbreak success rate relative to the undefended baseline and reduce cross-model attack transferability. Parametric ablations reveal (i) a monotonic dose-response relationship between L0 sparsity and attack success rate, and (ii) a layer-dependent defense-utility tradeoff, where intermediate layers balance robustness and clean performance. These findings are consistent with a representational bottleneck hypothesis: sparse projection reshapes the optimization geometry exploited by jailbreak attacks.

analysis.tldr: 在推理时插入稀疏自编码器可显著降低大语言模型越狱攻击成功率，揭示稀疏性与防御效果间的单调关系。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型易受基于梯度的越狱攻击，现有防御方法多需修改模型权重或阻断梯度，而稀疏自编码器主要用于可解释性，其鲁棒性潜力未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改模型权重或阻断梯度的前提下，利用稀疏自编码器提升大语言模型对越狱攻击的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现L0稀疏性与攻击成功率之间存在单调剂量-响应关系，以及防御效果与模型性能在中间层存在权衡。
analysis.method: 在推理时将预训练的稀疏自编码器集成到Transformer残差流中，不修改模型权重或阻断梯度。
contributions: 首次系统研究稀疏自编码器对大语言模型越狱攻击鲁棒性的影响
揭示稀疏性与防御效果的单调关系及层依赖的防御-效用权衡
analysis.experiments: 在Gemma、LLaMA、Mistral、Qwen四个模型家族上，使用GCG和BEAST两种白盒攻击及三种黑盒基准进行实验，SAE增强模型越狱成功率降低高达5倍，并减少跨模型攻击迁移性。
limitations: 仅针对优化型越狱攻击，未覆盖其他攻击类型
防御-效用权衡可能限制实际部署
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在推理时插入稀疏自编码器可显著降低大语言模型越狱攻击成功率，揭示稀疏性与防御效果间的单调关系。

papers.title: Handling and Interpreting Missing Modalities in Patient Clinical Trajectories via Autoregressive Sequence Modeling
papers.abstract: An active challenge in developing multimodal machine learning (ML) models for healthcare is handling missing modalities during training and deployment. As clinical datasets are inherently temporal and sparse in terms of modality presence, capturing the underlying predictive signal via diagnostic multimodal ML models while retaining model explainability remains an ongoing challenge. In this work, we address this by re-framing clinical diagnosis as an autoregressive sequence modeling task, utilizing causal decoders from large language models (LLMs) to model a patient's multimodal trajectory. We first introduce a missingness-aware contrastive pre-training objective that integrates multiple modalities in datasets with missingness in a shared latent space. We then show that autoregressive sequence modeling with transformer-based architectures outperforms baselines on the MIMIC-IV and eICU fine-tuning benchmarks. Finally, we use interpretability techniques to move beyond performance boosts and find that across various patient stays, removing modalities leads to divergent behavior that our contrastive pre-training mitigates. By abstracting clinical diagnosis as sequence modeling and interpreting patient stay trajectories, we develop a framework to profile and handle missing modalities while addressing the canonical desideratum of safe, transparent clinical AI.

analysis.tldr: 将临床诊断重构为自回归序列建模任务，利用LLM因果解码器处理多模态缺失，并提出缺失感知对比预训练目标。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态临床数据在训练和部署中普遍存在模态缺失问题，现有方法难以同时保持模型可解释性和预测性能。
analysis.problem: 如何有效处理临床轨迹中缺失模态，并实现可解释的多模态诊断预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 缺失模态会导致模型行为发散，而缺失感知对比预训练可以缓解这种发散。
analysis.method: 将临床诊断重构为自回归序列建模任务，使用LLM因果解码器建模患者多模态轨迹；提出缺失感知对比预训练目标，在共享潜空间整合多模态数据。
contributions: 提出将临床诊断作为自回归序列建模的新框架，利用LLM处理缺失模态。
设计缺失感知对比预训练目标，有效整合缺失多模态数据。
通过可解释性分析揭示缺失模态对模型行为的影响，并证明预训练策略的缓解作用。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-IV和eICU微调基准上，自回归序列建模方法优于基线。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模预训练数据，计算成本较高。
可解释性分析仅限于特定患者轨迹，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将临床诊断重构为自回归序列建模任务，利用LLM因果解码器处理多模态缺失，并提出缺失感知对比预训练目标。

papers.title: Beyond Coefficients: Forecast-Necessity Testing for Interpretable Causal Discovery in Nonlinear Time-Series Models
papers.abstract: Nonlinear machine-learning models are increasingly used to discover causal relationships in time-series data, yet the interpretation of their outputs remains poorly understood. In particular, causal scores produced by regularized neural autoregressive models are often treated as analogues of regression coefficients, leading to misleading claims of statistical significance. In this paper, we argue that causal relevance in nonlinear time-series models should be evaluated through forecast necessity rather than coefficient magnitude, and we present a practical evaluation procedure for doing so. We present an interpretable evaluation framework based on systematic edge ablation and forecast comparison, which tests whether a candidate causal relationship is required for accurate prediction. Using Neural Additive Vector Autoregression as a case study model, we apply this framework to a real-world case study of democratic development, modeled as a multivariate time series of panel data - democracy indicators across 139 countries. We show that relationships with similar causal scores can differ dramatically in their predictive necessity due to redundancy, temporal persistence, and regime-specific effects. Our results demonstrate how forecast-necessity testing supports more reliable causal reasoning in applied AI systems and provides practical guidance for interpreting nonlinear time-series models in high-stakes domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于预测必要性的因果检验方法，替代传统系数大小判断，用于非线性时间序列模型的可解释因果发现。
analysis.research_motivation: 非线性机器学习模型在时间序列因果发现中广泛应用，但输出解释不明确，常将因果分数误当作回归系数，导致统计显著性误导。
analysis.problem: 如何评估非线性时间序列模型中候选因果关系的实际重要性，避免仅依赖系数大小。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，具有相似因果分数的关系因冗余、时间持久性和特定制度效应，在预测必要性上差异巨大。
analysis.method: 提出基于系统性边消融和预测比较的评估框架，通过测试候选因果关系是否对准确预测必要来判断因果相关性。以神经加性向量自回归为案例模型。
contributions: 提出预测必要性测试作为非线性时间序列模型因果发现的可解释评估方法
通过民主发展面板数据案例展示该方法如何揭示系数大小与预测必要性之间的差异
analysis.experiments: 在139个国家的民主指标面板数据上进行了真实世界案例研究，比较了不同因果关系的预测必要性。
limitations: 方法依赖于特定模型（神经加性向量自回归），泛化性需进一步验证
预测必要性测试可能受预测模型质量影响
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于预测必要性的因果检验方法，替代传统系数大小判断，用于非线性时间序列模型的可解释因果发现。

papers.title: URoPE: Universal Relative Position Embedding across Geometric Spaces
papers.abstract: Relative position embedding has become a standard mechanism for encoding positional information in Transformers. However, existing formulations are typically limited to a fixed geometric space, namely 1D sequences or regular 2D/3D grids, which restricts their applicability to many computer vision tasks that require geometric reasoning across camera views or between 2D and 3D spaces. To address this limitation, we propose URoPE, a universal extension of Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE) to cross-view or cross-dimensional geometric spaces. For each key/value image patch, URoPE samples 3D points along the corresponding camera ray at predefined depth anchors and projects them into the query image plane. Standard 2D RoPE can then be applied using the projected pixel coordinates. URoPE is a parameter-free and intrinsics-aware relative position embedding that is invariant to the choice of global coordinate systems, while remaining fully compatible with existing RoPE-optimized attention kernels. We evaluate URoPE as a plug-in positional encoding for transformer architectures across a diverse set of tasks, including novel view synthesis, 3D object detection, object tracking, and depth estimation, covering 2D-2D, 2D-3D, and temporal scenarios. Experiments show that URoPE consistently improves the performance of transformer-based models across all tasks, demonstrating its effectiveness and generality for geometric reasoning. Our project website is: https://urope-pe.github.io/.

analysis.tldr: 提出URoPE，将RoPE扩展到跨视角/跨维度的几何空间，无需参数且兼容现有注意力核。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有相对位置嵌入局限于固定几何空间（如1D序列或规则2D/3D网格），难以应用于需要跨视角或跨维度几何推理的视觉任务。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种通用的相对位置嵌入，使其能处理跨相机视角或2D-3D空间的几何关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 对每个key/value图像块，沿对应相机射线在预定义深度锚点处采样3D点，投影到查询图像平面，然后应用标准2D RoPE。
contributions: 提出URoPE，一种无参数、内参感知的相对位置嵌入，可跨几何空间使用。
在多个视觉任务（新视图合成、3D检测、目标跟踪、深度估计）上验证了URoPE的通用性和有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个任务上评估，包括新视图合成、3D目标检测、目标跟踪和深度估计，URoPE一致提升了Transformer模型的性能。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的深度锚点，对深度分布敏感。
仅适用于有相机内参的场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出URoPE，将RoPE扩展到跨视角/跨维度的几何空间，无需参数且兼容现有注意力核。

papers.title: DeltaSeg: Tiered Attention and Deep Delta Learning for Multi-Class Structural Defect Segmentation
papers.abstract: Automated segmentation of structural defects from visual inspection imagery remains challenging due to the diversity of damage types, extreme class imbalance, and the need for precise boundary delineation. This paper presents DeltaSeg, a U-shaped encoder-decoder architecture with a tiered attention strategy that integrates Squeeze-and-Excitation (SE) channel attention in the encoder, Coordinate Attention at the bottleneck and decoder, and a novel Deep Delta Attention (DDA) mechanism in the skip connections. The encoder uses depthwise separable convolutions with dilated stages to maintain spatial resolution while expanding the receptive field. Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP) at the bottleneck captures multi-scale context. The DDA module refines skip connections through a dual-path scheme combining a learned delta operator for nuisance feature suppression with spatial attention gates conditioned on decoder signals. Deep supervision through multi-scale auxiliary heads further strengthens gradient flow and encourages semantically meaningful features at intermediate decoder stages. We evaluate DeltaSeg on two datasets: the S2DS dataset (7 classes) and the Culvert-Sewer Defect Dataset (CSDD, 9 classes). Across both benchmarks, DeltaSeg consistently outperforms 12 competing architectures including U-Net, SA-UNet, UNet3+, SegFormer, Swin-UNet, EGE-UNet, FPN, and Mobile-UNETR, demonstrating strong generalization across damage types, imaging conditions, and structural geometries.

analysis.tldr: DeltaSeg通过层级注意力与深度增量学习实现多类结构缺陷分割，在S2DS和CSDD数据集上超越12种架构。
analysis.research_motivation: 结构缺陷自动分割面临损伤类型多样、类别极度不平衡和边界精确描绘的需求，现有方法难以兼顾多尺度上下文与细粒度特征。
analysis.problem: 解决多类结构缺陷分割中类别不平衡、边界模糊及多尺度特征融合的挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出U形编码器-解码器架构，包含层级注意力策略（编码器SE通道注意力、瓶颈和解码器坐标注意力、跳跃连接深度增量注意力DDA）、深度可分离卷积与空洞卷积、ASPP多尺度上下文、深度监督多尺度辅助头。
contributions: 提出层级注意力策略整合SE、坐标注意力和深度增量注意力DDA。
设计DDA模块通过双路径方案抑制无关特征并增强空间注意力。
在S2DS和CSDD数据集上超越12种竞争架构，展示强泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在S2DS（7类）和CSDD（9类）两个数据集上评估，与U-Net、SA-UNet、UNet3+、SegFormer、Swin-UNet、EGE-UNet、FPN、Mobile-UNETR等12种架构对比，DeltaSeg一致优于所有基线。
limitations: 未在真实工业场景中验证实时性。
可能对极端小目标缺陷分割效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DeltaSeg通过层级注意力与深度增量学习实现多类结构缺陷分割，在S2DS和CSDD数据集上超越12种架构。

papers.title: Match-Any-Events: Zero-Shot Motion-Robust Feature Matching Across Wide Baselines for Event Cameras
papers.abstract: Event cameras have recently shown promising capabilities in instantaneous motion estimation due to their robustness to low light and fast motions. However, computing wide-baseline correspondence between two arbitrary views remains a significant challenge, since event appearance changes substantially with motion, and learning-based approaches are constrained by both scalability and limited wide-baseline supervision. We therefore introduce the first event matching model that achieves cross-dataset wide-baseline correspondence in a zero-shot manner: a single model trained once is deployed on unseen datasets without any target-domain fine-tuning or adaptation. To enable this capability, we introduce a motion-robust and computationally efficient attention backbone that learns multi-timescale features from event streams, augmented with sparsity-aware event token selection, making large-scale training on diverse wide-baseline supervision computationally feasible. To provide the supervision needed for wide-baseline generalization, we develop a robust event motion synthesis framework to generate large-scale event-matching datasets with augmented viewpoints, modalities, and motions. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks show that our framework achieves a 37.7% improvement over the previous best event feature matching methods. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/spikelab-jhu/Match-Any-Events.

analysis.tldr: 首个零样本跨数据集宽基线事件相机特征匹配模型，通过运动鲁棒注意力骨干和合成数据训练实现37.7%性能提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 事件相机在低光和快速运动下具有优势，但宽基线匹配因事件外观随运动剧烈变化而极具挑战，现有学习方法受限于可扩展性和宽基线监督不足。
analysis.problem: 实现事件相机在任意视角间的零样本宽基线特征匹配，无需目标域微调。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出运动鲁棒且计算高效的注意力骨干，学习事件流的多时间尺度特征，结合稀疏感知事件令牌选择；并开发鲁棒事件运动合成框架生成大规模宽基线匹配数据集。
contributions: 首个零样本跨数据集宽基线事件匹配模型，单次训练即可部署于未见数据集。
运动鲁棒注意力骨干与稀疏事件令牌选择，实现大规模训练可行性。
事件运动合成框架生成多样化宽基线监督数据。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上，该方法相比之前最佳事件特征匹配方法提升37.7%。代码和数据已开源。
limitations: 可能对极端运动或光照条件仍存在局限。
合成数据与真实场景的域差异可能影响泛化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个零样本跨数据集宽基线事件相机特征匹配模型，通过运动鲁棒注意力骨干和合成数据训练实现37.7%性能提升。

papers.title: Autonomous Skeletal Landmark Localization towards Agentic C-Arm Control
papers.abstract: Purpose: Automated C-arm positioning ensures timely treatment in patients requiring emergent interventions. When a conventional Deep Learning (DL) approach for C-arm control fails, clinicians must revert to manual operation, resulting in additional delays. Consequently, an agentic C-arm control framework based on multimodal large language models (MLLMs) is highly desirable, as it can incorporate clinician feedback and use reasoning to make adjustments toward more accurate positioning. Skeletal landmark localization is essential for C-arm control, and we investigate adapting MLLMs for autonomous landmark localization. Methods: We used an annotated synthetic X-ray dataset and a real X-ray dataset. Each X-ray in both datasets is paired with several skeletal landmarks. We fine-tuned two MLLMs and tasked them with retrieving the closest landmarks from each X-ray. Quantitative evaluations of landmark localization were performed and compared against a leading DL approach. We further conducted qualitative experiments demonstrating: (1) how an MLLM can correct an initially incorrect prediction through reasoning, and (2) how the MLLM can sequentially navigate the C-arm toward a target location. Results: On both datasets, fine-tuned MLLMs demonstrate competitive performance across all localization tasks when compared with the DL approach. In the qualitative experiments, the MLLMs provide evidence of reasoning and spatial awareness. Conclusion: This study shows that fine-tuned MLLMs achieve accurate skeletal landmark localization and hold promise for agentic autonomous C-arm control. Our code is available athttps://github.com/marszzibros/C-arm-localization-LLMs.git

analysis.tldr: 微调多模态大语言模型实现自主骨骼地标定位，为C型臂自主控制提供新思路。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统深度学习C型臂控制失败时需手动操作导致延误，而基于MLLM的智能框架可整合临床反馈并通过推理调整定位，因此研究MLLM在骨骼地标定位中的适用性。
analysis.problem: 如何使多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在X光图像中自主定位骨骼地标，以支持C型臂的智能控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用合成和真实X射线数据集，每个X射线图像配准多个骨骼地标；微调两个MLLM，使其从X射线中检索最近的地标；与领先的深度学习方法进行定量比较，并开展定性实验展示MLLM的推理和空间感知能力。
contributions: 首次探索将MLLM用于自主骨骼地标定位，并证明其与深度学习方法竞争力相当。
通过定性实验展示MLLM能通过推理纠正初始错误预测，并顺序引导C型臂到达目标位置。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实X射线数据集上，微调MLLM与领先的深度学习方法进行定量比较，结果显示MLLM在所有定位任务上表现具有竞争力。定性实验展示了MLLM的推理和空间感知能力。
limitations: 仅使用两个MLLM，可能未涵盖所有先进模型。
定性实验规模有限，实际临床部署效果待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 微调多模态大语言模型实现自主骨骼地标定位，为C型臂自主控制提供新思路。

papers.title: The Cost of Relaxation: Evaluating the Error in Convex Neural Network Verification
papers.abstract: Many neural network (NN) verification systems represent the network's input-output relation as a constraint program. Sound and complete, representations involve integer constraints, for simulating the activations. Recent works convexly relax the integer constraints, improving performance, at the cost of soundness. Convex relaxations consider outputs that are unreachable by the original network. We study the worst case divergence between the original network and its convex relaxations; both qualitatively and quantitatively. The relaxations' space forms a lattice, where the top element corresponds to a full relaxation, with every neuron linearized. The bottom element corresponds to the original network. We provide analytical upper and lower bounds for the $\ell_\infty$-distance between the fully relaxed and original outputs. This distance grows exponentially, w.r.t. the network's depth, and linearly w.r.t. the input's radius. The misclassification probability exhibits a step-like behavior, w.r.t. input radius. Our results are supported by experiments on MNIST, Fashion MNIST and random networks.

analysis.tldr: 凸松弛在神经网络验证中引入指数级误差，且误分类概率随输入半径呈阶梯式增长。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经网络验证系统常使用凸松弛来提升性能，但会牺牲完备性，导致输出偏离原始网络，需要量化这种误差。
analysis.problem: 量化凸松弛神经网络验证中，完全松弛网络与原始网络输出之间的最坏情况偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 松弛空间构成格结构，完全松弛对应所有神经元线性化；误差随网络深度指数增长、随输入半径线性增长；误分类概率随输入半径呈阶梯行为。
analysis.method: 理论分析给出ℓ∞距离的解析上下界，并通过实验验证。
contributions: 首次从理论上刻画了凸松弛验证中输出偏差的指数级增长规律
揭示了误分类概率的阶梯行为
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST、Fashion MNIST和随机网络上进行了实验，验证了理论结果。
limitations: 仅针对完全松弛（所有神经元线性化）进行分析，未考虑部分松弛
实验限于小规模数据集和随机网络，未在大型现代网络上验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 凸松弛在神经网络验证中引入指数级误差，且误分类概率随输入半径呈阶梯式增长。

papers.title: Skillful Global Ocean Emulation and the Role of Correlation-Aware Loss
papers.abstract: Machine learning emulators have shown extraordinary skill in forecasting atmospheric states, and their application to global ocean dynamics offers similar promise. Here, we adapt the GraphCast architecture into a dedicated ocean-only emulator, driven by prescribed atmospheric conditions, for medium-range predictions. The emulator is trained on NOAA's UFS-Replay dataset. Using a 24 hour time step, single initial condition, and without using autoregressive training, we produce an emulator that provides skillful forecasts for 10-15 day lead times. We further demonstrate the use of Mahalanobis distance as loss that improves the forecast skill compared to the Mean Squared Error loss by explicitly accounting for the correlations between tendencies of the target variables. Using spatial correlation analysis of the forecasted fields, we also show that the proposed correlation-aware loss acts as a statistical-dynamical regularizer for the slow, correlated dynamics of the global oceans, offering a better background forecast for downstream tasks like data assimilation.

analysis.tldr: 将GraphCast架构适配为海洋仿真器，并引入马氏距离损失函数以提升中短期海洋预报技能。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器学习仿真器在大气预报中表现优异，但将其应用于全球海洋动力学预报仍面临挑战，现有损失函数（如MSE）未考虑变量倾向之间的相关性，限制了预报技能。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够进行中短期（10-15天）全球海洋状态预报的机器学习仿真器，并设计合适的损失函数以提升预报准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将GraphCast架构适配为仅海洋的仿真器，以预设大气条件为驱动，使用24小时时间步长和单初始条件，训练于NOAA的UFS-Replay数据集；采用马氏距离作为损失函数，显式考虑目标变量倾向之间的相关性。
contributions: 首次将GraphCast架构成功应用于全球海洋中短期预报，展示了机器学习在海洋动力学中的潜力。
提出使用马氏距离作为相关性感知损失函数，相比MSE损失显著提升预报技能，并作为统计-动力学正则化器改善慢相关动力学的背景场。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定数据集（UFS-Replay）和预设大气条件，泛化性需进一步验证。
未使用自回归训练，长期预报稳定性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将GraphCast架构适配为海洋仿真器，并引入马氏距离损失函数以提升中短期海洋预报技能。

papers.title: Colour Extraction Pipeline for Odonates using Computer Vision
papers.abstract: The correlation between insect morphological traits and climate has been documented in physiological studies, but such studies remain limited by the time-consuming nature of the data analysis. In particular, the open source datasets often lack annotations of species' morphological traits, making dedicated annotations campaigns necessary; these efforts are typically local in scale and costly. In this paper, we propose a pipeline to identify and segment body parts of Odonates (dragonflies and damselflies) using deep neural networks, with the ultimate goal of extracting body parts' colouration. The pipeline is trained on a limited annotated dataset and refined with pseudo supervised data. We show that, by using open source images from citizen science platforms, our approach can segment each visible subject (Odonates) into head, thorax, abdomen, and wings and then extract a colour palette for each body part. This will enable large-scale statistical analysis of ecological correlations (e.g., between colouration and climate change, habitat loss, or geolocation) which are crucial for quantifying and assessing ecosystem biodiversity status.

analysis.tldr: 提出用深度神经网络分割蜻蜓身体部位并提取颜色，以支持大规模生态统计分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 昆虫形态特征与气候的关联研究受限于耗时的手动数据分析，开源数据集缺乏形态标注，专用标注成本高且规模小。
analysis.problem: 如何利用有限标注数据和公民科学平台的开源图像，自动分割蜻蜓身体部位并提取颜色。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于深度神经网络的分割流水线，使用有限标注数据集训练，并通过伪监督数据细化，将蜻蜓分割为头、胸、腹、翅，然后提取每个部位的颜色调色板。
contributions: 提出一个从公民科学平台开源图像中自动分割蜻蜓身体部位并提取颜色的流水线。
通过伪监督数据在有限标注下提升分割性能，支持大规模生态相关性统计分析。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖图像质量，公民科学平台图像质量不一。
仅针对蜻蜓，泛化到其他昆虫需额外标注。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出用深度神经网络分割蜻蜓身体部位并提取颜色，以支持大规模生态统计分析。

papers.title: Beyond One Output: Visualizing and Comparing Distributions of Language Model Generations
papers.abstract: Users typically interact with and evaluate language models via single outputs, but each output is just one sample from a broad distribution of possible completions. This interaction hides distributional structure such as modes, uncommon edge cases, and sensitivity to small prompt changes, leading users to over-generalize from anecdotes when iterating on prompts for open-ended tasks. Informed by a formative study with researchers who use LMs (n=13) examining when stochasticity matters in practice, how they reason about distributions over language, and where current workflows break down, we introduce GROVE. GROVE is an interactive visualization that represents multiple LM generations as overlapping paths through a text graph, revealing shared structure, branching points, and clusters while preserving access to raw outputs. We evaluate across three crowdsourced user studies (N=47, 44, and 40 participants) targeting complementary distributional tasks. Our results support a hybrid workflow: graph summaries improve structural judgments such as assessing diversity, while direct output inspection remains stronger for detail-oriented questions.

analysis.tldr: GROVE通过文本图可视化多语言模型生成分布，帮助用户理解结构多样性而非单一样本。
analysis.research_motivation: 用户通常只通过单次输出评估语言模型，忽略了生成分布中的模式、边缘情况和提示敏感性，导致过度泛化。
analysis.problem: 如何可视化并比较语言模型多次生成的分布，以揭示共享结构、分支点和聚类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GROVE：交互式可视化工具，将多个LM生成表示为文本图中的重叠路径，显示共享结构、分支点和聚类，同时保留原始输出。
contributions: 提出GROVE可视化方法，用于展示LM生成分布的结构信息。
通过三项众包用户研究验证了混合工作流的有效性：图摘要改善结构判断，直接输出检查适用于细节问题。
analysis.experiments: 三项众包用户研究（N=47, 44, 40），针对互补的分布性任务。
limitations: 可能依赖用户对图可视化的理解能力。
未提及对大规模生成或长文本的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GROVE通过文本图可视化多语言模型生成分布，帮助用户理解结构多样性而非单一样本。

papers.title: A Controlled Benchmark of Visual State-Space Backbones with Domain-Shift and Boundary Analysis for Remote-Sensing Segmentation
papers.abstract: Visual state-space models (SSMs) are increasingly promoted as efficient alternatives to Vision Transformers, yet their practical advantages remain unclear under fair comparison because existing studies rarely isolate encoder effects from decoder and training choices. We present a strictly controlled benchmark of representative visual SSM families, including VMamba, MambaVision, and Spatial-Mamba, for remote-sensing semantic segmentation, in which only the encoder varies across experiments. Evaluated on LoveDA and ISPRS Potsdam under a unified 4-stage feature interface and a fixed lightweight decoder, the benchmark reveals three main findings, intra-family scaling yields only modest gains, cross-domain generalization is strongly asymmetric, and boundary delineation is the dominant failure mode under distribution shift. Although visual SSMs achieve favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-offs relative to the controlled CNN and Transformer baselines considered here, the results suggest that future improvements are more likely to come from robustness-oriented design and boundary-aware decoding than from encoder scaling alone. By isolating encoder behavior under a unified and reproducible protocol, this study establishes a practical reference benchmark for the design and evaluation of future Mamba-based segmentation backbones

analysis.tldr: 严格控制的基准测试表明，视觉状态空间模型在遥感分割中精度-效率权衡优于CNN和Transformer，但边界分割是主要失败模式，未来改进应侧重鲁棒性设计和边界感知解码。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究很少在公平比较下隔离编码器效果，导致视觉SSM的实际优势不明确。
analysis.problem: 在遥感语义分割中，公平比较视觉SSM编码器与CNN/Transformer编码器的性能，并分析其失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现三个主要现象：族内缩放收益有限、跨域泛化严重不对称、边界分割是分布偏移下的主要失败模式。
analysis.method: 构建严格控制的基准，固定解码器和训练设置，仅变化编码器（VMamba、MambaVision、Spatial-Mamba），在LoveDA和ISPRS Potsdam上评估。
contributions: 提出了一个严格控制的视觉SSM编码器基准，用于遥感语义分割。
揭示了视觉SSM在精度-效率权衡上的优势，并指出边界分割是主要瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在LoveDA和ISPRS Potsdam数据集上进行了语义分割实验，使用统一4阶段特征接口和固定轻量解码器。
limitations: 仅评估了遥感分割任务，可能不适用于其他领域。
未探索不同解码器或训练策略的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 严格控制的基准测试表明，视觉状态空间模型在遥感分割中精度-效率权衡优于CNN和Transformer，但边界分割是主要失败模式，未来改进应侧重鲁棒性设计和边界感知解码。

papers.title: Towards Optimal Agentic Architectures for Offensive Security Tasks
papers.abstract: Agentic security systems increasingly audit live targets with tool-using LLMs, but prior systems fix a single coordination topology, leaving unclear when additional agents help and when they only add cost. We treat topology choice as an empirical systems question. We introduce a controlled benchmark of 20 interactive targets (10 web/API and 10 binary), each exposing one endpoint-reachable ground-truth vulnerability, evaluated in whitebox and blackbox modes. The core study executes 600 runs over five architecture families, three model families, and both access modes, with a separate 60-run long-context pilot reported only in the appendix. On the completed core benchmark, detection-any reaches 58.0% and validated detection reaches 49.8%. MAS-Indep attains the highest validated detection rate (64.2%), while SAS is the strongest efficiency baseline at $0.058 per validated finding. Whitebox materially outperforms blackbox (67.0% vs. 32.7% validated detection), and web materially outperforms binary (74.3% vs. 25.3%). Bootstrap confidence intervals and paired target-level deltas show that the dominant effects are observability and domain, while some leading whitebox topologies remain statistically close. The main result is a non-monotonic cost-quality frontier: broader coordination can improve coverage, but it does not dominate once latency, token cost, and exploit-validation difficulty are taken into account.

analysis.tldr: 通过大规模实证比较，发现安全Agent架构存在非单调成本-质量前沿，并非更多Agent协作总是更好。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Agent安全系统固定单一协调拓扑，不清楚何时增加Agent有帮助、何时只会增加成本，缺乏系统性的架构选择指导。
analysis.problem: 确定在渗透测试任务中，哪种Agent协调拓扑能在检测率、成本、延迟之间取得最优权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：白盒模式显著优于黑盒（67.0% vs 32.7%），Web任务优于二进制任务（74.3% vs 25.3%）；MAS-Indep达到最高验证检测率（64.2%），但SAS效率最高（$0.058/有效发现）；更广泛的协调可提升覆盖率，但考虑延迟、token成本和利用验证难度后并非主导。
analysis.method: 构建包含20个交互式靶标（10个Web/API和10个二进制）的受控基准，在五种架构族、三种模型族和两种访问模式下执行600次运行，比较不同拓扑的性能和成本。
contributions: 提出了一个用于评估安全Agent架构的受控基准，包含20个交互式靶标和两种访问模式。
通过大规模实验揭示了非单调的成本-质量前沿，为安全Agent拓扑选择提供了实证指导。
analysis.experiments: 在核心基准上执行600次运行，覆盖五种架构族、三种模型族和两种访问模式；另有60次长上下文试点实验（见附录）。
limitations: 基准规模有限（20个靶标），可能无法完全代表真实世界安全任务的多样性。
仅评估了有限数量的模型族和架构族，其他拓扑或模型可能产生不同结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过大规模实证比较，发现安全Agent架构存在非单调成本-质量前沿，并非更多Agent协作总是更好。

papers.title: Characterizing AlphaEarth Embedding Geometry for Agentic Environmental Reasoning
papers.abstract: Earth observation foundation models encode land surface information into dense embedding vectors, yet the geometric structure of these representations and its implications for downstream reasoning remain underexplored. We characterize the manifold geometry of Google AlphaEarth's 64-dimensional embeddings across 12.1 million Continental United States samples (2017--2023) and develop an agentic system that leverages this geometric understanding for environmental reasoning. The manifold is non-Euclidean: effective dimensionality is 13.3 (participation ratio) from 64 raw dimensions, with local intrinsic dimensionality of approximately 10. Tangent spaces rotate substantially, with 84\% of locations exceeding 60\textdegree{} and local-global alignment (mean$|\cosθ| = 0.17$) approaching the random baseline of 0.125. Supervised linear probes indicate that concept directions rotate across the manifold, and compositional vector arithmetic using both PCA-derived and probe-derived directions yields poor precision. Retrieval instead produces physically coherent results, with local geometry predicting retrieval coherence ($R^2 = 0.32$). Building on this characterization, we introduce an agentic system with nine specialized tools that decomposes environmental queries into reasoning chains over a FAISS-indexed embedding database. A five-condition ablation (120 queries, three complexity tiers) shows that embedding retrieval dominates response quality ($μ= 3.79 \pm 0.90$ vs.\ $3.03 \pm 0.77$ parametric-only; scale 1--5), with peak performance on multi-step comparisons ($μ= 4.28 \pm 0.43$). A cross-model benchmark show that geometric tools reduce Sonnet 4.5's score by 0.12 points but improve Opus 4.6's by 0.07, with Opus achieving higher geometric grounding (3.38 vs.\ 2.64), suggesting that the value of geometric characterization scales with the reasoning capability of the consuming model.

analysis.tldr: 揭示AlphaEarth嵌入的非欧几何结构，并构建基于检索的Agent系统提升环境推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 地球观测基础模型将地表信息编码为稠密嵌入向量，但这些表征的几何结构及其对下游推理的影响尚未被充分探索，限制了模型在环境推理任务中的有效利用。
analysis.problem: 如何刻画AlphaEarth嵌入的几何结构，并利用该几何理解构建有效的Agent系统以提升环境推理性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 嵌入流形是非欧几里得的：有效维度远低于原始维度，局部固有维度约10，切空间旋转显著，局部-全局对齐接近随机基线；概念方向在流形上旋转，向量算术精度差，但检索能产生物理一致的结果，且局部几何可预测检索一致性。
analysis.method: 首先通过参与率、局部固有维度、切空间对齐等指标刻画AlphaEarth嵌入的几何结构；然后构建一个包含九个专用工具的Agent系统，将环境查询分解为推理链，并在FAISS索引的嵌入数据库上进行检索。
contributions: 首次系统刻画了AlphaEarth嵌入的几何结构，揭示了其非欧几里得特性及检索优于向量算术的规律。
提出了一个基于几何理解的Agent系统，通过检索增强推理，在环境推理任务上显著优于纯参数化方法。
analysis.experiments: 在120个查询、三个复杂度层级上进行五条件消融实验，以及跨模型基准测试。结果显示嵌入检索主导响应质量（μ=3.79 vs. 3.03），几何工具对强推理模型（Opus 4.6）有正向提升。
limitations: 仅针对AlphaEarth嵌入和CONUS区域，泛化性未知。
几何工具对弱推理模型（Sonnet 4.5）有轻微负向影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 揭示AlphaEarth嵌入的非欧几何结构，并构建基于检索的Agent系统提升环境推理能力。

papers.title: Align then Refine: Text-Guided 3D Prostate Lesion Segmentation
papers.abstract: Automated 3D segmentation of prostate lesions from biparametric MRI (bp-MRI) is essential for reliable algorithmic analysis, but achieving high precision remains challenging. Volumetric methods must combine multiple modalities while ensuring anatomical consistency, but current models struggle to integrate cross-modal information reliably. While vision-language models (VLMs) are replacing the currently used architectural designs, they still lack the fine-grained, lesion-level semantics required for effective localized guidance. To address these limitations, we propose a new multi-encoder U-Net architecture incorporating three key innovations: (1) an alignment loss that enhances foreground text-image similarity to inject lesion semantics; (2) a heatmap loss that calibrates the similarity map and suppresses spurious background activations; and (3) a final-stage, confidence-gated multi-head cross-attention refiner that performs localized boundary edits in high-confidence regions. A phase-scheduled training regime stabilizes the optimization of these components. Our method consistently outperforms prior approaches, establishing a new state-of-the-art on the PI-CAI dataset through enhanced multi-modal fusion and localized text guidance. Our code is available at https://github.com/NUBagciLab/Prostate-Lesion-Segmentation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种多编码器U-Net架构，通过文本引导对齐与精炼实现前列腺病灶3D分割新SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 前列腺病灶的自动3D分割对可靠算法分析至关重要，但现有方法难以有效整合多模态信息并利用细粒度语义指导。
analysis.problem: 现有模型在双参数MRI上分割前列腺病灶时，跨模态信息融合不可靠，且视觉-语言模型缺乏病灶级语义用于局部引导。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出多编码器U-Net架构，包含三个关键创新：对齐损失增强前景文本-图像相似性、热图损失校准相似图并抑制背景激活、置信门控多头交叉注意力精炼器进行局部边界编辑，并采用分阶段训练策略。
contributions: 提出对齐损失和热图损失以注入病灶语义并抑制背景噪声
设计置信门控多头交叉注意力精炼器实现局部边界精修
在PI-CAI数据集上达到新SOTA，代码开源
analysis.experiments: 在PI-CAI数据集上评估，方法优于先前方法，达到新SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集和模态（bp-MRI）
文本引导的泛化性未在摘要中讨论
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种多编码器U-Net架构，通过文本引导对齐与精炼实现前列腺病灶3D分割新SOTA。

papers.title: Curiosity-Critic: Cumulative Prediction Error Improvement as a Tractable Intrinsic Reward for World Model Training
papers.abstract: Local prediction-error-based curiosity rewards focus on the current transition without considering the world model's cumulative prediction error across all visited transitions. We introduce Curiosity-Critic, which grounds its intrinsic reward in the improvement of this cumulative objective, and show that it admits a tractable per-step surrogate: the difference between the current prediction error and the asymptotic error baseline of the current state transition. We estimate this error baseline online with a learned critic co-trained alongside the world model; regressing a single scalar, the critic converges well before the world model saturates, redirecting exploration toward learnable transitions without oracle knowledge of the noise floor. The reward is higher for learnable transitions and collapses toward the error baseline for stochastic ones, effectively separating epistemic (reducible) from aleatoric (irreducible) prediction error online. Prior prediction-error curiosity formulations, from Schmidhuber (1991) to learned-feature-space variants, emerge as special cases corresponding to specific approximations of this error baseline. Experiments on a stochastic grid world show that Curiosity-Critic outperforms prediction-error, visitation-count, and Random Network Distillation methods in training speed and final world model accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Curiosity-Critic，用累积预测误差改进作为内在奖励，通过在线学习的误差基线区分认知与随机不确定性，提升世界模型训练效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于局部预测误差的好奇心奖励仅考虑当前转移，忽略了世界模型在所有访问转移上的累积预测误差，导致探索效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种内在奖励，能够反映世界模型累积预测误差的改进，并有效区分可减少的认知误差与不可减少的随机误差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Curiosity-Critic，将内在奖励定义为累积预测误差改进的每步代理：当前预测误差与渐近误差基线的差值。通过在线学习的 critic 估计误差基线，该 critic 与世界模型联合训练，仅回归单个标量，在世界模型饱和前收敛。
contributions: 提出基于累积预测误差改进的内在奖励，并给出可计算的每步代理形式。
引入在线学习的误差基线 critic，无需噪声底线的先验知识，自动区分认知与随机不确定性。
统一了从 Schmidhuber (1991) 到学习特征空间变体的多种预测误差好奇心方法。
analysis.experiments: 在随机网格世界上进行实验，Curiosity-Critic 在训练速度和最终世界模型准确性上优于预测误差、访问计数和随机网络蒸馏方法。
limitations: 实验仅在简单网格世界进行，未在复杂高维环境验证。
critic 的收敛性分析可能依赖特定假设。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Curiosity-Critic，用累积预测误差改进作为内在奖励，通过在线学习的误差基线区分认知与随机不确定性，提升世界模型训练效率。

papers.title: MathNet: a Global Multimodal Benchmark for Mathematical Reasoning and Retrieval
papers.abstract: Mathematical problem solving remains a challenging test of reasoning for large language and multimodal models, yet existing benchmarks are limited in size, language coverage, and task diversity. We introduce MathNet, a high-quality, large-scale, multimodal, and multilingual dataset of Olympiad-level math problems together with a benchmark for evaluating mathematical reasoning in generative models and mathematical retrieval in embedding-based systems. MathNet spans 47 countries, 17 languages, and two decades of competitions, comprising 30,676 expert-authored problems with solutions across diverse domains. In addition to the core dataset, we construct a retrieval benchmark consisting of mathematically equivalent and structurally similar problem pairs curated by human experts. MathNet supports three tasks: (i) Problem Solving, (ii) Math-Aware Retrieval, and (iii) Retrieval-Augmented Problem Solving. Experimental results show that even state-of-the-art reasoning models (78.4% for Gemini-3.1-Pro and 69.3% for GPT-5) remain challenged, while embedding models struggle to retrieve equivalent problems. We further show that retrieval-augmented generation performance is highly sensitive to retrieval quality; for example, DeepSeek-V3.2-Speciale achieves gains of up to 12%, obtaining the highest scores on the benchmark. MathNet provides the largest high-quality Olympiad dataset together with the first benchmark for evaluating mathematical problem retrieval, and we publicly release both the dataset and benchmark at https://mathnet.mit.edu.

analysis.tldr: MathNet 是一个大规模、多语言、多模态的奥数级数学推理与检索基准，涵盖 47 国 17 种语言，实验表明顶尖模型仍面临挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数学推理基准在规模、语言覆盖和任务多样性上存在局限，缺乏对数学检索能力的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 构建一个高质量、大规模、多语言、多模态的奥数级数学问题数据集，并设计推理与检索联合评测基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 收集 47 国 17 种语言、20 年间的奥数竞赛题，共 30,676 道专家编写的问题及解答；并构建由数学等价和结构相似问题对组成的检索基准。
contributions: 发布了最大规模的高质量奥数数据集 MathNet，覆盖多语言和多模态。
首次提出数学问题检索基准，并验证检索增强生成对检索质量的敏感性。
analysis.experiments: 在问题求解、数学检索和检索增强求解三项任务上评测了多个模型，Gemini-3.1-Pro 达 78.4%，GPT-5 达 69.3%，DeepSeek-V3.2-Speciale 通过检索增强提升 12%。
limitations: 仅针对奥数级别问题，可能不适用于更广泛的数学推理场景。
检索基准的构建依赖专家标注，扩展性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MathNet 是一个大规模、多语言、多模态的奥数级数学推理与检索基准，涵盖 47 国 17 种语言，实验表明顶尖模型仍面临挑战。

papers.title: MUA: Mobile Ultra-detailed Animatable Avatars
papers.abstract: Building photorealistic, animatable full-body digital humans remains a longstanding challenge in computer graphics and vision. Recent advances in animatable avatar modeling have largely progressed along two directions: improving the fidelity of dynamic geometry and appearance, or reducing computational complexity to enable deployment on resource-constrained platforms, e.g., VR headsets. However, existing approaches fail to achieve both goals simultaneously: Ultra-high-fidelity avatars typically require substantial computation on server-class GPUs, whereas lightweight avatars often suffer from limited surface dynamics, reduced appearance details, and noticeable artifacts. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel animatable avatar representation, termed Wavelet-guided Multi-level Spatial Factorized Blendshapes, and a corresponding distillation pipeline that transfers motion-aware clothing dynamics and fine-grained appearance details from a pre-trained ultra-high-quality avatar model into a compact, efficient representation. By coupling multi-level wavelet spectral decomposition with low-rank structural factorization in texture space, our method achieves up to 2000X lower computational cost and a 10X smaller model size than the original high-quality teacher avatar model, while preserving visually plausible dynamics and appearance details closely resemble those of the teacher model. Extensive comparisons with state-of-the-art methods show that our approach significantly outperforms existing avatar approaches designed for mobile settings and achieves comparable or superior rendering quality to most approaches that can only run on servers. Importantly, our representation substantially improves the practicality of high-fidelity avatars for immersive applications, achieving over 180 FPS on a desktop PC and real-time native on-device performance at 24 FPS on a standalone Meta Quest 3.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种移动端超精细可动画虚拟人表示，通过小波引导的多级空间因子化混合形状和蒸馏管道，实现高质量与低计算成本的平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可动画虚拟人方法要么追求高保真度但计算量大（需服务器级GPU），要么追求轻量化但表面动态和细节不足，无法同时满足高质量和移动端部署需求。
analysis.problem: 如何在移动设备上实现高保真、可动画的全数字人体，同时保持低计算成本和模型大小。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出小波引导的多级空间因子化混合形状表示，结合蒸馏管道，从预训练的高质量教师模型迁移运动感知的服装动态和精细外观细节到紧凑高效的学生表示。
contributions: 提出一种新颖的移动端超精细可动画虚拟人表示，利用多级小波频谱分解和纹理空间的低秩结构因子化。
设计蒸馏管道，将高质量教师模型的动态和细节迁移到紧凑表示，实现2000倍计算成本降低和10倍模型大小缩减。
在桌面PC上达到180+ FPS，在Meta Quest 3上达到24 FPS实时运行，且渲染质量与服务器级方法相当或更优。
analysis.experiments: 与多种最先进方法比较，在移动设置下显著优于现有方法，渲染质量与服务器级方法相当或更优。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练的高质量教师模型，教师模型的质量影响最终效果。
未提及对极端姿态或复杂服装动态的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种移动端超精细可动画虚拟人表示，通过小波引导的多级空间因子化混合形状和蒸馏管道，实现高质量与低计算成本的平衡。

papers.title: Sessa: Selective State Space Attention
papers.abstract: Modern sequence modeling is dominated by two families: Transformers, whose self-attention can access arbitrary elements of the visible sequence, and structured state-space models, which propagate information through an explicit recurrent state. These mechanisms face different limitations on long contexts: when attention is diffuse, the influence of individual tokens is diluted across the effective support, while recurrent state propagation can lose long-range sensitivity unless information is actively preserved. As a result, both mechanisms face challenges in preserving and selectively retrieving information over long contexts. We propose Sessa, a decoder that places attention inside a recurrent feedback path. This creates many attention-based paths through which past tokens can influence future states, rather than relying on a single attention read or a single recurrent chain. We prove that, under explicit assumptions and matched regimes, Sessa admits power-law memory tails $O(\ell^{-β})$ for $0 < β< 1$, with slower decay than in the corresponding Transformer and Mamba-style baselines. We further give an explicit construction that achieves this power-law rate. Under the same assumptions, Sessa is the only model class among those considered that realizes flexible selective retrieval, including profiles whose influence does not decay with distance. Consistent with this theoretical advantage, across matched experiments, Sessa achieves the strongest performance on long-context benchmarks while remaining competitive with Transformer and Mamba-style baselines on short-context language modeling.

analysis.tldr: Sessa通过将注意力置于循环反馈路径中，实现了长上下文上的幂律记忆衰减和灵活选择性检索。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer和状态空间模型在长上下文中分别面临注意力稀释和长程敏感性丢失的问题，亟需一种能同时保持长程记忆和选择性检索的机制。
analysis.problem: 如何在长序列中同时实现高效的幂律记忆衰减和灵活的选择性信息检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 注意力机制在长上下文中因注意力分散导致单个token影响被稀释，而循环状态传播则因信息未主动保留而丢失长程敏感性。
analysis.method: 提出Sessa解码器，将注意力机制嵌入循环反馈路径中，形成多条基于注意力的路径，使过去token通过多条路径影响未来状态。
contributions: 提出Sessa架构，结合注意力与循环反馈，实现长上下文上的幂律记忆衰减和灵活选择性检索。
理论证明Sessa在特定假设下具有比Transformer和Mamba更慢的幂律衰减，并给出显式构造。
实验表明Sessa在长上下文基准上表现最强，同时在短上下文语言建模上与基线竞争。
analysis.experiments: 在长上下文基准和短上下文语言建模上进行匹配实验，Sessa在长上下文上表现最强，短上下文上与Transformer和Mamba基线竞争。
limitations: 理论分析基于特定假设，实际泛化性需进一步验证。
未提供大规模预训练或下游任务（如推理、问答）的实验结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Sessa通过将注意力置于循环反馈路径中，实现了长上下文上的幂律记忆衰减和灵活选择性检索。

papers.title: Bounded Ratio Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) has become the predominant algorithm for on-policy reinforcement learning due to its scalability and empirical robustness across domains. However, there is a significant disconnect between the underlying foundations of trust region methods and the heuristic clipped objective used in PPO. In this paper, we bridge this gap by introducing the Bounded Ratio Reinforcement Learning (BRRL) framework. We formulate a novel regularized and constrained policy optimization problem and derive its analytical optimal solution. We prove that this solution ensures monotonic performance improvement. To handle parameterized policy classes, we develop a policy optimization algorithm called Bounded Policy Optimization (BPO) that minimizes an advantage-weighted divergence between the policy and the analytic optimal solution from BRRL. We further establish a lower bound on the expected performance of the resulting policy in terms of the BPO loss function. Notably, our framework also provides a new theoretical lens to interpret the success of the PPO loss, and connects trust region policy optimization and the Cross-Entropy Method (CEM). We additionally extend BPO to Group-relative BPO (GBPO) for LLM fine-tuning. Empirical evaluations of BPO across MuJoCo, Atari, and complex IsaacLab environments (e.g., Humanoid locomotion), and of GBPO for LLM fine-tuning tasks, demonstrate that BPO and GBPO generally match or outperform PPO and GRPO in stability and final performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出BRRL框架，推导单调改进保证，并开发BPO算法，在MuJoCo、Atari、IsaacLab及LLM微调中匹配或超越PPO。
analysis.research_motivation: PPO虽广泛使用，但其裁剪目标与信任区域方法理论基础脱节，缺乏理论保证。
analysis.problem: 解决PPO启发式裁剪目标与信任区域优化之间的理论鸿沟，并设计有理论保证的算法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出BRRL框架，通过正则化和约束优化推导解析最优解，并开发BPO算法最小化优势加权散度；扩展为GBPO用于LLM微调。
contributions: 提出BRRL框架，证明单调性能改进。
开发BPO算法，建立性能下界。
提供PPO损失的新理论解释，连接TRPO和CEM。
扩展GBPO用于LLM微调，实验验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在MuJoCo、Atari、IsaacLab（如人形运动）和LLM微调任务上评估，BPO和GBPO在稳定性和最终性能上匹配或超越PPO和GRPO。
limitations: 可能依赖优势估计的准确性。
大规模环境计算开销待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BRRL框架，推导单调改进保证，并开发BPO算法，在MuJoCo、Atari、IsaacLab及LLM微调中匹配或超越PPO。

papers.title: Agentic Forecasting using Sequential Bayesian Updating of Linguistic Beliefs
papers.abstract: We present the Bayesian Linguistic Forecaster (BLF), an agentic system for binary forecasting that achieves state-of-the-art performance on the ForecastBench benchmark. The system is built on three ideas. (1) Linguistic belief state: a semi-structured representation combining numerical probability estimates with natural-language evidence summaries, updated by the LLM at each step of an iterative tool-use loop. This contrasts with the common approach of appending all retrieved evidence to an ever-growing, unstructured context. (2) Hierarchical multi-trial aggregation: running $K$ independent trials and combining them using logit-space averaging shrinkage with a data-dependent prior. (3) Hierarchical calibration: Platt scaling with a hierarchical prior, which avoids over-shrinking extreme predictions for sources with skewed base rates. On 400 questions from the ForecastBench leaderboard, BLF outperforms all the top public methods, including Cassi, GPT-5, Grok~4.20, and Foresight-32B. Careful ablation studies, using mixed effects analysis to control for question variability (which accounts for 62\% of the variance in performance), reveals that all 3 components contribute to the overall gains, but some components matter more than others, depending on the base LLM, and the setting (e.g.\ with or without a crowd prior). All our experiments are based on a robust back-testing framework which we develop, which has a leakage rate below 1.5\%, and may be of independent interest.

analysis.tldr: 提出贝叶斯语言预测器(BLF)，通过顺序贝叶斯更新语言信念状态，在二元预测任务上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM预测系统通常将所有检索证据追加到不断增长的非结构化上下文中，导致信息冗余和更新效率低下，且缺乏系统性的不确定性量化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能有效利用LLM进行迭代证据收集、动态更新信念并输出校准概率的二元预测系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 问题变异性解释了62%的性能方差，表明控制问题间差异对评估方法贡献至关重要。
analysis.method: BLF包含三个核心组件：(1) 语言信念状态，结合数值概率和自然语言证据摘要，由LLM在迭代工具使用循环中更新；(2) 分层多试验聚合，运行K个独立试验并通过logit空间平均收缩与数据相关先验结合；(3) 分层校准，使用带分层先验的Platt缩放避免极端预测过度收缩。
contributions: 提出语言信念状态表示，实现结构化证据更新而非简单追加上下文。
设计分层多试验聚合与校准方法，提升预测校准性和鲁棒性。
在ForecastBench上超越所有公开方法，包括Cassi、GPT-5等。
analysis.experiments: 在ForecastBench的400个问题上评估，BLF优于所有顶级公开方法；通过混合效应分析控制问题变异性进行消融研究，验证三个组件均有贡献；开发了泄漏率低于1.5%的回测框架。
limitations: 依赖LLM的推理能力，可能受限于模型本身的不确定性。
多试验聚合增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出贝叶斯语言预测器(BLF)，通过顺序贝叶斯更新语言信念状态，在二元预测任务上达到SOTA。

papers.title: ReCap: Lightweight Referential Grounding for Coherent Story Visualization
papers.abstract: Story Visualization aims to generate a sequence of images that faithfully depicts a textual narrative that preserve character identity, spatial configuration, and stylistic coherence as the narratives unfold. Maintaining such cross-frame consistency has traditionally relied on explicit memory banks, architectural expansion, or auxiliary language models, resulting in substantial parameter growth and inference overhead. We introduce ReCap, a lightweight consistency framework that improves character stability and visual fidelity without modifying the base diffusion backbone. ReCap's CORE (COnditional frame REferencing) module treats anaphors, in our case pronouns, as visual anchors, activating only when characters are referred to by a pronoun and conditioning on the preceding frame to propagate visual identity. This selective design avoids unconditional cross-frame conditioning and introduces only 149K additional parameters, a fraction of the cost of memory-bank and LLM-augmented approaches. To further stabilize identity, we incorporate SemDrift (Guided Semantic Drift Correction) applied only during training. When text is vague or referential, the denoiser lacks a visual anchor for identity-defining attributes, causing character appearance to drift across frames, SemDrift corrects this by aligning denoiser representations with pretrained DINOv3 visual embeddings, enforcing semantic identity stability at zero inference cost. ReCap outperforms previous state-of-the-art, StoryGPT-V, on the two main benchmarks for story visualization by 2.63% Character-Accuracy on FlintstonesSV and by 5.65% on PororoSV, establishing a new state-of-the-art character consistency on both benchmarks. Furthermore, we extend story visualization to human-centric narratives derived from real films, demonstrating the capability of ReCap beyond stylized cartoon domains.

analysis.tldr: ReCap 通过轻量级条件帧引用和语义漂移校正，在不修改扩散主干的情况下显著提升故事可视化中角色一致性和视觉保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 故事可视化需要生成连贯的图像序列，但现有方法依赖显式记忆库或辅助语言模型，导致参数和推理开销大。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持轻量级的同时，解决故事可视化中跨帧的角色身份、空间配置和风格一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 文本模糊或指代不明时，去噪器缺乏视觉锚点，导致角色外观在帧间漂移。
analysis.method: 提出 ReCap 框架，包含 CORE 模块（条件帧引用，仅当代词出现时激活并基于前一帧传播视觉身份）和 SemDrift（训练时用 DINOv3 嵌入对齐去噪器表示，零推理成本）。
contributions: 提出轻量级一致性框架 ReCap，仅增加 149K 参数，无需修改扩散主干。
CORE 模块选择性跨帧条件化，避免无条件引用。
SemDrift 在训练时校正语义漂移，提升角色身份稳定性。
在 FlintstonesSV 和 PororoSV 上超越 StoryGPT-V，分别提升 2.63% 和 5.65% 角色准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在 FlintstonesSV 和 PororoSV 基准上评估，并扩展到真实电影的人类中心叙事。
limitations: 仅针对代词作为视觉锚点，可能不适用于其他指代形式。
SemDrift 依赖预训练 DINOv3，可能受限于其表征能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ReCap 通过轻量级条件帧引用和语义漂移校正，在不修改扩散主干的情况下显著提升故事可视化中角色一致性和视觉保真度。

papers.title: When Can LLMs Learn to Reason with Weak Supervision?
papers.abstract: Large language models have achieved significant reasoning improvements through reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR). Yet as model capabilities grow, constructing high-quality reward signals becomes increasingly difficult, making it essential to understand when RLVR can succeed under weaker forms of supervision. We conduct a systematic empirical study across diverse model families and reasoning domains under three weak supervision settings: scarce data, noisy rewards, and self-supervised proxy rewards. We find that generalization is governed by training reward saturation dynamics: models that generalize exhibit a prolonged pre-saturation phase during which training reward and downstream performance climb together, while models that saturate rapidly memorize rather than learn. We identify reasoning faithfulness, defined as the extent to which intermediate steps logically support the final answer, as the pre-RL property that predicts which regime a model falls into, while output diversity alone is uninformative. Motivated by these findings, we disentangle the contributions of continual pre-training and supervised fine-tuning, finding that SFT on explicit reasoning traces is necessary for generalization under weak supervision, while continual pre-training on domain data amplifies the effect. Applied together to Llama3.2-3B-Base, these interventions enable generalization across all three settings where the base model previously failed.

analysis.tldr: 弱监督下LLM推理泛化取决于训练奖励饱和动力学，且推理忠实度是预测泛化能力的关键预强化学习属性。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着LLM能力增强，构建高质量奖励信号越来越困难，理解弱监督下强化学习何时能成功至关重要。
analysis.problem: 在弱监督（数据稀缺、奖励噪声、自监督代理奖励）条件下，LLM通过可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）进行推理泛化的条件与机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 泛化由训练奖励饱和动力学控制：泛化的模型表现出较长的预饱和阶段，训练奖励与下游性能同步上升；快速饱和的模型则记忆而非学习。推理忠实度（中间步骤逻辑支持最终答案的程度）是预测泛化能力的预RL属性，而输出多样性无信息。
analysis.method: 系统实证研究：在多种模型族和推理领域下，对比三种弱监督设置；分析训练奖励饱和动力学；识别推理忠实度作为关键预测因子；解耦持续预训练和监督微调的贡献。
contributions: 揭示了弱监督下RLVR泛化由训练奖励饱和动力学决定，并识别推理忠实度为关键预测属性。
发现监督微调（SFT）在显式推理轨迹上是弱监督泛化的必要条件，持续预训练放大效果。
在Llama3.2-3B-Base上结合两种干预，使模型在三种弱监督设置下均实现泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在多种模型族和推理领域下进行系统实证，包括数据稀缺、噪声奖励和自监督代理奖励三种弱监督设置。
limitations: 研究主要基于特定模型族和推理任务，可能不适用于所有LLM和领域。
推理忠实度的度量方法可能依赖人工或自动评估，存在局限性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 弱监督下LLM推理泛化取决于训练奖励饱和动力学，且推理忠实度是预测泛化能力的关键预强化学习属性。

papers.title: T-REN: Learning Text-Aligned Region Tokens Improves Dense Vision-Language Alignment and Scalability
papers.abstract: Despite recent progress, vision-language encoders struggle with two core limitations: (1) weak alignment between language and dense vision features, which hurts tasks like open-vocabulary semantic segmentation; and (2) high token counts for fine-grained visual representations, which limits scalability to long videos. This work addresses both limitations. We propose T-REN (Text-aligned Region Encoder Network), an efficient encoder that maps visual data to a compact set of text-aligned region-level representations (or region tokens). T-REN achieves this through a lightweight network added on top of a frozen vision backbone, trained to pool patch-level representations within each semantic region into region tokens and align them with region-level text annotations. With only 3.7% additional parameters compared to the vision-language backbone, this design yields substantially stronger dense cross-modal understanding while reducing the token count by orders of magnitude. Specifically, T-REN delivers +5.9 mIoU on ADE20K open-vocabulary segmentation, +18.4% recall on COCO object-level text-image retrieval, +15.6% recall on Ego4D video object localization, and +17.6% mIoU on VSPW video scene parsing, all while reducing token counts by more than 24x for images and 187x for videos compared to the patch-based vision-language backbone. The code and model are available at https://github.com/savya08/T-REN.

analysis.tldr: T-REN通过轻量网络将视觉特征压缩为文本对齐的区域令牌，显著提升密集视觉-语言对齐并大幅减少令牌数量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉-语言编码器在密集视觉特征与语言的对齐上较弱，且细粒度视觉表示的高令牌数限制了长视频的可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 解决视觉-语言编码器中语言与密集视觉特征对齐弱以及令牌数量过多的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在冻结的视觉骨干上添加轻量网络，将每个语义区域内的补丁级特征池化为区域令牌，并与区域级文本标注对齐。
contributions: 提出T-REN，一种高效的编码器，将视觉数据映射为紧凑的文本对齐区域级表示。
在多个密集视觉-语言任务上取得显著性能提升，同时令牌数量减少24倍以上（图像）和187倍以上（视频）。
analysis.experiments: 在ADE20K开放词汇分割、COCO目标级文本-图像检索、Ego4D视频目标定位和VSPW视频场景解析上评估，分别提升+5.9 mIoU、+18.4% recall、+15.6% recall和+17.6% mIoU。
limitations: 可能依赖区域级文本标注的可用性。
轻量网络设计可能对复杂场景的泛化能力有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: T-REN通过轻量网络将视觉特征压缩为文本对齐的区域令牌，显著提升密集视觉-语言对齐并大幅减少令牌数量。

papers.title: Back into Plato's Cave: Examining Cross-modal Representational Convergence at Scale
papers.abstract: The Platonic Representation Hypothesis suggests that neural networks trained on different modalities (e.g., text and images) align and eventually converge toward the same representation of reality. If true, this has significant implications for whether modality choice matters at all. We show that the experimental evidence for this hypothesis is fragile and depends critically on the evaluation regime. Alignment is measured using mutual nearest neighbors on small datasets ($\approx$1K samples) and degrades substantially as the dataset is scaled to millions of samples.
