The alignment that remains between model representations reflects coarse semantic overlap rather than consistent fine-grained structure. Moreover, the evaluations in Huh et al. are done in a one-to-one image-caption setting, a constraint that breaks down in realistic many-to-many settings and further reduces alignment. We also find that the reported trend of stronger language models increasingly aligning with vision does not appear to hold for newer models. Overall, our findings suggest that the current evidence for cross-modal representational convergence is considerably weaker than subsequent works have taken it to be. Models trained on different modalities may learn equally rich representations of the world, just not the same one.

analysis.tldr: 跨模态表征收敛假说在大规模评估下证据脆弱，仅反映粗粒度语义重叠而非精细结构对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: Platonic表征假说声称不同模态的神经网络会收敛到同一现实表征，若成立将影响模态选择的重要性，但现有证据可能不可靠，需严格检验。
analysis.problem: 验证Platonic表征假说中跨模态表征收敛的稳健性，揭示其在小规模、一对一设置下的评估偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对齐度量在数据集从约1K扩展到百万样本时显著下降；剩余对齐仅反映粗粒度语义重叠，缺乏精细结构；一对一图像-文本约束在真实多对多场景下失效；语言模型与视觉对齐的趋势在新模型中不成立。
analysis.method: 通过大规模数据集（百万样本）和多对多匹配设置，重新评估跨模态表征对齐，使用互近邻度量。
contributions: 揭示Platonic表征假说的实验证据在小规模数据下脆弱，大规模评估下对齐显著退化。
发现对齐仅反映粗粒度语义重叠，且新语言模型与视觉的对齐趋势不成立。
analysis.experiments: 在百万级样本上评估跨模态对齐，并与原始小规模结果对比；测试多对多设置下的对齐变化。
limitations: 仅评估文本和图像模态，未涉及其他模态（如音频、视频）。
未提出新的对齐度量或替代假说。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 跨模态表征收敛假说在大规模评估下证据脆弱，仅反映粗粒度语义重叠而非精细结构对齐。

papers.title: A multimodal and temporal foundation model for virtual patient representations at healthcare system scale
papers.abstract: Modern medicine generates vast multimodal data across siloed systems, yet no existing model integrates the full breadth and temporal depth of the clinical record into a unified patient representation. We introduce Apollo, a multimodal temporal foundation model trained and evaluated on over three decades of longitudinal hospital records from a major US hospital system, composed of 25 billion records from 7.2 million patients, representing 28 distinct medical modalities and 12 major medical specialties. Apollo learns a unified representation space integrating over 100 thousand unique medical events in our clinical vocabulary as well as images and clinical text. This "atlas of medical concepts" forms a computational substrate for modeling entire patient care journeys comprised of sequences of structured and unstructured events, which are compressed by Apollo into virtual patient representations. To assess the potential of these whole-patient representations, we created 322 prognosis and retrieval tasks from a held-out test set of 1.4 million patients. We demonstrate the generalized clinical forecasting potential of Apollo embeddings, including predicting new disease onset risk up to five years in advance (95 tasks), disease progression (78 tasks), treatment response (59 tasks), risk of treatment-related adverse events (17 tasks), and hospital operations endpoints (12 tasks). Using feature attribution techniques, we show that model predictions align with clinically-interpretable multimodal biomarkers. We evaluate semantic similarity search on 61 retrieval tasks, and moreover demonstrate the potential of Apollo as a multimodal medical search engine using text and image queries. Together, these modeling capabilities establish the foundation for computable medicine, where the full context of patient care becomes accessible to computational reasoning.

analysis.tldr: Apollo 是一个多模态时序基础模型，利用超三十年医院记录构建虚拟患者表征，在 322 项预后和检索任务上展现临床预测潜力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代医疗数据分散于不同系统，缺乏能整合临床记录完整广度与时间深度的统一患者表征模型，限制了计算医学的发展。
analysis.problem: 如何从大规模、多模态、长时序的医院记录中学习统一的患者表征，并用于临床预后和检索任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Apollo 模型：基于 25 亿条记录、720 万患者、28 种模态和 12 个专科数据，学习包含超 10 万医学事件的统一表征空间，将结构化与非结构化事件序列压缩为虚拟患者表征。
contributions: 构建了首个大规模多模态时序基础模型 Apollo，整合 30 年医院记录。
在 322 项预后和检索任务上验证了模型性能，涵盖疾病风险预测、进展、治疗反应等。
analysis.experiments: 在 140 万患者的留出测试集上创建了 322 项任务，包括 95 项疾病风险预测（提前 5 年）、78 项疾病进展、59 项治疗反应、17 项不良事件、12 项医院运营任务，以及 61 项检索任务。
limitations: 模型仅在单一医院系统数据上训练，泛化性需跨机构验证。
摘要未提及模型在真实临床部署中的计算效率或可解释性评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Apollo 是一个多模态时序基础模型，利用超三十年医院记录构建虚拟患者表征，在 322 项预后和检索任务上展现临床预测潜力。

papers.title: Latent Phase-Shift Rollback: Inference-Time Error Correction via Residual Stream Monitoring and KV-Cache Steering
papers.abstract: Large language models frequently commit unrecoverable reasoning errors mid-generation: once a wrong step is taken, subsequent tokens compound the mistake rather than correct it. We introduce $\textbf{Latent Phase-Shift Rollback}$ (LPSR): at each generation step, we monitor the residual stream at a critical layer lcrit, detect abrupt directional reversals (phase shifts) via a cosine-similarity $+$ entropy dual gate, and respond by rolling back the KV-cache and injecting a pre-computed steering vector. No fine-tuning, gradient computation, or additional forward passes are required. LPSR achieves $\mathbf{44.0\%}$ on MATH-500 with an 8B model versus $28.8\%$ for standard AR ($+15.2$ pp; McNemar $χ^2 = 66.96$, $p < 10^{-15}$). Critically, prompted self-correction, the most natural inference-time baseline, scores only $19.8\%$, below standard AR; LPSR exceeds it by $+24.2$ pp ($χ^2 = 89.4$, $p \approx 0$). LPSR also outperforms Best-of-16 ($+7.8$ pp) at $5.4\times$ lower token cost, and surpasses a standard 70B model ($35.2\%$) with $8.75\times$ fewer parameters at ${\sim}3\times$ the token budget. A 32-layer sweep reveals a novel \textbf{detection-correction dissociation}: error-detection AUC peaks at layer~14 ($0.718$) but task accuracy peaks at layer~16 ($44.0\%$ vs.\ $29.2\%$), demonstrating that optimal monitoring depth differs for detection and correction.

analysis.tldr: 通过监控残差流中的相位反转并回滚KV缓存，无需微调即可在推理时纠正LLM错误，MATH-500上8B模型准确率44.0%。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在生成过程中一旦出现错误步骤，后续token会不断累积错误而无法自行纠正，现有推理时纠错方法（如提示自纠正）效果甚至不如标准自回归生成。
analysis.problem: 如何在无需微调、梯度计算或额外前向传播的条件下，在推理过程中检测并纠正LLM的中间错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现检测与纠正存在解耦：错误检测AUC在层14达到峰值（0.718），但任务准确率在层16最优（44.0% vs 29.2%），表明最优监控深度因任务而异。
analysis.method: 在每个生成步骤，监控关键层lcrit的残差流，通过余弦相似度+熵双门控检测方向突变（相位反转），然后回滚KV缓存并注入预计算的引导向量。
contributions: 提出LPSR方法，无需微调即可在推理时检测并纠正LLM错误，显著提升数学推理准确率。
发现检测-纠正解耦现象，为选择最优监控层提供指导。
analysis.experiments: 在MATH-500上使用8B模型，LPSR准确率44.0%，显著优于标准自回归（28.8%）、提示自纠正（19.8%）和Best-of-16（36.2%），且token成本更低；还对比了70B模型（35.2%）。
limitations: 仅针对数学推理任务验证，泛化性未知。
需要预计算引导向量，可能依赖特定领域知识。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过监控残差流中的相位反转并回滚KV缓存，无需微调即可在推理时纠正LLM错误，MATH-500上8B模型准确率44.0%。

papers.title: Benchmarking System Dynamics AI Assistants: Cloud Versus Local LLMs on CLD Extraction and Discussion
papers.abstract: We present a systematic evaluation of large language model families -- spanning both proprietary cloud APIs and locally-hosted open-source models -- on two purpose-built benchmarks for System Dynamics AI assistance: the \textbf{CLD Leaderboard} (53 tests, structured causal loop diagram extraction) and the \textbf{Discussion Leaderboard} (interactive model discussion, feedback explanation, and model building coaching). On CLD extraction, cloud models achieve 77--89\% overall pass rates; the best local model reaches 77\% (Kimi~K2.5~GGUF~Q3, zero-shot engine), matching mid-tier cloud performance. On Discussion, the best local models achieve 50--100\% on model building steps and 47--75\% on feedback explanation, but only 0--50\% on error fixing -- a category dominated by long-context prompts that expose memory limits in local deployments. A central contribution of this paper is a systematic analysis of \textit{model type effects} on performance: we compare reasoning vs.\ instruction-tuned architectures, GGUF (llama.cpp) vs.\ MLX (mlx\_lm) backends, and quantization levels (Q3 / Q4\_K\_M / MLX-3bit / MLX-4bit / MLX-6bit) across the same underlying model families. We find that backend choice has larger practical impact than quantization level: mlx\_lm does not enforce JSON schema constraints, requiring explicit prompt-level JSON instructions, while llama.cpp grammar-constrained sampling handles JSON reliably but causes indefinite generation on long-context prompts for dense models. We document the full parameter sweep ($t$, $p$, $k$) for all local models, cleaned timing data (stuck requests excluded), and a practitioner guide for running 671B--123B parameter models on Apple~Silicon.

analysis.tldr: 系统评估云端与本地LLM在系统动力学因果回路图提取与讨论任务上的表现，发现后端选择比量化级别影响更大。
analysis.research_motivation: 系统动力学建模需要专业AI助手，但现有LLM在结构化因果图提取和交互式讨论中的能力缺乏系统评估，尤其是本地部署模型与云端模型的性能差距及影响因素不明。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估不同LLM家族（云端API vs 本地开源）在系统动力学辅助任务（CLD提取和讨论）上的表现，并分析模型类型、后端、量化级别等因素的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 云端模型在CLD提取上通过率77-89%，本地最佳模型达77%；讨论任务中本地模型在模型构建步骤表现较好（50-100%），但在错误修复上仅0-50%，受限于长上下文提示的内存限制。后端选择（llama.cpp vs mlx_lm）比量化级别对性能影响更大。
analysis.method: 构建两个基准测试（CLD Leaderboard和Discussion Leaderboard），对多个LLM家族进行系统评估，并分析模型类型、后端、量化级别等参数的影响。
contributions: 提出了两个系统动力学AI辅助基准测试：CLD Leaderboard（结构化因果回路图提取）和Discussion Leaderboard（交互式模型讨论）。
系统比较了云端与本地LLM的性能，发现后端选择比量化级别影响更大，并提供了实践指南。
analysis.experiments: 在CLD Leaderboard（53个测试）和Discussion Leaderboard上评估了多个LLM家族，包括云端和本地模型，并进行了参数扫描（温度、top-p、top-k）。
limitations: 本地模型仅测试了Apple Silicon上的部署，未涵盖其他硬件。
讨论基准的评估可能受限于提示设计，未覆盖所有系统动力学场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统评估云端与本地LLM在系统动力学因果回路图提取与讨论任务上的表现，发现后端选择比量化级别影响更大。

papers.title: MultiWorld: Scalable Multi-Agent Multi-View Video World Models
papers.abstract: Video world models have achieved remarkable success in simulating environmental dynamics in response to actions by users or agents. They are modeled as action-conditioned video generation models that take historical frames and current actions as input to predict future frames. Yet, most existing approaches are limited to single-agent scenarios and fail to capture the complex interactions inherent in real-world multi-agent systems. We present \textbf{MultiWorld}, a unified framework for multi-agent multi-view world modeling that enables accurate control of multiple agents while maintaining multi-view consistency. We introduce the Multi-Agent Condition Module to achieve precise multi-agent controllability, and the Global State Encoder to ensure coherent observations across different views. MultiWorld supports flexible scaling of agent and view counts, and synthesizes different views in parallel for high efficiency. Experiments on multi-player game environments and multi-robot manipulation tasks demonstrate that MultiWorld outperforms baselines in video fidelity, action-following ability, and multi-view consistency. Project page: https://multi-world.github.io/

analysis.tldr: MultiWorld 是一个支持多智能体、多视角视频世界建模的统一框架，通过多智能体条件模块和全局状态编码器实现精确控制和视角一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频世界模型主要针对单智能体场景，无法处理真实世界中多智能体系统的复杂交互，且缺乏多视角一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可扩展的多智能体多视角视频世界模型，实现精确的多智能体控制和跨视角一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 MultiWorld 框架，包含多智能体条件模块（Multi-Agent Condition Module）实现精确控制，以及全局状态编码器（Global State Encoder）保证多视角一致性；支持灵活扩展智能体和视角数量，并行合成不同视角。
contributions: 提出统一的多智能体多视角世界建模框架 MultiWorld。
设计多智能体条件模块和全局状态编码器，实现精确控制和视角一致性。
在多人游戏和多机器人操作任务上验证了有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在多玩家游戏环境和多机器人操作任务上评估，MultiWorld 在视频保真度、动作跟随能力和多视角一致性方面优于基线。
limitations: 可能对智能体数量扩展时的计算效率有挑战。
未提及在真实复杂环境中的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MultiWorld 是一个支持多智能体、多视角视频世界建模的统一框架，通过多智能体条件模块和全局状态编码器实现精确控制和视角一致性。

papers.title: AnchorSeg: Language Grounded Query Banks for Reasoning Segmentation
papers.abstract: Reasoning segmentation requires models to ground complex, implicit textual queries into precise pixel-level masks. Existing approaches rely on a single segmentation token $\texttt{<SEG>}$, whose hidden state implicitly encodes both semantic reasoning and spatial localization, limiting the model's ability to explicitly disentangle what to segment from where to segment. We introduce AnchorSeg, which reformulates reasoning segmentation as a structured conditional generation process over image tokens, conditioned on language grounded query banks. Instead of compressing all semantic reasoning and spatial localization into a single embedding, AnchorSeg constructs an ordered sequence of query banks: latent reasoning tokens that capture intermediate semantic states, and a segmentation anchor token that provides explicit spatial grounding. We model spatial conditioning as a factorized distribution over image tokens, where the anchor query determines localization signals while contextual queries provide semantic modulation. To bridge token-level predictions and pixel-level supervision, we propose Token--Mask Cycle Consistency (TMCC), a bidirectional training objective that enforces alignment across resolutions. By explicitly decoupling spatial grounding from semantic reasoning through structured language grounded query banks, AnchorSeg achieves state-of-the-art results on ReasonSeg test set (67.7\% gIoU and 68.1\% cIoU). All code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/rui-qian/AnchorSeg.

analysis.tldr: AnchorSeg通过语言引导的查询库解耦语义推理与空间定位，在推理分割任务上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有推理分割方法依赖单一分割token隐式编码语义和空间信息，导致两者纠缠不清，限制了模型性能。
analysis.problem: 如何显式解耦推理分割中的语义推理与空间定位，提升分割精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出单一token的隐式编码方式限制了模型解耦能力，导致性能瓶颈。
analysis.method: 构建有序查询库（潜在推理token和分割锚点token），并引入Token-Mask循环一致性（TMCC）训练目标。
contributions: 提出AnchorSeg，通过语言引导的查询库显式解耦语义推理与空间定位。
设计Token-Mask循环一致性（TMCC）双向训练目标，对齐token级与像素级监督。
analysis.experiments: 在ReasonSeg测试集上达到67.7% gIoU和68.1% cIoU，超越现有方法。
limitations: 可能对复杂语言查询的推理能力有限。
查询库的构建方式可能依赖特定数据集。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AnchorSeg通过语言引导的查询库解耦语义推理与空间定位，在推理分割任务上取得SOTA。

papers.title: SynAgent: Generalizable Cooperative Humanoid Manipulation via Solo-to-Cooperative Agent Synergy
papers.abstract: Controllable cooperative humanoid manipulation is a fundamental yet challenging problem for embodied intelligence, due to severe data scarcity, complexities in multi-agent coordination, and limited generalization across objects. In this paper, we present SynAgent, a unified framework that enables scalable and physically plausible cooperative manipulation by leveraging Solo-to-Cooperative Agent Synergy to transfer skills from single-agent human-object interaction to multi-agent human-object-human scenarios. To maintain semantic integrity during motion transfer, we introduce an interaction-preserving retargeting method based on an Interact Mesh constructed via Delaunay tetrahedralization, which faithfully maintains spatial relationships among humans and objects. Building upon this refined data, we propose a single-agent pretraining and adaptation paradigm that bootstraps synergistic collaborative behaviors from abundant single-human data through decentralized training and multi-agent PPO. Finally, we develop a trajectory-conditioned generative policy using a conditional VAE, trained via multi-teacher distillation from motion imitation priors to achieve stable and controllable object-level trajectory execution. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SynAgent significantly outperforms existing baselines in both cooperative imitation and trajectory-conditioned control, while generalizing across diverse object geometries. Codes and data will be available after publication. Project Page: http://yw0208.github.io/synagent

analysis.tldr: SynAgent通过单智能体到多智能体的技能迁移，实现可泛化的协作人形操控。
analysis.research_motivation: 协作人形操控面临数据稀缺、多智能体协调复杂和泛化能力有限等挑战，现有方法难以实现可扩展且物理合理的协作行为。
analysis.problem: 如何从单智能体人-物交互数据中学习并迁移到多智能体人-物-人协作操控场景，同时保持运动语义完整性和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SynAgent框架，包含：1) 基于Delaunay四面体化的交互保持重定向方法，构建交互网格以保持空间关系；2) 单智能体预训练与适应范式，通过分散训练和多智能体PPO从单人类数据引导协作行为；3) 基于条件VAE的轨迹条件生成策略，通过多教师蒸馏从运动模仿先验学习。
contributions: 提出SynAgent框架，实现从单智能体到多智能体的技能迁移，解决协作人形操控的数据稀缺和泛化问题。
引入交互保持重定向方法，基于交互网格保持运动语义完整性。
提出单智能体预训练与适应范式，结合分散训练和多智能体PPO实现协作行为引导。
开发轨迹条件生成策略，通过多教师蒸馏实现稳定可控的物体级轨迹执行。
analysis.experiments: 在协作模仿和轨迹条件控制任务上，SynAgent显著优于现有基线，并能泛化到不同物体几何形状。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的交互网格构建，对复杂场景适应性待验证。
多智能体PPO训练可能面临扩展性问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SynAgent通过单智能体到多智能体的技能迁移，实现可泛化的协作人形操控。

papers.title: A Note on TurboQuant and the Earlier DRIVE/EDEN Line of Work
papers.abstract: This note clarifies the relationship between the recent TurboQuant work and the earlier DRIVE (NeurIPS 2021) and EDEN (ICML 2022) schemes. DRIVE is a 1-bit quantizer that EDEN extended to any $b>0$ bits per coordinate; we refer to them collectively as EDEN. First, TurboQuant$_{\text{mse}}$ is a special case of EDEN obtained by fixing EDEN's scalar scale parameter to $S=1$. EDEN supports both biased and unbiased quantization, each optimized by a different $S$ (chosen via methods described in the EDEN works). The fixed choice $S=1$ used by TurboQuant is generally suboptimal, although the optimal $S$ for biased EDEN converges to $1$ as the dimension grows; accordingly TurboQuant$_{\text{mse}}$ approaches EDEN's behavior for large $d$. Second, TurboQuant$_{\text{prod}}$ combines a biased $(b-1)$-bit EDEN step with an unbiased 1-bit QJL quantization of the residual. It is suboptimal in three ways: (1) its $(b-1)$-bit step uses the suboptimal $S=1$; (2) its 1-bit unbiased residual quantization has worse MSE than (unbiased) 1-bit EDEN; (3) chaining a biased $(b-1)$-bit step with a 1-bit unbiased residual step is inferior to unbiasedly quantizing the input directly with $b$-bit EDEN. Third, some of the analysis in the TurboQuant work mirrors that of the EDEN works: both exploit the connection between random rotations and the shifted Beta distribution, use the Lloyd-Max algorithm, and note that Randomized Hadamard Transforms can replace uniform random rotations. Experiments support these claims: biased EDEN (with optimized $S$) is more accurate than TurboQuant$_{\text{mse}}$, and unbiased EDEN is markedly more accurate than TurboQuant$_{\text{prod}}$, often by more than a bit (e.g., 2-bit EDEN beats 3-bit TurboQuant$_{\text{prod}}$). We also repeat all accuracy experiments from the TurboQuant paper, showing that EDEN outperforms it in every setup we have tried.

analysis.tldr: TurboQuant是早期EDEN方案的特例或次优变体，EDEN在精度上全面优于TurboQuant。
analysis.research_motivation: 澄清TurboQuant与早期DRIVE/EDEN方案的关系，避免重复工作和错误引用。
analysis.problem: TurboQuant声称的贡献实际上是EDEN的特例或次优变体，需要纠正这种误解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: TurboQuant的固定标量参数S=1通常次优，且其prod变体在多个方面不如EDEN。
analysis.method: 通过理论分析和实验对比，证明TurboQuant是EDEN的特例或次优变体。
contributions: 指出TurboQuant_mse是EDEN在S=1时的特例，且S=1通常次优。
指出TurboQuant_prod在三个层面次优，EDEN在精度上全面超越TurboQuant。
analysis.experiments: 重复了TurboQuant论文中的所有精度实验，EDEN在所有设置下均优于TurboQuant。
limitations: 未提供新的算法或理论贡献。
仅针对TurboQuant与EDEN的关系进行澄清。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TurboQuant是早期EDEN方案的特例或次优变体，EDEN在精度上全面优于TurboQuant。

papers.title: Advancing Vision Transformer with Enhanced Spatial Priors
papers.abstract: In recent years, the Vision Transformer (ViT) has garnered significant attention within the computer vision community. However, the core component of ViT, Self-Attention, lacks explicit spatial priors and suffers from quadratic computational complexity, limiting its applicability. To address these issues, we have proposed RMT, a robust vision backbone with explicit spatial priors for general purposes. RMT utilizes Manhattan distance decay to introduce spatial information and employs a horizontal and vertical decomposition attention method to model global information. Building on the strengths of RMT, Euclidean enhanced Vision Transformer (EVT) is an expanded version that incorporates several key improvements. Firstly, EVT uses a more reasonable Euclidean distance decay to enhance the modeling of spatial information, allowing for a more accurate representation of spatial relationships compared to the Manhattan distance used in RMT. Secondly, EVT abandons the decomposed attention mechanism featured in RMT and instead adopts a simpler spatially-independent grouping approach, providing the model with greater flexibility in controlling the number of tokens within each group. By addressing these modifications, EVT offers a more sophisticated and adaptable approach to incorporating spatial priors into the Self-Attention mechanism, thus overcoming some of the limitations associated with RMT and further enhancing its applicability in various computer vision tasks. Extensive experiments on Image Classification, Object Detection, Instance Segmentation, and Semantic Segmentation demonstrate that EVT exhibits exceptional performance. Without additional training data, EVT achieves 86.6% top1-acc on ImageNet-1k.

analysis.tldr: 提出 EVT，通过欧几里得距离衰减和空间独立分组改进 ViT 的空间先验，在多个视觉任务上取得优异性能。
analysis.research_motivation: ViT 的自注意力机制缺乏显式空间先验且计算复杂度高，限制了其应用。
analysis.problem: 如何为 ViT 引入有效的空间先验并降低计算复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用欧几里得距离衰减建模空间信息，并采用空间独立分组注意力机制替代分解注意力。
contributions: 提出 EVT，利用欧几里得距离衰减增强空间先验建模。
采用空间独立分组注意力，提高模型灵活性和效率。
analysis.experiments: 在 ImageNet-1k 上达到 86.6% top-1 准确率，并在目标检测、实例分割、语义分割任务上表现优异。
limitations: 可能未在更大规模数据集上验证。
分组策略的通用性有待进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 EVT，通过欧几里得距离衰减和空间独立分组改进 ViT 的空间先验，在多个视觉任务上取得优异性能。

papers.title: ClawEnvKit: Automatic Environment Generation for Claw-Like Agents
papers.abstract: Constructing environments for training and evaluating claw-like agents remains a manual, human-intensive process that does not scale. We argue that what is needed is not just a dataset, but an automated pipeline capable of generating diverse, verified environments on demand. To this end, we introduce ClawEnvKit, an autonomous generation pipeline that instantiates this formalism from natural language descriptions. The pipeline comprises three modules: (1) a parser that extracts structured generation parameters from natural language input; (2) a generator that produces the task specification, tool interface, and scoring configuration; and (3) a validator that enforces feasibility, diversity, structural validity, and internal consistency across the generated environments. Using ClawEnvKit, we construct Auto-ClawEval, the first large-scale benchmark for claw-like agents, comprising 1,040 environments across 24 categories. Empirically, Auto-ClawEval matches or exceeds human-curated environments on coherence and clarity at 13,800x lower cost. Evaluated across 4 model families and 8 agent harness frameworks, we find that harness engineering boosts performance by up to 15.7 percentage points over a bare ReAct baseline, completion remains the primary axis of variation with no model saturating the benchmark, and automated generation enables evaluation at a scale previously infeasible. Beyond static benchmarking, ClawEnvKit enables live evaluation: users describe a desired capability in natural language and obtain a verified environment on demand, turning evaluation into a continuous, user-driven process. The same mechanism serves as an on-demand training environment generator, producing task distributions that adapt to an agent's current weaknesses rather than being bounded by existing user logs.

analysis.tldr: 提出ClawEnvKit自动生成爪形智能体训练/评估环境，构建大规模基准Auto-ClawEval，成本降低13800倍且质量不输人工。
analysis.research_motivation: 手动构建爪形智能体环境耗时费力且难以规模化，缺乏自动化生成已验证环境的流程。
analysis.problem: 如何从自然语言描述自动生成多样化、可验证的爪形智能体训练与评估环境。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ClawEnvKit包含三个模块：解析器（从自然语言提取结构化参数）、生成器（产生任务规范、工具接口和评分配置）、验证器（确保可行性、多样性、结构有效性和内部一致性）。
contributions: 提出ClawEnvKit，首个从自然语言自动生成爪形智能体环境的流水线。
构建Auto-ClawEval，包含1040个环境、24个类别的大规模基准。
实验表明自动生成环境在连贯性和清晰度上匹配或超越人工环境，成本降低13800倍。
analysis.experiments: 在4个模型家族和8个智能体框架上评估，发现框架工程比裸ReAct基线提升最多15.7个百分点，完成率是主要变化轴，无模型饱和基准。
limitations: 仅针对爪形智能体，泛化性未知。
验证器可能无法覆盖所有环境缺陷。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ClawEnvKit自动生成爪形智能体训练/评估环境，构建大规模基准Auto-ClawEval，成本降低13800倍且质量不输人工。

papers.title: Transition-Matrix Regularization for Next Dialogue Act Prediction in Counselling Conversations
papers.abstract: This paper studies how empirical dialogue-flow statistics can be incorporated into Next Dialogue Act Prediction (NDAP). A KL regularization term is proposed that aligns predicted act distributions with corpus-derived transition patterns. Evaluated on a 60-class German counselling taxonomy using 5-fold cross-validation, this improves macro-F1 by 9--42% relative depending on encoder and substantially improves dialogue-flow alignment. Cross-dataset validation on HOPE suggests that improvements transfer across languages and counselling domains. In systematic ablations across pretrained encoders and architectures, the findings indicate that transition regularization provides consistent gains and disproportionately benefits weaker baseline models. The results suggest that lightweight discourse-flow priors complement pretrained encoders, especially in fine-grained, data-sparse dialogue tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出转移矩阵正则化方法，利用语料库对话流统计提升心理咨询对话中下一对话行为预测的宏F1值9-42%。
analysis.research_motivation: 心理咨询对话中细粒度对话行为预测面临数据稀疏问题，现有方法未充分利用对话流统计信息，导致预测与真实对话流对齐不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何将经验对话流统计信息融入下一对话行为预测（NDAP）模型，以提升预测准确性和对话流对齐度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出KL正则化项，使预测的对话行为分布与从语料库导出的转移模式对齐。
contributions: 提出转移矩阵正则化方法，有效利用对话流统计信息改进NDAP。
在60类德语心理咨询数据集上实现宏F1相对提升9-42%，并在跨语言/领域数据集HOPE上验证了迁移性。
analysis.experiments: 在60类德语心理咨询分类体系上使用5折交叉验证，评估多个预训练编码器和架构，并在HOPE数据集上进行跨数据集验证。
limitations: 仅针对心理咨询对话领域，泛化性需进一步验证。
正则化强度可能对强基线模型提升有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出转移矩阵正则化方法，利用语料库对话流统计提升心理咨询对话中下一对话行为预测的宏F1值9-42%。

papers.title: MetaCloak-JPEG: JPEG-Robust Adversarial Perturbation for Preventing Unauthorized DreamBooth-Based Deepfake Generation
papers.abstract: The rapid progress of subject-driven text-to-image synthesis, and in particular DreamBooth, has enabled a consent-free deepfake pipeline: an adversary needs only 4-8 publicly available face images to fine-tune a personalized diffusion model and produce photorealistic harmful content. Current adversarial face-protection systems -- PhotoGuard, Anti-DreamBooth, and MetaCloak -- perturb user images to disrupt surrogate fine-tuning, but all share a structural blindness: none backpropagates gradients through the JPEG compression pipeline that every major social-media platform applies before adversary access. Because JPEG quantization relies on round(), whose derivative is zero almost everywhere, adversarial energy concentrates in high-frequency DCT bands that JPEG discards, eliminating 60-80% of the protective signal. We introduce MetaCloak-JPEG, which closes this gap by inserting a Differentiable JPEG (DiffJPEG) layer built on the Straight-Through Estimator (STE): the forward pass applies standard JPEG compression, while the backward pass replaces round() with the identity. DiffJPEG is embedded in a JPEG-aware EOT distribution (~70% of augmentations include DiffJPEG) and a curriculum quality-factor schedule (QF: 95 to 50) inside a bilevel meta-learning loop. Under an l-inf perturbation budget of eps=8/255, MetaCloak-JPEG attains 32.7 dB PSNR, a 91.3% JPEG survival rate, and outperforms PhotoGuard on all 9 evaluated JPEG quality factors (9/9 wins, mean denoising-loss gain +0.125) within a 4.1 GB training-memory budget.

analysis.tldr: 提出MetaCloak-JPEG，通过可微分JPEG层和课程学习策略，使对抗性扰动在JPEG压缩后仍能有效阻止DreamBooth深度伪造。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对抗性人脸保护系统（如PhotoGuard、Anti-DreamBooth、MetaCloak）在生成扰动时未考虑社交媒体平台普遍应用的JPEG压缩，导致扰动能量集中在JPEG丢弃的高频DCT频带，保护信号损失60-80%。
analysis.problem: 如何生成对JPEG压缩鲁棒的对抗性扰动，以在用户图像经社交媒体JPEG压缩后仍能有效阻止基于DreamBooth的未经授权深度伪造生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: JPEG量化依赖round()函数，其导数几乎处处为零，导致现有方法无法通过JPEG压缩反向传播梯度，扰动能量集中在JPEG丢弃的高频DCT频带，保护信号损失60-80%。
analysis.method: 在元学习框架中插入基于直通估计器（STE）的可微分JPEG层（DiffJPEG），前向传播执行标准JPEG压缩，反向传播将round()替换为恒等函数；结合JPEG感知的EOT分布（约70%增强包含DiffJPEG）和课程质量因子调度（QF从95降至50）。
contributions: 首次将可微分JPEG压缩集成到对抗性人脸保护系统中，解决了JPEG鲁棒性问题。
提出课程质量因子调度策略，在元学习循环中逐步降低JPEG质量因子以增强鲁棒性。
在l_inf扰动预算eps=8/255下，PSNR达32.7 dB，JPEG生存率91.3%，在9个JPEG质量因子上均优于PhotoGuard。
analysis.experiments: 在l_inf扰动预算eps=8/255下，MetaCloak-JPEG达到32.7 dB PSNR，91.3% JPEG生存率，在9个评估的JPEG质量因子上均优于PhotoGuard（9/9胜，平均去噪损失增益+0.125），训练内存预算4.1 GB。
limitations: 仅针对JPEG压缩，未考虑其他图像压缩或处理操作。
可能对极高压缩率（QF<50）的鲁棒性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MetaCloak-JPEG，通过可微分JPEG层和课程学习策略，使对抗性扰动在JPEG压缩后仍能有效阻止DreamBooth深度伪造。

papers.title: Symbolic Synthesis for LTLf+ Obligations
papers.abstract: We study synthesis for obligation properties expressed in LTLfp, the extension of LTLf to infinite traces. Obligation properties are positive Boolean combinations of safety and guarantee (co-safety) properties and form the second level of the temporal hierarchy of Manna and Pnueli. Although obligation properties are expressed over infinite traces, they retain most of the simplicity of LTLf. In particular, we show that they admit a translation into symbolically represented deterministic weak automata (DWA) obtained directly from the symbolic deterministic finite automata (DFA) for the underlying LTLf properties on trace prefixes. DWA inherit many of the attractive algorithmic features of DFA, including Boolean closure and polynomial-time minimization. Moreover, we show that synthesis for LTLfp obligation properties is theoretically highly efficient - solvable in linear time once the DWA is constructed. We investigate several symbolic algorithms for solving DWA games that arise in the synthesis of obligation properties and evaluate their effectiveness experimentally. Overall, the results indicate that synthesis for LTLfp obligation properties can be performed with virtually the same effectiveness as LTLf synthesis.

analysis.tldr: 提出LTLfp义务属性的符号综合方法，利用确定性弱自动机实现高效综合。
analysis.research_motivation: LTLf综合虽有效，但扩展到无限迹时复杂度高；义务属性作为时序层次第二级，兼具表达力和简单性，但缺乏高效综合方法。
analysis.problem: 如何高效实现LTLfp义务属性的符号综合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 义务属性可转化为符号确定性弱自动机（DWA），继承DFA的布尔闭包和多项式时间最小化等优点。
analysis.method: 将LTLfp义务属性直接翻译为符号表示的确定性弱自动机（DWA），并设计符号算法求解DWA博弈。
contributions: 建立了LTLfp到符号DWA的翻译方法，保持LTLf的简洁性。
证明了LTLfp综合在DWA构建后可在线性时间内求解，并实验验证了有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于义务属性子类，未覆盖更高级时序属性。
符号算法的实际性能可能受自动机规模影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LTLfp义务属性的符号综合方法，利用确定性弱自动机实现高效综合。

papers.title: OGER: A Robust Offline-Guided Exploration Reward for Hybrid Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) have significantly improved Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning, yet models often struggle to explore novel trajectories beyond their initial latent space. While offline teacher guidance and entropy-driven strategies have been proposed to address this, they often lack deep integration or are constrained by the model's inherent capacity. In this paper, we propose OGER, a novel framework that unifies offline teacher guidance and online reinforcement learning through a specialized reward modeling lens. OGER employs multi-teacher collaborative training and constructs an auxiliary exploration reward that leverages both offline trajectories and the model's own entropy to incentivize autonomous exploration. Extensive experiments across mathematical and general reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that OGER significantly outperforms competitive baselines, achieving substantial gains in mathematical reasoning while maintaining robust generalization to out-of-domain tasks. We provide a comprehensive analysis of training dynamics and conduct detailed ablation studies to validate the effectiveness of our entropy-aware reward modulation. Our code is available at https://github.com/ecoli-hit/OGER.git.

analysis.tldr: OGER通过多教师协作和熵感知奖励统一离线引导与在线强化学习，显著提升LLM推理探索能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RLVR方法在LLM推理中难以探索新轨迹，离线引导和熵驱动策略缺乏深度集成或受限于模型容量。
analysis.problem: 如何设计统一的奖励机制，有效结合离线教师引导和在线探索，提升LLM在数学和通用推理中的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出OGER框架，采用多教师协作训练构建辅助探索奖励，结合离线轨迹和模型熵激励自主探索。
contributions: 提出OGER框架，统一离线教师引导与在线RL，通过奖励建模促进探索。
在数学和通用推理基准上显著超越基线，并保持跨域泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在数学和通用推理基准上进行实验，包括消融研究和训练动态分析，代码已开源。
limitations: 可能依赖多教师质量，教师选择不当会影响性能。
熵感知奖励的调参可能敏感，需进一步验证鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OGER通过多教师协作和熵感知奖励统一离线引导与在线强化学习，显著提升LLM推理探索能力。

papers.title: IDOBE: Infectious Disease Outbreak forecasting Benchmark Ecosystem
papers.abstract: Epidemic forecasting has become an integral part of real-time infectious disease outbreak response. While collaborative ensembles composed of statistical and machine learning models have become the norm for real-time forecasting, standardized benchmark datasets for evaluating such methods are lacking. Further, there is limited understanding on performance of these methods for novel outbreaks with limited historical data. In this paper, we propose IDOBE, a curated collection of epidemiological time series focused on outbreak forecasting. IDOBE compiles from multiple data repositories spanning over a century of surveillance and across U.S. states and global locations. We perform derivative-based segmentation to generate over 10,000 outbreaks covering multiple outcomes such as cases and hospitalizations for 13 diseases. We consider a variety of information-theoretic and distributional measures to quantify the epidemiological diversity of the dataset. Finally, we perform multi-horizon short-term forecasting (1- to 4-week-ahead) through the progression of the outbreak using 11 baseline models and report on their performance. In addition to standard metrics such as NMSE and MAPE for point forecasts, we include probabilistic scoring rules such as Normalized Weighted Interval Score (NWIS) to quantify the performance. We find that MLP-based methods have the most robust performance, with statistical methods having a slight edge during the pre-peak phase. IDOBE dataset along with baselines are released publicly on https://github.com/NSSAC/IDOBE to enable standardized, reproducible benchmarking of outbreak forecasting methods.

analysis.tldr: IDOBE 是一个面向传染病暴发预测的标准化基准数据集和评估生态系统，包含超过 10,000 个暴发时间序列和 11 个基线模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 实时传染病暴发预测中缺乏标准化基准数据集，且对缺乏历史数据的新暴发方法性能理解不足。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一、多样化的暴发预测基准数据集和标准化评估框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从多个数据仓库编译跨越一个世纪的监测数据，使用基于导数的分割生成超过 10,000 个暴发序列，并采用信息论和分布度量量化多样性，最后用 11 个基线模型进行多步预测评估。
contributions: 构建了 IDOBE 基准数据集，包含 13 种疾病的 10,000+ 暴发时间序列。
提供了 11 个基线模型的多步预测性能评估，发现 MLP 方法最鲁棒，统计方法在峰值前略有优势。
analysis.experiments: 在 11 个基线模型上进行了 1-4 周预测，使用 NMSE、MAPE 和 NWIS 等指标评估，发现 MLP 方法最鲁棒。
limitations: 可能未涵盖所有地区或疾病类型。
基线模型有限，未包含最新深度学习方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: IDOBE 是一个面向传染病暴发预测的标准化基准数据集和评估生态系统，包含超过 10,000 个暴发时间序列和 11 个基线模型。

papers.title: LLM Safety From Within: Detecting Harmful Content with Internal Representations
papers.abstract: Guard models are widely used to detect harmful content in user prompts and LLM responses. However, state-of-the-art guard models rely solely on terminal-layer representations and overlook the rich safety-relevant features distributed across internal layers. We present SIREN, a lightweight guard model that harnesses these internal features. By identifying safety neurons via linear probing and combining them through an adaptive layer-weighted strategy, SIREN builds a harmfulness detector from LLM internals without modifying the underlying model. Our comprehensive evaluation shows that SIREN substantially outperforms state-of-the-art open-source guard models across multiple benchmarks while using 250 times fewer trainable parameters. Moreover, SIREN exhibits superior generalization to unseen benchmarks, naturally enables real-time streaming detection, and significantly improves inference efficiency compared to generative guard models. Overall, our results highlight LLM internal states as a promising foundation for practical, high-performance harmfulness detection.

analysis.tldr: 利用LLM内部表示中的安全神经元，通过轻量级探测构建高效有害内容检测器。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有防护模型仅依赖终端层表示，忽略了内部层丰富的安全相关特征，导致性能受限且参数量大。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM内部层的安全相关特征，构建轻量、高效且泛化性强的有害内容检测器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM内部层存在安全神经元，通过线性探测可识别，且不同层对安全检测的贡献不同。
analysis.method: SIREN：通过线性探测识别安全神经元，采用自适应层加权策略融合内部特征，构建轻量级有害内容检测器。
contributions: 提出SIREN，利用LLM内部表示进行有害内容检测，参数量减少250倍。
在多个基准上显著优于现有开源防护模型，并展现出更好的泛化性和实时检测能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个有害内容检测基准上评估，SIREN显著优于现有开源防护模型，且参数量减少250倍。
limitations: 依赖LLM内部表示的可获取性，可能不适用于黑盒模型。
线性探测可能无法捕捉复杂的安全特征交互。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用LLM内部表示中的安全神经元，通过轻量级探测构建高效有害内容检测器。

papers.title: UDM-GRPO: Stable and Efficient Group Relative Policy Optimization for Uniform Discrete Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Uniform Discrete Diffusion Model (UDM) has recently emerged as a promising paradigm for discrete generative modeling; however, its integration with reinforcement learning remains largely unexplored. We observe that naively applying GRPO to UDM leads to training instability and marginal performance gains. To address this, we propose UDM-GRPO, the first framework to integrate UDM with RL. Our method is guided by two key insights: (i) treating the final clean sample as the action provides more accurate and stable optimization signals; and (ii) reconstructing trajectories via the diffusion forward process better aligns probability paths with the pretraining distribution. Additionally, we introduce two strategies, Reduced-Step and CFG-Free, to further improve training efficiency. UDM-GRPO significantly improves base model performance across multiple T2I tasks. Notably, GenEval accuracy improves from $69\%$ to $96\%$ and PickScore increases from $20.46$ to $23.81$, achieving state-of-the-art performance in both continuous and discrete settings. On the OCR benchmark, accuracy rises from $8\%$ to $57\%$, further validating the generalization ability of our method. Code is available at https://github.com/Yovecent/UDM-GRPO.

analysis.tldr: 提出UDM-GRPO框架，通过将最终干净样本作为动作和利用扩散前向过程重建轨迹，实现均匀离散扩散模型与强化学习的稳定高效集成。
analysis.research_motivation: 均匀离散扩散模型（UDM）在离散生成建模中前景广阔，但其与强化学习的集成尚未被探索，且简单应用GRPO会导致训练不稳定和性能提升有限。
analysis.problem: 如何将GRPO有效应用于UDM，解决训练不稳定和性能增益不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，直接将GRPO应用于UDM会导致训练不稳定和边际性能提升。
analysis.method: 提出UDM-GRPO框架，核心包括：(i) 将最终干净样本作为动作，提供更准确稳定的优化信号；(ii) 通过扩散前向过程重建轨迹，使概率路径与预训练分布更好对齐；并引入Reduced-Step和CFG-Free策略提升训练效率。
contributions: 首个将UDM与RL集成的框架UDM-GRPO
提出将最终干净样本作为动作和利用扩散前向过程重建轨迹两种关键洞察
引入Reduced-Step和CFG-Free策略提升训练效率
在多个T2I任务上实现SOTA性能，GenEval准确率从69%提升至96%，PickScore从20.46提升至23.81
analysis.experiments: 在多个T2I任务上评估，GenEval准确率从69%提升至96%，PickScore从20.46提升至23.81，OCR基准准确率从8%提升至57%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于均匀离散扩散模型，对其他离散模型泛化性未知
训练效率提升策略可能引入额外超参数
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出UDM-GRPO框架，通过将最终干净样本作为动作和利用扩散前向过程重建轨迹，实现均匀离散扩散模型与强化学习的稳定高效集成。

papers.title: S2H-DPO: Hardness-Aware Preference Optimization for Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable progress in single-image understanding, yet effective reasoning across multiple images remains challenging. We identify a critical capability gap in existing multi-image alignment approaches: current methods focus primarily on localized reasoning with pre-specified image indices (``Look at Image 3 and...''), bypassing the essential skills of global visual search and autonomous cross-image comparison. To address this limitation, we introduce a Simple-to-Hard (S2H) learning framework that systematically constructs multi-image preference data across three hierarchical reasoning levels requiring an increasing level of capabilities: (1) single-image localized reasoning, (2) multi-image localized comparison, and (3) global visual search. Unlike prior work that relies on model-specific attributes, such as hallucinations or attention heuristics, to generate preference pairs, our approach leverages prompt-driven complexity to create chosen/rejected pairs that are applicable across different models. Through extensive evaluations on LLaVA and Qwen-VL models, we show that our diverse multi-image reasoning data significantly enhances multi-image reasoning performance, yielding significant improvements over baseline methods across benchmarks. Importantly, our approach maintains strong single-image reasoning performance while simultaneously strengthening multi-image understanding capabilities, thus advancing the state of the art for holistic visual preference alignment.

analysis.tldr: 提出S2H-DPO框架，通过分层难度偏好数据提升VLM多图像推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM在多图像推理中缺乏全局视觉搜索和自主跨图像比较能力，而当前对齐方法仅关注局部推理。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地构建多图像偏好数据，以提升VLM在多图像推理中的全局搜索和比较能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Simple-to-Hard (S2H)学习框架，构建三个层次的多图像偏好数据：单图像局部推理、多图像局部比较、全局视觉搜索，通过提示驱动复杂度生成偏好对。
contributions: 识别了VLM多图像对齐中的能力差距，即缺乏全局视觉搜索和自主跨图像比较。
提出S2H-DPO框架，通过分层难度偏好数据提升多图像推理性能。
analysis.experiments: 在LLaVA和Qwen-VL模型上评估，多图像推理性能显著提升，同时保持单图像推理能力。
limitations: 可能依赖特定提示设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论对超大规模模型的效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出S2H-DPO框架，通过分层难度偏好数据提升VLM多图像推理能力。

papers.title: Different Paths to Harmful Compliance: Behavioral Side Effects and Mechanistic Divergence Across LLM Jailbreaks
papers.abstract: Open-weight language models can be rendered unsafe through several distinct interventions, but the resulting models may differ substantially in capabilities, behavioral profile, and internal failure mode. We study behavioral and mechanistic properties of jailbroken models across three unsafe routes: harmful supervised fine-tuning (SFT), harmful reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), and refusal-suppressing abliteration. All three routes achieve near-ceiling harmful compliance, but they diverge once we move beyond direct harmfulness. RLVR-jailbroken models show minimal degradation and preserve explicit harm recognition in a structured self-audit: they are able to identify harmful prompts and describe how a safe LLM should respond, yet they comply with the harmful request. With RLVR, harmful behavior is strongly suppressed by a reflective safety scaffold: when a harmful prompt is prepended with an instruction to reflect on safety standards, harmful behavior drops close to the baseline. Category-specific RLVR jailbreaks generalize broadly across harmfulness domains. Models jailbroken with SFT show the largest collapse in explicit safety judgments, the highest behavioral drift, and a substantial capability loss on standard benchmarks. Abliteration is family-dependent in both self-audit and response to a reflective safety scaffold. Mechanistic and repair analyses further separate the routes: abliteration is consistent with localized refusal-feature deletion, RLVR with preserved safety geometry but retargeted policy behavior, and SFT with broader distributed drift. Targeted repair partially recovers RLVR-jailbroken models, but has little effect on SFT-jailbroken models. Together, these results show that jailbreaks can produce vastly different properties despite similar harmfulness, with models jailbroken via RLVR showing remarkable similarity to the base model.

analysis.tldr: 不同越狱路径（SFT、RLVR、abliteration）虽都实现高有害遵从，但在能力、行为与内部机制上存在显著差异，其中RLVR越狱模型保留安全认知但选择遵从。
analysis.research_motivation: 开源语言模型可通过多种干预变得不安全，但不同越狱方法对模型能力、行为特征和内部故障模式的影响尚不清楚，理解这些差异对安全评估和修复至关重要。
analysis.problem: 研究三种越狱路径（有害SFT、有害RLVR、拒绝抑制abliteration）在有害遵从之外的行为和机制差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RLVR越狱模型在结构化自审计中能识别有害提示并描述安全响应，但仍遵从有害请求；反射性安全支架可强烈抑制其有害行为；SFT越狱模型安全判断崩溃、行为漂移大、能力损失严重；abliteration效果依赖模型家族。
analysis.method: 通过有害SFT、有害RLVR和拒绝抑制abliteration三种方式获得越狱模型，比较其有害遵从、安全自审计、反射性安全支架响应、能力基准、行为漂移，并进行机制分析和修复实验。
contributions: 系统比较了三种越狱路径在有害遵从之外的行为和机制差异
发现RLVR越狱模型保留安全认知但选择遵从，且反射性安全支架可有效抑制其有害行为
揭示了不同越狱路径的机制差异：abliteration对应局部拒绝特征删除，RLVR保留安全几何但重定向策略，SFT对应广泛分布漂移
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及了有害遵从率、安全自审计、反射性安全支架响应、能力基准、行为漂移、机制分析和修复实验。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定模型和越狱方法，泛化性需验证
机制分析可能依赖特定解释方法，结论的稳健性需进一步确认
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 不同越狱路径（SFT、RLVR、abliteration）虽都实现高有害遵从，但在能力、行为与内部机制上存在显著差异，其中RLVR越狱模型保留安全认知但选择遵从。

papers.title: Document-as-Image Representations Fall Short for Scientific Retrieval
papers.abstract: Many recent document embedding models are trained on document-as-image representations, embedding rendered pages as images rather than the underlying source. Meanwhile, existing benchmarks for scientific document retrieval, such as ArXivQA and ViDoRe, treat documents as images of pages, implicitly favoring such representations. In this work, we argue that this paradigm is not well-suited for text-rich multimodal scientific documents, where critical evidence is distributed across structured sources, including text, tables, and figures. To study this setting, we introduce ArXivDoc, a new benchmark constructed from the underlying LaTeX sources of scientific papers. Unlike PDF or image-based representations, LaTeX provides direct access to structured elements (e.g., sections, tables, figures, equations), enabling controlled query construction grounded in specific evidence types. We systematically compare text-only, image-based, and multimodal representations across both single-vector and multi-vector retrieval models. Our results show that: (1) document-as-image representations are consistently suboptimal, especially as document length increases; (2) text-based representations are most effective, even for figure-based queries, by leveraging captions and surrounding context; and (3) interleaved text+image representations outperform document-as-image approaches without requiring specialized training.

analysis.tldr: 文档即图像表示在科学文献检索中不如纯文本表示，新基准ArXivDoc揭示其随文档长度增加性能下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有科学文献检索基准（如ArXivQA、ViDoRe）默认使用文档即图像表示，但该范式是否适合文本丰富的多模态科学文档尚不清楚，且缺乏基于结构化源（如LaTeX）的评估。
analysis.problem: 评估文档即图像表示在科学文献检索中的有效性，并比较文本、图像及多模态表示的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 文档即图像表示在长文档检索中表现次优；纯文本表示即使对基于图像的查询也最有效，得益于标题和上下文；交错文本+图像表示无需专门训练即可超越文档即图像方法。
analysis.method: 构建ArXivDoc基准，从LaTeX源中提取结构化元素（章节、表格、图表、公式），并系统比较单向量和多向量检索模型下的文本、图像及多模态表示。
contributions: 提出ArXivDoc基准，基于LaTeX源构建，支持细粒度查询构建。
系统比较不同表示在科学文献检索中的表现，揭示文档即图像表示的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 在ArXivDoc基准上，使用单向量和多向量检索模型，比较文本、图像及多模态表示的性能。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准仅基于科学论文，可能不适用于其他领域。
未探讨文档即图像表示在非科学文档上的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 文档即图像表示在科学文献检索中不如纯文本表示，新基准ArXivDoc揭示其随文档长度增加性能下降。

papers.title: Learning the Riccati solution operator for time-varying LQR via Deep Operator Networks
papers.abstract: We propose a computational framework for replacing the repeated numerical solution of differential Riccati equations in finite-horizon Linear Quadratic Regulator (LQR) problems by a learned operator surrogate. Instead of solving a nonlinear matrix-valued differential equation for each new system instance, we construct offline an approximation of the associated solution operator mapping time-dependent system parameters to the Riccati trajectory. The resulting model enables fast online evaluation of approximate optimal feedbacks across a wide class of systems, thereby shifting the computational burden from repeated numerical integration to a one-time learning stage. From a theoretical perspective, we establish control-theoretic guarantees for this operator-based approximation. In particular, we derive bounds quantifying how operator approximation errors propagate to feedback performance, trajectory accuracy, and cost suboptimality, and we prove that exponential stability of the closed-loop system is preserved under sufficiently accurate operator approximation. These results provide a framework to assess the reliability of data-driven approximations in optimal control. On the computational side, we design tailored DeepONet architectures for matrix-valued, time-dependent problems and introduce a progressive learning strategy to address scalability with respect to the system dimension. Numerical experiments on both time-invariant and time-varying LQR problems demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves high accuracy and strong generalization across a wide range of system configurations, while delivering substantial computational speedups compared to classical solvers. The method offers an effective and scalable alternative for parametric and real-time optimal control applications.

analysis.tldr: 用深度算子网络学习时变LQR的Riccati解算子，实现快速在线反馈控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 有限时域LQR问题中，每次系统参数变化都需要重新数值求解微分Riccati方程，计算成本高，难以满足实时控制需求。
analysis.problem: 如何高效近似时变LQR问题的Riccati解算子，避免重复数值积分。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建DeepONet架构学习从时变系统参数到Riccati轨迹的映射，并采用渐进学习策略处理高维系统。
contributions: 提出用算子学习替代重复数值求解Riccati方程的计算框架，实现快速在线评估。
推导了算子近似误差对反馈性能、轨迹精度和代价次优性的传播界，并证明在足够精确近似下闭环系统指数稳定性保持不变。
设计了针对矩阵值时变问题的DeepONet架构和渐进学习策略，数值实验验证了高精度、强泛化和显著加速。
analysis.experiments: 在时不变和时变LQR问题上进行数值实验，表明方法达到高精度、强泛化，并相比经典求解器实现大幅计算加速。
limitations: 可能对极高维系统或极长时域存在扩展性挑战。
理论保证依赖于近似误差足够小，实际中误差界可能保守。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用深度算子网络学习时变LQR的Riccati解算子，实现快速在线反馈控制。

papers.title: Faster by Design: Interactive Aerodynamics via Neural Surrogates Trained on Expert-Validated CFD
papers.abstract: Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) is central to race-car aerodynamic development, yet its cost -- tens of thousands of core-hours per high-fidelity evaluation -- severely limits the design space exploration feasible within realistic budgets. AI-based surrogate models promise to alleviate this bottleneck, but progress has been constrained by the limited complexity of public datasets, which are dominated by smoothed passenger-car shapes that fail to exercise surrogates on the thin, complex, highly loaded components governing motorsport performance. This work presents three primary contributions. First, we introduce a high-fidelity RANS dataset built on a parametric LMP2-class CAD model and spanning six operating conditions (map points) covering straight-line and cornering regimes, generated and validated by aerodynamics experts at Dallara to preserve features relevant to industrial motorsport. Second, we present the Gauge-Invariant Spectral Transformer (GIST), a graph-based neural operator whose spectral embeddings encode mesh connectivity to enhance predictions on tightly packed, complex geometries. GIST guarantees discretization invariance and scales linearly with mesh size, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy on both public benchmarks and the proposed race-car dataset. Third, we demonstrate that GIST achieves a level of predictive accuracy suitable for early-stage aerodynamic design, providing a first validation of the concept of interactive design-space exploration -- where engineers query a surrogate in place of the CFD solver -- within industrial motorsport workflows.

analysis.tldr: 提出GIST图神经算子，在专家验证的赛车CFD数据集上实现高精度气动代理，支持交互式设计空间探索。
analysis.research_motivation: CFD高保真评估成本极高（数万核时），严重限制了设计空间探索；现有AI代理模型受限于公开数据集的简单性，无法处理赛车运动中薄而复杂的部件。
analysis.problem: 如何构建高精度、离散化不变且可扩展的神经代理模型，以替代CFD求解器进行早期气动设计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Gauge-Invariant Spectral Transformer (GIST)，一种基于图的神经算子，利用谱嵌入编码网格连接性，保证离散化不变性且计算复杂度与网格规模线性相关。
contributions: 构建了基于参数化LMP2级CAD模型的高保真RANS数据集，涵盖6种工况，由Dallara空气动力学专家生成并验证。
提出GIST模型，在公开基准和赛车数据集上达到最先进精度，支持交互式设计空间探索。
analysis.experiments: 在公开基准和提出的赛车数据集上评估，GIST达到最先进精度，且预测精度适用于早期气动设计。
limitations: 可能仅适用于稳态RANS模拟，未涉及瞬态或更高保真度CFD。
交互式设计空间探索的实用性需进一步在工业流程中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GIST图神经算子，在专家验证的赛车CFD数据集上实现高精度气动代理，支持交互式设计空间探索。

papers.title: LQM: Linguistically Motivated Multidimensional Quality Metrics for Machine Translation
papers.abstract: Existing MT evaluation frameworks, including automatic metrics and human evaluation schemes such as Multidimensional Quality Metrics (MQM), are largely language-agnostic. However, they often fail to capture dialect- and culture-specific errors in diglossic languages (e.g., Arabic), where translation failures stem from mismatches in language variety, content coverage, and pragmatic appropriateness rather than surface form alone.We introduce LQM: Linguistically Motivated Multidimensional Quality Metrics for MT. LQM is a hierarchical error taxonomy for diagnosing MT errors through six linguistically grounded levels: sociolinguistics, pragmatics, semantics, morphosyntax, orthography, and graphetics (Figure 1). We construct a bidirectional parallel corpus of 3,850 sentences (550 per variety) spanning seven Arabic dialects (Egyptian, Emirati, Jordanian, Mauritanian, Moroccan, Palestinian, and Yemeni), derived from conversational, culturally rich content. We evaluate six LLMs in a zero-shot setting and conduct expert span-level human annotation using LQM, producing 6,113 labeled error spans across 3,495 unique erroneous sentences, along with severity-weighted quality scores. We complement this analysis with an automatic metric (spBLEU). Though validated here on Arabic, LQM is a language-agnostic framework designed to be easily applied to or adapted for other languages. LQM annotated errors data, prompts, and annotation guidelines are publicly available at https://github.com/UBC-NLP/LQM_MT.

analysis.tldr: 提出语言感知的多维质量指标LQM，用于诊断机器翻译中方言和文化特定错误。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MT评估框架（如自动指标和MQM）是语言无关的，无法捕捉双语方言（如阿拉伯语）中因语言变体、内容覆盖和语用适切性导致的翻译失败。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能诊断机器翻译中方言和文化特定错误的分层错误分类体系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LQM，一个基于语言学的分层错误分类体系，包含社会语言学、语用学、语义学、形态句法、正字法和图形学六个层面；构建了覆盖7种阿拉伯方言的双向平行语料库，并进行了专家级跨度级人工标注。
contributions: 提出LQM，一个语言感知的多维质量指标框架，用于诊断MT中的方言和文化特定错误。
构建了包含7种阿拉伯方言、3850句的双向平行语料库，并提供了6113个标注错误跨度和严重性加权质量分数。
analysis.experiments: 在零样本设置下评估了6个LLM，并使用LQM进行了专家级跨度级人工标注，同时使用了自动指标spBLEU。
limitations: 当前验证仅针对阿拉伯语，其他语言的有效性需进一步验证。
依赖专家标注，成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语言感知的多维质量指标LQM，用于诊断机器翻译中方言和文化特定错误。

papers.title: Adversarial Humanities Benchmark: Results on Stylistic Robustness in Frontier Model Safety
papers.abstract: The Adversarial Humanities Benchmark (AHB) evaluates whether model safety refusals survive a shift away from familiar harmful prompt forms. Starting from harmful tasks drawn from MLCommons AILuminate, the benchmark rewrites the same objectives through humanities-style transformations while preserving intent. This extends literature on Adversarial Poetry and Adversarial Tales from single jailbreak operators to a broader benchmark family of stylistic obfuscation and goal concealment. In the benchmark results reported here, the original attacks record 3.84% attack success rate (ASR), while transformed methods range from 36.8% to 65.0%, yielding 55.75% overall ASR across 31 frontier models. Under a European Union AI Act Code-of-Practice-inspired systemic-risk lens, Chemical, biological, radiological and nuclear (CBRN) is the highest bucket. Taken together, this lack of stylistic robustness suggests that current safety techniques suffer from weak generalization: deep understanding of 'non-maleficence' remains a central unresolved problem in frontier model safety.

analysis.tldr: 通过人文风格改写有害提示，发现前沿模型安全拒绝机制存在严重风格鲁棒性缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有模型安全评估主要依赖标准有害提示，但模型在面对风格化改写（如诗歌、故事）时可能失效，缺乏对风格鲁棒性的系统评测。
analysis.problem: 评估前沿模型在有害意图不变但提示风格从标准形式转换为人文风格时，安全拒绝机制是否仍然有效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 原始攻击成功率仅3.84%，而风格转换后攻击成功率升至36.8%-65.0%，总体ASR达55.75%，表明安全技术泛化能力弱。
analysis.method: 基于MLCommons AILuminate有害任务，通过人文风格变换（如诗歌、故事）改写提示，构建对抗性人文基准（AHB），并测试31个前沿模型。
contributions: 提出对抗性人文基准（AHB），系统评估模型对风格化有害提示的鲁棒性。
揭示当前安全技术缺乏风格鲁棒性，CBRN类别风险最高。
analysis.experiments: 在31个前沿模型上测试，原始攻击ASR 3.84%，风格转换后ASR 36.8%-65.0%，总体ASR 55.75%。
limitations: 仅针对特定风格变换（人文类），未覆盖其他风格。
未深入分析模型内部机制为何失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过人文风格改写有害提示，发现前沿模型安全拒绝机制存在严重风格鲁棒性缺陷。

papers.title: Xiaomi OneVL: One-Step Latent Reasoning and Planning with Vision-Language Explanation
papers.abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning has become a powerful driver of trajectory prediction in VLA-based autonomous driving, yet its autoregressive nature imposes a latency cost that is prohibitive for real-time deployment. Latent CoT methods attempt to close this gap by compressing reasoning into continuous hidden states, but consistently fall short of their explicit counterparts. We suggest that this is due to purely linguistic latent representations compressing a symbolic abstraction of the world, rather than the causal dynamics that actually govern driving. Thus, we present OneVL (One-step latent reasoning and planning with Vision-Language explanations), a unified VLA and World Model framework that routes reasoning through compact latent tokens supervised by dual auxiliary decoders. Alongside a language decoder that reconstructs text CoT, we introduce a visual world model decoder that predicts future-frame tokens, forcing the latent space to internalize the causal dynamics of road geometry, agent motion, and environmental change. A three-stage training pipeline progressively aligns these latents with trajectory, language, and visual objectives, ensuring stable joint optimization. In inference, the auxiliary decoders are discarded, and all latent tokens are prefilled in a single parallel pass, matching the speed of answer-only prediction. Across four benchmarks, OneVL becomes the first latent CoT method to surpass explicit CoT, delivering superior accuracy at answer-only latency. These results show that with world model supervision, latent CoT produces more generalizable representations than verbose token-by-token reasoning. Code has been open-sourced to the community. Project Page: https://xiaomi-embodied-intelligence.github.io/OneVL

analysis.tldr: OneVL通过视觉世界模型监督的潜空间推理，首次在自动驾驶轨迹预测中实现潜CoT超越显式CoT，且推理速度与无CoT方法相当。
analysis.research_motivation: 显式CoT推理在VLA自动驾驶中延迟高，无法实时部署；潜CoT方法虽试图压缩推理为连续隐状态，但性能始终不及显式CoT，现有方法因仅用语言表征而丢失因果动力学。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种潜CoT方法，使其在保持显式CoT精度的同时，达到无CoT方法的推理速度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，纯语言潜表征压缩的是世界的符号抽象，而非驾驶所需的因果动力学，导致潜CoT性能不足。
analysis.method: 提出OneVL框架，在语言解码器之外引入视觉世界模型解码器预测未来帧，迫使潜空间学习因果动力学；采用三阶段训练对齐轨迹、语言和视觉目标；推理时丢弃辅助解码器，所有潜token单次并行预填充。
contributions: 首次实现潜CoT在自动驾驶轨迹预测中超越显式CoT，且推理速度与无CoT方法相同。
提出视觉世界模型监督的潜空间学习方法，使潜表征泛化性优于逐token显式推理。
analysis.experiments: 在四个基准上评估，OneVL成为首个超越显式CoT的潜CoT方法，精度更高且延迟与无CoT相当。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定驾驶场景，泛化到极端情况需验证。
三阶段训练流程可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OneVL通过视觉世界模型监督的潜空间推理，首次在自动驾驶轨迹预测中实现潜CoT超越显式CoT，且推理速度与无CoT方法相当。

papers.title: XEmbodied: A Foundation Model with Enhanced Geometric and Physical Cues for Large-Scale Embodied Environments
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models drive next-generation autonomous systems, but training them requires scalable, high-quality annotations from complex environments. Current cloud pipelines rely on generic vision-language models (VLMs) that lack geometric reasoning and domain semantics due to their 2D image-text pretraining. To address this mismatch, we propose XEmbodied, a cloud-side foundation model that endows VLMs with intrinsic 3D geometric awareness and interaction with physical cues (e.g., occupancy grids, 3D boxes). Instead of treating geometry as auxiliary input, XEmbodied integrates geometric representations via a structured 3D Adapter and distills physical signals into context tokens using an Efficient Image-Embodied Adapter. Through progressive domain curriculum and reinforcement learning post-training, XEmbodied preserves general capabilities while demonstrating robust performance across 18 public benchmarks. It significantly improves spatial reasoning, traffic semantics, embodied affordance, and out-of-distribution generalization for large-scale scenario mining and embodied VQA.

analysis.tldr: 提出XEmbodied，通过3D适配器和物理信号蒸馏增强VLM的几何与物理感知，提升具身场景性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型依赖2D图像-文本预训练的VLM，缺乏几何推理和领域语义，难以适应大规模具身环境。
analysis.problem: 如何为云端VLM注入内在的3D几何感知和物理线索交互能力，以提升其在具身环境中的空间推理和泛化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出XEmbodied，包含结构化3D适配器集成几何表征，以及高效图像-具身适配器将物理信号蒸馏为上下文令牌，并通过渐进式领域课程学习和强化学习后训练。
contributions: 提出XEmbodied，一种增强几何与物理线索的云端基础模型。
在18个公开基准上显著提升空间推理、交通语义、具身可供性和分布外泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在18个公开基准上评估，显示鲁棒性能提升。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量3D标注数据。
云端部署可能引入延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出XEmbodied，通过3D适配器和物理信号蒸馏增强VLM的几何与物理感知，提升具身场景性能。

papers.title: WorldDB: A Vector Graph-of-Worlds Memory Engine with Ontology-Aware Write-Time Reconciliation
papers.abstract: Persistent memory is the bottleneck separating stateless chatbots from long-running agentic systems. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) over flat vector stores fragments facts into chunks, loses cross-session identity, and has no first-class notion of supersession or contradiction. Recent bitemporal knowledge-graph systems (Graphiti, Memento, Hydra DB) add typed edges and valid-time metadata, but the graph itself remains flat: no recursive composition, no content-addressed invariants on nodes, and edge types carry no behavior beyond a label. We present WorldDB, a memory engine built on three commitments: (i) every node is a world -- a container with its own interior subgraph, ontology scope, and composed embedding, recursive to arbitrary depth; (ii) nodes are content-addressed and immutable, so any edit produces a new hash at the node and every ancestor, giving a Merkle-style audit trail for free; (iii) edges are write-time programs -- each edge type ships on_insert/on_delete/on_query_rewrite handlers (supersession closes validity, contradicts preserves both sides, same_as stages a merge proposal), so no raw append path exists. On LongMemEval-s (500 questions, ~115k-token conversational stacks), WorldDB with Claude Opus 4.7 as answerer achieves 96.40% overall / 97.11% task-averaged accuracy, a +5.61pp improvement over the previously reported Hydra DB state-of-the-art (90.79%) and +11.20pp over Supermemory (85.20%), with perfect single-session-assistant recall and robust performance on temporal reasoning (96.24%), knowledge update (98.72%), and preference synthesis (96.67%). Ablations show that the engine's graph layer -- resolver-unified entities and typed refers_to edges -- contributes +7.0pp task-averaged independently of the underlying answerer.

analysis.tldr: WorldDB 提出一种基于向量图的世界记忆引擎，通过递归世界节点、内容寻址和可编程边实现跨会话持久记忆，在 LongMemEval-s 上超越先前 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 RAG 系统将事实碎片化，缺乏跨会话身份和矛盾处理机制；双时态知识图谱虽引入类型边和元数据，但图结构扁平，缺乏递归组合和内容寻址不变性，边类型无行为语义。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个支持递归组合、内容寻址审计和可编程边行为的持久记忆引擎，以解决长运行 agent 系统中的记忆碎片化、身份丢失和矛盾处理问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: WorldDB 基于三个核心设计：1) 每个节点是一个世界（递归子图容器）；2) 节点内容寻址且不可变，编辑产生新哈希形成 Merkle 审计链；3) 边是写时程序，每种边类型携带 on_insert/on_delete/on_query_rewrite 处理器。
contributions: 提出递归世界节点和内容寻址的不可变记忆结构，提供免费 Merkle 审计追踪。
设计可编程边类型，通过写时处理器实现自动超期、矛盾保留和合并提议。
在 LongMemEval-s 上达到 96.40% 准确率，超越先前 SOTA 5.61 个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 在 LongMemEval-s（500 问题，~115k 令牌对话栈）上评估，使用 Claude Opus 4.7 作为回答器，总体准确率 96.40%，任务平均准确率 97.11%，消融实验显示图层独立贡献 +7.0pp。
limitations: 依赖外部大模型（Claude Opus 4.7）作为回答器，可能引入模型偏差。
递归世界节点的计算开销和存储成本未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: WorldDB 提出一种基于向量图的世界记忆引擎，通过递归世界节点、内容寻址和可编程边实现跨会话持久记忆，在 LongMemEval-s 上超越先前 SOTA。

papers.title: SemLT3D: Semantic-Guided Expert Distillation for Camera-only Long-Tailed 3D Object Detection
papers.abstract: Camera-only 3D object detection has emerged as a cost-effective and scalable alternative to LiDAR for autonomous driving, yet existing methods primarily prioritize overall performance while overlooking the severe long-tail imbalance inherent in real-world datasets. In practice, many rare but safety-critical categories such as children, strollers, or emergency vehicles are heavily underrepresented, leading to biased learning and degraded performance. This challenge is further exacerbated by pronounced inter-class ambiguity (e.g., visually similar subclasses) and substantial intra-class diversity (e.g., objects varying widely in appearance, scale, pose, or context), which together hinder reliable long-tail recognition. In this work, we introduce SemLT3D, a Semantic-Guided Expert Distillation framework designed to enrich the representation space for underrepresented classes through semantic priors. SemLT3D consists of: (1) a language-guided mixture-of-experts module that routes 3D queries to specialized experts according to their semantic affinity, enabling the model to better disentangle confusing classes and specialize on tail distributions; and (2) a semantic projection distillation pipeline that aligns 3D queries with CLIP-informed 2D semantics, producing more coherent and discriminative features across diverse visual manifestations. Although motivated by long-tail imbalance, the semantically structured learning in SemLT3D also improves robustness under broader appearance variations and challenging corner cases, offering a principled step toward more reliable camera-only 3D perception.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义引导的专家蒸馏框架SemLT3D，利用语义先验和CLIP对齐提升纯相机3D检测的长尾性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 纯相机3D检测中真实数据集存在严重长尾不平衡，安全关键类别（如儿童、婴儿车）样本稀少，且存在类间模糊和类内多样性，导致模型偏向头部类别，长尾识别性能差。
analysis.problem: 如何利用语义先验增强纯相机3D检测中长尾类别的表征，缓解类间混淆和类内多样性带来的识别困难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出长尾类别（如儿童、婴儿车）严重不足，类间模糊（如视觉相似的子类）和类内多样性（外观、尺度、姿态、上下文变化）共同阻碍可靠的长尾识别。
analysis.method: 提出SemLT3D框架，包含两个核心模块：(1) 语言引导的混合专家模块，根据语义亲和性将3D查询路由到专门专家，解耦混淆类别并专注尾部分布；(2) 语义投影蒸馏管道，将3D查询与CLIP引导的2D语义对齐，生成更一致和判别性的特征。
contributions: 提出SemLT3D，首个利用语义先验和专家蒸馏解决纯相机3D检测长尾问题的框架。
设计语言引导的混合专家模块和语义投影蒸馏管道，有效缓解类间混淆和类内多样性。
实验表明SemLT3D不仅提升长尾性能，还增强了对广泛外观变化和困难角落案例的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖CLIP的语义先验，可能受限于CLIP对特定类别或场景的表示能力。
混合专家模块可能增加计算开销，部署效率需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义引导的专家蒸馏框架SemLT3D，利用语义先验和CLIP对齐提升纯相机3D检测的长尾性能。

papers.title: A Generalized Synthetic Control Method for Baseline Estimation in Demand Response Services
papers.abstract: Baseline estimation is critical to Demand Response (DR) settlement in electricity markets, yet existing machine learning methods remain limited in predictive performance, while methodologies from causal inference and counterfactual prediction are still underutilized in this domain. We introduce a Generalized Synthetic Control Method that builds on the classical Synthetic Control Method (SCM) from econometrics. While SCM provides a powerful framework for counterfactual estimation, classical SCM remains a static estimator: it fits the treated unit as a combination of contemporaneous donor units and therefore ignores predictable temporal structure in the residual error. We develop a generalized SCM framework that transforms baseline estimation into a dynamic counterfactual prediction problem by augmenting the donor representation with exogenous features, lagged treated load, and selected lagged donor signals. This enriched representation allows the estimator to capture autoregressive dependence, delayed donor-response patterns, and error-correction effects beyond the scope of standard SCM. The framework further accommodates nonlinear predictors when linear weighting is inadequate, with the greatest benefit arising in limited-data settings. Experiments on the Ausgrid smart-meter dataset show consistent improvements over classical SCM and strong benchmark methods, with the dominant performance gains driven by dynamic augmentation.

analysis.tldr: 将经典合成控制法扩展为动态反事实预测框架，用于电力需求响应基线估计，在Ausgrid数据集上优于传统方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 需求响应结算中基线估计至关重要，但现有机器学习方法预测性能有限，且因果推断与反事实预测方法在该领域未被充分利用。
analysis.problem: 如何利用反事实预测框架提升需求响应基线估计的准确性，克服经典合成控制法作为静态估计器忽略残差中可预测时间结构的局限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 经典合成控制法作为静态估计器，忽略残差中可预测的时间结构，导致预测精度不足。
analysis.method: 提出广义合成控制法，通过用外生特征、滞后处理负荷和选定的滞后供体信号增强供体表示，将基线估计转化为动态反事实预测问题，并支持非线性预测器。
contributions: 将基线估计形式化为动态反事实预测问题，提出广义合成控制框架。
通过动态增强表示捕获自回归依赖、延迟供体响应和误差修正效应。
在Ausgrid数据集上验证了相对于经典SCM和强基准方法的持续改进。
analysis.experiments: 在Ausgrid智能电表数据集上进行实验，结果显示相对于经典SCM和强基准方法有一致改进，主要性能提升来自动态增强。
limitations: 可能对特征选择敏感，需要领域知识确定合适的滞后和外生变量。
非线性扩展在数据充足时可能收益递减。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将经典合成控制法扩展为动态反事实预测框架，用于电力需求响应基线估计，在Ausgrid数据集上优于传统方法。

papers.title: Asset Harvester: Extracting 3D Assets from Autonomous Driving Logs for Simulation
papers.abstract: Closed-loop simulation is a core component of autonomous vehicle (AV) development, enabling scalable testing, training, and safety validation before real-world deployment. Neural scene reconstruction converts driving logs into interactive 3D environments for simulation, but it does not produce complete 3D object assets required for agent manipulation and large-viewpoint novel-view synthesis. To address this challenge, we present Asset Harvester, an image-to-3D model and end-to-end pipeline that converts sparse, in-the-wild object observations from real driving logs into complete, simulation-ready assets. Rather than relying on a single model component, we developed a system-level design for real-world AV data that combines large-scale curation of object-centric training tuples, geometry-aware preprocessing across heterogeneous sensors, and a robust training recipe that couples sparse-view-conditioned multiview generation with 3D Gaussian lifting. Within this system, SparseViewDiT is explicitly designed to address limited-angle views and other real-world data challenges. Together with hybrid data curation, augmentation, and self-distillation, this system enables scalable conversion of sparse AV object observations into reusable 3D assets.

analysis.tldr: 提出Asset Harvester系统，从自动驾驶日志中提取完整3D资产用于仿真。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶开发需要闭环仿真，但现有神经场景重建无法生成可操作的完整3D物体资产，限制了智能体操控和大视角新视图合成。
analysis.problem: 如何从自动驾驶日志中稀疏、非受控的物体观测生成完整、可仿真的3D资产。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 端到端流水线，包括大规模物体中心训练元组筛选、几何感知预处理、稀疏视图条件多视图生成（SparseViewDiT）与3D高斯提升，结合混合数据筛选、增强和自蒸馏。
contributions: 提出Asset Harvester系统，实现从真实驾驶日志到仿真就绪3D资产的端到端转换。
设计SparseViewDiT模块，专门处理有限视角等真实世界数据挑战。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定传感器配置，泛化性需验证。
资产质量可能受稀疏观测质量影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Asset Harvester系统，从自动驾驶日志中提取完整3D资产用于仿真。

papers.title: An Integrated Deep-Learning Framework for Peptide-Protein Interaction Prediction and Target-Conditioned Peptide Generation with ConGA-PepPI and TC-PepGen
papers.abstract: Motivation: Peptide-protein interactions (PepPIs) are central to cellular regulation and peptide therapeutics, but experimental characterization remains too slow for large-scale screening. Existing methods usually emphasize either interaction prediction or peptide generation, leaving candidate prioritization, residue-level interpretation, and target-conditioned expansion insufficiently integrated. Results: We present an integrated framework for early-stage peptide screening that combines a partner-aware prediction and localization model (ConGA-PepPI) with a target-conditioned generative model (TC-PepGen). ConGA-PepPI uses asymmetric encoding, bidirectional cross-attention, and progressive transfer from pair prediction to binding-site localization, while TC-PepGen preserves target information throughout autoregressive decoding via layerwise conditioning. In five-fold cross-validation, ConGA-PepPI achieved 0.839 accuracy and 0.921 AUROC, with binding-site AUPR values of 0.601 on the protein side and 0.950 on the peptide side, and remained competitive on external benchmarks. Under a controlled length-conditioned benchmark, 40.39% of TC-PepGen peptides exceeded native templates in AlphaFold 3 ipTM, and unconstrained generation retained evidence of target-conditioned signal.

analysis.tldr: 提出集成框架ConGA-PepPI和TC-PepGen，分别用于肽-蛋白相互作用预测和靶标条件肽生成，在交叉验证中表现优异。
analysis.research_motivation: 肽-蛋白相互作用对细胞调控和肽治疗至关重要，但实验表征速度慢，现有方法通常只侧重预测或生成，缺乏整合。
analysis.problem: 如何同时实现准确的肽-蛋白相互作用预测、残基级解释和靶标条件肽生成，以支持早期肽筛选。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出集成框架：ConGA-PepPI使用非对称编码、双向交叉注意力和渐进迁移实现预测与定位；TC-PepGen通过逐层条件化在自回归解码中保留靶标信息。
contributions: 提出ConGA-PepPI模型，结合预测与结合位点定位，实现高精度和可解释性。
提出TC-PepGen模型，通过逐层条件化实现靶标条件肽生成。
在交叉验证中ConGA-PepPI达到0.839准确率和0.921 AUROC，TC-PepGen生成肽中40.39%超过天然模板。
analysis.experiments: 五折交叉验证和外部基准测试，ConGA-PepPI准确率0.839，AUROC 0.921；TC-PepGen在长度条件基准中40.39%生成肽的AlphaFold 3 ipTM超过天然模板。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
生成肽的实用性需实验验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出集成框架ConGA-PepPI和TC-PepGen，分别用于肽-蛋白相互作用预测和靶标条件肽生成，在交叉验证中表现优异。

papers.title: Using large language models for embodied planning introduces systematic safety risks
papers.abstract: Large language models are increasingly used as planners for robotic systems, yet how safely they plan remains an open question. To evaluate safe planning systematically, we introduce DESPITE, a benchmark of 12,279 tasks spanning physical and normative dangers with fully deterministic validation. Across 23 models, even near-perfect planning ability does not ensure safety: the best-planning model fails to produce a valid plan on only 0.4% of tasks but produces dangerous plans on 28.3%. Among 18 open-source models from 3B to 671B parameters, planning ability improves substantially with scale (0.4-99.3%) while safety awareness remains relatively flat (38-57%). We identify a multiplicative relationship between these two capacities, showing that larger models complete more tasks safely primarily through improved planning, not through better danger avoidance. Three proprietary reasoning models reach notably higher safety awareness (71-81%), while non-reasoning proprietary models and open-source reasoning models remain below 57%. As planning ability approaches saturation for frontier models, improving safety awareness becomes a central challenge for deploying language-model planners in robotic systems.

analysis.tldr: LLM作为机器人规划器存在系统性安全风险，规划能力与安全意识呈乘法关系，规模提升主要改善规划而非安全。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM越来越多地用于机器人规划，但其规划的安全性尚未得到系统评估，现有方法无法区分规划能力与安全意识。
analysis.problem: 系统评估LLM在具身规划中的安全性，并揭示规划能力与安全意识之间的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 规划能力与安全意识呈乘法关系：模型规模提升主要改善规划能力（0.4-99.3%），安全意识提升有限（38-57%）；最佳规划模型在28.3%的任务中产生危险计划。
analysis.method: 构建DESPITE基准（12,279个任务，涵盖物理和规范危险，确定性验证），评估23个模型的规划能力和安全意识。
contributions: 提出DESPITE基准，系统评估LLM规划安全性
发现规划能力与安全意识的乘法关系，揭示规模提升的局限性
analysis.experiments: 在23个模型（含开源3B-671B参数和专有推理模型）上评估，开源模型安全意识38-57%，专有推理模型71-81%。
limitations: 基准任务可能未覆盖所有现实危险场景
仅评估确定性验证，未考虑随机环境
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM作为机器人规划器存在系统性安全风险，规划能力与安全意识呈乘法关系，规模提升主要改善规划而非安全。

papers.title: Progressive Online Video Understanding with Evidence-Aligned Timing and Transparent Decisions
papers.abstract: Visual agents operating in the wild must respond to queries precisely when sufficient evidence first appears in a video stream, a critical capability that is overlooked by conventional video LLMs evaluated in offline settings. The shift to an online, streaming paradigm introduces significant challenges: a lack of decision transparency, the difficulty of aligning response timing with visual evidence, and the need to maintain a global, causally consistent understanding under tight computational budgets. To address these issues, we propose a novel framework that decouples reasoning control from memory integration. We introduce \textbf{\model{}}, an instantiation of this framework with two core components. First, the \emph{Active Thinking Decision Maker (ATDM)} is a transparent reasoning controller that externalizes its decision process using observable progress ($\boldsymbolρ$) and confidence ($\boldsymbol{c}$) metrics. This allows it to precisely time its response $t_r$ to match the first-sufficient-evidence timestamp $t^\star$ while streaming its reasoning to the user. Second, the \emph{Hierarchical Progressive Semantic Integration (HPSI)} module acts as an efficient memory system. It employs a set of learnable, multi-level aggregation tokens that are propagated across clips to build a rich, global cognitive state without exceeding token budgets. %Our approach sets a new standard on key online video understanding benchmarks, achieving strong performance of \textbf{71.6\%} on StreamingBench and \textbf{46.9\%} on OVOBench, demonstrating a robust solution for evidence-aligned and transparent online video analysis. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of ATDM and HPSI, e.g., Thinking-QwenVL improves the accuracy of the previous state-of-the-art from 67.63\% to 71.60\% on the StreamingBench benchmark.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种在线视频理解框架，通过解耦推理控制与记忆集成，实现证据对齐的响应时机和透明决策。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统视频LLM在离线场景下评估，忽略了在线流式视频中需在证据首次出现时即时响应的关键能力，且面临决策不透明、响应时机与视觉证据对齐困难、计算预算紧张下保持全局因果一致性的挑战。
analysis.problem: 在线流式视频理解中，如何实现证据对齐的响应时机、透明决策以及高效全局记忆集成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出框架解耦推理控制与记忆集成，包含两个核心组件：Active Thinking Decision Maker (ATDM) 通过可观测的进度ρ和置信度c指标外部化决策过程，精确对齐响应时间与首次充分证据时间戳；Hierarchical Progressive Semantic Integration (HPSI) 模块使用可学习的多级聚合令牌跨片段传播，构建丰富的全局认知状态而不超出令牌预算。
contributions: 提出解耦推理控制与记忆集成的在线视频理解框架。
设计ATDM实现透明推理和证据对齐的响应时机。
设计HPSI实现高效全局记忆集成。
analysis.experiments: 在StreamingBench和OVOBench上评估，Thinking-QwenVL在StreamingBench上将准确率从67.63%提升至71.60%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定视频LLM架构，泛化性需验证。
在线场景下的实时性开销未详细讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种在线视频理解框架，通过解耦推理控制与记忆集成，实现证据对齐的响应时机和透明决策。

papers.title: ESsEN: Training Compact Discriminative Vision-Language Transformers in a Low-Resource Setting
papers.abstract: Vision-language modeling is rapidly increasing in popularity with an ever expanding list of available models. In most cases, these vision-language models have parameters in the tens of billions, which is necessary for some needs, but in many cases smaller models are necessary (e.g., on edge devices or independent robotic platforms). Unfortunately, there is little research in producing light-weight models or in training them with small datasets. Inspired by the language learning progression and data sparsity in child development, in this paper, we address both of these goals in a systematic fashion.
