We show that two-tower encoder models are superior to one-tower encoders in low-resource settings for discriminative English tasks. We show also that incorporating traditional convolutional networks into the two-tower transformer architecture can help produce parameter efficient vision-language models. Finally, we show that the cross-modal fusion module of two-tower encoders can vary significantly in shape and size while producing the same results. In addition, we present ESsEN, a compact vision-language model that can be trained end-to-end with relatively few resources that performs as well on several tasks with only a fraction of the parameters compared to other models. The experimental results and the tools we present here make vision-language modeling more accessible to a wider variety of researchers.

analysis.tldr: 提出ESsEN紧凑型视觉-语言模型，在低资源设置下通过双塔编码器和卷积网络实现高效判别任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型参数庞大（数十亿），不适合边缘设备或小型数据集场景，而轻量级模型和低资源训练研究不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在低资源（小数据集、有限计算）条件下训练紧凑且有效的判别式视觉-语言Transformer。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 双塔编码器在低资源判别任务中优于单塔；卷积网络融入双塔架构可提升参数效率；跨模态融合模块的形状和大小对结果影响不大。
analysis.method: 提出ESsEN模型，采用双塔编码器架构，融入传统卷积网络以提升参数效率，并设计灵活的跨模态融合模块。
contributions: 证明双塔编码器在低资源判别任务中优于单塔编码器。
提出ESsEN紧凑模型，在参数远少于其他模型的情况下，在多个任务上表现相当。
analysis.experiments: 在多个判别式英语任务上评估，ESsEN以较少参数达到与其他模型相当的性能。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅针对判别式英语任务，未涉及生成式或多语言场景。
跨模态融合模块的灵活性可能带来设计选择上的不确定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ESsEN紧凑型视觉-语言模型，在低资源设置下通过双塔编码器和卷积网络实现高效判别任务。

papers.title: ProtoCLIP: Prototype-Aligned Latent Refinement for Robust Zero-Shot Chest X-Ray Classification
papers.abstract: Zero-shot vision-language models (VLMs) have shown promise for chest radiograph classification, but their performance is often limited by confounding label co-occurrence, long-tail class imbalance, and transfer instability under domain shift. We propose ProtoCLIP, a refinement strategy for CLIP-style VLMs that improves zero-shot discrimination through targeted data curation and distilled anchor alignment. Specifically, we construct pathology-focused training subsets with curated negative samples to reduce co-occurrence bias. We also introduce a representation-preserving distillation objective to stabilize adaptation while maintaining semantic structure and improving discrimination of clinically relevant co-occurring pathologies. Evaluated on an unseen dataset VinDr-CXR, ProtoCLIP improves AUC by 2-10 percentage points over a strong CLIP-based baseline across multiple findings. For pneumothorax specifically, ProtoCLIP achieves a state-of-the-art AUC of 0.94. These results demonstrate that anchor-guided refinement, coupled with curated supervision and controlled adaptation, can mitigate common zero-shot transfer failures in medical VLMs without requiring large-scale retraining.

analysis.tldr: ProtoCLIP通过原型对齐的潜在精炼策略，在不重新训练的情况下显著提升CLIP在胸部X光零样本分类中的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 零样本视觉语言模型在胸部X光分类中受限于标签共现混淆、长尾类别不平衡和领域偏移下的迁移不稳定性，亟需轻量级精炼方法提升性能。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行大规模重训练的前提下，缓解CLIP在医学影像零样本分类中的共现偏差和迁移不稳定问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出标签共现、长尾不平衡和领域偏移是导致零样本迁移失败的关键因素。
analysis.method: 构建病理聚焦的训练子集并引入负样本以降低共现偏差，同时设计表示保持蒸馏目标来稳定适应并提升对临床相关共现病理的区分能力。
contributions: 提出ProtoCLIP，一种针对CLIP的零样本精炼策略，通过数据筛选和蒸馏对齐提升分类性能。
在VinDr-CXR数据集上实现2-10个百分点的AUC提升，气胸检测达到0.94的SOTA AUC。
analysis.experiments: 在未见数据集VinDr-CXR上评估，与强CLIP基线对比，AUC提升2-10个百分点，气胸AUC达0.94。
limitations: 仅在一个数据集上验证，泛化性需更多测试。
方法依赖病理聚焦子集的构建，可能引入额外标注成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ProtoCLIP通过原型对齐的潜在精炼策略，在不重新训练的情况下显著提升CLIP在胸部X光零样本分类中的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Revisiting Change VQA in Remote Sensing with Structured and Native Multimodal Qwen Models
papers.abstract: Change visual question answering (Change VQA) addresses the problem of answering natural-language questions about semantic changes between bi-temporal remote sensing (RS) images. Although vision-language models (VLMs) have recently been studied for temporal RS image understanding, Change VQA remains underexplored in the context of modern multimodal models. In this letter, we revisit the CDVQA benchmark using recent Qwen models under a unified low-rank adaptation (LoRA) setting. We compare Qwen3-VL, which follows a structured vision-language pipeline with multi-depth visual conditioning and a full-attention decoder, with Qwen3.5, a native multimodal model that combines a single-stage alignment with a hybrid decoder backbone. Experimental results on the official CDVQA test splits show that recent VLMs improve over earlier specialized baselines. They further show that performance does not scale monotonically with model size, and that native multimodal models are more effective than structured vision-language pipelines for this task. These findings indicate that tightly integrated multimodal backbones contribute more to performance than scale or explicit multi-depth visual conditioning for language-driven semantic change reasoning in RS imagery.

analysis.tldr: 对比结构化与原生多模态Qwen模型在遥感变化VQA任务上的表现，发现原生多模态模型更有效。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感变化VQA任务在现有VLM中研究不足，需要探索现代多模态模型在该任务上的适用性。
analysis.problem: 评估结构化视觉语言管道（如Qwen3-VL）与原生多模态模型（如Qwen3.5）在遥感变化VQA任务上的性能差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 性能不随模型规模单调提升，原生多模态模型优于结构化视觉语言管道。
analysis.method: 在统一LoRA微调设置下，比较Qwen3-VL（结构化管道）与Qwen3.5（原生多模态）在CDVQA基准上的表现。
contributions: 首次在统一LoRA设置下系统比较结构化与原生多模态Qwen模型在遥感变化VQA上的性能。
发现原生多模态模型比结构化管道更有效，且性能不随模型规模单调提升。
analysis.experiments: 在官方CDVQA测试集上进行了实验，结果显示近期VLM优于早期基线，且原生多模态模型表现更好。
limitations: 仅基于Qwen模型，可能不适用于其他架构。
未提供具体数值结果，仅定性结论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对比结构化与原生多模态Qwen模型在遥感变化VQA任务上的表现，发现原生多模态模型更有效。

papers.title: MedProbeBench: Systematic Benchmarking at Deep Evidence Integration for Expert-level Medical Guideline
papers.abstract: Recent advances in deep research systems enable large language models to retrieve, synthesize, and reason over large-scale external knowledge. In medicine, developing clinical guidelines critically depends on such deep evidence integration. However, existing benchmarks fail to evaluate this capability in realistic workflows requiring multi-step evidence integration and expert-level judgment. To address this gap, we introduce MedProbeBench, the first benchmark leveraging high-quality clinical guidelines as expert-level references. Medical guidelines, with their rigorous standards in neutrality and verifiability, represent the pinnacle of medical expertise and pose substantial challenges for deep research agents. For evaluation, we propose MedProbe-Eval, a comprehensive evaluation framework featuring: (1) Holistic Rubrics with 1,200+ task-adaptive rubric criteria for comprehensive quality assessment, and (2) Fine-grained Evidence Verification for rigorous validation of evidence precision, grounded in 5,130+ atomic claims. Evaluation of 17 LLMs and deep research agents reveals critical gaps in evidence integration and guideline generation, underscoring the substantial distance between current capabilities and expert-level clinical guideline development. Project: https://github.com/uni-medical/MedProbeBench

analysis.tldr: 首个以临床指南为专家级参考的深度证据整合基准，揭示当前LLM在生成专家级临床指南上的显著差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床指南制定依赖深度证据整合，但现有基准无法评估模型在多步证据整合和专家级判断上的真实能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏能够评估大语言模型在临床指南生成中深度证据整合能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对17个LLM和深度研究代理的评估显示，当前模型在证据整合和指南生成方面存在关键差距，距离专家级临床指南开发能力尚远。
analysis.method: 构建MedProbeBench基准，包含高质量临床指南作为参考；提出MedProbe-Eval评估框架，含1200+任务自适应评分标准和5130+原子声明的细粒度证据验证。
contributions: 首个以临床指南为专家级参考的深度证据整合基准MedProbeBench。
提出MedProbe-Eval综合评估框架，包含全面质量评估和细粒度证据验证。
analysis.experiments: 评估了17个LLM和深度研究代理，揭示了证据整合和指南生成中的关键差距。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖临床指南领域，泛化性待验证。
评估框架依赖人工标注的评分标准和原子声明，扩展成本高。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个以临床指南为专家级参考的深度证据整合基准，揭示当前LLM在生成专家级临床指南上的显著差距。

papers.title: Six Llamas: Comparative Religious Ethics Through LoRA-Adapted Language Models
papers.abstract: We present Six Llamas, a comparative study examining whether large language models fine-tuned on distinct religious corpora encode systematically different patterns of ethical reasoning. Six variants of Meta-Llama-3.1-8B are constructed: one unmodified control and five LoRA-adapted models trained exclusively on the sacred and theological texts of Christianity, Islam, Judaism, Hinduism, or Buddhism. All six models are probed with an identical battery of 17 standardized ethical prompts spanning moral dilemmas, game-theoretic scenarios, public policy questions, and moral-psychological self-assessments. To assess robustness and reproducibility, we implement a multi-temperature sampling design spanning ten temperature settings. We compute response consistency metrics, pairwise inter-model agreement rates, temperature sensitivity coefficients across four prompt domains, and run-to-run stability analyses. Findings show that LoRA-adapted models produce ethical reasoning patterns that are (a) systematically differentiated from the base model, (b) consistent with the moral logics of their training traditions, (c) structured along interpretable dimensions in moral-philosophical space, (d) core ethical positions remain stable across temperature variations for high-consensus dilemmas. The Trolley Problem achieves 100% consistency across all models and temperatures, while (e) tradition-specific divergence intensifies at higher temperatures in morally contested domains, and (f) the base model exhibits the highest overall response consistency (mean 88.3%), suggesting LoRA adaptation introduces both tradition-specific signal and increased sampling sensitivity. The study offers a proof-of-concept for the condensate comparative method using differentially trained language models as instruments for cultural and ethical analysis and identifies specific criteria for falsification and planned extensions.

analysis.tldr: 通过LoRA微调五种宗教文本的LLM，发现其伦理推理模式与训练传统一致，且温度越高分歧越大。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM伦理研究多关注通用对齐，缺乏对特定文化/宗教传统如何塑造模型伦理推理的系统比较，而宗教文本蕴含丰富的道德逻辑，为探究文化嵌入性提供了独特窗口。
analysis.problem: 如何通过LoRA微调构建不同宗教传统的LLM变体，并系统比较其伦理推理模式的差异、一致性与温度敏感性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LoRA微调模型产生与训练传统一致的伦理推理模式；温度升高时，道德争议领域的分歧加剧；基础模型响应一致性最高（平均88.3%），表明LoRA引入传统信号的同时增加了采样敏感性。
analysis.method: 基于Meta-Llama-3.1-8B，构建1个未修改控制模型和5个LoRA微调模型（分别训练于基督教、伊斯兰教、犹太教、印度教、佛教文本），使用17个标准化伦理提示（涵盖道德困境、博弈论场景、公共政策、道德心理自评）进行探测，采用多温度采样（10个温度设置）并计算一致性指标、成对模型一致率、温度敏感系数和运行稳定性。
contributions: 提出一种利用LoRA微调LLM进行比较宗教伦理分析的新方法（冷凝比较法）。
系统揭示了不同宗教传统微调模型在伦理推理上的差异化模式、温度依赖性及可解释性维度。
analysis.experiments: 使用17个标准化伦理提示，10个温度设置，计算响应一致性、成对一致率、温度敏感系数和运行稳定性。摘要未提供具体数值结果（除基础模型一致性88.3%和电车难题100%一致性外）。
limitations: 仅基于单一基础模型（8B参数），可能无法推广到更大或不同架构的模型。
宗教文本的选择和预处理可能引入偏差，且未涵盖所有主要宗教传统。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过LoRA微调五种宗教文本的LLM，发现其伦理推理模式与训练传统一致，且温度越高分歧越大。

papers.title: AlphaContext: An Evolutionary Tree-based Psychometric Context Generator for Creativity Assessment
papers.abstract: Creativity has become a core competence in the era of LLMs and human-AI collaboration, underpinning innovation in real-world problem solving. Crucially, the systematic improvement of creativity necessitates scientifically valid assessment instruments. Psychometric research recognizes context-based assessment as an effective way to measure creative thinking. However, high-quality expert-designed contexts remain scarce. Existing LLM-based generators often struggle with insufficient assessment cues, weak narrative coherence, limited stylistic diversity, and poor support for creative thinking. To address these challenges, we propose AlphaContext, an evolutionary tree-based psychometric context generator for creativity assessment. First, the HyperTree Outline Planner formalizes expert-designed outlining as a rule-guided hypertree and performs top-down hierarchical planning. The MCTS-based Context Generator fills the outline via MCTS to balance global structure and local quality. Then, the Evolutionary Context Optimizer evolves contexts with MAP-Elites by repeatedly updating niche elites to jointly improve diversity and quality. Finally, the Assessment-Guided Evolution Refiner simulates virtual participants with diverse styles and recycles weak contexts for further evolution. Experiments show that AlphaContext yields an average improvement of 8% over competitive methods across 6 quality metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于进化树的心理测量上下文生成器AlphaContext，用于创造力评估，在6个质量指标上平均提升8%。
analysis.research_motivation: 创造力评估需要高质量上下文，但专家设计的上下文稀缺，现有LLM生成器存在评估线索不足、叙事连贯性弱、风格多样性有限等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成高质量、多样化的心理测量上下文以支持创造力评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: AlphaContext包含四个模块：HyperTree大纲规划器（规则引导的超树分层规划）、基于MCTS的上下文生成器（平衡全局结构与局部质量）、进化上下文优化器（MAP-Elites更新生态位精英以提升多样性与质量）、评估引导进化精炼器（模拟虚拟参与者并回收弱上下文）。
contributions: 提出AlphaContext，一种基于进化树的创造力评估上下文生成框架。
设计HyperTree大纲规划器和MCTS上下文生成器以结构化生成。
引入MAP-Elites进化优化和评估引导精炼机制，提升多样性与质量。
analysis.experiments: 在6个质量指标上，AlphaContext相比竞争方法平均提升8%。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的评估指标，泛化性需验证。
进化过程计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于进化树的心理测量上下文生成器AlphaContext，用于创造力评估，在6个质量指标上平均提升8%。

papers.title: One-Step Diffusion with Inverse Residual Fields for Unsupervised Industrial Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Diffusion models have achieved outstanding performance in unsupervised industrial anomaly detection (uIAD) by learning a manifold of normal data under the common assumption that off-manifold anomalies are harder to generate, resulting in larger reconstruction errors in data space or lower probability densities in the tractable latent space. However, their iterative denoising and noising nature leads to slow inference. In this paper, we propose OSD-IRF, a novel one-step diffusion with inverse residual fields, to address this limitation for uIAD task. We first train a deep diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM) on normal data without any conditioning. Then, for a test sample, we predict its inverse residual fields (IRF) based on the noise estimated by the well-trained parametric noise function of the DDPM. Finally, uIAD is performed by evaluating the probability density of the IRF under a Gaussian distribution and comparing it with a threshold. Our key observation is that anomalies become distinguishable in this IRF space, a finding that has seldom been reported in prior works. Moreover, OSD-IRF requires only single step diffusion for uIAD, thanks to the property that IRF holds for any neighboring time step in the denoising process. Extensive experiments on three widely used uIAD benchmarks show that our model achieves SOTA or competitive performance across six metrics, along with roughly a 2X inference speedup without distillation.

analysis.tldr: 提出单步扩散逆残差场（OSD-IRF）实现无监督工业异常检测，在保持SOTA性能的同时推理速度提升约2倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在无监督工业异常检测中表现优异，但迭代去噪/加噪过程导致推理缓慢，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲检测性能的前提下，将扩散模型的多步推理加速为单步，用于无监督工业异常检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 异常在逆残差场（IRF）空间中变得可区分，这一现象在以往工作中鲜有报道。
analysis.method: 首先在正常数据上训练无条件DDPM；测试时，利用DDPM的噪声函数预测逆残差场（IRF），然后通过评估IRF在高斯分布下的概率密度并与阈值比较进行异常检测。
contributions: 提出OSD-IRF，首个单步扩散无监督工业异常检测方法，推理速度提升约2倍。
发现逆残差场（IRF）空间能有效区分异常，为异常检测提供新视角。
analysis.experiments: 在三个广泛使用的uIAD基准上，六个指标达到SOTA或竞争性性能，推理速度提升约2倍（无需蒸馏）。
limitations: 可能依赖DDPM的噪声函数质量，对噪声估计误差敏感。
仅适用于无监督工业异常检测场景，泛化性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出单步扩散逆残差场（OSD-IRF）实现无监督工业异常检测，在保持SOTA性能的同时推理速度提升约2倍。

papers.title: Randomly Initialized Networks Can Learn from Peer-to-Peer Consensus
papers.abstract: In self-supervised learning, self-distilled methods have shown impressive performance, learning representations useful for downstream tasks and even displaying emergent properties. However, state-of-the-art methods usually rely on ensembles of complex mechanisms, with many design choices that are empirically motivated and not well understood. In this work, we explore the role of self-distillation within learning dynamics. Specifically, we isolate the effect of self-distillation by training a group of randomly initialized networks, removing all other common components such as projectors, predictors, and even pretext tasks. Our findings show that even this minimal setup can lead to learned representations with non-trivial improvements over a random baseline on downstream tasks. We also demonstrate how this effect varies with different hyperparameters and present a short analysis of what is being learned by the models under this setup.

analysis.tldr: 仅用随机初始化网络和自蒸馏共识就能学到有用表征。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自监督方法依赖复杂组件（如投影头、预测头、前置任务），设计选择多基于经验且理解不足，需要简化以理解自蒸馏的本质作用。
analysis.problem: 探究自蒸馏在无其他常见组件（投影头、预测头、前置任务）时，仅通过随机初始化网络间的共识能否学习到有用表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 即使去除所有常见组件，仅用随机初始化网络和自蒸馏共识，也能在下游任务上取得优于随机基线的表征学习效果，且效果随超参数变化。
analysis.method: 训练一组随机初始化的网络，通过自蒸馏（peer-to-peer consensus）进行学习，不使用投影头、预测头或前置任务。
contributions: 证明仅靠随机初始化网络和自蒸馏共识即可学到非平凡的表征。
分析了超参数对学习效果的影响以及模型所学内容的初步分析。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未与复杂自监督方法进行性能对比。
仅分析了超参数影响，缺乏对学习机制更深入的理论解释。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 仅用随机初始化网络和自蒸馏共识就能学到有用表征。

papers.title: More Is Different: Toward a Theory of Emergence in AI-Native Software Ecosystems
papers.abstract: Software engineering faces a fundamental challenge: multi-agent AI systems fail in ways that defy explanation by traditional theories. While individual agents perform correctly, their interactions degrade entire ecosystems, revealing a gap in our understanding of software evolution. This paper argues that AI-native software ecosystems must be studied as complex adaptive systems (CAS), where emergent properties like architectural entropy, cascade failures, and comprehension debt arise not from individual components, but from their interactions. We map Holland's six CAS properties onto observable ecosystem dynamics, distinguishing these systems from microservices or open-source networks. To measure causal emergence, we define micro-level state variables, coarse-graining functions, and a tractable measurement framework. Seven falsifiable propositions link CAS theory to software evolution, challenging or extending Lehman's laws where agent-level assumptions fail. If confirmed, these findings would demand a radical shift: ecosystem-level monitoring as the primary governance mechanism for AI-native systems. If refuted, existing theories may only need incremental updates. Either way, this work forces us to ask: Can software engineering's core assumptions survive the age of autonomous agents?

analysis.tldr: 提出将AI原生软件生态系统视为复杂自适应系统，并定义因果涌现的测量框架与可证伪命题。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体AI系统在交互中涌现出架构熵、级联故障等整体性失效，传统软件工程理论无法解释这些现象，亟需新理论框架。
analysis.problem: 如何从理论上刻画和测量AI原生软件生态系统中由智能体交互产生的涌现行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出个体智能体表现正常但交互导致生态系统退化，涌现出架构熵、级联故障、理解债务等整体属性，区别于微服务或开源网络。
analysis.method: 将Holland的六个CAS属性映射到生态系统动态，定义微观状态变量、粗粒化函数和可计算的因果涌现测量框架，并提出七个可证伪命题。
contributions: 提出将AI原生软件生态系统作为复杂自适应系统研究的新视角
定义因果涌现的测量框架并给出七个可证伪命题以连接CAS理论与软件演化
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架尚未经过实证验证
可证伪命题的验证需要长期生态系统数据
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出将AI原生软件生态系统视为复杂自适应系统，并定义因果涌现的测量框架与可证伪命题。

papers.title: Learning from Less: Measuring the Effectiveness of RLVR in Low Data and Compute Regimes
papers.abstract: Fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) typically relies on large quantities of high-quality annotated data, or questions with well-defined ground truth answers in the case of Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR). While previous work has explored the benefits to model reasoning capabilities by scaling both data and compute used for RLVR, these results lack applicability in many real-world settings where annotated data and accessible compute may be scarce. In this work, we present a comprehensive empirical study of open-source Small Language Model (SLM) performance after RLVR in low data regimes. Across three novel datasets covering number counting problems, graph reasoning, and spatial reasoning, we characterize how model performance scales with dataset size, diversity, and complexity. We demonstrate that (1) procedural datasets allow for fine-grained evaluation and training dataset development with controllable properties (size, diversity, and complexity), (2) under RLVR, models trained on lower complexity tasks can generalize to higher complexity tasks, and (3) training on mixed complexity datasets is associated with the greatest benefits in low data regimes, providing up to 5x sample efficiency versus training on easy tasks. These findings inspire future work on the development of data scaling laws for RLVR and the use of procedural data generators to further understand effective data development for efficient LLM fine-tuning.

analysis.tldr: 在低数据和低计算资源下，RLVR 训练小语言模型仍有效，混合复杂度数据可提升 5 倍样本效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 RLVR 研究依赖大量数据和计算资源，但实际场景中标注数据和计算资源可能稀缺，缺乏对低资源条件下 RLVR 效果的了解。
analysis.problem: 研究在低数据和低计算资源下，RLVR 对开源小语言模型性能的影响，以及数据规模、多样性和复杂度如何影响模型表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：(1) 程序化数据集可精细控制属性；(2) 低复杂度任务训练可泛化到高复杂度任务；(3) 混合复杂度数据集在低数据场景下样本效率最高，可达 5 倍提升。
analysis.method: 使用三个新数据集（计数、图推理、空间推理）进行 RLVR 微调，系统评估数据规模、多样性和复杂度的影响。
contributions: 提出程序化数据集用于细粒度评估和训练数据开发，支持可控属性。
发现 RLVR 下低复杂度任务训练可泛化到高复杂度任务。
证明混合复杂度数据集在低数据场景下提供高达 5 倍样本效率提升。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及三个数据集和样本效率提升。
limitations: 仅使用小语言模型，可能不适用于大模型。
数据集为程序化生成，真实场景适用性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在低数据和低计算资源下，RLVR 训练小语言模型仍有效，混合复杂度数据可提升 5 倍样本效率。

papers.title: The implicated scientist: on the role of AI researchers in the development of weapons systems
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) technologies are increasingly used in modern weapons systems. Notably, these systems have recently been involved in mass killings and destruction at scale. Furthermore, there is currently a strong interest and competition among powerful players to accelerate the proliferation of weapons with automated or AI-based components, a phenomenon known as AI arms race. This competition poses a risk of causing even more deaths and devastation in the future, as well as increased power and wealth inequality. In this work, we aim to shed light on the role of AI researchers as implicated subjects in the harms caused by weapons enabled by AI technologies. We investigate and discuss the specifics of this implication and explore ways to transfigure this position of implication into one of differentiated, long-distance solidarity with the victims of technologically fortified injustices.

analysis.tldr: 探讨AI研究人员在武器系统开发中的道德责任与共谋角色。
analysis.research_motivation: AI技术被用于现代武器系统，已造成大规模杀伤，且AI军备竞赛加剧了未来风险与不平等，亟需反思研究者的伦理责任。
analysis.problem: AI研究人员在武器系统引发的伤害中扮演何种共谋角色，以及如何将这种共谋转化为对受害者的差异化、远距离团结。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象。
analysis.method: 通过哲学与伦理分析，探讨AI研究者作为共谋主体的具体含义，并提出转变共谋为团结的路径。
contributions: 揭示了AI研究人员在武器系统伤害中的共谋角色。
提出了将共谋转化为差异化团结的伦理框架。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 缺乏实证数据支持。
伦理框架的实际应用性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探讨AI研究人员在武器系统开发中的道德责任与共谋角色。

papers.title: Towards Robust Text-to-Image Person Retrieval: Multi-View Reformulation for Semantic Compensation
papers.abstract: In text-to-image person retrieval tasks, the diversity of natural language expressions and the implicitness of visual semantics often lead to the problem of Expression Drift, where semantically equivalent texts exhibit significant feature discrepancies in the embedding space due to phrasing variations, thereby degrading the robustness of image-text alignment. This paper proposes a semantic compensation framework (MVR) driven by Large Language Models (LLMs), which enhances cross-modal representation consistency through multi-view semantic reformulation and feature compensation. The core methodology comprises three components: Multi-View Reformulation (MVR): A dual-branch prompting strategy combines key feature guidance (extracting visually critical components via feature similarity) and diversity-aware rewriting to generate semantically equivalent yet distributionally diverse textual variants; Textual Feature Robustness Enhancement: A training-free latent space compensation mechanism suppresses noise interference through multi-view feature mean-pooling and residual connections, effectively capturing "Semantic Echoes"; Visual Semantic Compensation: VLM generates multi-perspective image descriptions, which are further enhanced through shared text reformulation to address visual semantic gaps. Experiments demonstrate that our method can improve the accuracy of the original model well without training and performs SOTA on three text-to-image person retrieval datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的LLM驱动语义补偿框架MVR，通过多视角文本改写和视觉语义补偿提升文本-图像行人检索鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 自然语言表达的多样性和视觉语义的隐含性导致文本-图像行人检索中语义等价文本因措辞差异在嵌入空间产生特征漂移，降低跨模态对齐鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 解决文本-图像行人检索中的表达漂移问题，即语义等价文本因措辞变化导致特征不一致，影响检索精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到语义等价文本因措辞变化在嵌入空间产生显著特征差异（表达漂移），损害图像-文本对齐的鲁棒性。
analysis.method: 提出MVR框架，包含三部分：1) 多视角改写（MVR）：双分支提示策略，结合关键特征引导和多样性感知改写生成语义等价但分布多样的文本变体；2) 文本特征鲁棒性增强：无训练隐空间补偿机制，通过多视角特征均值池化和残差连接抑制噪声；3) 视觉语义补偿：VLM生成多视角图像描述，经共享文本改写增强以弥补视觉语义差距。
contributions: 提出无需训练的语义补偿框架MVR，通过多视角语义改写和特征补偿提升跨模态一致性。
在三个文本-图像行人检索数据集上达到SOTA性能，且无需额外训练即可提升原模型精度。
analysis.experiments: 在三个文本-图像行人检索数据集上验证，方法无需训练即可提升原模型精度并达到SOTA。
limitations: 依赖LLM和VLM的生成质量，可能受限于模型能力。
多视角改写可能引入冗余或噪声，需进一步优化选择机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的LLM驱动语义补偿框架MVR，通过多视角文本改写和视觉语义补偿提升文本-图像行人检索鲁棒性。

papers.title: IceBreaker for Conversational Agents: Breaking the First-Message Barrier with Personalized Starters
papers.abstract: Conversational agents, such as ChatGPT and Doubao, have become essential daily assistants for billions of users. To further enhance engagement, these systems are evolving from passive responders to proactive companions. However, existing efforts focus on activation within ongoing dialogues, while overlooking a key real-world bottleneck. In the conversation initiation stage, users may have a vague need but no explicit query intent, creating a first-message barrier where the conversation holds before it begins. To overcome this, we introduce Conversation Starter Generation: generating personalized starters to guide users into conversation. However, unlike in-conversation stages where immediate context guides the response, initiation must operate in a cold-start moment without explicit user intent. To pioneer in this direction, we present IceBreaker that frames human ice-breaking as a two-step handshake: (i) evoke resonance via Resonance-Aware Interest Distillation from session summaries to capture trigger interests, and (ii) stimulate interaction via Interaction-Oriented Starter Generation, optimized with personalized preference alignment and a self-reinforced loop to maximize engagement. Online A/B tests on one of the world's largest conversational agent products show that IceBreaker improves user active days by +0.184% and click-through rate by +9.425%, and has been deployed in production.

analysis.tldr: 提出对话起始生成任务，通过个性化开场白打破用户与对话智能体之间的首次消息障碍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对话智能体主要关注对话中的主动交互，忽略了对话启动阶段用户有模糊需求但无明确查询意图的瓶颈，导致对话在开始前就停滞。
analysis.problem: 如何在无用户明确意图的冷启动时刻，生成个性化开场白以引导用户进入对话。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将人类破冰建模为两步握手：1) 通过共鸣感知兴趣蒸馏从会话摘要中提取触发兴趣；2) 通过交互导向开场白生成，结合个性化偏好对齐和自我强化循环优化，最大化用户参与度。
contributions: 首次提出对话起始生成任务，填补了对话智能体在启动阶段的空白。
提出IceBreaker框架，包含共鸣感知兴趣蒸馏和交互导向开场白生成，并采用个性化偏好对齐与自我强化循环。
analysis.experiments: 在大型对话智能体产品上进行在线A/B测试，用户活跃天数提升0.184%，点击率提升9.425%，并已部署到生产环境。
limitations: 可能依赖会话摘要的质量，对无历史用户效果有限。
个性化偏好对齐可能引入隐私风险。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出对话起始生成任务，通过个性化开场白打破用户与对话智能体之间的首次消息障碍。

papers.title: Dissecting AI Trading: Behavioral Finance and Market Bubbles
papers.abstract: We study how AI agents form expectations and trade in experimental asset markets. Using a simulated open-call auction populated by autonomous Large Language Model (LLM) agents, we document three main findings. First, AI agents exhibit classic behavioral patterns: a pronounced disposition effect and recency-weighted extrapolative beliefs. Second, these individual-level patterns aggregate into equilibrium dynamics that replicate classic experimental findings (Smith et al., 1988), including the predictive power of excess demand for future prices and the positive relationship between disagreement and trading volume. Third, by analyzing the agents' reasoning text through a twenty-mechanism scoring framework, we show that targeted prompt interventions causally amplify or suppress specific behavioral mechanisms, significantly altering the magnitude of market bubbles.

analysis.tldr: AI智能体在实验资产市场中表现出行为金融学特征，且提示干预可调控市场泡沫。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解AI智能体在金融市场中的行为模式及其对市场动态的影响，对于设计稳健的AI交易系统和防范市场风险具有重要意义。
analysis.problem: AI智能体在实验资产市场中如何形成预期并进行交易，以及其行为是否复现人类行为金融学现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI智能体表现出处置效应和近因加权外推信念，个体行为聚合为均衡动态，复现经典实验发现，且提示干预可因果性地放大或抑制特定行为机制，显著改变市场泡沫规模。
analysis.method: 使用大语言模型（LLM）智能体模拟开放式叫价拍卖，通过二十机制评分框架分析推理文本，并实施目标提示干预。
contributions: 首次系统性地研究AI智能体在实验资产市场中的行为金融学特征。
证明提示干预可因果性地调控市场泡沫，为AI交易系统设计提供新思路。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 实验环境为模拟市场，可能无法完全反映真实市场复杂性。
仅使用单一LLM架构，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI智能体在实验资产市场中表现出行为金融学特征，且提示干预可调控市场泡沫。

papers.title: DSA-CycleGAN: A Domain Shift Aware CycleGAN for Robust Multi-Stain Glomeruli Segmentation
papers.abstract: A key challenge in segmentation in digital histopathology is inter- and intra-stain variations as it reduces model performance. Labelling each stain is expensive and time-consuming so methods using stain transfer via CycleGAN, have been developed for training multi-stain segmentation models using labels from a single stain. Nevertheless, CycleGAN tends to introduce noise during translation because of the one-to-many nature of some stain pairs, which conflicts with its cycle consistency loss. To address this, we propose the Domain Shift Aware CycleGAN, which reduces the presence of such noise. Furthermore, we evaluate several advances from the field of machine learning aimed at resolving similar problems and compare their effectiveness against DSA-CycleGAN in the context of multi-stain glomeruli segmentation. Experiments demonstrate that DSA-CycleGAN not only improves segmentation performance in glomeruli segmentation but also outperforms other methods in reducing noise. This is particularly evident when translating between biologically distinct stains. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/zeeshannisar/DSA-CycleGAN.

analysis.tldr: 提出DSA-CycleGAN，通过域偏移感知机制减少染色转换中的噪声，提升多染色肾小球分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 数字病理学中染色变化导致分割模型性能下降，而标注每种染色成本高昂，现有CycleGAN方法因染色对的一对多特性引入噪声，影响分割效果。
analysis.problem: CycleGAN在染色转换中因一对多映射与循环一致性损失冲突而产生噪声，影响多染色分割模型的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: CycleGAN在生物染色差异大的转换中噪声明显，循环一致性损失无法处理一对多映射。
analysis.method: 提出域偏移感知CycleGAN（DSA-CycleGAN），通过减少转换噪声来提升多染色分割性能。
contributions: 提出DSA-CycleGAN，有效减少染色转换中的噪声。
在肾小球分割任务中验证了DSA-CycleGAN优于其他噪声抑制方法。
analysis.experiments: 在肾小球分割数据集上评估，DSA-CycleGAN提升了分割性能并减少了噪声，尤其在生物染色差异大的转换中效果显著。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定染色对有效，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论计算开销或训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DSA-CycleGAN，通过域偏移感知机制减少染色转换中的噪声，提升多染色肾小球分割性能。

papers.title: EAST: Early Action Prediction Sampling Strategy with Token Masking
papers.abstract: Early action prediction seeks to anticipate an action before it fully unfolds, but limited visual evidence makes this task especially challenging. We introduce EAST, a simple and efficient framework that enables a model to reason about incomplete observations. In our empirical study, we identify key components when training early action prediction models. Our key contribution is a randomized training strategy that samples a time step separating observed and unobserved video frames, enabling a single model to generalize seamlessly across all test-time observation ratios. We further show that joint learning on both observed and future (oracle) representations significantly boosts performance, even allowing an encoder-only model to excel. To improve scalability, we propose a token masking procedure that cuts memory usage in half and accelerates training by 2x with negligible accuracy loss. Combined with a forecasting decoder, EAST sets a new state of the art on NTU60, SSv2, and UCF101, surpassing previous best work by 10.1, 7.7, and 3.9 percentage points, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出EAST框架，通过随机采样时间步和token掩码策略，在早期动作预测任务上实现SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 早期动作预测因视觉证据有限而极具挑战，现有方法难以高效处理不完整观测。
analysis.problem: 如何让模型在仅观察到部分视频帧时准确预测完整动作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EAST框架，包含随机时间步采样训练策略、联合学习观测与未来表征、以及token掩码加速技术。
contributions: 提出随机采样时间步的训练策略，使单一模型泛化到任意观测比例。
发现联合学习观测与未来表征可显著提升性能，使编码器模型也能表现优异。
提出token掩码过程，内存减半、训练加速2倍且精度损失可忽略。
analysis.experiments: 在NTU60、SSv2和UCF101上超越先前最佳方法10.1、7.7和3.9个百分点。
limitations: 可能依赖特定视频数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
token掩码策略可能不适用于所有架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EAST框架，通过随机采样时间步和token掩码策略，在早期动作预测任务上实现SOTA。

papers.title: Training and Agentic Inference Strategies for LLM-based Manim Animation Generation
papers.abstract: Generating programmatic animation using libraries such as Manim presents unique challenges for Large Language Models (LLMs), requiring spatial reasoning, temporal sequencing, and familiarity with domain-specific APIs that are underrepresented in general pre-training data. A systematic study of how training and inference strategies interact in this setting is lacking in current research. This study introduces ManimTrainer, a training pipeline that combines Supervised Fine-tuning (SFT) with Reinforcement Learning (RL) based Group Relative Policy Optimisation (GRPO) using a unified reward signal that fuses code and visual assessment signals, and ManimAgent, an inference pipeline featuring Renderer-in-the-loop (RITL) and API documentation-augmented RITL (RITL-DOC) strategies. Using these techniques, this study presents the first unified training and inference study for text-to-code-to-video transformation with Manim. It evaluates 17 open-source sub-30B LLMs across nine combinations of training and inference strategies using ManimBench. Results show that SFT generally improves code quality, while GRPO enhances visual outputs and increases the models' responsiveness to extrinsic signals during self-correction at inference time. The Qwen 3 Coder 30B model with GRPO and RITL-DOC achieved the highest overall performance, with a 94% Render Success Rate (RSR) and 85.7% Visual Similarity (VS) to reference videos, surpassing the baseline GPT-4.1 model by +3 percentage points in VS. Additionally, the analysis shows that the correlation between code and visual metrics strengthens with SFT and GRPO but weakens with inference-time enhancements, highlighting the complementary roles of training and agentic inference strategies in Manim animation generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出ManimTrainer训练和ManimAgent推理策略，结合SFT与GRPO及渲染器在环，显著提升LLM生成Manim动画的质量。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成程序化动画（如Manim）需要空间推理、时间序列和领域特定API知识，但通用预训练数据中这些内容不足，现有研究缺乏对训练与推理策略交互的系统研究。
analysis.problem: 如何通过训练和推理策略的协同优化，提升LLM在文本到代码到视频的Manim动画生成任务中的代码质量和视觉输出效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SFT提升代码质量，GRPO增强视觉输出并提高模型在推理时自我纠正中对额外信号的响应能力；代码与视觉指标的相关性在SFT和GRPO后增强，但在推理增强后减弱。
analysis.method: ManimTrainer：结合SFT和基于GRPO的强化学习，使用融合代码和视觉评估的统一奖励信号；ManimAgent：渲染器在环（RITL）和API文档增强RITL（RITL-DOC）推理策略。
contributions: 首次对文本到代码到视频的Manim动画生成进行统一的训练和推理研究。
提出ManimTrainer训练管道和ManimAgent推理策略，并系统评估17个开源LLM在9种策略组合下的表现。
analysis.experiments: 使用ManimBench评估17个开源sub-30B LLM，Qwen 3 Coder 30B结合GRPO和RITL-DOC达到94%渲染成功率和85.7%视觉相似度，超过GPT-4.1。
limitations: 仅评估sub-30B模型，更大模型效果未知。
ManimBench可能未覆盖所有复杂动画场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ManimTrainer训练和ManimAgent推理策略，结合SFT与GRPO及渲染器在环，显著提升LLM生成Manim动画的质量。

papers.title: LBFTI: Layer-Based Facial Template Inversion for Identity-Preserving Fine-Grained Face Reconstruction
papers.abstract: In face recognition systems, facial templates are widely adopted for identity authentication due to their compliance with the data minimization principle. However, facial template inversion technologies have posed a severe privacy leakage risk by enabling face reconstruction from templates. This paper proposes a Layer-Based Facial Template Inversion (LBFTI) method to reconstruct identity-preserving fine-grained face images. Our scheme decomposes face images into three layers: foreground layers (including eyebrows, eyes, nose, and mouth), midground layers (skin), and background layers (other parts). LBFTI leverages dedicated generators to produce these layers, adopting a rigorous three-stage training strategy: (1) independent refined generation of foreground and midground layers, (2) fusion of foreground and midground layers with template secondary injection to produce complete panoramic face images with background layers, and (3) joint fine-tuning of all modules to optimize inter-layer coordination and identity consistency. Experiments demonstrate that our LBFTI not only outperforms state-of-the-art methods in machine authentication performance, with a 25.3% improvement in TAR, but also achieves better similarity in human perception, as validated by both quantitative metrics and a questionnaire survey.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于层的面部模板反演方法，通过分层生成和三级训练策略实现身份保持的细粒度人脸重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 面部模板广泛应用于身份认证，但模板反演技术带来严重隐私泄露风险，现有方法在身份保持和细粒度重建方面不足。
analysis.problem: 如何从面部模板中重建出身份保持且细粒度的人脸图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将人脸分解为前景层（眉毛、眼睛、鼻子、嘴）、中景层（皮肤）和背景层（其他部分），使用专用生成器分层生成，并采用三级训练策略：独立精炼生成前景和中景层、融合并注入模板生成全景图、联合微调优化层间协调与身份一致性。
contributions: 提出基于层的面部模板反演方法，实现身份保持的细粒度人脸重建。
设计三级训练策略，提升层间协调和身份一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在机器认证性能上，TAR提升25.3%，并通过定量指标和问卷调查验证了人类感知相似性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模板提取器，泛化性需验证。
分层生成可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于层的面部模板反演方法，通过分层生成和三级训练策略实现身份保持的细粒度人脸重建。

papers.title: Co-Located Tests, Better AI Code: How Test Syntax Structure Affects Foundation Model Code Generation
papers.abstract: AI coding assistants increasingly generate code alongside tests. How developers structure test code, whether inline with the implementation or in separate blocks, has traditionally been a matter of testing philosophy. We investigate whether this choice affects AI code generation quality. We conduct a large-scale empirical study (830+ generated files, 12 models, 3 providers) using SEGA, a three-dimensional evaluation framework measuring Determinism, Preservation, and Correctness. Comparing inline test syntax (Python doctests) against separated test syntax (Rust #[test] blocks) on a d-ary heap implementation, we find that: (1) inline tests yield near-perfect preservation (100%) and correctness (92-100%) across all models; (2) separated tests expose stark model-tier gaps (0-100% correctness) and independence between preservation and correctness; (3) model behavior evolves across generations, and notably one model breaks the test suppression pattern of its three predecessors; (4) mechanistic analysis on 7 open-source architectures (6 transformers and a gated-linear Recurrent Neural Network (RNN)) reveals inline test markers receive 2.8-4.4$\times$ stronger attention in 5/7 models, with causal validation via knockout and steering experiments on the 4 code-specialized transformers and RWKV-6; the co-location mechanism extends to a non-transformer architecture, suggesting the design recommendation is robust to future architectural shifts. In the Foundation Model era, test syntax structure is a software design concern: co-locating tests with implementation code produces measurably better AI-generated code. This arxiv long version includes appendices that further qualify the effect as bounded by both model capability and programming language.

analysis.tldr: 测试代码与实现代码的语法结构（内联 vs 分离）显著影响AI代码生成质量，内联测试带来更高正确性和保持率。
analysis.research_motivation: AI代码助手日益普及，但测试代码的结构（内联或分离）对生成代码质量的影响尚未被系统研究，传统上这只是测试哲学问题。
analysis.problem: 测试语法结构（内联 vs 分离）如何影响基础模型代码生成的质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 内联测试在所有模型上近乎完美保持（100%）和正确性（92-100%）；分离测试暴露模型层级差距（0-100%正确性），且保持与正确性独立；模型行为跨代演化，某模型打破前代测试抑制模式；内联测试标记在5/7模型中注意力强度高2.8-4.4倍。
analysis.method: 大规模实证研究（830+生成文件，12模型，3提供商），使用SEGA三维评估框架（确定性、保持性、正确性），比较Python doctests（内联）与Rust #[test]块（分离）在d-ary堆实现上的效果，并进行机制分析（7个开源架构，含6个Transformer和1个门控线性RNN）。
contributions: 首次系统研究测试语法结构对AI代码生成质量的影响，发现内联测试显著优于分离测试。
提出SEGA三维评估框架（确定性、保持性、正确性）。
通过机制分析揭示内联测试标记获得更强注意力，且该效应扩展到非Transformer架构。
analysis.experiments: 830+生成文件，12模型，3提供商，使用SEGA框架评估，并在7个开源架构上进行机制分析（含因果验证）。摘要未提供具体数值结果细节。
limitations: 仅针对d-ary堆实现，可能不泛化到其他任务。
效果受模型能力和编程语言限制（如附录所述）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 测试代码与实现代码的语法结构（内联 vs 分离）显著影响AI代码生成质量，内联测试带来更高正确性和保持率。

papers.title: Tight Auditing of Differential Privacy in MST and AIM
papers.abstract: State-of-the-art Differentially Private (DP) synthetic data generators such as MST and AIM are widely used, yet tightly auditing their privacy guarantees remains challenging. We introduce a Gaussian Differential Privacy (GDP)-based auditing framework that measures privacy via the full false-positive/false-negative tradeoff. Applied to MST and AIM under worst-case settings, our method provides the first tight audits in the strong-privacy regime. For $(ε,δ)=(1,10^{-2})$, we obtain $μ_{emp}\approx0.43$ vs. implied $μ=0.45$, showing a small theory-practice gap. Our code is publicly available: https://github.com/sassoftware/dpmm.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于高斯差分隐私的审计框架，首次实现对MST和AIM合成数据生成器的紧致隐私审计。
analysis.research_motivation: 差分隐私合成数据生成器（如MST和AIM）被广泛使用，但紧致审计其隐私保证仍具挑战，现有方法难以准确衡量实际隐私泄露。
analysis.problem: 如何对MST和AIM等差分隐私合成数据生成器进行紧致审计，以准确评估其隐私保证与实际表现之间的差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于高斯差分隐私（GDP）的审计框架，通过完整的假阳性/假阴性权衡来衡量隐私，并在最坏情况下应用于MST和AIM。
contributions: 首次在强隐私体制下对MST和AIM实现紧致审计。
揭示了理论隐私保证与实际隐私泄露之间的微小差距（μ_emp≈0.43 vs μ=0.45）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对MST和AIM两种生成器，可能不适用于其他DP机制。
审计框架在最坏情况下进行，可能无法反映典型使用场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于高斯差分隐私的审计框架，首次实现对MST和AIM合成数据生成器的紧致隐私审计。

papers.title: OAMVOS:2nd Report for 5th PVUW MOSE Track
papers.abstract: SAM-based dense trackers provide strong short-term mask propagation but remain fragile under long occlusion, fast motion, viewpoint change, and distractors. The problem is especially severe for small objects, where a few incorrect memory updates can dominate later predictions. This report presents an occlusion- and reappearance-aware extension of DAM4SAM that improves memory control rather than changing the backbone. The method augments the original SAM3 tracker with four ingredients: a reliability-aware tracking state machine, branch-based recovery, delayed DRM promotion, and a selective policy for native SAM3 memory selection. During stable tracking, the model follows the original single-path propagation process. Once confidence drops, the tracker enters an ambiguous or recovery mode, maintains a small set of candidate branches, and commits memory only after a branch is reconfirmed. For small-object disappearance and reappearance, native memory selection is temporarily bypassed so older anchors remain accessible. In addition, the first conditioning frame is explicitly preserved, and the conditioning-memory budget is moderately enlarged to improve long-gap recovery. The resulting design keeps DAM4SAM efficient in easy cases while improving robustness in sequences dominated by occlusion and reappearance.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种遮挡与重感知增强的DAM4SAM跟踪器，通过状态机、分支恢复和选择性记忆策略提升长时遮挡下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于SAM的密集跟踪器在短时掩码传播上表现良好，但在长时遮挡、快速运动、视角变化和干扰物下脆弱，尤其对小物体，少量错误记忆更新会主导后续预测。
analysis.problem: 解决SAM跟踪器在长时遮挡、小物体消失重出现等困难场景下的鲁棒性不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出SAM跟踪器在长时遮挡、快速运动、视角变化和干扰物下脆弱，小物体对错误记忆更新敏感。
analysis.method: 在DAM4SAM基础上增加四个组件：可靠性感知跟踪状态机、分支恢复、延迟DRM提升、选择性原生SAM3记忆策略。稳定时单路径传播，置信度低时进入模糊或恢复模式，维护候选分支，分支确认后才提交记忆；小物体消失重出现时绕过原生记忆选择，保留旧锚点；显式保留第一帧条件帧，适度扩大条件记忆预算。
contributions: 提出遮挡与重感知增强的DAM4SAM跟踪器，通过状态机和分支恢复提升长时遮挡鲁棒性
设计选择性记忆策略和延迟DRM提升，改善小物体消失重出现场景的跟踪性能
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能增加计算开销，尤其在分支恢复模式下
对极长遮挡或完全遮挡场景的效果未明确说明
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种遮挡与重感知增强的DAM4SAM跟踪器，通过状态机、分支恢复和选择性记忆策略提升长时遮挡下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: AdaCluster: Adaptive Query-Key Clustering for Sparse Attention in Video Generation
papers.abstract: Video diffusion transformers (DiTs) suffer from prohibitive inference latency due to quadratic attention complexity. Existing sparse attention methods either overlook semantic similarity or fail to adapt to heterogeneous token distributions across layers, leading to model performance degradation. We propose AdaCluster, a training-free adaptive clustering framework that accelerates the generation of DiTs while preserving accuracy. AdaCluster applies an angle-similarity-preserving clustering method to query vectors for higher compression, and designs a euclidean-similarity-preserving clustering method for keys, covering cluster number assignment, threshold-wise adaptive clustering, and efficient critical cluster selection. Experiments on CogVideoX-2B, HunyuanVideo, and Wan-2.1 on one A40 GPU demonstrate up to 1.67-4.31x speedup with negligible quality degradation.

analysis.tldr: 提出训练无关的自适应聚类框架AdaCluster，通过查询和键的聚类加速视频扩散Transformer推理，实现1.67-4.31倍加速且质量损失极小。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频扩散Transformer推理延迟高，现有稀疏注意力方法忽略语义相似性或无法适应层间异构分布，导致性能下降。
analysis.problem: 视频扩散Transformer中二次注意力复杂度导致的推理延迟问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 训练无关的自适应聚类框架，包括角度相似性保持的查询聚类、欧氏相似性保持的键聚类、聚类数分配、阈值自适应聚类和关键簇选择。
contributions: 提出训练无关的自适应聚类框架AdaCluster，加速视频扩散Transformer生成。
设计角度相似性保持的查询聚类和欧氏相似性保持的键聚类方法。
在多个模型上实现1.67-4.31倍加速且质量损失极小。
analysis.experiments: 在CogVideoX-2B、HunyuanVideo和Wan-2.1上使用单块A40 GPU进行实验，实现1.67-4.31倍加速，质量下降可忽略。
limitations: 可能对极端长视频或高分辨率场景的加速效果有限。
聚类方法可能引入额外计算开销，需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出训练无关的自适应聚类框架AdaCluster，通过查询和键的聚类加速视频扩散Transformer推理，实现1.67-4.31倍加速且质量损失极小。

papers.title: Multilingual Training and Evaluation Resources for Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision Language Models (VLMs) achieved rapid progress in the recent years. However, despite their growth, VLMs development is heavily grounded on English, leading to two main limitations: (i) the lack of multilingual and multimodal datasets for training, and (ii) the scarcity of comprehensive evaluation benchmarks across languages. In this work, we address these gaps by introducing a new comprehensive suite of resources for VLMs training and evaluation spanning five European languages (English, French, German, Italian, and Spanish). We adopt a regeneration-translation paradigm that produces high-quality cross-lingual resources by combining curated synthetic generation and manual annotation. Specifically, we build Multi-PixMo, a training corpus obtained regenerating examples from Pixmo pre-existing datasets with permissively licensed models: PixMo-Cap, PixMo-AskModelAnything, and CoSyn-400k. On the evaluation side, we construct a set of multilingual benchmarks derived translating widely used English datasets (MMbench, ScienceQA, MME, POPE, AI2D). We assess the quality of these resources through qualitative and quantitative human analyses, measuring inter-annotator agreement. Additionally, we perform ablation studies to demonstrate the impact of multilingual data, with respect to English only, in VLMs training. Experiments, comprising 3 different models show that using multilingual, multimodal examples for training VLMs aids is consistently beneficial on non-English benchmarks, with positive transfer to English as well.

analysis.tldr: 构建多语言VLM训练与评测资源，证明多语言数据对非英语和英语任务均有提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前VLM发展严重依赖英语，缺乏多语言多模态训练数据和全面评测基准，限制了模型在多语言场景下的应用。
analysis.problem: 解决VLM多语言训练数据不足和评测基准稀缺的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用再生-翻译范式，结合合成生成和人工标注构建多语言训练语料Multi-PixMo，并翻译现有英文基准得到多语言评测集。
contributions: 构建了覆盖五种欧洲语言的多语言VLM训练语料Multi-PixMo。
提供了多语言评测基准集，并进行了人工质量评估和消融实验。
analysis.experiments: 在3种不同模型上进行实验，表明多语言训练对非英语基准一致有益，且对英语有正迁移。
limitations: 仅覆盖五种欧洲语言，未涉及其他语系。
翻译范式可能引入偏差，依赖源数据质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建多语言VLM训练与评测资源，证明多语言数据对非英语和英语任务均有提升。

papers.title: One Pass for All: A Discrete Diffusion Model for Knowledge Graph Triple Set Prediction
papers.abstract: Knowledge Graphs (KGs) are composed of triples, and the goal of Knowledge Graph Completion (KGC) is to infer the missing factual triples. Traditional KGC tasks predict missing elements in a triple given one or two of its elements. As a more realistic task, the Triple Set Prediction (TSP) task aims to infer the set of missing triples conditioned only on the observed knowledge graph, without assuming any partial information about the missing triples. Existing TSP methods predict the set of missing triples in a triple-by-triple manner, falling short in capturing the dependencies among the predicted triples to ensure consistency. To address this issue, we propose a novel discrete diffusion model termed DiffTSP that treats TSP as a generative task. DiffTSP progressively adds noise to the KG through a discrete diffusion process, achieved by masking relational edges. The reverse process then gradually recovers the complete KG conditioned on the incomplete graph. To this end, we design a structure-aware denoising network that integrates a relational context encoder with a relational graph diffusion transformer for knowledge graph generation. DiffTSP can generate the complete set of triples in a one-pass manner while ensuring the dependencies among the predicted triples. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on three public datasets. Code: https://github.com/ADMIS-TONGJI/DiffTSP.

analysis.tldr: 提出离散扩散模型DiffTSP，一次性生成知识图谱缺失三元组集合，捕获三元组间依赖关系。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统知识图谱补全任务需要部分三元组信息，而三元组集合预测（TSP）任务更贴近现实，但现有方法逐三元组预测，无法捕获三元组间依赖关系以保证一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不假设缺失三元组部分信息的情况下，一次性预测完整的三元组集合并捕获其依赖关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出离散扩散模型DiffTSP，通过掩码关系边的离散扩散过程逐步向知识图谱添加噪声，再以结构感知去噪网络（关系上下文编码器+关系图扩散Transformer）基于不完整图逐步恢复完整图，一次性生成所有三元组。
contributions: 首次将离散扩散模型应用于知识图谱三元组集合预测任务。
设计结构感知去噪网络，捕获三元组间依赖关系，实现一次性生成。
analysis.experiments: 在三个公开数据集上达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖图结构质量，对稀疏图效果未知。
扩散模型推理速度可能较慢。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出离散扩散模型DiffTSP，一次性生成知识图谱缺失三元组集合，捕获三元组间依赖关系。

papers.title: AgentRVOS for MeViS-Text Track of 5th PVUW Challenge: 3rd Method
papers.abstract: This report describes a Ref-VOS pipeline centered on Sa2VA and organized with explicit agent roles. The key idea is that Sa2VA should provide the first dense semantic hypothesis, while an agent loop decides whether that hypothesis should be accepted, revised, or refined. The pipeline starts with a target-presence judgment stage. If the referred object does not exist in the video, the system directly outputs zero masks. Otherwise, Sa2VA receives the video and referring prompt and produces a coarse mask trajectory over the full video. This trajectory is treated as a semantic prior rather than a final answer. A planner agent decomposes the query, temporal partition agents identify informative blocks, scout agents search for anchor frames, and refinement agents convert reliable Sa2VA masks into boxes and points for SAM3 propagation. A critic scores candidate trajectories, a reflection controller repairs weak hypotheses, and a collaboration controller reconciles multiple agent branches. The result is a Ref-VOS system in which Sa2VA is responsible for dense grounded understanding, while the agent layer handles presence verification, temporal search, confidence-aware revision, and final mask refinement.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种以Sa2VA为核心、多智能体协作的Ref-VOS管道，通过显式角色分工提升视频对象分割的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Ref-VOS方法在复杂视频场景中常因语义理解不足或时序搜索低效导致分割不准确，需要一种结合密集语义先验与灵活智能体协作的框架。
analysis.problem: 解决视频中参照对象分割（Ref-VOS）任务中，如何有效利用Sa2VA的语义先验并通过多智能体协作进行假设验证、修正与精化的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建以Sa2VA为核心的Ref-VOS管道，包含目标存在判断、粗掩码生成、规划器、时序分区智能体、侦察智能体、精化智能体、评论家、反思控制器和协作控制器等模块，通过显式角色分工实现假设的接受、修订或精化。
contributions: 提出一种多智能体协作的Ref-VOS框架，将Sa2VA的密集语义理解与智能体层的验证、搜索、修正相结合。
设计了目标存在判断、时序分区、锚帧搜索、置信度感知修正等模块，提升分割的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖Sa2VA的初始假设质量，若Sa2VA产生严重错误可能难以完全修复。
多智能体协作可能增加计算开销和推理延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种以Sa2VA为核心、多智能体协作的Ref-VOS管道，通过显式角色分工提升视频对象分割的准确性和鲁棒性。

papers.title: Enhancing Glass Surface Reconstruction via Depth Prior for Robot Navigation
papers.abstract: Indoor robot navigation is often compromised by glass surfaces, which severely corrupt depth sensor measurements. While foundation models like Depth Anything 3 provide excellent geometric priors, they lack an absolute metric scale. We propose a training-free framework that leverages depth foundation models as a structural prior, employing a robust local RANSAC-based alignment to fuse it with raw sensor depth. This naturally avoids contamination from erroneous glass measurements and recovers an accurate metric scale. Furthermore, we introduce \ti{GlassRecon}, a novel RGB-D dataset with geometrically derived ground truth for glass regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, especially under severe sensor depth corruption. The dataset and related code will be released at https://github.com/jarvisyjw/GlassRecon.

analysis.tldr: 利用深度先验模型和RANSAC对齐，无需训练即可提升玻璃表面重建精度，助力机器人导航。
analysis.research_motivation: 室内机器人导航中，玻璃表面会严重破坏深度传感器测量，现有方法难以恢复准确的度量尺度。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖训练的情况下，利用深度基础模型的结构先验，融合原始传感器深度，实现玻璃表面的准确重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 深度基础模型（如Depth Anything 3）提供良好的几何先验但缺乏绝对度量尺度；原始传感器深度在玻璃区域严重失真。
analysis.method: 提出无训练框架，使用基于局部RANSAC的对齐方法，将深度基础模型的结构先验与原始传感器深度融合，避免玻璃错误测量污染并恢复度量尺度。
contributions: 提出一种无训练框架，利用深度先验模型和RANSAC对齐提升玻璃表面重建。
发布GlassRecon数据集，包含玻璃区域的几何推导真值。
analysis.experiments: 在GlassRecon数据集上实验，方法在严重传感器深度损坏情况下持续优于现有基线。
limitations: 依赖深度基础模型的质量，可能在某些极端玻璃场景下失效。
RANSAC对齐的计算开销可能影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用深度先验模型和RANSAC对齐，无需训练即可提升玻璃表面重建精度，助力机器人导航。

papers.title: PARM: Pipeline-Adapted Reward Model
papers.abstract: Reward models (RMs) are central to aligning large language models (LLMs) with human preferences, powering RLHF and advanced decoding strategies. While most prior work focuses on single-step generation, real-world applications increasingly adopt multi-stage LLM pipelines, where effective reward guidance remains underexplored. We investigate this through code generation for combinatorial optimization, constructing a pipeline that integrates reward models into both formulation and solution stages. We identify a critical challenge: inconsistency between reward model predictions and actual pipeline execution outcomes. To address this, we propose the Pipeline-Adapted Reward Model (PARM), which leverages pipeline-specific data and direct preference optimization to align rewards with downstream feedback. We instantiate PARM as a two-stage pipeline (formulation -> code generation) and evaluate it on four public optimization benchmarks, measuring execution rate and solving accuracy against baselines and sampling methods. A supplementary cross-domain experiment on GSM8K assesses transferability. Results demonstrate that PARM consistently improves pipeline output quality and stability, providing new insights into reward modeling for multi-stage LLM reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出管道自适应奖励模型（PARM），通过管道特定数据和直接偏好优化对齐多阶段LLM管道中的奖励与下游反馈，提升代码生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有奖励模型主要针对单步生成，但实际应用越来越多采用多阶段LLM管道，奖励引导在多阶段场景下研究不足。
analysis.problem: 多阶段LLM管道中奖励模型预测与管道实际执行结果之间存在不一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出奖励模型预测与管道执行结果不一致是关键挑战，但未提供具体失败模式分析。
analysis.method: 提出Pipeline-Adapted Reward Model (PARM)，利用管道特定数据和直接偏好优化（DPO）来对齐奖励与下游反馈。
contributions: 识别了多阶段LLM管道中奖励模型预测与执行结果不一致的关键问题
提出PARM方法，通过管道特定数据和DPO对齐奖励，并在组合优化代码生成任务上验证有效性
analysis.experiments: 在四个公开优化基准上评估执行率和求解准确率，与基线和采样方法对比；并在GSM8K上进行跨领域迁移实验。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 实验仅聚焦代码生成领域，泛化性需进一步验证
未讨论PARM在不同管道结构下的适用性
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出管道自适应奖励模型（PARM），通过管道特定数据和直接偏好优化对齐多阶段LLM管道中的奖励与下游反馈，提升代码生成质量。

papers.title: OmniHuman: A Large-scale Dataset and Benchmark for Human-Centric Video Generation
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in audio-video joint generation models have demonstrated impressive capabilities in content creation. However, generating high-fidelity human-centric videos in complex, real-world physical scenes remains a significant challenge. We identify that the root cause lies in the structural deficiencies of existing datasets across three dimensions: limited global scene and camera diversity, sparse interaction modeling (both person-person and person-object), and insufficient individual attribute alignment. To bridge these gaps, we present OmniHuman, a large-scale, multi-scene dataset designed for fine-grained human modeling. OmniHuman provides a hierarchical annotation covering video-level scenes, frame-level interactions, and individual-level attributes. To facilitate this, we develop a fully automated pipeline for high-quality data collection and multi-modal annotation. Complementary to the dataset, we establish the OmniHuman Benchmark (OHBench), a three-level evaluation system that provides a scientific diagnosis for human-centric audio-video synthesis. Crucially, OHBench introduces metrics that are highly consistent with human perception, filling the gaps in existing benchmarks by providing a comprehensive diagnosis across global scenes, relational interactions, and individual attributes.

analysis.tldr: OmniHuman 是一个大规模、多场景的人类中心视频生成数据集和基准，提供分层标注和与人类感知高度一致的评估指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数据集在全局场景多样性、交互建模和个体属性对齐方面存在结构性缺陷，限制了高保真人类中心视频生成的发展。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个大规模、多场景、细粒度标注的数据集和全面的评估基准来支持人类中心视频生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有数据集在三个维度存在不足：有限的全局场景和相机多样性、稀疏的交互建模（人与人、人与物）、以及个体属性对齐不足。
analysis.method: 构建大规模多场景数据集 OmniHuman，提供分层标注（视频级场景、帧级交互、个体级属性），并开发全自动数据收集和多模态标注流程；同时建立三层次评估基准 OHBench，引入与人类感知高度一致的指标。
contributions: 提出 OmniHuman 数据集，包含分层标注和全自动标注流程
建立 OHBench 基准，提供与人类感知一致的评估指标
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集可能仍存在场景或交互类型的覆盖不足
自动标注流程可能存在噪声或错误
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OmniHuman 是一个大规模、多场景的人类中心视频生成数据集和基准，提供分层标注和与人类感知高度一致的评估指标。

papers.title: EVE: Verifiable Self-Evolution of MLLMs via Executable Visual Transformations
papers.abstract: Self-evolution of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) remains a critical challenge: pseudo-label-based methods suffer from progressive quality degradation as model predictions drift, while template-based methods are confined to a static set of transformations that cannot adapt in difficulty or diversity. We contend that robust, continuous self-improvement requires not only deterministic external feedback independent of the model's internal certainty, but also a mechanism to perpetually diversify the training distribution. To this end, we introduce EVE (Executable Visual transformation-based self-Evolution), a novel framework that entirely bypasses pseudo-labels by harnessing executable visual transformations continuously enriched in both variety and complexity. EVE adopts a Challenger-Solver dual-policy architecture. The Challenger maintains and progressively expands a queue of visual transformation code examples, from which it synthesizes novel Python scripts to perform dynamic visual transformations. Executing these scripts yields VQA problems with absolute, execution-verified ground-truth answers, eliminating any reliance on model-generated supervision. A multi-dimensional reward system integrating semantic diversity and dynamic difficulty calibration steers the Challenger to enrich its code example queue while posing progressively more challenging tasks, preventing mode collapse and fostering reciprocal co-evolution between the two policies. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EVE consistently surpasses existing self-evolution methods, establishing a robust and scalable paradigm for verifiable MLLM self-evolution. The code is available at https://github.com/0001Henry/EVE .

analysis.tldr: EVE 通过可执行视觉变换实现 MLLM 的可验证自我进化，无需伪标签。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 MLLM 自我进化方法存在伪标签质量退化或变换模板静态固定的问题，难以实现持续、鲁棒的自我提升。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有伪标签且变换多样性和难度可动态增长的情况下，实现 MLLM 的持续自我进化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 伪标签方法随模型预测漂移导致质量下降；模板方法变换固定，无法适应难度或多样性变化。
analysis.method: 提出 Challenger-Solver 双策略架构：Challenger 维护并扩展视觉变换代码队列，合成 Python 脚本执行动态变换，生成执行验证的 VQA 问题；多维度奖励系统引导 Challenger 丰富队列并增加难度，促进双策略协同进化。
contributions: 提出 EVE 框架，完全绕过伪标签，利用可执行视觉变换实现可验证的自我进化。
设计 Challenger-Solver 双策略架构及多维度奖励系统，实现变换多样性和难度的动态增长。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖初始代码示例库的质量。
视觉变换的多样性可能受限于可执行脚本的生成能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EVE 通过可执行视觉变换实现 MLLM 的可验证自我进化，无需伪标签。

papers.title: Denoise and Align: Diffusion-Driven Foreground Knowledge Prompting for Open-Vocabulary Temporal Action Detection
papers.abstract: Open-Vocabulary Temporal Action Detection (OV-TAD) aims to localize and classify action segments of unseen categories in untrimmed videos, where effective alignment between action semantics and video representations is critical for accurate detection. However, existing methods struggle to mitigate the semantic imbalance between concise, abstract action labels and rich, complex video contents, inevitably introducing semantic noise and misleading cross-modal alignment. To address this challenge, we propose DFAlign, the first framework that leverages diffusion-based denoising to generate foreground knowledge for the guidance of action-video alignment. Following the 'conditioning, denoising and aligning' manner, we first introduce the Semantic-Unify Conditioning (SUC) module, which unifies action-shared and action-specific semantics as conditions for diffusion denoising. Then, the Background-Suppress Denoising (BSD) module generates foreground knowledge by progressively removing background redundancy from videos through denoising process. This foreground knowledge serves as effective intermediate semantic anchor between video and text representations, mitigating the semantic gap and enhancing the discriminability of action-relevant segments. Furthermore, we introduce the Foreground-Prompt Alignment (FPA) module to inject extracted foreground knowledge as prompt tokens into text representations, guiding model's attention towards action-relevant segments and enabling precise cross-modal alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on two OV-TAD benchmarks. The code repository is provided as follows: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Code-2114/.

analysis.tldr: 提出DFAlign框架，利用扩散去噪生成前景知识以引导开放词汇时序动作检测中的跨模态对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放词汇时序动作检测中，简洁抽象的动作标签与丰富复杂的视频内容之间存在语义不平衡，导致语义噪声和跨模态对齐误导，现有方法难以缓解这一问题。
analysis.problem: 如何有效对齐动作语义与视频表示，减少语义噪声，提升对未见类别动作片段的定位和分类能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法难以缓解简洁抽象的动作标签与丰富复杂视频内容之间的语义不平衡，引入语义噪声并误导跨模态对齐。
analysis.method: 提出DFAlign框架，包含三个模块：语义统一条件模块（SUC）统一动作共享和特定语义作为扩散条件；背景抑制去噪模块（BSD）通过逐步去除视频背景冗余生成前景知识；前景提示对齐模块（FPA）将前景知识作为提示令牌注入文本表示，引导模型关注动作相关片段。
contributions: 首个利用扩散去噪生成前景知识以引导动作-视频对齐的框架。
提出SUC、BSD和FPA三个模块，有效缓解语义不平衡并提升跨模态对齐精度。
在两个OV-TAD基准上达到最先进性能。
analysis.experiments: 在两个开放词汇时序动作检测基准上进行了大量实验，达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖扩散模型的生成质量，若生成的前景知识不准确会影响对齐效果。
框架复杂度较高，可能增加推理时间。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DFAlign框架，利用扩散去噪生成前景知识以引导开放词汇时序动作检测中的跨模态对齐。

papers.title: On the Importance and Evaluation of Narrativity in Natural Language AI Explanations
papers.abstract: Explainable AI (XAI) aims to make the behaviour of machine learning models interpretable, yet many explanation methods remain difficult to understand. The integration of Natural Language Generation into XAI aims to deliver explanations in textual form, making them more accessible to practitioners. Current approaches, however, largely yield static lists of feature importances. Although such explanations indicate what influences the prediction, they do not explain why the prediction occurs. In this study, we draw on insights from social sciences and linguistics, and argue that XAI explanations should be presented in the form of narratives. Narrative explanations support human understanding through four defining properties: continuous structure, cause-effect mechanisms, linguistic fluency, and lexical diversity. We show that standard Natural Language Processing (NLP) metrics based solely on token probability or word frequency fail to capture these properties and can be matched or exceeded by tautological text that conveys no explanatory content. To address this issue, we propose seven automatic metrics that quantify the narrative quality of explanations along the four identified dimensions. We benchmark current state-of-the-art explanation generation methods on six datasets and show that the proposed metrics separate descriptive from narrative explanations more reliably than standard NLP metrics. Finally, to further advance the field, we propose a set of problem-agnostic XAI Narrative generation rules for producing natural language XAI explanations, so that the resulting XAI Narratives exhibit stronger narrative properties and align with the findings from the linguistic and social science literature.

analysis.tldr: 提出叙事性作为XAI解释的关键属性，设计自动评估指标并验证其有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有XAI解释方法（如特征重要性列表）难以被用户理解，缺乏因果解释和连贯性，而自然语言生成虽能提供文本解释，但当前方法仅生成静态列表，无法满足人类认知需求。
analysis.problem: 如何定义、量化并生成具有叙事性的自然语言XAI解释，以提升可理解性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准NLP指标（如基于token概率或词频）无法捕捉叙事性属性，且可能被无意义的同义反复文本超越。
analysis.method: 从社会科学和语言学中提炼叙事性的四个维度（连续结构、因果机制、语言流畅性、词汇多样性），提出七项自动评估指标，并设计问题无关的XAI叙事生成规则。
contributions: 论证叙事性对XAI解释的重要性，并定义其四个关键属性。
提出七项自动指标量化叙事质量，在六个数据集上验证其优于标准NLP指标。
提出一套问题无关的XAI叙事生成规则，以产生更具叙事性的解释。
analysis.experiments: 在六个数据集上对当前最先进的解释生成方法进行基准测试，显示所提指标能更可靠地区分描述性与叙事性解释。
limitations: 摘要未提及指标在不同领域或模型上的泛化性。
叙事生成规则可能依赖特定语言或文化背景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出叙事性作为XAI解释的关键属性，设计自动评估指标并验证其有效性。

papers.title: Toward Zero-Egress Psychiatric AI: On-Device LLM Deployment for Privacy-Preserving Mental Health Decision Support
papers.abstract: Privacy represents one of the most critical yet underaddressed barriers to AI adoption in mental healthcare -- particularly in high-sensitivity operational environments such as military, correctional, and remote healthcare settings, where the risk of patient data exposure can deter help-seeking behavior entirely. Existing AI-enabled psychiatric decision support systems predominantly rely on cloud-based inference pipelines, requiring sensitive patient data to leave the device and traverse external servers, creating unacceptable privacy and security risks in these contexts. In this paper, we propose a zero-egress, on-device AI platform for privacy-preserving psychiatric decision support, deployed as a cross-platform mobile application. The proposed system extends our prior work on fine-tuned LLM consortiums for psychiatric diagnosis standardization by fundamentally re-architecting the inference pipeline for fully local execution -- ensuring that no patient data is transmitted to, processed by, or stored on any external server at any stage. The platform integrates a consortium of three lightweight, fine-tuned, and quantized open-source LLMs -- Gemma, Phi-3.5-mini, and Qwen2 -- selected for their compact architectures and proven efficiency on resource-constrained mobile hardware. An on-device orchestration layer coordinates ensemble inference and consensus-based diagnostic reasoning, producing DSM-5-aligned assessments for conditions. The platform is designed to assist clinicians with differential diagnosis and evidence-linked symptom mapping, as well as to support patient-facing self-screening with appropriate clinical safeguards. Initial evaluation demonstrates that the proposed zero-egress deployment achieves diagnostic accuracy comparable to its server-side predecessor while sustaining real-time inference latency on commodity mobile hardware.

analysis.tldr: 提出零数据离设备的精神科AI平台，在手机端部署轻量量化LLM实现隐私保护的诊断支持。
analysis.research_motivation: 精神健康领域AI应用面临隐私瓶颈，现有云推理方案在军事、矫正等敏感场景中数据泄露风险高，阻碍患者求助。
analysis.problem: 如何在资源受限的移动设备上实现完全本地化、隐私保护的精神科诊断推理，且不牺牲诊断准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建跨平台移动应用，集成三个轻量量化开源LLM（Gemma、Phi-3.5-mini、Qwen2），通过设备端编排层实现集成推理与共识诊断，输出DSM-5对齐评估。
contributions: 提出零数据离设备的精神科AI平台，完全本地化执行，无数据外传。
在移动硬件上实现与服务器端相当的诊断准确率和实时推理延迟。
analysis.experiments: 初始评估显示零数据离设备部署在商用移动硬件上达到与服务器端相当的诊断准确率，并保持实时推理延迟。
limitations: 仅基于初始评估，缺乏大规模临床验证。
可能受限于移动设备算力，模型规模与诊断覆盖范围有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出零数据离设备的精神科AI平台，在手机端部署轻量量化LLM实现隐私保护的诊断支持。

papers.title: Agent-World: Scaling Real-World Environment Synthesis for Evolving General Agent Intelligence
papers.abstract: Large language models are increasingly expected to serve as general-purpose agents that interact with external, stateful tool environments. The Model Context Protocol (MCP) and broader agent skills offer a unified interface for connecting agents with scalable real-world services, but training robust agents remains limited by the lack of realistic environments and principled mechanisms for life-long learning. In this paper, we present \textbf{Agent-World}, a self-evolving training arena for advancing general agent intelligence through scalable environments. Agent-World has two main components: (1) Agentic Environment-Task Discovery, which autonomously explores topic-aligned databases and executable tool ecosystems from thousands of real-world environment themes and synthesizes verifiable tasks with controllable difficulty; and (2) Continuous Self-Evolving Agent Training, which combines multi-environment reinforcement learning with a self-evolving agent arena that automatically identifies capability gaps through dynamic task synthesis and drives targeted learning, enabling the co-evolution of agent policies and environments. Across 23 challenging agent benchmarks, Agent-World-8B and 14B consistently outperforms strong proprietary models and environment scaling baselines. Further analyses reveal scaling trends in relation to environment diversity and self-evolution rounds, offering insights for building general agent intelligence.

analysis.tldr: 提出Agent-World框架，通过可扩展环境合成与自进化训练提升通用Agent能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM Agent训练缺乏真实环境与终身学习机制，难以实现通用智能。
analysis.problem: 如何构建可扩展的真实环境并实现Agent策略与环境的协同进化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 环境多样性与自进化轮次存在缩放趋势，对通用Agent智能构建有指导意义。
analysis.method: Agent-World包含两个组件：1) 环境-任务发现，自动探索真实世界主题并合成可验证任务；2) 连续自进化训练，结合多环境强化学习与动态任务合成。
contributions: 提出自进化训练框架Agent-World，实现环境与Agent策略的协同进化。
在23个基准上，8B和14B模型超越强专有模型和环境缩放基线。
analysis.experiments: 在23个挑战性Agent基准上评估，Agent-World-8B和14B一致优于强专有模型和环境缩放基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定工具生态，泛化性需进一步验证。
自进化机制的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Agent-World框架，通过可扩展环境合成与自进化训练提升通用Agent能力。

papers.title: Relative State Estimation using Event-Based Propeller Sensing
papers.abstract: Autonomous swarms of multi-Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) system requires an accurate and fast relative state estimation. Although monocular frame-based camera methods perform well in ideal conditions, they are slow, suffer scale ambiguity, and often struggle in visually challenging conditions. The advent of event cameras addresses these challenging tasks by providing low latency, high dynamic range, and microsecond-level temporal resolution. This paper proposes a framework for relative state estimation for quadrotors using event-based propeller sensing. The propellers in the event stream are tracked by detection to extract the region-of-interests. The event streams in these regions are processed in temporal chunks to estimate per-propeller frequencies. These frequency measurements drive a kinematic state estimation module as a thrust input, while camera-derived position measurements provide the update step. Additionally, we use geometric primitives derived from event streams to estimate the orientation of the quadrotor by fitting an ellipse over a propeller and backprojecting it to recover body-frame tilt-axis. The existing event-based approaches for quadrotor state estimation use the propeller frequency in simulated flight sequences. Our approach estimates the propeller frequency under 3% error on a test dataset of five real-world outdoor flight sequences, providing a method for decentralized relative localization for multi-robot systems using event camera.

analysis.tldr: 利用事件相机感知无人机螺旋桨频率和姿态，实现多机相对状态估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 多无人机自主编队需要快速准确的相对状态估计，传统单目相机在视觉挑战条件下速度慢、存在尺度模糊，事件相机具有低延迟、高动态范围等优势，但现有方法多依赖模拟数据。
analysis.problem: 如何在真实户外飞行场景中，利用事件相机进行四旋翼无人机的相对状态估计（包括螺旋桨频率和姿态）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过事件流检测螺旋桨区域，在时间块内处理事件流估计每桨频率，作为推力输入驱动运动学状态估计；同时利用几何基元拟合椭圆并反投影恢复机体倾斜轴，估计四旋翼姿态。
contributions: 提出基于事件相机螺旋桨感知的相对状态估计框架，实现频率和姿态估计。
在真实户外飞行序列上验证，螺旋桨频率估计误差低于3%。
analysis.experiments: 在包含五个真实户外飞行序列的测试数据集上评估，螺旋桨频率估计误差低于3%。
limitations: 可能依赖螺旋桨可见性，在遮挡或低光照条件下性能未知。
仅针对四旋翼无人机，未推广到其他多旋翼构型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用事件相机感知无人机螺旋桨频率和姿态，实现多机相对状态估计。

papers.title: Spike-NVPT: Learning Robust Visual Prompts via Bio-Inspired Temporal Filtering and Discretization
papers.abstract: Pre-trained vision models have found widespread application across diverse domains. Prompt tuning-based methods have emerged as a parameter-efficient paradigm for adapting pre-trained vision models. While effective on standard benchmarks, the continuous and dense nature of learned prompts can lead to sensitivity against input noise, as the high-capacity prompts tend to overfit task-irrelevant details. To address this trade-off, we propose Spike-NVPT, a noise-robust visual prompt tuning method. Specifically, we design a Signal Filtering Layer based on spiking neurons, which uses the integrate-and-fire (IF) mechanism to accumulate task-relevant signals over time and filter transient noise fluctuations. A subsequent Spike Discretization Unit converts filtered signals into sparse binary prompts. This discretization acts as a strong regularizer, forcing the model to anchor decision boundaries on the most discriminative and robust features. Notably, the resulting binary prompts remain static during deployment, ensuring zero additional computational overhead during inference. Experimental results demonstrate that Spike-NVPT achieves superior robustness performance, with a maximum improvement of 11.2% over conventional methods, and retains competitive accuracy on clean datasets. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to leverage spiking neurons for fine-tuning traditional artificial neural network (ANN)-based visual models.

analysis.tldr: 提出Spike-NVPT，利用脉冲神经元的滤波和离散化机制生成鲁棒的稀疏二值提示，提升预训练视觉模型对噪声的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 预训练视觉模型在标准基准上表现良好，但连续密集的提示容易过拟合任务无关细节，导致对输入噪声敏感，需要一种参数高效的鲁棒提示调优方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计视觉提示调优方法，使其在保持干净数据精度的同时，增强对输入噪声的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 连续密集的提示倾向于过拟合任务无关细节，导致对噪声敏感；而稀疏二值化可作为强正则化，迫使模型关注最具判别性的鲁棒特征。
analysis.method: 提出Spike-NVPT，包含信号滤波层（基于脉冲神经元的整合-发放机制）和脉冲离散化单元，将滤波后的信号转换为稀疏二值提示，推理时静态且零额外开销。
contributions: 首次利用脉冲神经元微调传统ANN视觉模型，提出噪声鲁棒的视觉提示调优方法。
设计信号滤波层和脉冲离散化单元，生成稀疏二值提示，在噪声鲁棒性上最高提升11.2%，同时保持干净数据上的竞争力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定噪声类型上验证，泛化性未知。
二值提示可能损失部分表达能力，影响复杂任务性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Spike-NVPT，利用脉冲神经元的滤波和离散化机制生成鲁棒的稀疏二值提示，提升预训练视觉模型对噪声的鲁棒性。

papers.title: LiquidTAD: Efficient Temporal Action Detection via Parallel Liquid-Inspired Temporal Relaxation
papers.abstract: Temporal Action Detection (TAD) requires precise localization of action boundaries within long, untrimmed video sequences. While current high-performing methods achieve strong accuracy, they are often characterized by excessive parameter counts, substantial computational overhead, and a reliance on specialized operators that hinder deployment across diverse hardware platforms. This paper presents LiquidTAD, a framework that distills the exponential relaxation prior of liquid neural dynamics into a parallel temporal operator, rather than reproducing full Liquid Neural Network (LNN) dynamics. By introducing a Parallel Liquid-inspired Relaxation mechanism, sequential ODE solving is avoided through a fully vectorized, non-recursive formulation built entirely upon standard neural operations, enabling hardware-agnostic deployment with linear complexity with respect to the temporal length. A complementary Hierarchical Decay-Rate Sharing Strategy further adapts this relaxation prior across feature pyramid levels, stabilizing optimization and implicitly compensating for temporal compression in deeper layers. Experimental evaluations on THUMOS-14 and ActivityNet-1.3 demonstrate that LiquidTAD achieves accuracy competitive with strong baselines while substantially lowering the model footprint. Specifically, on THUMOS-14, LiquidTAD achieves 69.46\% average mAP with only 10.82M parameters and 27.17G FLOPs, reducing the parameter count by over 60\% compared with ActionFormer.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种受液体神经网络启发的并行时序松弛机制，实现高效时序动作检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有高性能时序动作检测方法参数多、计算开销大，且依赖专用算子，难以在不同硬件上部署。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲精度的前提下，大幅降低时序动作检测模型的参数和计算量，并实现硬件无关的部署。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将液体神经动力学的指数松弛先验蒸馏为并行时序算子，通过全向量化非递归公式避免顺序ODE求解，并引入分层衰减率共享策略适应特征金字塔。
contributions: 提出LiquidTAD框架，实现线性复杂度的硬件无关时序动作检测。
设计并行液体启发松弛机制和分层衰减率共享策略，在THUMOS-14和ActivityNet-1.3上达到竞争性精度，同时大幅降低模型参数量和计算量。
analysis.experiments: 在THUMOS-14和ActivityNet-1.3上评估，THUMOS-14上平均mAP 69.46%，仅10.82M参数和27.17G FLOPs，参数量比ActionFormer减少60%以上。
limitations: 可能仅在特定数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
与最先进方法相比，精度可能仍有微小差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
