analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种受液体神经网络启发的并行时序松弛机制，实现高效时序动作检测。

papers.title: MARCO: Navigating the Unseen Space of Semantic Correspondence
papers.abstract: Recent advances in semantic correspondence rely on dual-encoder architectures, combining DINOv2 with diffusion backbones. While accurate, these billion-parameter models generalize poorly beyond training keypoints, revealing a gap between benchmark performance and real-world usability, where queried points rarely match those seen during training. Building upon DINOv2, we introduce MARCO, a unified model for generalizable correspondence driven by a novel training framework that enhances both fine-grained localization and semantic generalization. By coupling a coarse-to-fine objective that refines spatial precision with a self-distillation framework, which expands sparse supervision beyond annotated regions, our approach transforms a handful of keypoints into dense, semantically coherent correspondences. MARCO sets a new state of the art on SPair-71k, AP-10K, and PF-PASCAL, with gains that amplify at fine-grained localization thresholds (+8.9 PCK@0.01), strongest generalization to unseen keypoints (+5.1, SPair-U) and categories (+4.7, MP-100), while remaining 3x smaller and 10x faster than diffusion-based approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/visinf/MARCO .

analysis.tldr: MARCO 通过粗到细目标与自蒸馏框架，在语义对应任务上实现高效且泛化强的模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语义对应方法依赖双编码器架构（如 DINOv2+扩散模型），虽准确但参数量大、泛化差，训练关键点外的查询点性能急剧下降，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个轻量、快速且能泛化到未见关键点和类别的语义对应模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有十亿参数模型在训练关键点外泛化差，揭示基准性能与真实可用性之间的差距。
analysis.method: 基于 DINOv2，提出粗到细目标（提升空间精度）与自蒸馏框架（将稀疏监督扩展到未标注区域），将少量关键点转化为密集语义对应。
contributions: 提出 MARCO 统一模型，结合粗到细优化与自蒸馏，实现泛化语义对应。
在 SPair-71k、AP-10K、PF-PASCAL 上达到新 SOTA，尤其细粒度定位提升显著。
模型比扩散方法小 3 倍、快 10 倍，且对未见关键点和类别泛化更强。
analysis.experiments: 在 SPair-71k、AP-10K、PF-PASCAL 上评估，报告了 PCK@0.01 提升 +8.9，SPair-U 未见关键点 +5.1，MP-100 未见类别 +4.7。
limitations: 可能仍依赖 DINOv2 预训练特征，极端场景泛化未知。
自蒸馏框架的收敛性及超参数敏感性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MARCO 通过粗到细目标与自蒸馏框架，在语义对应任务上实现高效且泛化强的模型。

papers.title: Enhancing Tabular Anomaly Detection via Pseudo-Label-Guided Generation
papers.abstract: Identifying anomalous instances in tabular data is essential for improving data reliability and maintaining system stability. Due to the scarcity of ground-truth anomaly labels, existing methods mainly rely on unsupervised anomaly detection models, or exploit a small number of labeled anomalies to facilitate detection via sample generation or contrastive learning. However, unsupervised methods lack sufficient anomaly awareness, while current generation and contrastive approaches tend to compute anomalies globally, overlooking the localized anomaly patterns of tabular features, resulting in suboptimal detection performance. To address these limitations, we propose PLAG, a pseudo-label-guided anomaly generation method designed to enhance tabular anomaly detection. Specifically, by utilizing pseudo-anomalies as guidance signals and decoupling the overall anomaly quantification of a sample into an accumulation of feature-level abnormalities, PLAG not only effectively obviates the need for scarce ground-truth labels but also provides a novel perspective for the model to comprehend localized anomalous signals at a fine-grained level. Furthermore, a two-stage data selection strategy is proposed, integrating format verification and uncertainty estimation to rigorously filter candidate samples, thereby ensuring the fidelity and diversity of the synthetic anomalies. Ultimately, these filtered synthetic anomalies serve as robust discriminative guidance, empowering the model to better separate normal and anomalous instances. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PLAG achieves state-of-the-art performance against eight representative baselines. Moreover, as a flexible framework, it integrates seamlessly with existing unsupervised detectors, consistently boosting F1-scores by 0.08 to 0.21.

analysis.tldr: 提出伪标签引导的异常生成方法PLAG，通过细粒度特征级异常量化提升表格异常检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 表格数据异常检测中真实标签稀缺，现有无监督方法缺乏异常意识，而生成和对比方法全局计算异常，忽略局部模式，导致性能次优。
analysis.problem: 如何利用伪标签生成高质量合成异常样本，以增强模型对表格数据中局部异常模式的感知能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有生成和对比方法全局计算异常，忽视表格特征的局部异常模式，导致检测性能受限。
analysis.method: 提出PLAG方法，利用伪异常作为引导信号，将样本整体异常量化分解为特征级异常累积，并通过两阶段数据选择策略（格式验证+不确定性估计）筛选合成异常，确保保真度和多样性。
contributions: 提出伪标签引导的异常生成方法PLAG，实现细粒度特征级异常感知。
设计两阶段数据选择策略，保证合成异常的保真度和多样性。
在多个基准上达到SOTA，且作为灵活框架可无缝集成现有无监督检测器，F1提升0.08-0.21。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集上与8个代表性基线对比，PLAG达到SOTA性能；作为框架集成到现有无监督检测器，F1分数提升0.08-0.21。
limitations: 依赖伪标签质量，若伪标签噪声大可能影响生成效果。
两阶段选择策略可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出伪标签引导的异常生成方法PLAG，通过细粒度特征级异常量化提升表格异常检测性能。

papers.title: Geometry-Guided 3D Visual Token Pruning for Video-Language Models
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in 2D vision, motivating their extension to 3D scene understanding. Recent studies represent 3D scenes as 3D spatial videos composed of image sequences with depth and camera pose information, enabling pre-trained video-language models to perform 3D reasoning tasks. However, the large number of visual tokens in spatial videos remains a major bottleneck for efficient inference and context management. Existing pruning methods overlook the view consistency of spatial videos and the spatial diversity of the remaining tokens, which prevents them from effectively removing inter-frame redundancy and preserving scene completeness. In this paper, we propose Geo3DPruner, a Geometry-Guided 3D Visual Token Pruning framework. Geo3DPruner first models cross-frame relevance through geometry-aware global attention, and then performs a two-stage pruning process. The intra-voxel stage selects representative multi-view features within each voxel, while the inter-voxel stage preserves spatial diversity by selecting a globally distributed subset of voxels. Extensive experiments on multiple 3D scene understanding benchmarks demonstrate that Geo3DPruner retains over 90% of the original performance while pruning 90% of visual tokens, significantly outperforming existing text-guided and vision-guided pruning methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出几何引导的3D视觉令牌剪枝框架Geo3DPruner，在剪除90%视觉令牌时仍保留90%以上性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在2D视觉中表现优异，但扩展到3D场景理解时，空间视频中大量视觉令牌导致推理和上下文管理效率低下。现有剪枝方法忽略空间视频的视图一致性和剩余令牌的空间多样性，无法有效去除帧间冗余并保持场景完整性。
analysis.problem: 如何高效剪枝3D空间视频中的视觉令牌，在减少计算开销的同时保持3D场景理解的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有剪枝方法未能利用空间视频的几何一致性，导致冗余去除不充分且场景完整性受损。
analysis.method: 提出Geo3DPruner框架，首先通过几何感知全局注意力建模跨帧相关性，然后进行两阶段剪枝：体素内阶段选择每个体素内的代表性多视图特征，体素间阶段通过选择全局分布的体素子集保持空间多样性。
contributions: 提出几何引导的3D视觉令牌剪枝框架Geo3DPruner，有效去除帧间冗余并保持场景完整性。
在多个3D场景理解基准上，剪除90%视觉令牌时仍保留90%以上性能，显著优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多个3D场景理解基准上进行实验，剪除90%视觉令牌时保留90%以上原始性能，优于文本引导和视觉引导的剪枝方法。
limitations: 可能依赖准确的深度和相机位姿信息，在噪声环境下性能可能下降。
两阶段剪枝可能增加额外计算开销，需进一步优化效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出几何引导的3D视觉令牌剪枝框架Geo3DPruner，在剪除90%视觉令牌时仍保留90%以上性能。

papers.title: Long-Text-to-Image Generation via Compositional Prompt Decomposition
papers.abstract: While modern text-to-image (T2I) models excel at generating images from intricate prompts, they struggle to capture the key details when the inputs are descriptive paragraphs. This limitation stems from the prevalence of concise captions that shape their training distributions. Existing methods attempt to bridge this gap by either fine-tuning T2I models on long prompts, which generalizes poorly to longer lengths; or by projecting the oversize inputs into normal-prompt space and compromising fidelity. We propose Prompt Refraction for Intricate Scene Modeling (PRISM), a compositional approach that enables pre-trained T2I models to process long sequence inputs. PRISM uses a lightweight module to extract constituent representations from the long prompts. The T2I model makes independent noise predictions for each component, and their outputs are merged into a single denoising step using energy-based conjunction. We evaluate PRISM across a wide range of model architectures, showing comparable performances to models fine-tuned on the same training data. Furthermore, PRISM demonstrates superior generalization, outperforming baseline models by 7.4% on prompts over 500 tokens in a challenging public benchmark.

analysis.tldr: 提出PRISM方法，通过组合式提示分解使预训练T2I模型能处理长文本输入，无需微调即可生成高质量图像。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有T2I模型在处理长文本描述时性能下降，因为训练数据以短标题为主，而微调方法泛化性差，投影方法会损失保真度。
analysis.problem: 如何让预训练T2I模型有效处理长文本输入（如描述性段落），同时保持生成质量和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出T2I模型在长文本输入下难以捕捉关键细节，原因是训练分布偏向简洁标题。
analysis.method: PRISM：使用轻量级模块从长提示中提取成分表示，T2I模型对每个成分独立预测噪声，然后通过能量基连接合并为单一去噪步骤。
contributions: 提出PRISM方法，无需微调即可使预训练T2I模型处理长文本输入。
在多种模型架构上验证了PRISM的有效性，并在超过500 token的长提示上比基线模型提升7.4%。
analysis.experiments: 在多种模型架构上评估，与微调模型性能相当，并在长提示基准上超越基线7.4%。
limitations: 可能依赖成分分解的质量，复杂场景下分解可能不准确。
能量基合并的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PRISM方法，通过组合式提示分解使预训练T2I模型能处理长文本输入，无需微调即可生成高质量图像。

papers.title: DocQAC: Adaptive Trie-Guided Decoding for Effective In-Document Query Auto-Completion
papers.abstract: Query auto-completion (QAC) has been widely studied in the context of web search, yet remains underexplored for in-document search, which we term DocQAC. DocQAC aims to enhance search productivity within long documents by helping users craft faster, more precise queries, even for complex or hard-to-spell terms. While global historical queries are available to both WebQAC and DocQAC, DocQAC uniquely accesses document-specific context, including the current document's content and its specific history of user query interactions. To address this setting, we propose a novel adaptive trie-guided decoding framework that uses user query prefixes to softly steer language models toward high-quality completions. Our approach introduces an adaptive penalty mechanism with tunable hyperparameters, enabling a principled trade-off between model confidence and trie-based guidance. To efficiently incorporate document context, we explore retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and lightweight contextual document signals such as titles, keyphrases, and summaries. When applied to encoder-decoder models like T5 and BART, our trie-guided framework outperforms strong baselines and even surpasses much larger instruction-tuned models such as LLaMA-3 and Phi-3 on seen queries across both seen and unseen documents. This demonstrates its practicality for real-world DocQAC deployments, where efficiency and scalability are critical. We evaluate our method on a newly introduced DocQAC benchmark derived from ORCAS, enriched with query-document pairs. We make both the DocQAC dataset (https://bit.ly/3IGEkbH) and code (https://github.com/rahcode7/DocQAC) publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应Trie引导解码框架，用于文档内查询自动补全，在长文档搜索中提升查询效率与准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 文档内搜索的查询自动补全（DocQAC）尚未被充分研究，现有WebQAC方法无法利用文档特定上下文，导致复杂或难拼写术语的查询效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何利用文档内容和用户查询历史，在长文档中生成高质量、上下文感知的查询补全。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出自适应Trie引导解码框架，通过用户查询前缀软引导语言模型，结合可调超参数的自适应惩罚机制平衡模型置信度与Trie引导，并利用RAG及文档标题、关键短语、摘要等轻量信号融入上下文。
contributions: 首次定义并形式化文档内查询自动补全（DocQAC）任务。
提出自适应Trie引导解码框架，在T5/BART上超越强基线及更大模型（LLaMA-3, Phi-3）。
构建并公开DocQAC基准数据集及代码。
analysis.experiments: 在基于ORCAS构建的DocQAC基准上评估，方法在已见查询上超越强基线和更大指令微调模型，涵盖已见和未见文档。
limitations: 可能依赖特定文档结构（如标题、关键短语），对无结构化文档效果未知。
自适应惩罚机制的超参数调优可能增加部署成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应Trie引导解码框架，用于文档内查询自动补全，在长文档搜索中提升查询效率与准确性。

papers.title: Domain-Specialized Object Detection via Model-Level Mixtures of Experts
papers.abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models provide a structured approach to combining specialized neural networks and offer greater interpretability than conventional ensembles. While MoEs have been successfully applied to image classification and semantic segmentation, their use in object detection remains limited due to challenges in merging dense and structured predictions. In this work, we investigate model-level mixtures of object detectors and analyze their suitability for improving performance and interpretability in object detection. We propose an MoE architecture that combines YOLO-based detectors trained on semantically disjoint data subsets, with a learned gating network that dynamically weights expert contributions. We study different strategies for fusing detection outputs and for training the gating mechanism, including balancing losses to prevent expert collapse. Experiments on the BDD100K dataset demonstrate that the proposed MoE consistently outperforms standard ensemble approaches and provides insights into expert specialization across domains, highlighting model-level MoEs as a viable alternative to traditional ensembling for object detection. Our code is available at https://github.com/KASTEL-MobilityLab/mixtures-of-experts/.

analysis.tldr: 提出模型级混合专家架构用于目标检测，在BDD100K上优于标准集成方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 混合专家模型在图像分类和语义分割中已成功应用，但在目标检测中因密集和结构化预测的融合挑战而受限，需要探索其适用性。
analysis.problem: 如何将模型级混合专家架构有效应用于目标检测，以提升性能和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MoE架构，组合基于YOLO的检测器（在语义不相交数据子集上训练），使用学习门控网络动态加权专家输出，并研究不同融合策略和门控训练方法（包括平衡损失防止专家崩溃）。
contributions: 首次系统研究模型级混合专家在目标检测中的应用
提出有效的MoE架构和训练策略，在BDD100K上优于标准集成
analysis.experiments: 在BDD100K数据集上实验，MoE一致优于标准集成方法，并揭示了专家专业化现象。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性未知
门控网络和专家融合策略可能需针对不同场景调整
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出模型级混合专家架构用于目标检测，在BDD100K上优于标准集成方法。

papers.title: LeGo-Code: Can Modular Curriculum Learning Advance Complex Code Generation? Insights from Text-to-SQL
papers.abstract: Recently, code-oriented large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in translating natural language into executable code. Text-to-SQL is a significant application of this ability, enabling non-technical users to interact with relational databases using natural language. However, state-of-the-art models continue to struggle with highly complex logic, particularly deeply nested statements involving multiple joins and conditions, as well as with real-world database schemas that are noisy or poorly structured. In this paper, we investigate whether curriculum learning can improve the performance of code-based LLMs on Text-to-SQL tasks. Employing benchmarks including Spider and BIRD, we fine-tune models under different curriculum strategies. Our experiments show that naive curriculum, simply ordering training samples by complexity in a single epoch, fails to surpass standard fine-tuning due to catastrophic forgetting. To overcome this, we propose a Modular Adapter Composition (MAC) strategy. By sequentially training tier-specific adapters on incremental complexity levels (Easy to Extra-Hard), we create a scaffolded learning environment that improves performance on complex queries. Our approach not only produces measurable performance gains on the Spider and BIRD benchmarks but also provides a flexible, "Lego-like" architecture, allowing models to be composed and deployed based on specific schema difficulty requirements. These findings demonstrate that structured, modular learning is a superior alternative to monolithic fine-tuning for mastering the syntax and logic of complex code generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出模块化适配器组合（MAC）策略，通过课程学习提升代码LLM在Text-to-SQL复杂查询上的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有代码LLM在处理复杂SQL查询（如深层嵌套、多表连接）和真实世界噪声数据库模式时表现不佳，而标准微调难以应对这种复杂性。
analysis.problem: 如何通过课程学习有效提升代码LLM在Text-to-SQL任务中处理复杂逻辑和噪声模式的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 简单课程学习（按复杂度排序单轮训练）因灾难性遗忘而无法超越标准微调。
analysis.method: 模块化适配器组合（MAC）：按难度级别（Easy到Extra-Hard）顺序训练层级特定的适配器，形成脚手架式学习环境。
contributions: 提出MAC策略，通过模块化课程学习提升复杂代码生成性能。
在Spider和BIRD基准上验证了MAC的有效性，并展示了可组合的Lego式架构。
analysis.experiments: 在Spider和BIRD基准上微调模型，比较不同课程策略，MAC取得了可测量的性能提升。
limitations: 可能仅适用于Text-to-SQL任务，泛化性未验证。
适配器组合的部署开销未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出模块化适配器组合（MAC）策略，通过课程学习提升代码LLM在Text-to-SQL复杂查询上的性能。

papers.title: Style-Based Neural Architectures for Real-Time Weather Classification
papers.abstract: In this paper, we present three neural network architectures designed for real-time classification of weather conditions (sunny, rain, snow, fog) from images. These models, inspired by recent advances in style transfer, aim to capture the stylistic elements present in images. One model, called "Multi-PatchGAN", is based on PatchGANs used in well-known architectures such as Pix2Pix and CycleGAN, but here adapted with multiple patch sizes for detection tasks. The second model, "Truncated ResNet50", is a simplified version of ResNet50 retaining only its first nine layers. This truncation, determined by an evolutionary algorithm, facilitates the extraction of high-frequency features essential for capturing subtle stylistic details. Finally, we propose "Truncated ResNet50 with Gram Matrix and Attention", which computes Gram matrices for each layer during training and automatically weights them via an attention mechanism, thus optimizing the extraction of the most relevant stylistic expressions for classification. These last two models outperform the state of the art and demonstrate remarkable generalization capability on several public databases. Although developed for weather detection, these architectures are also suitable for other appearance-based classification tasks, such as animal species recognition, texture classification, disease detection in medical imaging, or industrial defect identification.

analysis.tldr: 提出三种基于风格迁移的轻量级神经网络架构，用于实时天气分类，其中截断ResNet50结合Gram矩阵与注意力机制的方法在多个公开数据集上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 实时天气分类在自动驾驶、户外监控等场景中至关重要，但现有方法难以高效捕捉天气图像中的风格化特征（如雾的模糊、雪的纹理），且计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何设计轻量级神经网络架构，在保持实时推理速度的同时，准确捕捉天气图像中的风格化视觉特征（如雨、雪、雾、晴）以实现高精度分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三种架构：1) Multi-PatchGAN：基于PatchGAN的多尺度判别器，用于检测任务；2) Truncated ResNet50：通过进化算法截断ResNet50至前9层，保留高频特征；3) Truncated ResNet50 with Gram Matrix and Attention：在截断ResNet50基础上，每层计算Gram矩阵并通过注意力机制自动加权，优化风格特征提取。
contributions: 提出三种轻量级风格感知架构，适用于实时天气分类及其他外观分类任务。
Truncated ResNet50 with Gram Matrix and Attention在多个公开天气数据集上超越现有方法，并展示出强泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个公开天气数据库上评估，后两种模型超越现有技术并展现出色泛化能力。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅在特定天气数据集上验证，未提及在极端或混合天气条件下的表现。
Multi-PatchGAN的性能未明确说明，可能不如后两种模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出三种基于风格迁移的轻量级神经网络架构，用于实时天气分类，其中截断ResNet50结合Gram矩阵与注意力机制的方法在多个公开数据集上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Medical Image Understanding Improves Survival Prediction via Visual Instruction Tuning
papers.abstract: Accurate prognostication and risk estimation are essential for guiding clinical decision-making and optimizing patient management. While radiologist-assessed features from CT scans provide valuable indicators of disease severity and outcomes, interpreting such images requires expert knowledge, and translating rich visual information into textual summaries inevitably leads to information loss. In this work, we propose a vision-language framework for 3D CT image understanding that leverages large-scale open-sourced CT images paired with radiology reports through visual instruction tuning. This pre-training enables the model to learn clinically meaningful visual-textual representations, which can then be adapted to downstream survival prediction tasks. By incorporating a survival prediction head on top of the pre-trained model, our approach improves survival prediction from CT images and clinical data while generating clinically meaningful language responses to predefined questions. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms baseline methods in survival prediction, particularly, when clinical data alone is less predictive. The code will be released upon acceptance.

analysis.tldr: 通过视觉指令调优预训练3D CT图像理解模型，提升生存预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: CT图像中的放射学特征对预后至关重要，但解读需要专业知识，且将视觉信息转为文本摘要会导致信息损失，现有方法未能充分利用视觉-语言联合表征。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大规模CT图像与放射报告对进行视觉指令调优，学习临床有意义的视觉-文本表征，并迁移到下游生存预测任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出视觉-语言框架，通过视觉指令调优在大规模开源3D CT图像与放射报告对上预训练，学习视觉-文本表征，然后添加生存预测头进行下游任务微调。
contributions: 提出一种视觉指令调优方法，利用CT图像与放射报告对进行预训练，学习临床相关表征。
将预训练模型适配到生存预测任务，在临床数据预测力不足时仍能提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在生存预测任务上，所提方法优于基线方法，尤其在临床数据单独预测力较弱时提升显著。摘要未提供具体数据集和指标。
limitations: 依赖大规模配对CT-报告数据，可能难以获取。
仅验证了生存预测任务，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过视觉指令调优预训练3D CT图像理解模型，提升生存预测性能。

papers.title: AJ-Bench: Benchmarking Agent-as-a-Judge for Environment-Aware Evaluation
papers.abstract: As reinforcement learning continues to scale the training of large language model-based agents, reliably verifying agent behaviors in complex environments has become increasingly challenging. Existing approaches rely on rule-based verifiers or LLM-as-a-Judge models, which struggle to generalize beyond narrow domains. Agent-as-a-Judge addresses this limitation by actively interacting with environments and tools to acquire verifiable evidence, yet its capabilities remain underexplored. We introduce a benchmark AJ-Bench to systematically evaluate Agent-as-a-Judge across three domains-search, data systems, and graphical user interfaces-comprising 155 tasks and 516 annotated trajectories. The benchmark comprehensively assesses judge agents' abilities in information acquisition, state verification, and process verification. Experiments demonstrate consistent performance gains over LLM-as-a-Judge baselines, while also revealing substantial open challenges in agent-based verification. Our data and code are available at https://aj-bench.github.io/.

analysis.tldr: 提出AJ-Bench基准，系统评估Agent-as-a-Judge在环境感知评估中的能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于规则或LLM-as-a-Judge的验证方法难以泛化到复杂环境，Agent-as-a-Judge通过主动与环境交互获取证据，但其能力尚未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 缺乏系统评估Agent-as-a-Judge在复杂环境中验证行为能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Agent-as-a-Judge相比LLM-as-a-Judge基线有一致性能提升，但仍存在显著开放挑战。
analysis.method: 构建包含搜索、数据系统和图形用户界面三个领域共155个任务和516条标注轨迹的基准AJ-Bench，评估信息获取、状态验证和过程验证能力。
contributions: 提出AJ-Bench基准，系统评估Agent-as-a-Judge在环境感知评估中的能力。
实验表明Agent-as-a-Judge优于LLM-as-a-Judge基线，并揭示开放挑战。
analysis.experiments: 在三个领域（搜索、数据系统、GUI）共155个任务和516条轨迹上评估，对比LLM-as-a-Judge基线，显示一致性能提升。
limitations: 基准覆盖领域有限，可能无法代表所有复杂环境。
未提供具体性能数值，开放挑战的具体性质未详细说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AJ-Bench基准，系统评估Agent-as-a-Judge在环境感知评估中的能力。

papers.title: Towards Disentangled Preference Optimization Dynamics: Suppress the Loser, Preserve the Winner
papers.abstract: Preference optimization is widely used to align large language models (LLMs) with human preferences. However, many margin-based methods also suppress the chosen response when they try to suppress the rejected one, and there is no general way to prevent this across different objectives. We address this issue with a unified incentive-score decomposition of preference optimization, revealing that different objectives share the same local update directions and differ only in their scalar weights. This decomposition provides a common framework for analyzing objectives that were previously studied in separate settings. Building on this decomposition, by analyzing the dynamics of the chosen/rejected likelihoods, we identify the disentanglement band (DB), a simple, testable condition that tells us when training can follow the desired path: suppress the loser while preserving the winner, possibly after an early stage. Using the DB, we propose reward calibration (RC), a plug-and-play method that adaptively rebalances the updates for chosen and rejected responses to satisfy the DB, without redesigning the base objective. Empirical results show that RC leads to more disentangled dynamics, with better downstream performance observed across several settings. Our code is available at https://github.com/IceyWuu/DisentangledPreferenceOptimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出奖励校准（RC）方法，通过解耦偏好优化中的胜者与败者更新，实现抑制拒绝响应同时保留选中响应的训练动态。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于边际的偏好优化方法在抑制拒绝响应时往往会连带抑制选中响应，且缺乏通用方法在不同目标函数中避免此问题。
analysis.problem: 偏好优化中选中响应和拒绝响应的更新耦合，导致选中响应被错误抑制，影响对齐效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过激励-分数分解发现不同偏好优化目标共享相同局部更新方向，仅标量权重不同；进一步分析选中/拒绝似然动态，识别出解耦带（DB）条件，用于判断训练是否遵循期望路径。
analysis.method: 提出奖励校准（RC），一种即插即用方法，通过自适应重新平衡选中和拒绝响应的更新来满足解耦带条件，无需重新设计基础目标函数。
contributions: 提出统一的激励-分数分解框架，揭示不同偏好优化目标的共同更新结构。
识别解耦带（DB）条件，用于指导训练动态。
提出奖励校准（RC）方法，实现抑制拒绝响应同时保留选中响应。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明RC带来更解耦的动态，并在多个设置中取得更好的下游性能。
limitations: 可能依赖解耦带条件的可测试性，实际中可能难以严格满足。
RC作为即插即用方法，可能对某些基础目标函数效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出奖励校准（RC）方法，通过解耦偏好优化中的胜者与败者更新，实现抑制拒绝响应同时保留选中响应的训练动态。

papers.title: Semantic-based Distributed Learning for Diverse and Discriminative Representations
papers.abstract: In large-scale distributed scenarios, increasingly complex tasks demand more intelligent collaboration across networks, requiring the joint extraction of structural representations from data samples. However, conventional task-specific approaches often result in nonstructural embeddings, leading to collapsed variability among data samples within the same class, particularly in classification tasks. To address this issue and fully leverage the intrinsic structure of data for downstream applications, we propose a novel distributed learning framework that ensures both diverse and discriminative representations. For independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) data, we reformulate and decouple the global optimization function by introducing constraints on representation variance. The update rules are then derived and simplified using a primal-dual approach. For non-i.i.d. data distributions, we tackle the problem by clustering and virtually replicating nodes, allowing model updates within each cluster using block coordinate descent. In both cases, the resulting optimal solutions are theoretically proven to maintain discriminative and diverse properties, with a guaranteed convergence for i.i.d. conditions. Additionally, semantic information from representations is shared among nodes, reducing the need for common neural network architectures. Finally, extensive simulations on MNIST, CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 confirm the effectiveness of the proposed algorithms in capturing global structural representations.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种语义分布式学习框架，通过约束表示方差和节点聚类，在分布式场景下学习多样且判别性的表示。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模分布式场景中，传统任务特定方法导致同类样本表示坍塌，无法利用数据内在结构，影响下游任务性能。
analysis.problem: 分布式学习中如何学习既多样（类内差异）又判别（类间可分）的全局结构表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统方法在分类任务中导致同类样本表示坍塌，即类内变异性丧失。
analysis.method: 对i.i.d.数据，通过引入表示方差约束解耦全局优化，用原始-对偶方法推导更新规则；对非i.i.d.数据，通过聚类和虚拟复制节点，用块坐标下降更新模型。
contributions: 提出一种分布式学习框架，同时保证表示的多样性和判别性。
针对i.i.d.和非i.i.d.数据分别给出优化算法，并理论证明收敛性和性质。
通过共享语义信息减少对统一网络架构的依赖。
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上仿真，验证了算法捕获全局结构表示的有效性。
limitations: 实验仅在图像分类数据集上验证，未涉及其他模态或任务。
非i.i.d.场景的收敛性未提供理论保证。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种语义分布式学习框架，通过约束表示方差和节点聚类，在分布式场景下学习多样且判别性的表示。

papers.title: Negative Advantage Is a Double-Edged Sword: Calibrating Advantage in GRPO for Deep Search
papers.abstract: Deep search agents can autonomously initiate multi-turn interactions with search engines, thereby exhibiting strong question-answering capabilities. Such performance critically relies on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) as its core training algorithm. However, GRPO still faces several challenges in deep search settings. First, there exists a substantial mismatch between the correctness of intermediate steps and the reward signal, causing numerous correct intermediate steps to be incorrectly penalized when the final answer is wrong. Second, training is highly unstable, often resulting in degradation of natural language ability or even catastrophic training collapse. Our analysis attributes these issues to coarse-grained advantage assignment and an imbalance between positive and negative advantages. To address these problems, we propose CalibAdv, an advantage calibration method specifically designed for deep search tasks. Specifically, CalibAdv leverages the correctness of intermediate steps to downscale excessive negative advantages at a fine-grained level. It then rebalances positive and negative advantages in the answer component. Extensive experiments across three models and seven benchmarks demonstrate that CalibAdv improves both model performance and training stability. Our code is available at https://github.com/wujwyi/CalibAdv.

analysis.tldr: 提出CalibAdv方法，通过细粒度校准GRPO中的优势函数，提升深度搜索智能体的训练稳定性和性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度搜索智能体依赖GRPO进行训练，但GRPO在深度搜索场景中存在中间步骤正确性与奖励信号不匹配、训练不稳定甚至崩溃的问题，亟需改进。
analysis.problem: GRPO在深度搜索任务中优势分配粗粒度且正负优势不平衡，导致正确中间步骤被错误惩罚和训练不稳定。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 中间步骤正确性与最终奖励信号不匹配，正确中间步骤因最终答案错误而被惩罚；训练不稳定，出现自然语言能力退化或训练崩溃。
analysis.method: 提出CalibAdv，利用中间步骤的正确性在细粒度上降低过度的负优势，并在答案部分重新平衡正负优势。
contributions: 识别了GRPO在深度搜索中优势分配粗粒度和正负优势不平衡的问题。
提出CalibAdv方法，通过细粒度校准优势函数提升训练稳定性和模型性能。
在三个模型和七个基准上验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在三个模型和七个基准上进行实验，结果表明CalibAdv提升了模型性能和训练稳定性。
limitations: 可能依赖中间步骤正确性的标注，增加额外成本。
未讨论在非搜索任务上的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CalibAdv方法，通过细粒度校准GRPO中的优势函数，提升深度搜索智能体的训练稳定性和性能。

papers.title: Evaluating Multi-Hop Reasoning in RAG Systems: A Comparison of LLM-Based Retriever Evaluation Strategies
papers.abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) enhances large language models (LLMs) with external knowledge to answer questions more accurately. However, research on evaluating RAG systems-particularly the retriever component-remains limited, as most existing work focuses on single-context retrieval rather than multi-hop queries, where individual contexts may appear irrelevant in isolation but are essential when combined. In this research, we use the HotPotQA, MuSiQue, and SQuAD datasets to simulate a RAG system and compare three LLM-as-judge evaluation strategies, including our proposed Context-Aware Retriever Evaluation (CARE). Our goal is to better understand how multi-hop reasoning can be most effectively evaluated in RAG systems. Experiments with LLMs from OpenAI, Meta, and Google demonstrate that CARE consistently outperforms existing methods for evaluating multi-hop reasoning in RAG systems. The performance gains are most pronounced in models with larger parameter counts and longer context windows, while single-hop queries show minimal sensitivity to context-aware evaluation. Overall, the results highlight the critical role of context-aware evaluation in improving the reliability and accuracy of retrieval-augmented generation systems, particularly in complex query scenarios. To ensure reproducibility, we provide the complete data of our experiments at https://github.com/lorenzbrehme/CARE.

analysis.tldr: 提出上下文感知检索评估策略CARE，在多跳RAG评估中优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RAG评估研究多聚焦单上下文检索，缺乏对多跳查询中检索器组件的有效评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何有效评估RAG系统中多跳推理的检索器性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多跳查询中单个上下文看似无关但组合后至关重要；大参数模型和长上下文窗口下CARE优势更明显；单跳查询对上下文感知评估不敏感。
analysis.method: 提出Context-Aware Retriever Evaluation (CARE)，一种基于LLM作为评判者的上下文感知评估策略。
contributions: 提出CARE方法用于多跳RAG检索评估
在多个数据集和LLM上系统比较三种评估策略
analysis.experiments: 在HotPotQA、MuSiQue、SQuAD数据集上使用OpenAI、Meta、Google的LLM进行实验，CARE一致优于现有方法。
limitations: 仅评估了检索器组件，未涉及生成器
实验限于特定数据集和模型
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出上下文感知检索评估策略CARE，在多跳RAG评估中优于现有方法。

papers.title: Aether: Network Validation Using Agentic AI and Digital Twin
papers.abstract: Network change validation remains a critical yet predominantly manual, time-consuming, and error-prone process in modern network operations. While formal network verification has made substantial progress in proving correctness properties, it is typically applied in offline, pre-deployment settings and faces challenges in accommodating continuous changes and validating live production behavior. Current operational approaches typically involve scattered testing tools, resulting in partial coverage and errors that surface only after deployment. In this paper, we present Aether, a novel approach that integrates Generative Agentic AI with a multi-functional Network Digital Twin to automate and streamline network change validation workflows. It features an agentic architecture with five specialized Network Operations AI agents that collaboratively handle the change validation lifecycle from intent analysis to network verification and testing. Aether agents use a unified Network Digital Twin integrating modeling, simulation, and emulation to maintain a consistent, up-to-date network view for verification and testing. By orchestrating agent collaboration atop this digital twin, Aether enables automated, rapid network change validation while reducing manual effort, minimizing errors, and improving operational agility and cost-effectiveness. We evaluate Aether over synthetic network change scenarios covering main classes of network changes and on past incidents from a major ISP operational network, demonstrating promising results in error detection (100%), diagnostic coverage (92-96%), and speed (6-7 minutes) over traditional methods.

analysis.tldr: Aether 将生成式 AI Agent 与网络数字孪生结合，自动化网络变更验证流程，显著提升错误检测率和诊断覆盖率。
analysis.research_motivation: 网络变更验证目前主要依赖人工，耗时且易出错；现有形式化验证方法离线应用，难以适应持续变更和实时生产环境验证。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化网络变更验证流程，减少人工干预，提高错误检测率和诊断覆盖率，并加速验证速度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Aether 系统，集成生成式 Agentic AI 与多功能的网络数字孪生，包含五个专门的网络运维 AI 代理，协同处理从意图分析到网络验证和测试的变更验证生命周期。
contributions: 提出将生成式 Agentic AI 与网络数字孪生结合的新方法，用于自动化网络变更验证。
设计多代理架构，五个专用代理协同完成变更验证全流程。
在合成场景和真实 ISP 事故上验证，实现 100% 错误检测率、92-96% 诊断覆盖率和 6-7 分钟验证速度。
analysis.experiments: 在合成网络变更场景和一家主要 ISP 运营网络的过去事故上评估，与传统方法相比，错误检测率 100%，诊断覆盖率 92-96%，验证速度 6-7 分钟。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的数字孪生模型，构建和维护成本较高。
评估仅在单一 ISP 网络和合成场景上，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Aether 将生成式 AI Agent 与网络数字孪生结合，自动化网络变更验证流程，显著提升错误检测率和诊断覆盖率。

papers.title: Is SAM3 ready for pathology segmentation?
papers.abstract: Is Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM3) capable in segmenting Any Pathology Images? Digital pathology segmentation spans tissue-level and nuclei-level scales, where traditional methods often suffer from high annotation costs and poor generalization. SAM3 introduces Promptable Concept Segmentation, offering a potential automated interface via text prompts. With this work, we propose a systematic evaluation protocol to explore the capability space of SAM3 in a structured manner. Specifically, we evaluate SAM3 under different supervision settings including zero-shot, few-shot, and supervised with varying prompting strategies. Our extensive evaluation on pathological datasets including NuInsSeg, PanNuke and GlaS, reveals that: 1.text-only prompts poorly activate nuclear concepts. 2.performance is highly sensitive to visual prompt types and budgets. 3.few-shot learning offers gains, but SAM3 lacks robustness against visual prompt noise. and 4.a significant gap persists between prompt-based usage and task-trained adapter-based reference. Our study delineates SAM3's boundaries in pathology image segmentation and provides practical guidance on the necessity of pathology domain adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 系统评估SAM3在病理图像分割中的能力，发现文本提示效果差、对视觉提示敏感、鲁棒性不足，与适配器方法仍有差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 病理图像分割面临标注成本高和泛化性差的问题，SAM3作为新一代通用分割模型，其实际病理分割能力尚不清楚，需要系统评估以指导应用。
analysis.problem: SAM3在病理图像分割中的能力边界和适用条件是什么？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了四个关键现象：1) 纯文本提示难以激活核概念；2) 性能对视觉提示类型和预算高度敏感；3) 少样本学习虽有提升，但模型对视觉提示噪声缺乏鲁棒性；4) 基于提示的使用与任务训练适配器方法之间仍存在显著差距。
analysis.method: 提出系统评估协议，在零样本、少样本和监督设置下，结合不同提示策略，在NuInsSeg、PanNuke和GlaS数据集上评估SAM3。
contributions: 首次系统评估SAM3在病理图像分割中的能力，覆盖多种监督设置和提示策略。
揭示了SAM3在病理分割中的关键局限性，包括文本提示失效、视觉提示敏感性和鲁棒性不足。
提供了病理领域适应的实用指导，明确了SAM3的适用边界。
analysis.experiments: 在NuInsSeg、PanNuke和GlaS三个病理数据集上进行了零样本、少样本和监督实验，对比不同提示策略。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 评估仅限于三个数据集，可能无法代表所有病理图像类型。
未深入探讨如何改进SAM3以适应病理领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统评估SAM3在病理图像分割中的能力，发现文本提示效果差、对视觉提示敏感、鲁棒性不足，与适配器方法仍有差距。

papers.title: WebCompass: Towards Multimodal Web Coding Evaluation for Code Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models are rapidly evolving into interactive coding agents capable of end-to-end web coding, yet existing benchmarks evaluate only narrow slices of this capability, typically text-conditioned generation with static-correctness metrics, leaving visual fidelity, interaction quality, and codebase-level reasoning largely unmeasured. We introduce WebCompass, a multimodal benchmark that provides unified lifecycle evaluation of web engineering capability. Recognizing that real-world web coding is an iterative cycle of generation, editing, and repair, WebCompass spans three input modalities (text, image, video) and three task types (generation, editing, repair), yielding seven task categories that mirror professional workflows. Through a multi-stage, human-in-the-loop pipeline, we curate instances covering 15 generation domains, 16 editing operation types, and 11 repair defect types, each annotated at Easy/Medium/Hard levels. For evaluation, we adopt a checklist-guided LLM-as-a-Judge protocol for editing and repair, and propose a novel Agent-as-a-Judge paradigm for generation that autonomously executes generated websites in a real browser, explores interactive behaviors via the Model Context Protocol (MCP), and iteratively synthesizes targeted test cases, closely approximating human acceptance testing. We evaluate representative closed-source and open-source models and observe that: (1) closed-source models remain substantially stronger and more balanced; (2) editing and repair exhibit distinct difficulty profiles, with repair preserving interactivity better but remaining execution-challenging; (3) aesthetics is the most persistent bottleneck, especially for open-source models; and (4) framework choice materially affects outcomes, with Vue consistently challenging while React and Vanilla/HTML perform more strongly depending on task type.

analysis.tldr: 提出WebCompass多模态基准，统一评估代码语言模型的网页编码全生命周期能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准仅评估文本条件生成和静态正确性，忽略了视觉保真度、交互质量和代码级推理，无法反映真实网页编码的迭代循环。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个覆盖生成、编辑、修复全流程且支持文本、图像、视频多模态输入的网页编码能力评估基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 闭源模型显著更强且更均衡；编辑和修复任务难度不同，修复保留交互性更好但执行困难；美观度是最大瓶颈，尤其对开源模型；框架选择影响结果，Vue更具挑战性，React和Vanilla/HTML表现更强。
analysis.method: 构建WebCompass基准，包含三种输入模态（文本、图像、视频）和三种任务类型（生成、编辑、修复），共七类任务；采用LLM-as-a-Judge评估编辑和修复，Agent-as-a-Judge范式通过MCP在真实浏览器中执行网站并生成测试用例。
contributions: 提出WebCompass多模态基准，统一评估网页编码的生成、编辑、修复能力。
引入Agent-as-a-Judge评估范式，通过真实浏览器执行和交互测试近似人类验收测试。
系统评估多个模型，揭示闭源与开源模型差距、任务难度差异、美观度瓶颈及框架影响。
analysis.experiments: 评估了代表性闭源和开源模型，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准覆盖的领域和缺陷类型可能有限。
Agent-as-a-Judge的自动化程度和与人类判断的一致性有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出WebCompass多模态基准，统一评估代码语言模型的网页编码全生命周期能力。

papers.title: Instruction-as-State: Environment-Guided and State-Conditioned Semantic Understanding for Embodied Navigation
papers.abstract: Vision-and-Language Navigation requires agents to follow natural-language instructions in visually changing environments. A central challenge is the dynamic entanglement between language and observations: the meaning of instruction shifts as the agent's field of view and spatial context evolve. However, many existing models encode the instruction as a static global representation, limiting their ability to adapt instruction meaning to the current visual context. We therefore model instruction understanding as an Instruction-as-State variable: a decision-relevant, token-level instruction state that evolves step by step conditioned on the agent's perceptual state, where the perceptual state denotes the observation-grounded navigation context at each step. To realize this principle, we introduce State-Entangled Environment-Guided Instruction Understanding (S-EGIU), a coarse-to-fine framework for state-conditioned segment activation and token-level semantic refinement. At the coarse level, S-EGIU activates the instruction segment whose semantics align with the current observation. At the fine level, it refines the activated segment through observation-guided token grounding and contextual modeling, sharpening its internal semantics under the current observation. Together, these stages maintain an instruction state that is continuously updated according to the agent's perceptual state during navigation. S-EGIU delivers strong performance on several key metrics, including a +2.68% SPL gain on REVERIE Test Unseen, and demonstrates consistent efficiency gains across multiple VLN benchmarks, underscoring the value of dynamic instruction--perception entanglement.

analysis.tldr: 提出指令即状态（Instruction-as-State）范式，通过状态条件的分段激活与语义精炼实现指令与视觉观测的动态对齐，提升具身导航性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLN模型将指令编码为静态全局表示，无法适应导航过程中指令语义随视觉上下文动态变化的问题，导致指令理解与当前观测脱节。
analysis.problem: 如何让指令理解在导航过程中随智能体感知状态动态演化，实现指令与观测的持续对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 指令含义随智能体视野和空间上下文变化，静态编码限制了模型对当前视觉上下文的适应能力。
analysis.method: 提出S-EGIU框架，包含粗粒度阶段（激活与当前观测语义对齐的指令片段）和细粒度阶段（通过观测引导的token定位和上下文建模精炼激活片段），维护一个随感知状态更新的指令状态变量。
contributions: 提出Instruction-as-State范式，将指令理解建模为随感知状态演化的决策相关变量。
设计S-EGIU框架，实现粗到细的状态条件分段激活与语义精炼。
在REVERIE等基准上取得SPL提升，验证动态指令-感知纠缠的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在REVERIE Test Unseen上SPL提升2.68%，并在多个VLN基准上展示一致效率提升。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量指令-观测对齐标注。
框架复杂度可能影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出指令即状态（Instruction-as-State）范式，通过状态条件的分段激活与语义精炼实现指令与视觉观测的动态对齐，提升具身导航性能。

papers.title: SolidCoder: Bridging the Mental-Reality Gap in LLM Code Generation through Concrete Execution
papers.abstract: State-of-the-art code generation frameworks rely on mental simulation, where LLMs internally trace execution to verify correctness. We expose a fundamental limitation: the Mental-Reality Gap -- where models hallucinate execution traces and confidently validate buggy code. This gap manifests along two orthogonal dimensions: the Specification Gap (overlooking edge cases during planning) and the Verification Gap (hallucinating correct behavior for flawed code). We propose SolidCoder with a simple principle: don't imagine -- execute. The S.O.L.I.D. architecture addresses both dimensions by forcing edge-case awareness before algorithm design and replacing imagined traces with sandboxed execution using property-based oracles. With GPT-4o, SolidCoder achieves state-of-the-art pass@1 performance: 95.7% on HumanEval (+0.6%p), 77.0% on CodeContests (+4.3%p), and 26.7% on APPS (+3.4%p). Ablation reveals that edge-case awareness provides the largest individual gain, while execution grounding catches categorically different errors that specification improvements cannot address. These gains generalize to RL post-trained models, validating that bridging both gap dimensions is essential for robust code synthesis. We release our code and framework to facilitate future research.

analysis.tldr: SolidCoder通过强制边缘案例感知和沙盒执行弥合LLM代码生成中的心理-现实差距，显著提升代码正确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM代码生成依赖心理模拟，但模型会幻觉执行轨迹并自信地验证有缺陷的代码，导致生成代码可靠性不足。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM代码生成中的心理-现实差距，具体包括规划时忽略边缘案例的规范差距和幻觉正确行为的验证差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了LLM在代码生成中会幻觉执行轨迹并自信验证错误代码的现象，即心理-现实差距，并分解为规范差距和验证差距两个正交维度。
analysis.method: 提出SolidCoder，采用S.O.L.I.D.架构：在算法设计前强制边缘案例感知，并用沙盒执行（基于属性的预言机）替代想象轨迹。
contributions: 首次系统定义并形式化LLM代码生成中的心理-现实差距，包括规范差距和验证差距两个维度。
提出SolidCoder框架，通过边缘案例感知和沙盒执行弥合两个差距，在多个基准上取得SOTA结果。
analysis.experiments: 在HumanEval（95.7% pass@1）、CodeContests（77.0%）和APPS（26.7%）上评估，消融实验表明边缘案例感知贡献最大，执行接地能捕获规范改进无法解决的错误。
limitations: 可能依赖外部执行环境，增加推理开销。
对属性预言机的设计质量敏感，复杂任务中预言机可能不完善。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SolidCoder通过强制边缘案例感知和沙盒执行弥合LLM代码生成中的心理-现实差距，显著提升代码正确性。

papers.title: Memorize When Needed: Decoupled Memory Control for Spatially Consistent Long-Horizon Video Generation
papers.abstract: Spatially consistent long-horizon video generation aims to maintain temporal and spatial consistency along predefined camera trajectories. Existing methods mostly entangle memory modeling with video generation, leading to inconsistent content during scene revisits and diminished generative capacity when exploring novel regions, even trained on extensive annotated data. To address these limitations, we propose a decoupled framework that separates memory conditioning from generation. Our approach significantly reduces training costs while simultaneously enhancing spatial consistency and preserving the generative capacity for novel scene exploration. Specifically, we employ a lightweight, independent memory branch to learn precise spatial consistency from historical observation. We first introduce a hybrid memory representation to capture complementary temporal and spatial cues from generated frames, then leverage a per-frame cross-attention mechanism to ensure each frame is conditioned exclusively on the most spatially relevant historical information, which is injected into the generative model to ensure spatial consistency. When generating new scenes, a camera-aware gating mechanism is proposed to mediate the interaction between memory and generation modules, enabling memory conditioning only when meaningful historical references exist. Compared with the existing method, our method is highly data-efficient, yet the experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of both visual quality and spatial consistency.

analysis.tldr: 提出解耦记忆控制框架，在长时视频生成中实现空间一致性，同时降低训练成本并保持新场景生成能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将记忆建模与视频生成纠缠，导致场景重访时内容不一致，且探索新区域时生成能力下降，即使使用大量标注数据训练也难以解决。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲新场景生成能力的前提下，实现长时视频生成中的空间一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出解耦框架，包含轻量独立记忆分支、混合记忆表示（捕获时空线索）、逐帧交叉注意力（基于空间相关历史信息条件化）、以及相机感知门控机制（仅在存在有意义历史参考时激活记忆条件）。
contributions: 提出解耦记忆控制框架，分离记忆条件与生成过程，降低训练成本并提升空间一致性。
设计混合记忆表示和逐帧交叉注意力机制，有效利用历史信息。
引入相机感知门控机制，动态调节记忆与生成模块的交互。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明方法在视觉质量和空间一致性上达到最先进性能，且数据效率高。摘要未提供具体数据集或指标。
limitations: 可能依赖相机轨迹的准确性。
门控机制在极端场景下可能失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出解耦记忆控制框架，在长时视频生成中实现空间一致性，同时降低训练成本并保持新场景生成能力。

papers.title: TacticGen: Grounding Adaptable and Scalable Generation of Football Tactics
papers.abstract: Success in association football relies on both individual skill and coordinated tactics. While recent advancements in spatio-temporal data and deep learning have enabled predictive analyses like trajectory forecasting, the development of tactical design remains limited. Bridging this gap is essential, as prediction reveals what is likely to occur, whereas tactic generation determines what should occur to achieve strategic objectives. In this work, we present TacticGen, a generative model for adaptable and scalable tactic generation. TacticGen formulates tactics as sequences of multi-agent movements and interactions conditioned on the game context. It employs a multi-agent diffusion transformer with agent-wise self-attention and context-aware cross-attention to capture cooperative and competitive dynamics among players and the ball. Trained with over 3.3 million events and 100 million tracking frames from top-tier leagues, TacticGen achieves state-of-the-art precision in predicting player trajectories. Building on it, TacticGen enables adaptable tactic generation tailored to diverse inference-time objectives through classifier guidance mechanism, specified via rules, natural language, or neural models. Its modeling performance is also inherently scalable. A case study with football experts confirms that TacticGen generates realistic, strategically valuable tactics, demonstrating its practical utility for tactical planning in professional football. The project page is available at: https://shengxu.net/TacticGen/.

analysis.tldr: TacticGen 是一个基于多智能体扩散 Transformer 的足球战术生成模型，能够根据比赛上下文生成可适应、可扩展的战术序列。
analysis.research_motivation: 足球战术设计在深度学习中研究不足，现有预测分析只能揭示可能发生的情况，而战术生成能决定应该发生什么以实现战略目标，具有重要应用价值。
analysis.problem: 如何生成适应不同比赛上下文和推理目标的、可扩展的多智能体足球战术序列。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用多智能体扩散 Transformer，通过智能体自注意力和上下文感知交叉注意力捕捉球员与球的协作与竞争动态，并利用分类器引导机制实现适应不同目标的战术生成。
contributions: 提出 TacticGen，首个可适应、可扩展的足球战术生成模型。
设计多智能体扩散 Transformer 架构，有效建模多智能体运动序列。
通过分类器引导机制支持规则、自然语言或神经模型指定的多样化推理目标。
analysis.experiments: 使用超过330万事件和1亿跟踪帧的顶级联赛数据训练，在球员轨迹预测上达到最先进精度；通过足球专家案例研究验证了战术的真实性和战略价值。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量跟踪数据，泛化到低级别联赛或不同比赛风格的能力未知。
分类器引导机制可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TacticGen 是一个基于多智能体扩散 Transformer 的足球战术生成模型，能够根据比赛上下文生成可适应、可扩展的战术序列。

papers.title: Towards Symmetry-sensitive Pose Estimation: A Rotation Representation for Symmetric Object Classes
papers.abstract: Symmetric objects are common in daily life and industry, yet their inherent orientation ambiguities that impede the training of deep learning networks for pose estimation are rarely discussed in the literature. To cope with these ambiguities, existing solutions typically require the design of specific loss functions and network architectures or resort to symmetry-invariant evaluation metrics. In contrast, we focus on the numeric representation of the rotation itself, modifying trigonometric identities with the degrees of symmetry derived from the objects' shapes. We use our representation, SARR, to obtain canonic (symmetry-resolved) poses for the symmetric objects in two popular 6D pose estimation datasets, T-LESS and ITODD, where SARR is unique and continuous w.r.t. the visual appearance. This allows us to use a standard CNN for 3D orientation estimation whose performance is evaluated with the symmetry-sensitive cosine distance $\text{AR}_{\text{C}}$. Our networks outperform the state of the art using $\text{AR}_{\text{C}}$ and achieve satisfactory performance when using conventional symmetry-invariant measures. Our method does not require any 3D models but only depth, or, as part of an additional experiment, texture-less RGB/grayscale images as input. We also show that networks trained on SARR outperform the same networks trained on rotation matrices, Euler angles, quaternions, standard trigonometrics or the recently popular 6d representation -- even in inference scenarios where no prior knowledge of the objects' symmetry properties is available. Code and a visualization toolkit are available at https://github.com/akriegler/SARR .

analysis.tldr: 提出对称感知旋转表示SARR，用于对称物体的6D姿态估计，无需3D模型即可提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 对称物体在日常生活和工业中常见，但其固有的方向歧义性阻碍了深度学习网络在姿态估计中的训练，现有方法需设计特定损失函数或网络架构，缺乏通用性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种旋转表示，能够消除对称物体的方向歧义，使标准CNN能够直接用于3D方向估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对称物体的姿态存在多个等价方向，导致训练歧义；现有表示（如旋转矩阵、四元数）无法自然处理对称性。
analysis.method: 提出SARR（对称感知旋转表示），通过修改三角函数恒等式，融入从物体形状导出的对称度数，得到唯一且连续的旋转表示。
contributions: 提出SARR表示，能够为对称物体生成规范（对称解析）姿态，且相对于视觉外观唯一且连续。
在T-LESS和ITODD数据集上，使用标准CNN和对称敏感度量AR_C，SARR在姿态估计上超越现有方法。
无需3D模型，仅需深度或纹理缺失的RGB/灰度图像，且对未知对称性的物体也具有泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在T-LESS和ITODD数据集上评估，使用对称敏感度量AR_C和常规对称不变度量，SARR优于旋转矩阵、四元数等表示。
limitations: 可能依赖物体形状的对称度数先验，对于非对称物体效果未知。
仅验证了深度和纹理缺失的RGB输入，对全纹理RGB图像未充分实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出对称感知旋转表示SARR，用于对称物体的6D姿态估计，无需3D模型即可提升性能。

papers.title: A Control Architecture for Training-Free Memory Use
papers.abstract: Prompt-injected memory can improve reasoning without updating model weights, but it also creates a control problem: retrieved content helps only when it is applied in the right state. We study this problem in a strict training-free setting and formulate it as applicability control: when to trigger a memory-assisted second pass, when to trust it, and how to maintain the memory bank over time. Our method combines uncertainty-based routing, confidence-based selective acceptance, bank selection across rule and exemplar memory, and evidence-based governance of the memory bank over time. Under a locked training-free protocol with compute-matched controls, it improves two core arithmetic benchmarks by +7.0 points on SVAMP and +7.67 points on ASDiv over baseline. The same architecture also transfers to QA and agent benchmarks with smaller positive effects and shows the same positive direction on a second checkpoint for the main arithmetic tasks. On arithmetic, the main empirical pattern is that the control architecture, rather than raw memory exposure, drives the improvements on SVAMP and ASDiv. Mechanistically, confidence separates helpful from harmful rule-bank interventions, and under fixed retrieval the repair-versus-corrupt difference localizes to rows whose retrieved set actually contains the edited entries.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的记忆控制架构，通过不确定性路由、置信度选择和记忆库治理提升算术推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 提示注入记忆可以提升推理能力，但记忆内容只有在正确状态下应用才有效，现有方法缺乏对记忆使用时机和信任度的控制。
analysis.problem: 在严格无训练设置下，如何控制记忆辅助的二次推理触发时机、结果信任度以及记忆库的长期维护。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 控制架构而非原始记忆暴露驱动了SVAMP和ASDiv上的性能提升；置信度能区分规则记忆干预的有益与有害；在固定检索下，修复与破坏的差异集中在检索集包含编辑条目的行上。
analysis.method: 结合不确定性路由、置信度选择性接受、规则与示例记忆库选择以及基于证据的记忆库治理。
contributions: 形式化了无训练记忆使用中的适用性控制问题。
提出了一种包含路由、选择、记忆库选择和治理的控制架构。
在算术基准上取得显著提升，并展示了向QA和Agent任务的迁移能力。
analysis.experiments: 在SVAMP和ASDiv上分别提升+7.0和+7.67个点；在QA和Agent基准上也有较小正向效果；在第二个检查点上验证了算术任务的一致性。
limitations: 迁移到QA和Agent任务的效果较小。
仅验证了特定算术和QA/Agent基准，泛化性有待进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的记忆控制架构，通过不确定性路由、置信度选择和记忆库治理提升算术推理性能。

papers.title: A Comparative Evaluation of Geometric Accuracy in NeRF and Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Recent advances in neural rendering have introduced numerous 3D scene representations. Although standard computer vision metrics evaluate the visual quality of generated images, they often overlook the fidelity of surface geometry. This limitation is particularly critical in robotics, where accurate geometry is essential for tasks such as grasping and object manipulation. In this paper, we present an evaluation pipeline for neural rendering methods that focuses on geometric accuracy, along with a benchmark comprising 19 diverse scenes. Our approach enables a systematic assessment of reconstruction methods in terms of surface and shape fidelity, complementing traditional visual metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出评估NeRF和Gaussian Splatting几何精度的基准与流程，发现视觉质量高不代表几何准确。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经渲染评估主要关注视觉质量，忽略了机器人操作等任务所需的几何精度，缺乏系统性的几何评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估神经渲染方法（NeRF和Gaussian Splatting）的几何精度，并建立相应基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含19个场景的几何精度评估基准，提出评估流程，从表面和形状保真度两方面系统评估重建方法。
contributions: 提出一个专注于几何精度的神经渲染评估流程
构建包含19个多样化场景的基准数据集
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准场景数量有限，可能无法覆盖所有实际应用场景
评估流程可能未考虑动态场景或复杂光照条件
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出评估NeRF和Gaussian Splatting几何精度的基准与流程，发现视觉质量高不代表几何准确。

papers.title: DiffuSAM: Diffusion Guided Zero-Shot Object Grounding for Remote Sensing Imagery
papers.abstract: Diffusion models have emerged as powerful tools for a wide range of vision tasks, including text-guided image generation and editing. In this work, we explore their potential for object grounding in remote sensing imagery. We propose a hybrid pipeline that integrates diffusion-based localization cues with state-of-the-art segmentation models such as RemoteSAM and SAM3 to obtain more accurate bounding boxes. By leveraging the complementary strengths of generative diffusion models and foundational segmentation models, our approach enables robust and adaptive object localization across complex scenes. Experiments demonstrate that our pipeline significantly improves localization performance, achieving over a 14% increase in Acc@0.5 compared to existing state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 利用扩散模型引导的零样本目标定位方法，在遥感图像上提升定位精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感图像目标定位在复杂场景中面临挑战，现有方法精度不足，扩散模型在视觉任务中表现出潜力但尚未充分用于遥感定位。
analysis.problem: 如何利用扩散模型提升遥感图像中零样本目标定位的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混合流水线，结合扩散模型生成的定位线索与分割模型（如RemoteSAM、SAM3）以获得更精确的边界框。
contributions: 首次探索扩散模型在遥感图像目标定位中的应用
提出融合扩散模型与分割模型的混合流水线，显著提升定位性能
analysis.experiments: 在遥感数据集上实验，Acc@0.5指标相比现有最优方法提升超过14%。
limitations: 可能依赖扩散模型的计算成本较高
零样本场景下泛化性有待进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用扩散模型引导的零样本目标定位方法，在遥感图像上提升定位精度。

papers.title: Attraction, Repulsion, and Friction: Introducing DMF, a Friction-Augmented Drifting Model
papers.abstract: Drifting Models [Deng et al., 2026] train a one-step generator by evolving samples under a kernel-based drift field, avoiding ODE integration at inference. The original analysis leaves two questions open. The drift-field iteration admits a locally repulsive regime in a two-particle surrogate, and vanishing of the drift ($V_{p,q}\equiv 0$) is not known to force the learned distribution $q$ to match the target $p$. We derive a contraction threshold for the surrogate and show that a linearly-scheduled friction coefficient gives a finite-horizon bound on the error trajectory. Under a Gaussian kernel we prove that the drift-field equilibrium is identifiable: vanishing of $V_{p,q}$ on any open set forces $q=p$, closing the converse of Proposition 3.1 of Deng et al. Our friction-augmented model, DMF (Drifting Model with Friction), matches or exceeds Optimal Flow Matching on FFHQ adult-to-child domain translation at 16x lower training compute.

analysis.tldr: 提出带摩擦项的漂移模型DMF，理论证明漂移场消失可识别性，在FFHQ域翻译上以16倍更低训练计算量匹配或超越最优流匹配。
analysis.research_motivation: 漂移模型训练单步生成器时存在两个未解决问题：漂移场迭代存在局部排斥机制，且漂移场消失时无法保证学习分布匹配目标分布，限制了其理论完备性和实际效果。
analysis.problem: 解决漂移模型中漂移场消失时分布匹配的理论保证问题，并提升模型训练效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DMF（带摩擦的漂移模型），引入线性调度的摩擦系数，推导出收缩阈值和有限时域误差界，并证明高斯核下漂移场平衡的可识别性。
contributions: 推导了双粒子代理中局部排斥机制的收缩阈值。
证明了高斯核下漂移场消失可识别性：若漂移场在任意开集上为零则分布相等。
提出DMF模型，在FFHQ域翻译任务上以16倍更低训练计算量达到或超越最优流匹配。
analysis.experiments: 在FFHQ成人到儿童域翻译任务上评估，DMF匹配或超越最优流匹配，训练计算量降低16倍。
limitations: 理论分析限于高斯核，其他核函数下的可识别性未验证。
仅在一个域翻译任务上实验，泛化性需更多验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出带摩擦项的漂移模型DMF，理论证明漂移场消失可识别性，在FFHQ域翻译上以16倍更低训练计算量匹配或超越最优流匹配。

papers.title: Scalable Neighborhood-Based Multi-Agent Actor-Critic
papers.abstract: We propose MADDPG-K, a scalable extension to Multi-Agent Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (MADDPG) that addresses the computational limitations of centralized critic approaches. Centralized critics, which condition on the observations and actions of all agents, have demonstrated significant performance gains in cooperative and competitive multi-agent settings. However, their critic networks grow linearly in input size with the number of agents, making them increasingly expensive to train at scale. MADDPG-K mitigates this by restricting each agent's critic to the $k$ closest agents under a chosen metric which in our case is Euclidean distance. This ensures a constant-size critic input regardless of the total agent count. We analyze the complexity of this approach, showing that the quadratic cost it retains arises from cheap scalar distance computations rather than the expensive neural network matrix multiplications that bottleneck standard MADDPG. We validate our method empirically across cooperative and adversarial environments from the Multi-Particle Environment suite, demonstrating competitive or superior performance compared to MADDPG, faster convergence in cooperative settings, and better runtime scaling as the number of agents grows. Our code is available at https://github.com/TimGop/MADDPG-K .

analysis.tldr: 提出MADDPG-K，通过限制每个智能体的评论家只关注最近的k个邻居，实现多智能体强化学习的可扩展训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 集中式评论家方法在多智能体场景中性能优异，但其评论家网络输入随智能体数量线性增长，导致训练成本高昂，难以扩展到大规模智能体系统。
analysis.problem: 解决集中式评论家方法在大规模多智能体系统中的计算可扩展性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MADDPG-K：每个智能体的评论家只使用距离最近的k个智能体的观测和动作作为输入，保持输入大小恒定，从而降低计算复杂度。
contributions: 提出MADDPG-K算法，通过k近邻限制评论家输入，实现线性复杂度到常数复杂度的转变。
理论分析表明，剩余二次成本来自标量距离计算而非神经网络矩阵乘法，显著降低计算瓶颈。
在Multi-Particle Environment中验证，MADDPG-K在合作和对抗场景中性能与MADDPG相当或更优，收敛更快，且随智能体数量增加运行时扩展性更好。
analysis.experiments: 在Multi-Particle Environment套件的合作和对抗环境中进行实验，与MADDPG对比，展示了性能、收敛速度和运行时扩展性的优势。
limitations: k近邻假设可能不适用于某些需要全局信息的任务。
距离度量（欧氏距离）可能不是所有场景的最佳选择。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MADDPG-K，通过限制每个智能体的评论家只关注最近的k个邻居，实现多智能体强化学习的可扩展训练。

papers.title: CanonSLR: Canonical-View Guided Multi-View Continuous Sign Language Recognition
papers.abstract: Continuous Sign Language Recognition (CSLR) has achieved remarkable progress in recent years; however, most existing methods are developed under single-view settings and thus remain insufficiently robust to viewpoint variations in real-world scenarios. To address this limitation, we propose CanonSLR, a canonical-view guided framework for multi-view CSLR. Specifically, we introduce a frontal-view-anchored teacher-student learning strategy, in which a teacher network trained on frontal-view data provides canonical temporal supervision for a student network trained on all viewpoints. To further reduce cross-view semantic discrepancy, we propose Sequence-Level Soft-Target Distillation, which transfers structured temporal knowledge from the frontal view to non-frontal samples, thereby alleviating gloss boundary ambiguity and category confusion caused by occlusion and projection variation. In addition, we introduce Temporal Motion Relational Enhancement to explicitly model motion-aware temporal relations in high-level visual features, strengthening stable dynamic representations while suppressing viewpoint-sensitive appearance disturbances. To support multi-view CSLR research, we further develop a universal multi-view sign language data construction pipeline that transforms original single-view RGB videos into semantically consistent, temporally coherent, and viewpoint-controllable multi-view sign language videos. Based on this pipeline, we extend PHOENIX-2014T and CSL-Daily into two seven-view benchmarks, namely PT14-MV and CSL-MV, providing a new experimental foundation for multi-view CSLR. Extensive experiments on PT14-MV and CSL-MV demonstrate that CanonSLR consistently outperforms existing approaches under multi-view settings and exhibits stronger robustness, especially on challenging non-frontal views.

analysis.tldr: 提出规范视角引导的多视角连续手语识别框架，通过教师-学生蒸馏和时序增强提升跨视角鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有连续手语识别方法多基于单视角，对真实场景中的视角变化鲁棒性不足，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 解决多视角连续手语识别中因视角变化导致的语义歧义和类别混淆问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非正面视角下存在遮挡和投影变化，导致手语词汇边界模糊和类别混淆。
analysis.method: 提出规范视角引导框架，包括正面视角锚定的教师-学生蒸馏、序列级软目标蒸馏和时序运动关系增强。
contributions: 提出规范视角引导的多视角CSLR框架CanonSLR，有效提升跨视角鲁棒性。
构建通用多视角手语数据构建流水线，并扩展两个七视角基准数据集PT14-MV和CSL-MV。
analysis.experiments: 在PT14-MV和CSL-MV上实验，CanonSLR在多视角设置下持续优于现有方法，尤其在挑战性非正面视角上表现更强。
limitations: 可能依赖正面视角教师网络的质量。
多视角数据构建流水线可能引入额外噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出规范视角引导的多视角连续手语识别框架，通过教师-学生蒸馏和时序增强提升跨视角鲁棒性。

papers.title: Committed SAE-Feature Traces for Audited-Session Substitution Detection in Hosted LLMs
papers.abstract: Hosted-LLM providers have a silent-substitution incentive: advertise a stronger model while serving cheaper replies. Probe-after-return schemes such as SVIP leave a parallel-serve side-channel, since a dishonest provider can route the verifier's probe to the advertised model while serving ordinary users from a substitute. We propose a commit-open protocol that closes this gap. Before any opening request, the provider commits via a Merkle tree to a per-position sparse-autoencoder (SAE) feature-trace sketch of its served output at a published probe layer. A verifier opens random positions, scores them against a public named-circuit probe library calibrated with cross-backend noise, and decides with a fixed-threshold joint-consistency z-score rule. We instantiate the protocol on three backbones -- Qwen3-1.7B, Gemma-2-2B, and a 4.5x scale-up to Gemma-2-9B with a 131k-feature SAE. Of 17 attackers spanning same-family lifts, cross-family substitutes, and rank-<=128 adaptive LoRA, all are rejected at a shared, scale-stable threshold; the same attackers all evade a matched SVIP-style parallel-serve baseline. A white-box end-to-end attack that backpropagates through the frozen SAE encoder does not close the margin, and a feature-forgery attacker that never runs M_hon is bounded in closed form by an intrinsic-dimension argument. Commitment adds <=2.1% to forward-only wall-clock at batch 32.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于SAE特征迹的承诺-打开协议，用于检测托管LLM中的模型替换攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 托管LLM提供商存在用弱模型替代强模型以节省成本的激励，现有检测方案（如SVIP）存在并行服务侧信道漏洞，无法完全防止不诚实提供商对验证者与普通用户区别对待。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种协议，使得托管LLM提供商无法在不被发现的情况下用弱模型替代强模型服务用户。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出承诺-打开协议：提供商在服务输出时，通过Merkle树对每位置的稀疏自编码器（SAE）特征迹草图进行承诺；验证者随机打开位置，使用公共命名电路探针库进行评分，并通过固定阈值的联合一致性z-score规则做出决策。
contributions: 提出了一种基于SAE特征迹的承诺-打开协议，消除了并行服务侧信道漏洞。
在三个骨干模型（Qwen3-1.7B、Gemma-2-2B、Gemma-2-9B）上实例化协议，并验证了对17种攻击者的有效性。
提供了白盒端到端攻击和特征伪造攻击的理论分析，证明了协议的安全性。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-1.7B、Gemma-2-2B和Gemma-2-9B（带131k特征SAE）上测试了17种攻击者（包括同族提升、跨族替代和自适应LoRA），所有攻击者均被共享的尺度稳定阈值拒绝，而SVIP风格的并行服务基线被绕过。白盒攻击和特征伪造攻击均无法突破协议。
limitations: 协议依赖于SAE特征的质量和探针库的校准，可能受限于特定模型和任务。
承诺过程增加了最多2.1%的推理时间开销，可能影响高吞吐场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于SAE特征迹的承诺-打开协议，用于检测托管LLM中的模型替换攻击。

papers.title: STaD: Scaffolded Task Design for Identifying Compositional Skill Gaps in LLMs
papers.abstract: Benchmarks are often used as a standard to understand LLM capabilities in different domains. However, aggregate benchmark scores provide limited insight into compositional skill gaps of LLMs and how to improve them. To make these weaknesses visible, we propose Scaffolded Task Design (STaD) framework. STaD generates controlled variations of benchmark tasks based on the concept of scaffolding, which introduces structured, incremental support in a step-by-step manner. Rather than inspecting failures individually, this approach enables systematic and scalable probing of model behavior by identifying the specific reasoning skill compositions they lack. Treating the LLM as a black box, our experiments on six models of varying sizes reveal multiple failure points in three reasoning benchmarks and highlight each model's unique and distinct skill gaps.

analysis.tldr: 提出STaD框架，通过脚手架式任务设计系统识别LLM在组合推理技能上的缺口。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准测试的聚合分数无法揭示LLM在组合技能上的具体缺陷，难以指导改进。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地发现LLM在组合推理任务中缺失的具体技能组合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同规模的LLM在推理基准上表现出多样且独特的技能缺口，但传统失败分析难以规模化。
analysis.method: STaD框架基于脚手架概念，生成受控的任务变体，逐步增加结构化支持，从而探测模型缺乏的推理技能组合。
contributions: 提出STaD框架，用于系统探测LLM的组合技能缺口。
在六个模型和三个推理基准上实验，揭示了各模型独特的技能缺陷。
analysis.experiments: 在六个不同规模的LLM上，针对三个推理基准进行实验，识别出多个失败点。
limitations: 可能仅适用于推理类任务，对其他领域泛化性未知。
脚手架设计依赖人工先验，可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出STaD框架，通过脚手架式任务设计系统识别LLM在组合推理技能上的缺口。

papers.title: Beyond Explicit Refusals: Soft-Failure Attacks on Retrieval-Augmented Generation
papers.abstract: Existing jamming attacks on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems typically induce explicit refusals or denial-of-service behaviors, which are conspicuous and easy to detect. In this work, we formalize a subtler availability threat, termed soft failure, which degrades system utility by inducing fluent and coherent yet non-informative responses rather than overt failures. We propose Deceptive Evolutionary Jamming Attack (DEJA), an automated black-box attack framework that generates adversarial documents to trigger such soft failures by exploiting safety-aligned behaviors of large language models. DEJA employs an evolutionary optimization process guided by a fine-grained Answer Utility Score (AUS), computed via an LLM-based evaluator, to systematically degrade the certainty of answers while maintaining high retrieval success. Extensive experiments across multiple RAG configurations and benchmark datasets show that DEJA consistently drives responses toward low-utility soft failures, achieving SASR above 79\% while keeping hard-failure rates below 15\%, significantly outperforming prior attacks. The resulting adversarial documents exhibit high stealth, evading perplexity-based detection and resisting query paraphrasing, and transfer across model families to proprietary systems without retargeting.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种针对RAG系统的软失败攻击方法DEJA，通过生成对抗文档诱导流畅但无信息的回答，隐蔽性强且难以检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有针对RAG系统的干扰攻击通常导致显式拒绝或服务拒绝，容易被检测；需要更隐蔽的攻击方式以暴露系统脆弱性。
analysis.problem: 如何生成对抗文档，使RAG系统产生流畅连贯但无信息价值的回答（软失败），同时保持高检索成功率和低硬失败率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DEJA（Deceptive Evolutionary Jamming Attack），一种自动化黑盒攻击框架，利用进化优化和基于LLM的答案效用评分（AUS）生成对抗文档，诱导安全对齐的LLM产生软失败。
contributions: 形式化定义了RAG系统的软失败威胁，区别于显式拒绝攻击。
提出DEJA攻击框架，通过进化优化和AUS评分实现高效、隐蔽的软失败攻击。
实验证明DEJA在多个RAG配置和数据集上实现高软失败成功率（SASR>79%）和低硬失败率（<15%），且对抗文档具有高隐蔽性和迁移性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个RAG配置和基准数据集上进行实验，DEJA持续驱动回答向低效用软失败，SASR超过79%，硬失败率低于15%，显著优于先前攻击。对抗文档能规避基于困惑度的检测并抵抗查询改写，且跨模型族迁移至专有系统。
limitations: 依赖LLM评估器计算AUS，可能引入评估偏差。
未讨论防御方法或对实际部署的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种针对RAG系统的软失败攻击方法DEJA，通过生成对抗文档诱导流畅但无信息的回答，隐蔽性强且难以检测。

papers.title: QuantumQA: Enhancing Scientific Reasoning via Physics-Consistent Dataset and Verification-Aware Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) show strong capabilities in general reasoning but typically lack reliability in scientific domains like quantum mechanics, which demand strict adherence to physical constraints. This limitation arises from the scarcity of verifiable training resources and the inadequacy of coarse feedback signals in standard alignment paradigms. To address the data challenge, we introduce QuantumQA, a large-scale dataset constructed via a task-adaptive strategy and a hybrid verification protocol that combines deterministic solvers with semantic auditing to guarantee scientific rigor. Building on this foundation, we propose the verification-aware reward model (VRM) tailored for Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR), which employs an adaptive reward fusion (ARF) mechanism to dynamically integrate deterministic signals from a scientific execution suite (SES) with multidimensional semantic evaluations for precise supervision. Experimental results demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms baselines and general-purpose preference models. Notably, our optimized 8B model achieves performance competitive with proprietary models, validating that incorporating verifiable, rule-based feedback into the reinforcement learning loop offers a parameter-efficient alternative to pure scaling.

analysis.tldr: 通过物理一致的数据集和验证感知强化学习提升LLM在量子力学等科学领域的推理可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在通用推理上表现强劲，但在量子力学等科学领域缺乏可靠性，因为缺乏可验证的训练资源和标准对齐范式中反馈信号粗糙。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM在科学推理中因数据稀缺和反馈不精确导致的物理约束违背问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准对齐范式中的粗粒度反馈信号不足以确保科学领域的物理一致性。
analysis.method: 构建大规模数据集QuantumQA（任务自适应策略+混合验证协议），提出验证感知奖励模型VRM（自适应奖励融合ARF机制，结合确定性求解器和语义评估）。
contributions: 提出QuantumQA数据集，通过任务自适应策略和混合验证协议保证科学严谨性。
提出验证感知奖励模型VRM，利用自适应奖励融合机制整合确定性和语义反馈，提升RLVR效果。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明方法持续优于基线和通用偏好模型，优化后的8B模型性能与专有模型竞争。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有明确物理约束的科学领域。
混合验证协议可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过物理一致的数据集和验证感知强化学习提升LLM在量子力学等科学领域的推理可靠性。

papers.title: Copy-as-Decode: Grammar-Constrained Parallel Prefill for LLM Editing
papers.abstract: LLMs edit text and code by autoregressively regenerating the full output, even when most tokens appear verbatim in the input. We study Copy-as-Decode, a decoding-layer mechanism that recasts edit generation as structured decoding over a two-primitive grammar: <copy lines="i-j"/> references an input line range, <gen>...</gen> emits new content. A token-level FSM guarantees syntactic validity, and a serving-layer primitive updates the KV cache for each copy span via a single parallel-prefill forward rather than $N$ autoregressive steps -- sharing the parallel-forward kernel of speculative decoding but with input tokens as the draft and program-enforced acceptance replacing probabilistic verification. We report an upper-bound analysis that requires no end-to-end training. (i) Kernel speedup: on Qwen2.5-{1.5B, 7B}, copying $N$ tokens via parallel prefill is $6.8\times$--$303\times$ faster than autoregressive ($N \in [8, 512]$, A100 80GB bf16). (ii) Copy ceiling: on ProbeEdit and HumanEvalPack-Fix (Py/JS), $74$--$98\%$ of gold tokens are reachable under the line-level primitive; composed with the empirical kernel over each corpus's span histogram this yields a closed-form wall-clock bound of $29.0\times / 3.4\times / 4.2\times$ ($13.0\times$ pooled). A token-level extension reaches $91$--$99\%$ coverage with $4.5\times$--$6.5\times$ floors. (iii) Pipeline losslessness: oracle programs round-trip through the deterministic resolver on all $482$ cases, localizing any downstream failure to span selection rather than the mechanism. A perturbation study shows pooled EM drops from $100\%$ to $15.48\%$ under off-by-one noise. A fine-tuning pilot on Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B lifts HEvalFix-Py EM from $0/33$ (untrained) to $12$--$17\%$, a learnability signal, not a production selector. Batched-serving integration and multi-file coverage are scoped as follow-up.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Copy-as-Decode 机制，通过语法约束并行预填充加速 LLM 编辑，无需端到端训练。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 编辑文本和代码时需自回归重生成全部输出，即使大部分 token 与输入相同，导致效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何利用输入中已有的 token 加速 LLM 编辑生成过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在解码层引入基于两个原语的语法约束：<copy> 引用输入行范围，<gen> 生成新内容；通过 token 级 FSM 保证语法有效性，并在服务层对复制跨度使用单次并行预填充前向更新 KV 缓存，替代 N 步自回归。
contributions: 提出 Copy-as-Decode 机制，将编辑生成转化为结构化解码。
通过并行预填充实现显著加速，无需端到端训练。
提供上界分析，包括内核加速比、复制覆盖率及流水线无损性。
analysis.experiments: 在 Qwen2.5-{1.5B, 7B} 上测试内核加速比，在 ProbeEdit 和 HumanEvalPack-Fix 上测试复制覆盖率，并进行了微调试点实验。
limitations: 微调试点仅作为可学习性信号，非生产选择器。
批处理服务集成和多文件覆盖留作后续工作。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Copy-as-Decode 机制，通过语法约束并行预填充加速 LLM 编辑，无需端到端训练。

papers.title: Beyond Reproduction: A Paired-Task Framework for Assessing LLM Comprehension and Creativity in Literary Translation
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for creative tasks such as literary translation. Yet translational creativity remains underexplored and is rarely evaluated at scale, while source-text comprehension is typically studied in isolation, despite the fact that, in professional translation, comprehension and creativity are tightly intertwined. We address these gaps with a paired-task framework applied to literary excerpts from 11 books. Task 1 assesses source-text comprehension, and Task 2 evaluates translational creativity through Units of Creative Potential (UCPs), such as metaphors and wordplay. Using a scalable evaluation setup that combines expert human annotations with UCP-based automatic scoring, we benchmark 23 models and four creativity-oriented prompts. Our findings show that strong comprehension does not translate into human-level creativity: models often produce literal or contextually inappropriate renderings, with particularly large gaps for the more distant English-Chinese language pair. Creativity-oriented prompts yield only modest gains, and only one model, Mistral-Large, comes close to human-level creativity (0.167 vs. 0.246). Across all model-prompt combinations, only three exceed a creativity score of 0.1, while the rest remain at or near zero.

analysis.tldr: 提出配对任务框架评估LLM在文学翻译中的理解与创造力，发现强理解不等于高创造力。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM越来越多用于文学翻译等创造性任务，但翻译创造力缺乏大规模评估，且理解与创造力的关系常被分开研究。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估LLM在文学翻译中的源文本理解与翻译创造力，并探究二者关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 强理解不保证高创造力，模型常产生字面或不恰当的翻译，英中语言对差距更大；创造力提示仅带来微小提升。
analysis.method: 提出配对任务框架：任务1评估源文本理解，任务2通过创造性潜力单元（UCP）评估翻译创造力，结合专家标注与UCP自动评分。
contributions: 提出评估LLM文学翻译理解与创造力的配对任务框架
构建基于UCP的可扩展评估方法，并基准测试23个模型和4种提示策略
analysis.experiments: 在11本书的文学摘录上评估23个模型和4种创造力导向提示，使用专家标注和UCP自动评分。
limitations: 仅使用文学摘录，可能不覆盖所有翻译类型
UCP定义可能遗漏某些创造性形式
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出配对任务框架评估LLM在文学翻译中的理解与创造力，发现强理解不等于高创造力。

papers.title: Extending One-Step Image Generation from Class Labels to Text via Discriminative Text Representation
papers.abstract: Few-step generation has been a long-standing goal, with recent one-step generation methods exemplified by MeanFlow achieving remarkable results. Existing research on MeanFlow primarily focuses on class-to-image generation. However, an intuitive yet unexplored direction is to extend the condition from fixed class labels to flexible text inputs, enabling richer content creation. Compared to the limited class labels, text conditions pose greater challenges to the model's understanding capability, necessitating the effective integration of powerful text encoders into the MeanFlow framework. Surprisingly, although incorporating text conditions appears straightforward, we find that integrating powerful LLM-based text encoders using conventional training strategies results in unsatisfactory performance. To uncover the underlying cause, we conduct detailed analyses and reveal that, due to the extremely limited number of refinement steps in the MeanFlow generation, such as only one step, the text feature representations are required to possess sufficiently high discriminability. This also explains why discrete and easily distinguishable class features perform well within the MeanFlow framework. Guided by these insights, we leverage a powerful LLM-based text encoder validated to possess the required semantic properties and adapt the MeanFlow generation process to this framework, resulting in efficient text-conditioned synthesis for the first time. Furthermore, we validate our approach on the widely used diffusion model, demonstrating significant generation performance improvements. We hope this work provides a general and practical reference for future research on text-conditioned MeanFlow generation. The code is available at https://github.com/AMAP-ML/EMF.

analysis.tldr: 通过提升文本特征判别性，将MeanFlow从类标签生成扩展到文本条件生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MeanFlow方法仅支持类标签到图像生成，无法处理更灵活、更丰富的文本条件，限制了其应用范围。
analysis.problem: 如何将MeanFlow框架从固定类标签条件扩展到灵活文本输入，并解决文本条件带来的理解挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现直接集成基于LLM的文本编码器在MeanFlow中性能不佳，原因是MeanFlow生成步骤极少（如一步），要求文本特征具有足够高的判别性，而离散易区分类特征表现良好。
