analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出INTENT网络，通过视觉不变性组合和双目标判别学习，同时处理组合图像检索中的跨模态噪声和模态固有噪声。

papers.title: The Topological Dual of a Dataset: A Logic-to-Topology Encoding for AlphaGeometry-Style Data
papers.abstract: AlphaGeometry represents a milestone in neuro-symbolic reasoning, yet its architecture faces a log-linear scaling bottleneck within its symbolic deduction engine that limits its efficiency as problem complexity increases. Recent technical reports suggest that current domain-specific languages may be isomorphic as input representations to natural language, interchanging them acts as a performance-invariant transformation, implying that current neural guidance relies on superficial encodings rather than structural understanding. This paper addresses this representation bottleneck by proposing a logic-to-topology encoding designed to reveal the structural invariants of a model's latent space under a transformation of its input space. By leveraging the Logic of Observation, we utilize the duality between provability in observable theories and topologies to propose a logic-to-topology encoder for the input space. We introduce the concept of the "topological dual of a dataset", a transformation that bridges formal logic, topology, and neural processing. This framework serves as a Rosetta Stone for neuro-symbolic AI, providing a principled pathway for the mechanistic interpretability of how models navigate complex discovery paths.

analysis.tldr: 提出逻辑到拓扑编码，揭示数据集的结构不变量，解决AlphaGeometry符号推理引擎的瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: AlphaGeometry在神经符号推理中取得里程碑，但其符号推理引擎存在对数线性缩放瓶颈，且当前神经指导依赖表面编码而非结构理解。
analysis.problem: 解决AlphaGeometry中符号推理引擎的效率瓶颈，以及当前神经指导缺乏结构理解的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前领域特定语言与自然语言作为输入表示同构，互换是性能不变变换，暗示神经指导依赖表面编码。
analysis.method: 提出逻辑到拓扑编码，利用观察逻辑中可证明性与拓扑之间的对偶性，引入数据集拓扑对偶概念。
contributions: 提出逻辑到拓扑编码，揭示模型潜空间的结构不变量
引入数据集拓扑对偶概念，连接形式逻辑、拓扑和神经处理
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于AlphaGeometry类问题
实际效率提升未在摘要中验证
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出逻辑到拓扑编码，揭示数据集的结构不变量，解决AlphaGeometry符号推理引擎的瓶颈。

papers.title: Owner-Harm: A Missing Threat Model for AI Agent Safety
papers.abstract: Existing AI agent safety benchmarks focus on generic criminal harm (cybercrime, harassment, weapon synthesis), leaving a systematic blind spot for a distinct and commercially consequential threat category: agents harming their own deployers. Real-world incidents illustrate the gap: Slack AI credential exfiltration (Aug 2024), Microsoft 365 Copilot calendar-injection leaks (Jan 2024), and a Meta agent unauthorized forum post exposing operational data (Mar 2026). We propose Owner-Harm, a formal threat model with eight categories of agent behavior damaging the deployer. We quantify the defense gap on two benchmarks: a compositional safety system achieves 100% TPR / 0% FPR on AgentHarm (generic criminal harm) yet only 14.8% (4/27; 95% CI: 5.9%-32.5%) on AgentDojo injection tasks (prompt-injection-mediated owner harm). A controlled generic-LLM baseline shows the gap is not inherent to owner-harm (62.7% vs. 59.3%, delta 3.4 pp) but arises from environment-bound symbolic rules that fail to generalize across tool vocabularies. On a post-hoc 300-scenario owner-harm benchmark, the gate alone achieves 75.3% TPR / 3.3% FPR; adding a deterministic post-audit verifier raises overall TPR to 85.3% (+10.0 pp) and Hijacking detection from 43.3% to 93.3%, demonstrating strong layer complementarity. We introduce the Symbolic-Semantic Defense Generalization (SSDG) framework relating information coverage to detection rate. Two SSDG experiments partially validate it: context deprivation amplifies the detection gap 3.4x (R = 3.60 vs. R = 1.06); context injection reveals structured goal-action alignment, not text concatenation, is required for effective owner-harm detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出AI Agent对部署者造成伤害的威胁模型Owner-Harm，发现现有安全系统对此类攻击防御效果极差。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI Agent安全基准只关注通用犯罪危害，忽略了Agent伤害部署者这一商业后果严重的威胁类别，且真实世界已发生多起此类事件。
analysis.problem: 现有安全系统无法有效检测Agent对部署者造成伤害的行为（如凭证泄露、日历注入、未授权发帖等）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 一个组合安全系统在通用犯罪危害上达到100% TPR/0% FPR，但在提示注入导致的部署者伤害任务上仅14.8% TPR；该差距并非源于任务本身难度（通用LLM基线差距仅3.4个百分点），而是源于环境绑定的符号规则无法跨工具词汇泛化。
analysis.method: 提出Owner-Harm威胁模型（8类伤害行为），并引入符号-语义防御泛化（SSDG）框架，结合门控系统与确定性事后审计验证器进行分层防御。
contributions: 形式化定义了Owner-Harm威胁模型，涵盖8类Agent伤害部署者的行为类别。
量化了现有安全系统在Owner-Harm上的防御缺口，并展示了分层防御（门控+事后审计）的有效性。
提出SSDG框架解释防御泛化差距，并通过实验验证上下文剥夺和注入对检测的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在AgentHarm（通用犯罪）和AgentDojo（注入任务）上评估防御系统，并构建300场景的Owner-Harm基准测试。门控系统TPR 75.3%/FPR 3.3%，加入事后审计后TPR提升至85.3%，劫持检测从43.3%升至93.3%。
limitations: 基准测试规模有限（300场景），可能未覆盖所有Owner-Harm类型。
防御方法依赖符号规则和确定性审计，可能对复杂语义攻击鲁棒性不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AI Agent对部署者造成伤害的威胁模型Owner-Harm，发现现有安全系统对此类攻击防御效果极差。

papers.title: GS-STVSR: Ultra-Efficient Continuous Spatio-Temporal Video Super-Resolution via 2D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Continuous Spatio-Temporal Video Super-Resolution (C-STVSR) aims to simultaneously enhance the spatial resolution and frame rate of videos by arbitrary scale factors, offering greater flexibility than fixed-scale methods that are constrained by predefined upsampling ratios. In recent years, methods based on Implicit Neural Representations (INR) have made significant progress in C-STVSR by learning continuous mappings from spatio-temporal coordinates to pixel values. However, these methods fundamentally rely on dense pixel-wise grid queries, causing computational cost to scale linearly with the number of interpolated frames and severely limiting inference efficiency. We propose GS-STVSR, an ultra-efficient C-STVSR framework based on 2D Gaussian Splatting (2D-GS) that drives the spatiotemporal evolution of Gaussian kernels through continuous motion modeling, bypassing dense grid queries entirely. We exploit the strong temporal stability of covariance parameters for lightweight intermediate fitting, design an optical flow-guided motion module to derive Gaussian position and color at arbitrary time steps, introduce a Covariance resampling alignment module to prevent covariance drift, and propose an adaptive offset window for large-scale motion. Extensive experiments on Vid4, GoPro, and Adobe240 show that GS-STVSR achieves state-of-the-art quality across all benchmarks. Moreover, its inference time remains nearly constant at conventional temporal scales (X2--X8) and delivers over X3 speedup at extreme scales X32, demonstrating strong practical applicability.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于2D高斯溅射的连续时空视频超分辨率框架，通过连续运动建模绕过密集网格查询，实现超高效推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于隐式神经表示的方法在连续时空视频超分辨率中依赖密集像素级网格查询，导致计算成本随插帧数量线性增长，推理效率严重受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行密集网格查询的前提下，实现任意尺度因子的连续时空视频超分辨率，同时保持高质量和超高效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于2D高斯溅射（2D-GS）的框架，利用协方差参数的时间稳定性进行轻量级中间拟合，设计光流引导的运动模块推导任意时间步的高斯位置和颜色，引入协方差重采样对齐模块防止协方差漂移，并提出自适应偏移窗口处理大尺度运动。
contributions: 提出GS-STVSR，首个基于2D高斯溅射的连续时空视频超分辨率框架，绕过密集网格查询。
设计光流引导的运动模块和协方差重采样对齐模块，实现高效且稳定的时空连续建模。
在多个基准上达到最先进质量，且推理时间在常规尺度下几乎恒定，极端尺度下加速3倍以上。
analysis.experiments: 在Vid4、GoPro和Adobe240数据集上进行实验，结果显示GS-STVSR在所有基准上达到最先进质量，推理时间在X2-X8尺度下几乎恒定，在X32尺度下加速超过3倍。
limitations: 可能对光流估计的准确性敏感，光流误差可能影响运动建模。
自适应偏移窗口的设计可能在大尺度运动场景下仍有优化空间。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于2D高斯溅射的连续时空视频超分辨率框架，通过连续运动建模绕过密集网格查询，实现超高效推理。

papers.title: First, Do No Harm (With LLMs): Mitigating Racial Bias via Agentic Workflows
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in clinical settings, raising concerns about racial bias in both generated medical text and clinical reasoning. Existing studies have identified bias in medical LLMs, but many focus on single models and give less attention to mitigation. This study uses the EU AI Act as a governance lens to evaluate five widely used LLMs across two tasks, namely synthetic patient-case generation and differential diagnosis ranking. Using race-stratified epidemiological distributions in the United States and expert differential diagnosis lists as benchmarks, we apply structured prompt templates and a two-part evaluation design to examine implicit and explicit racial bias. All models deviated from observed racial distributions in the synthetic case generation task, with GPT-4.1 showing the smallest overall deviation. In the differential diagnosis task, DeepSeek V3 produced the strongest overall results across the reported metrics. When embedded in an agentic workflow, DeepSeek V3 showed an improvement of 0.0348 in mean p-value, 0.1166 in median p-value, and 0.0949 in mean difference relative to the standalone model, although improvement was not uniform across every metric. These findings support multi-metric bias evaluation for AI systems used in medical settings and suggest that retrieval-based agentic workflows may reduce some forms of explicit bias in benchmarked diagnostic tasks. Detailed prompt templates, experimental datasets, and code pipelines are available on our GitHub.

analysis.tldr: 基于EU AI Act评估五种LLM在临床任务中的种族偏见，发现检索增强的Agentic工作流可缓解部分显式偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在临床场景中广泛应用，但存在种族偏见问题，现有研究多聚焦单一模型且缺乏缓解策略，亟需系统性评估与治理方案。
analysis.problem: 如何评估并缓解LLM在合成患者病例生成和鉴别诊断排序任务中的种族偏见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有模型在合成病例生成任务中均偏离真实种族分布；DeepSeek V3在鉴别诊断任务中表现最佳，但偏见缓解不统一。
analysis.method: 以EU AI Act为治理框架，采用结构化提示模板和两阶段评估设计，对比五种LLM在种族分层流行病学分布下的表现，并引入检索增强的Agentic工作流。
contributions: 提出基于EU AI Act的LLM种族偏见评估框架
发现检索增强的Agentic工作流可缓解部分显式偏见
analysis.experiments: 在合成患者病例生成和鉴别诊断排序两个任务上评估五种LLM，使用种族分层流行病学分布和专家鉴别诊断列表作为基准，并对比独立模型与Agentic工作流的表现。
limitations: 仅评估五种LLM，可能不具广泛代表性
Agentic工作流改善不统一，部分指标未提升
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于EU AI Act评估五种LLM在临床任务中的种族偏见，发现检索增强的Agentic工作流可缓解部分显式偏见。

papers.title: HABIT: Chrono-Synergia Robust Progressive Learning Framework for Composed Image Retrieval
papers.abstract: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) is a flexible image retrieval paradigm that enables users to accurately locate the target image through a multimodal query composed of a reference image and modification text. Although this task has demonstrated promising applications in personalized search and recommendation systems, it encounters a severe challenge in practical scenarios known as the Noise Triplet Correspondence (NTC) problem. This issue primarily arises from the high cost and subjectivity involved in annotating triplet data. To address this problem, we identify two central challenges: the precise estimation of composed semantic discrepancy and the insufficient progressive adaptation to modification discrepancy. To tackle these challenges, we propose a cHrono-synergiA roBust progressIve learning framework for composed image reTrieval (HABIT), which consists of two core modules. First, the Mutual Knowledge Estimation Module quantifies sample cleanliness by calculating the Transition Rate of mutual information between the composed feature and the target image, thereby effectively identifying clean samples that align with the intended modification semantics. Second, the Dual-consistency Progressive Learning Module introduces a collaborative mechanism between the historical and current models, simulating human habit formation to retain good habits and calibrate bad habits, ultimately enabling robust learning under the presence of NTC. Extensive experiments conducted on two standard CIR datasets demonstrate that HABIT significantly outperforms most methods under various noise ratios, exhibiting superior robustness and retrieval performance. Codes are available at https://github.com/Lee-zixu/HABIT

analysis.tldr: 提出HABIT框架，通过互信息过渡率估计样本清洁度与双一致性渐进学习，解决组合图像检索中的噪声三元组对应问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 组合图像检索在个性化搜索和推荐系统中具有重要应用，但实际场景中三元组数据标注成本高且主观性强，导致噪声三元组对应问题严重影响模型性能。
analysis.problem: 解决组合图像检索中噪声三元组对应问题，具体包括精确估计组合语义差异和渐进适应修改差异不足两个挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HABIT框架，包含两个核心模块：1) 互知识估计模块，通过计算组合特征与目标图像之间互信息的过渡率来量化样本清洁度；2) 双一致性渐进学习模块，引入历史模型与当前模型的协作机制，模拟人类习惯形成过程以保留好习惯并校准坏习惯。
contributions: 提出HABIT框架，有效应对组合图像检索中的噪声三元组对应问题。
设计互知识估计模块，通过互信息过渡率精确识别清洁样本。
提出双一致性渐进学习模块，利用历史与当前模型协作实现鲁棒学习。
analysis.experiments: 在两个标准CIR数据集上进行了大量实验，结果表明HABIT在不同噪声比例下显著优于大多数方法，展现出优越的鲁棒性和检索性能。
limitations: 可能对噪声比例极高的情况仍需进一步验证。
框架复杂度较高，可能影响训练效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HABIT框架，通过互信息过渡率估计样本清洁度与双一致性渐进学习，解决组合图像检索中的噪声三元组对应问题。

papers.title: SignDPO: Multi-level Direct Preference Optimisation for Skeleton-based Gloss-free Sign Language Translation
papers.abstract: We present SignDPO, a novel multi-level Direct Preference Optimisation (DPO) framework designed to enhance the alignment of skeleton-based Sign Language Translation. While current skeleton-based models have made significant progress using Maximum Likelihood Estimation, they are primarily constrained by an imitation-based paradigm that lacks discriminative sensitivity to the fine-grained spatio-temporal nuances of sign language, often leading to semantic drift. To address this, SignDPO shifts the optimisation goal from simple sequence mimicry to structured preference alignment across spatial, temporal, and linguistic dimensions. Our framework involves three key designs. First, we introduce a hierarchical perturbation strategy to construct spatial and temporal non-preferred samples at both global and local granularities automatically. Second, we propose a self-guiding mechanism that leverages decoder cross-attention scores to identify and perturb semantically salient skeletal regions, forcing the model to distinguish genuine sign signals from structural distortions. Third, we establish an automated language-level preference generator by fine-tuning a dedicated perturbation model, capturing complex output-level failure modes without manual annotation. Extensive experiments on three widely adopted benchmarks, CSL-Daily, How2Sign, and OpenASL, demonstrate that SignDPO consistently outperforms state-of-the-art gloss-free methods and even rivals established gloss-based ones. Our results suggest that multi-level preference alignment is a powerful paradigm for bridging the gap between high-entropy skeletal trajectories and discrete linguistic semantics.

analysis.tldr: 提出多级直接偏好优化框架SignDPO，通过空间、时间和语言维度的偏好对齐提升骨架手语翻译质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有骨架手语翻译模型基于最大似然估计的模仿范式，缺乏对细粒度时空语义的判别能力，易导致语义漂移。
analysis.problem: 如何让骨架手语翻译模型从简单序列模仿转向结构化偏好对齐，以捕捉精细的时空语言特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前模型受限于模仿范式，对骨架序列中细微的时空变化不敏感，导致语义漂移。
analysis.method: 提出SignDPO框架，包含层次化扰动策略生成非偏好样本、自引导机制利用解码器交叉注意力识别关键区域、自动语言级偏好生成器。
contributions: 提出多级直接偏好优化框架，首次将DPO应用于骨架手语翻译。
设计层次化扰动策略和自引导机制，实现空间、时间和语言维度的偏好对齐。
在三个基准数据集上超越现有无词汇方法，甚至媲美有词汇方法。
analysis.experiments: 在CSL-Daily、How2Sign和OpenASL三个基准上实验，SignDPO持续超越最先进的无词汇方法，并匹敌有词汇方法。
limitations: 可能依赖骨架数据的质量，对噪声敏感。
偏好生成器的泛化性可能受限于训练数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多级直接偏好优化框架SignDPO，通过空间、时间和语言维度的偏好对齐提升骨架手语翻译质量。

papers.title: CFSR: Geometry-Conditioned Shadow Removal via Physical Disentanglement
papers.abstract: Traditional shadow removal networks often treat image restoration as an unconstrained mapping, lacking the physical interpretability required to balance localized texture recovery with global illumination consistency. To address this, we propose CFSR, a multi-modal prior-driven framework that reframes shadow removal as a physics-constrained restoration process. By seamlessly integrating 3D geometric cues with large-scale foundation model semantics, CFSR effectively bridges the 2D-3D domain gap. Specifically, we first map observations into a custom HVI color space to suppress shadow-induced noise and robustly fuse RGB data with estimated depth priors. At its core, our Geometric & Semantic Dual Explicit Guided Attention mechanism utilizes DINO features and 3D surface normals to directly modulate the attention affinity matrix, structurally enforcing physical lighting constraints. To recover severely degraded regions, we inject holistic priors via a frozen CLIP encoder. Finally, our Frequency Collaborative Reconstruction Module (FCRM) achieves an optimal synthesis by decoupling the decoding process. Conditioned on geometric priors, FCRM seamlessly harmonizes the reconstruction of sharp high-frequency occlusion boundaries with the restoration of low-frequency global illumination. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CFSR achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple challenging benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出CFSR，利用3D几何和语义先验通过物理解耦实现阴影去除，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统阴影去除网络缺乏物理可解释性，难以平衡局部纹理恢复与全局光照一致性。
analysis.problem: 将阴影去除建模为物理约束的恢复过程，需要融合3D几何和语义先验。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CFSR框架，包括HVI颜色空间映射、几何与语义双显式引导注意力机制、CLIP编码器注入整体先验、频率协同重建模块(FCRM)。
contributions: 提出多模态先验驱动的阴影去除框架，融合3D几何和语义信息。
设计几何与语义双显式引导注意力机制，物理约束注意力矩阵。
提出频率协同重建模块，解耦高频边界和低频光照恢复。
analysis.experiments: 在多个挑战性基准上达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 依赖深度估计和CLIP等预训练模型，可能引入额外计算开销。
在极端光照或复杂几何场景下性能可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CFSR，利用3D几何和语义先验通过物理解耦实现阴影去除，在多个基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: RASP-Tuner: Retrieval-Augmented Soft Prompts for Context-Aware Black-Box Optimization in Non-Stationary Environments
papers.abstract: Many deployed systems expose black-box objectives whose minimizing configuration shifts with an externally observed context. When contexts revisit a small set of latent regimes, an optimizer that discards history pays repeated adaptation cost; when each step must remain inexpensive, full Gaussian-process (GP) refits at high observation counts are difficult to sustain. We cast online tuning as context-conditioned regret minimization and present RASP-Tuner, which instantiates a decomposition motivated by first principles: (i) identify a regime proxy by retrieving similar past contexts; (ii) predict short-horizon loss with a mixture-of-experts surrogate whose input concatenates parameters, context, and a retrieved soft prompt; (iii) adapt chiefly in a low-dimensional prompt subspace, invoking full surrogate updates only when scalarized error or disagreement spikes. A RealErrorComposer maps heterogeneous streaming metrics to [0,1] via EMA-stabilized logistic scores, supplying a single differentiable training target. On nine synthetic non-stationary benchmarks, an adversarial-context sanity check, and three tabular real-world streams (Section on real-world experiments), RASP-Tuner improves or matches cumulative regret relative to our GP-UCB and CMA-ES implementations on seven of nine synthetic tasks under paired tests at horizon T=100, while recording 8-12 times lower wall-clock per step than sliding-window GP-UCB on identical hardware. Idealized analysis in a cluster-separated, strongly convex regime model (RA-GD) supplies sufficient conditions for bounded dynamic regret; the deployed pipeline violates several of these premises, and we articulate which gaps remain open.

analysis.tldr: RASP-Tuner通过检索增强的软提示实现非平稳环境下的上下文感知黑箱优化，在合成和真实任务上以更低计算成本匹配或超越GP-UCB。
analysis.research_motivation: 许多部署系统暴露黑箱目标函数，其最优配置随外部上下文变化，而传统优化器忽略历史导致重复适应成本，且高斯过程在观测数高时计算昂贵。
analysis.problem: 在非平稳环境中，如何以低计算成本实现上下文感知的黑箱优化，避免重复适应并保持低每步开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: RASP-Tuner：通过检索相似历史上下文识别状态代理，使用混合专家代理预测短期损失，并在低维提示子空间中进行自适应，仅在误差或分歧激增时触发完整代理更新；同时使用RealErrorComposer将异构流指标映射到[0,1]作为训练目标。
contributions: 提出RASP-Tuner，一种检索增强的软提示方法，用于非平稳环境下的上下文感知黑箱优化。
在合成和真实世界流数据上，以8-12倍更低的每步时间成本匹配或超越GP-UCB和CMA-ES。
analysis.experiments: 在9个合成非平稳基准、一个对抗上下文健全性检查和3个表格真实世界流上评估，在T=100时，RASP-Tuner在7/9合成任务上匹配或改进累积遗憾，且每步时间比滑动窗口GP-UCB低8-12倍。
limitations: 理想化分析（RA-GD）的假设在实际部署中可能不成立，存在未解决的差距。
方法依赖于检索和软提示，可能对检索质量敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RASP-Tuner通过检索增强的软提示实现非平稳环境下的上下文感知黑箱优化，在合成和真实任务上以更低计算成本匹配或超越GP-UCB。

papers.title: Multi-View Hierarchical Graph Neural Network for Sketch-Based 3D Shape Retrieval
papers.abstract: Sketch-based 3D shape retrieval (SBSR) aims to retrieve 3D shapes that are consistent with the category of the input hand-drawn sketch. The core challenge of this task lies in two aspects: existing methods typically employ simplified aggregation strategies for independently encoded 3D multi-view features, which ignore the geometric relationships between views and multi-level details, resulting in weak 3D representation. Simultaneously, traditional SBSR methods are constrained by visible category limitations, leading to poor performance in zero-shot scenarios. To address these challenges, we propose Multi-View Hierarchical Graph Neural Network (MV-HGNN), a novel framework for SBSR. Specifically, we construct a view-level graph and capture adjacent geometric dependencies and cross-view message passing via local graph convolution and global attention. A view selector is further introduced to perform hierarchical graph coarsening, enabling a progressively larger receptive field for graph convolution and mitigating the interference of redundant views, which leads to more discriminate discriminative hierarchical 3D representation. To enable category agnostic alignment and mitigate overfitting to seen classes, we leverage CLIP text embeddings as semantic prototypes and project both sketch and 3D features into a shared semantic space. We use a two-stage training strategy for category-level retrieval and a one-stage strategy for zero-shot retrieval under the same model architecture. Under both category-level and zero-shot settings, extensive experiments on two public benchmarks demonstrate that MV-HGNN outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出多视图层次图神经网络，通过图卷积和语义对齐提升手绘草图检索3D形状的准确性和零样本能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有草图检索3D形状方法对多视图特征采用简单聚合策略，忽略视图间几何关系和多级细节，导致3D表示弱；同时受限于可见类别，零样本场景性能差。
analysis.problem: 如何有效建模多视图间的几何依赖和层次细节，并实现类别无关的草图-3D对齐以提升零样本检索性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MV-HGNN，构建视图级图网络，通过局部图卷积和全局注意力捕获相邻视图几何依赖和跨视图消息传递；引入视图选择器进行层次图粗化，扩大感受野并减少冗余视图干扰；利用CLIP文本嵌入作为语义原型，将草图和3D特征投影到共享语义空间实现类别无关对齐；采用两阶段训练用于类别级检索，一阶段训练用于零样本检索。
contributions: 提出MV-HGNN框架，通过层次图卷积和视图选择器生成判别性层次3D表示。
利用CLIP语义原型实现草图与3D特征的类别无关对齐，提升零样本检索能力。
在类别级和零样本设置下，两个公开基准上均达到最先进性能。
analysis.experiments: 在两个公开基准上进行了类别级和零样本检索实验，结果表明MV-HGNN优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖CLIP的预训练质量，在特定领域泛化性有限。
层次图粗化可能丢失部分细粒度视图信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多视图层次图神经网络，通过图卷积和语义对齐提升手绘草图检索3D形状的准确性和零样本能力。

papers.title: Diversity Collapse in Multi-Agent LLM Systems: Structural Coupling and Collective Failure in Open-Ended Idea Generation
papers.abstract: Multi-agent systems (MAS) are increasingly used for open-ended idea generation, driven by the expectation that collective interaction will broaden the exploration diversity. However, when and why such collaboration truly expands the solution space remains unclear. We present a systematic empirical study of diversity in MAS-based ideation across three bottom-up levels: model intelligence, agent cognition, and system dynamics. At the model level, we identify a compute efficiency paradox, where stronger, highly aligned models yield diminishing marginal diversity despite higher per-sample quality. At the cognition level, authority-driven dynamics suppress semantic diversity compared to junior-dominated groups. At the system level, group-size scaling yields diminishing returns and dense communication topologies accelerate premature convergence. We characterize these outcomes as collective failures emerging from structural coupling, a process where interaction inadvertently contracts agent exploration and triggers diversity collapse. Our analysis shows that this collapse arises primarily from the interaction structure rather than inherent model insufficiency, highlighting the importance of preserving independence and disagreement when designing MAS for creative tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/Xtra-Computing/MAS_Diversity.

analysis.tldr: 多智能体LLM系统在开放式创意生成中因结构耦合导致多样性崩溃。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体系统被广泛用于开放式创意生成，但集体互动何时真正扩展解空间尚不明确，现有方法缺乏对多样性崩溃机制的系统理解。
analysis.problem: 揭示多智能体LLM系统中多样性崩溃的原因和机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到三个层面的现象：模型层面，强对齐模型虽单样本质量高但边际多样性递减；认知层面，权威驱动动态抑制语义多样性；系统层面，组规模扩展收益递减且密集通信拓扑加速过早收敛。
analysis.method: 从模型智能、智能体认知和系统动力学三个层面进行系统性实证研究。
contributions: 识别出多智能体LLM系统中多样性崩溃的三种集体失败模式（计算效率悖论、权威驱动抑制、规模收益递减）。
将多样性崩溃归因于结构耦合而非模型固有不足，强调保留独立性和分歧的重要性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定类型的创意生成任务，泛化性需验证。
未提供定量实验细节，结论的稳健性待确认。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多智能体LLM系统在开放式创意生成中因结构耦合导致多样性崩溃。

papers.title: SELF-EMO: Emotional Self-Evolution from Recognition to Consistent Expression
papers.abstract: Emotion Recognition in Conversation (ERC) has become a fundamental capability for large language models (LLMs) in human-centric interaction. Beyond accurate recognition, coherent emotional expression is also crucial, yet both are limited by the scarcity and static nature of high-quality annotated data. In this work, we propose SELF-EMO, a self-evolution framework grounded in the hypothesis that better emotion prediction leads to more consistent emotional responses. We introduce two auxiliary tasks, emotional understanding and emotional expression, and design a role-based self-play paradigm where the model acts as both an emotion recognizer and a dialogue responder. Through iterative interactions, the model generates diverse conversational trajectories, enabling scalable data generation. To ensure quality, we adopt a data flywheel mechanism that filters candidate predictions and responses using a smoothed IoU-based reward and feeds selected samples back for continuous self-improvement without external supervision. We further develop SELF-GRPO, a reinforcement learning algorithm that stabilizes optimization with multi-label alignment rewards and group-level consistency signals. Experiments on IEMOCAP, MELD, and EmoryNLP show that SELF-EMO achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving accuracy by +6.33% on Qwen3-4B and +8.54% on Qwen3-8B, demonstrating strong effectiveness and generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出SELF-EMO框架，通过自演化机制让LLM从情感识别到一致表达，无需外部监督，在多个数据集上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 对话情感识别中高质量标注数据稀缺且静态，限制了LLM的情感识别和一致表达能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在缺乏高质量标注数据的情况下，同时提升情感识别准确性和情感表达一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SELF-EMO自演化框架，包含两个辅助任务（情感理解和情感表达），基于角色的自对弈范式生成对话轨迹，通过数据飞轮机制（平滑IoU奖励过滤）和SELF-GRPO强化学习算法实现无外部监督的持续自我改进。
contributions: 提出SELF-EMO自演化框架，实现从情感识别到一致表达的无监督自我提升。
设计角色自对弈和数据飞轮机制，生成高质量训练数据。
开发SELF-GRPO强化学习算法，稳定优化多标签对齐和组级一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在IEMOCAP、MELD和EmoryNLP数据集上评估，Qwen3-4B准确率提升+6.33%，Qwen3-8B提升+8.54%，达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖初始模型的情感识别能力。
数据飞轮机制的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SELF-EMO框架，通过自演化机制让LLM从情感识别到一致表达，无需外部监督，在多个数据集上取得SOTA。

papers.title: Trustworthy Endoscopic Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Super-resolution (SR) models are attracting growing interest for enhancing minimally invasive surgery and diagnostic videos under hardware constraints. However, valid concerns remain regarding the introduction of hallucinated structures and amplified noise, limiting their reliability in safety-critical settings. We propose a direct and practical framework to make SR systems more trustworthy by identifying where reconstructions are likely to fail. Our approach integrates a lightweight error-prediction network that operates on intermediate representations to estimate pixel-wise reconstruction error. The module is computationally efficient and low-latency, making it suitable for real-time deployment. We convert these predictions into operational failure decisions by constructing Conformal Failure Masks (CFM), which localize regions where the SR output should not be trusted. Built on conformal risk control principles, our method provides theoretical guarantees for controlling both the tolerated error limit and the miscoverage in detected failures. We evaluate our approach on image and video SR, demonstrating its effectiveness in detecting unreliable reconstructions in endoscopic and robotic surgery settings. To our knowledge, this is the first study to provide a model-agnostic, theoretically grounded approach to improving the safety of real-time endoscopic image SR.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级错误预测网络结合保形失败掩码，为内窥镜超分辨率提供理论保证的可靠性评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 超分辨率模型在内窥镜手术等安全关键场景中可能引入幻觉结构和放大噪声，现有方法缺乏可靠性保障。
analysis.problem: 如何实时、理论有保证地检测内窥镜超分辨率重建中的不可靠区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 超分辨率模型在安全关键场景中可能产生不可靠重建，但缺乏有效的失败检测机制。
analysis.method: 集成轻量级错误预测网络（基于中间表征估计像素级误差）和保形失败掩码（基于保形风险控制提供理论保证）。
contributions: 首个为实时内窥镜图像超分辨率提供模型无关、理论有保证的可靠性提升方法。
提出保形失败掩码，可定位不可信区域并提供误差容忍度和未覆盖率的理论控制。
analysis.experiments: 在图像和视频超分辨率任务上评估，验证了内窥镜和机器人手术场景中检测不可靠重建的有效性。
limitations: 可能仅针对内窥镜场景，泛化性未充分验证。
错误预测网络的精度可能受限于中间表征质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级错误预测网络结合保形失败掩码，为内窥镜超分辨率提供理论保证的可靠性评估。

papers.title: AIT Academy: Cultivating the Complete Agent with a Confucian Three-Domain Curriculum
papers.abstract: What does it mean to give an AI agent a complete education? Current agent development produces specialists systems optimized for a single capability dimension, whether tool use, code generation, or security awareness that exhibit predictable deficits wherever they were not trained. We argue this pattern reflects a structural absence: there is no curriculum theory for agents, no principled account of what a fully developed agent should know, be, and be able to do across the full scope of intelligent behavior. This paper introduces the AIT Academy (Agents Institute of Technology Academy), a curriculum framework for cultivating AI agents across the tripartite structure of human knowledge. Grounded in Kagan's Three Cultures and UNESCO ISCED-F 2013, AIT organizes agent capability development into three domains: Natural Science and Technical Reasoning (Domain I), Humanities and Creative Expression (Domain II), and Social Science and Ethical Reasoning (Domain III). The Confucian Six Arts (liuyi) a 2,500-year-old holistic education system are reinterpreted as behavioral archetypes that map directly onto trainable agent capabilities within each domain. Three representative training grounds instantiate the framework across multiple backbone LLMs: the ClawdGO Security Dojo (Domain I), Athen's Academy (Domain II), and the Alt Mirage Stage (Domain III). Experiments demonstrate a 15.9-point improvement in security capability scores under weakest-first curriculum scheduling, and a 7-percentage-point gain in social reasoning performance under principled attribution modeling. A cross-domain finding Security Awareness Calibration Pathology (SACP), in which over-trained Domain I agents fail on out-of-distribution evaluation illustrates the diagnostic value of a multi-domain perspective unavailable to any single-domain framework.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于儒家六艺和三元知识结构的AI智能体课程框架AIT Academy，实验显示安全能力提升15.9分，社会推理提升7个百分点。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前智能体开发只针对单一能力维度（如工具使用、代码生成或安全意识），导致未训练领域出现可预测的缺陷，缺乏完整的课程理论来培养全面发展的智能体。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个结构化的课程框架，使AI智能体在自然/技术、人文/创意、社会/伦理三个领域均衡发展，避免单一领域训练导致的系统性缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现安全意识校准病理学（SACP）现象：过度训练的领域I智能体在分布外评估中失败，表明多领域视角的诊断价值。
analysis.method: 基于Kagan三种文化和UNESCO ISCED-F 2013，将智能体能力分为三个领域，并重新诠释儒家六艺作为可训练的行为原型，构建三个训练场（ClawdGO Security Dojo、Athen's Academy、Alt Mirage Stage）实例化框架。
contributions: 提出AIT Academy，首个基于三元知识结构的智能体课程框架
发现安全校准病理学（SACP）现象，证明多领域训练的必要性
在多个骨干LLM上验证框架有效性，安全能力提升15.9分，社会推理提升7个百分点
analysis.experiments: 在多个骨干LLM上，使用最弱优先课程调度使安全能力得分提升15.9分，使用原则归因建模使社会推理性能提升7个百分点。
limitations: 摘要未提及跨领域泛化到其他任务或更大规模模型的效果
可能依赖特定课程调度策略，通用性待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于儒家六艺和三元知识结构的AI智能体课程框架AIT Academy，实验显示安全能力提升15.9分，社会推理提升7个百分点。

papers.title: Latent Fourier Transform
papers.abstract: We introduce the Latent Fourier Transform (LatentFT), a framework that provides novel frequency-domain controls for generative music models. LatentFT combines a diffusion autoencoder with a latent-space Fourier transform to separate musical patterns by timescale. By masking latents in the frequency domain during training, our method yields representations that can be manipulated coherently at inference. This allows us to generate musical variations and blends from reference examples while preserving characteristics at desired timescales, which are specified as frequencies in the latent space. LatentFT parallels the role of the equalizer in music production: while traditional equalizers operates on audible frequencies to shape timbre, LatentFT operates on latent-space frequencies to shape musical structure. Experiments and listening tests show that LatentFT improves condition adherence and quality compared to baselines. We also present a technique for hearing frequencies in the latent space in isolation, and show different musical attributes reside in different regions of the latent spectrum. Our results show how frequency-domain control in latent space provides an intuitive, continuous frequency axis for conditioning and blending, advancing us toward more interpretable and interactive generative music models.

analysis.tldr: 提出LatentFT框架，在扩散自编码器的隐空间中引入傅里叶变换，实现对音乐结构按时间尺度的频率域控制与编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成式音乐模型缺乏对音乐结构（如节奏、和声）的细粒度、可解释的控制手段，传统均衡器只能控制音色频率，无法操控隐空间中的音乐结构。
analysis.problem: 如何为生成式音乐模型提供一种直观、连续且可解释的频率域控制机制，以分离和操纵不同时间尺度的音乐模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合扩散自编码器与隐空间傅里叶变换，在训练时对频域隐变量进行掩码，使模型学习到可分离的表示；推理时通过指定隐空间频率来生成音乐变体或混合，同时保留目标时间尺度的特征。
contributions: 提出LatentFT框架，首次在隐空间中使用傅里叶变换实现音乐结构的频率域控制。
展示了隐空间频率与音乐属性（如节奏、和声）之间的对应关系，并提供了孤立聆听隐空间频率的技术。
analysis.experiments: 实验和听力测试表明，LatentFT在条件遵循度和质量上优于基线方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于音乐生成领域，泛化到其他模态需验证。
隐空间频率与音乐属性的对应关系可能依赖特定数据集或模型架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LatentFT框架，在扩散自编码器的隐空间中引入傅里叶变换，实现对音乐结构按时间尺度的频率域控制与编辑。

papers.title: Mitigating Multimodal Hallucination via Phase-wise Self-reward
papers.abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) still struggle with vision hallucination, where generated responses are inconsistent with the visual input. Existing methods either rely on large-scale annotated data for fine-tuning, which incurs massive computational overhead, or employ static post-hoc strategies that overlook the dynamic nature of hallucination emergence. To address these, we introduce a new self-rewarding framework, enabling dynamic hallucination mitigation at inference time without external supervision. On the empirical side, we reveal that visual hallucination exhibits phase-wise dynamic patterns, peaking at the onset of each semantic phase. Drawing on these insights, we propose \textbf{PSRD} (\textbf{Phase-wise \textbf{S}elf-\textbf{R}eward \textbf{D}ecoding) for online hallucination correction guided by phase-wise self-reward signals. To reduce the cost of repeated self-evaluation during decoding, we distill the hallucination guidance signal from LVLMs into a lightweight reward model. The reward model subsequently provides on-the-fly guidance for targeted intervention during the decoding process, enabling precise hallucination suppression. The proposed PSRD significantly reduces the hallucination rate of LLaVA-1.5-7B by 50.0% and consistently outperforms existing post-hoc methods across five hallucination evaluation benchmarks for four LVLMs. Further analysis confirms that PSRD effectively mitigates hallucination propagation and achieves a highly controllable trade-off between strong performance and inference efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需外部监督的相位式自奖励解码框架PSRD，利用视觉幻觉的相位动态模式在推理时在线纠正幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）仍存在视觉幻觉问题，即生成响应与视觉输入不一致。现有方法要么依赖大规模标注数据进行微调（计算开销大），要么采用静态事后策略（忽略幻觉出现的动态性）。
analysis.problem: 如何在推理时动态、高效地缓解LVLMs的视觉幻觉，无需外部监督或大规模微调。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现视觉幻觉呈现相位式动态模式，在每个语义阶段开始时达到峰值。
analysis.method: 提出PSRD（Phase-wise Self-Reward Decoding），利用相位式自奖励信号指导在线幻觉纠正。为降低重复自评估成本，将LVLM的幻觉引导信号蒸馏为轻量级奖励模型，在解码过程中提供实时指导。
contributions: 揭示视觉幻觉的相位式动态模式，为在线干预提供依据。
提出PSRD框架，无需外部监督即可在推理时动态缓解幻觉。
通过知识蒸馏将幻觉引导信号压缩为轻量级奖励模型，提升效率。
在多个基准上显著降低幻觉率，LLaVA-1.5-7B降低50.0%，并一致优于现有事后方法。
analysis.experiments: 在五个幻觉评估基准上对四种LVLM进行评测，PSRD显著降低幻觉率，LLaVA-1.5-7B降低50.0%，并一致优于现有事后方法。
limitations: 可能依赖LVLM自身生成的自奖励信号质量，若模型本身幻觉严重，信号可能不准确。
蒸馏过程需要额外训练轻量级奖励模型，可能引入少量计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需外部监督的相位式自奖励解码框架PSRD，利用视觉幻觉的相位动态模式在推理时在线纠正幻觉。

papers.title: Identifying Ethical Biases in Action Recognition Models
papers.abstract: Human Action Recognition (HAR) models are increasingly deployed in high-stakes environments, yet their fairness across different human appearances has not been analyzed. We introduce a framework for auditing bias in HAR models using synthetic video data, generated with full control over visual identity attributes such as skin color. Unlike prior work that focuses on static images or pose estimation, our approach preserves temporal consistency, allowing us to isolate and test how changes to a single attribute affect model predictions. Through controlled interventions using the BEDLAM simulation platform, we show whether some popular HAR models exhibit statistically significant biases on the skin color even when the motion remains identical. Our results highlight how models may encode unwanted visual associations, and we provide evidence of systematic errors across groups. This work contributes a framework for auditing HAR models and supports the development of more transparent, accountable systems in light of upcoming regulatory standards.

analysis.tldr: 提出用合成视频审计动作识别模型在肤色等视觉属性上的公平性偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: HAR模型在高风险场景中部署，但其在不同人种外观上的公平性尚未被系统分析，现有工作多聚焦静态图像或姿态估计，缺乏对时间一致性的控制。
analysis.problem: 如何系统审计HAR模型在视觉身份属性（如肤色）上的偏见，并确保测试的时序一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用BEDLAM仿真平台生成完全控制视觉属性的合成视频，通过干预单一属性（如肤色）并保持动作不变，统计模型预测的显著偏差。
contributions: 提出一个基于合成视频的HAR模型偏见审计框架，支持对视觉属性的可控干预。
实证发现流行HAR模型在肤色上存在统计显著的偏见，即使动作相同。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅测试了肤色属性，未覆盖其他潜在偏见维度（如性别、年龄）。
合成视频与真实场景的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出用合成视频审计动作识别模型在肤色等视觉属性上的公平性偏见。

papers.title: E3VS-Bench: A Benchmark for Viewpoint-Dependent Active Perception in 3D Gaussian Splatting Scenes
papers.abstract: Visual search in 3D environments requires embodied agents to actively explore their surroundings and acquire task-relevant evidence. However, existing visual search and embodied AI benchmarks, including EQA, typically rely on static observations or constrained egocentric motion, and thus do not explicitly evaluate fine-grained viewpoint-dependent phenomena that arise under unrestricted 5-DoF viewpoint control in real-world 3D environments, such as visibility changes caused by vertical viewpoint shifts, revealing contents inside containers, and disambiguating object attributes that are only observable from specific angles. To address this limitation, we introduce {E3VS-Bench}, a benchmark for embodied 3D visual search where agents must control their viewpoints in 5-DoF to gather viewpoint-dependent evidence for question answering. E3VS-Bench consists of 99 high-fidelity 3D scenes reconstructed using 3D Gaussian Splatting and 2,014 question-driven episodes. 3D Gaussian Splatting enables photorealistic free-viewpoint rendering that preserves fine-grained visual details (e.g., small text and subtle attributes) often degraded in mesh-based simulators, thereby allowing the construction of questions that cannot be answered from a single view and instead require active inspection across viewpoints in 5-DoF. We evaluate multiple state-of-the-art VLMs and compare their performance with humans. Despite strong 2D reasoning ability, all models exhibit a substantial gap from humans, highlighting limitations in active perception and coherent viewpoint planning specifically under full 5-DoF viewpoint changes.

analysis.tldr: 提出E3VS-Bench基准，评估5自由度视点控制下的主动感知能力，发现VLM与人类差距显著。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉搜索和具身AI基准通常依赖静态观察或受限运动，无法评估真实3D环境中5自由度视点变化带来的细粒度视点依赖现象。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够显式评估5自由度视点控制下主动感知能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含99个3D高斯泼溅场景和2014个问答回合的基准，要求智能体通过5自由度视点控制收集视点依赖证据。
contributions: 提出E3VS-Bench基准，用于评估5自由度视点控制下的主动感知能力。
通过3D高斯泼溅实现高保真自由视点渲染，支持细粒度视觉细节。
评估多个VLM并揭示其与人类在主动感知和视点规划上的显著差距。
analysis.experiments: 评估多个SOTA VLM并与人类对比，所有模型表现均远低于人类。
limitations: 基准规模有限（99场景，2014回合）。
未提供模型失败的具体分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出E3VS-Bench基准，评估5自由度视点控制下的主动感知能力，发现VLM与人类差距显著。

papers.title: From Fallback to Frontline: When Can LLMs be Superior Annotators of Human Perspectives?
papers.abstract: Although large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as annotators at scale, they are typically treated as a pragmatic fallback rather than a faithful estimator of human perspectives. This work challenges that presumption. By framing perspective-taking as the estimation of a latent group-level judgment, we characterize the conditions under which modern LLMs can outperform human annotators, including in-group humans, when predicting aggregate subgroup opinions on subjective tasks, and show that these conditions are common in practice. This advantage arises from structural properties of LLMs as estimators, including low variance and reduced coupling between representation and processing biases, rather than any claim of lived experience. Our analysis identifies clear regimes where LLMs act as statistically superior frontline estimators, as well as principled limits where human judgment remains essential. These findings reposition LLMs from a cost-saving compromise to a principled tool for estimating collective human perspectives.

analysis.tldr: LLM在预测群体主观意见时，由于低方差和偏差解耦，可在特定条件下超越人类标注者。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM常被用作大规模标注的实用后备方案，但很少被视为人类观点的忠实估计器，需要系统评估其作为标注者的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 确定LLM在何种条件下能够优于人类标注者（包括群体内成员）来预测聚合的亚群体意见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM作为估计器具有低方差和表征偏差与处理偏差解耦的结构优势，这使其在常见条件下能超越人类。
analysis.method: 将观点采择建模为潜在群体级判断的估计，分析LLM作为估计器的统计性质，并识别其优势与局限的边界条件。
contributions: 从统计估计角度解释了LLM在主观任务中超越人类标注者的原因
明确了LLM作为前线估计器的适用场景和人类判断不可替代的边界
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 分析基于理论框架，可能缺乏大规模实证验证
未讨论LLM在不同文化或语言背景下的泛化性
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在预测群体主观意见时，由于低方差和偏差解耦，可在特定条件下超越人类标注者。

papers.title: A Sugeno Integral View of Binarized Neural Network Inference
papers.abstract: In this article, we establish a precise connection between binarized neural networks (BNNs) and Sugeno integrals. The advantage of the Sugeno integral is that it provides a framework for representing the importance of inputs and their interactions, while being equivalent to a set of if-then rules. For a hidden BNN neuron at inference time, we show that the activation threshold test can be written as a Sugeno integral on binary inputs. This yields an explicit set-function representation of each neuron decision, and an associated rule-based representation. We also provide a Sugeno-integral expression for the last-layer score. Finally, we discuss how the same framework can be adapted to support richer input interactions and how it can be extended beyond the binary case induced by binarized neural networks.

analysis.tldr: 将二值化神经网络推理与Sugeno积分建立精确联系，提供基于规则的神经元决策表示。
analysis.research_motivation: 二值化神经网络（BNN）在资源受限场景中具有优势，但其内部决策机制缺乏可解释性。Sugeno积分能表示输入重要性和交互，且等价于if-then规则，为理解BNN提供新视角。
analysis.problem: 如何将BNN推理过程形式化为可解释的Sugeno积分表示，并揭示其规则化决策逻辑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 证明BNN隐藏层神经元的激活阈值测试可写为二进制输入上的Sugeno积分，从而得到每个神经元决策的显式集函数表示和关联规则表示；同时给出最后一层分数的Sugeno积分表达式。
contributions: 建立了BNN推理与Sugeno积分之间的精确联系。
提供了BNN神经元决策的显式集函数和规则表示。
讨论了框架对更丰富输入交互的适应性及向非二值情况的扩展。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 当前框架主要针对二值化神经网络，扩展至一般神经网络需进一步研究。
规则表示可能随神经元数量增长而变得复杂。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将二值化神经网络推理与Sugeno积分建立精确联系，提供基于规则的神经元决策表示。

papers.title: TPS-CalcBench: A Benchmark and Diagnostic Evaluation Framework for LLM Analytical Calculation Competence in Hypersonic Thermal Protection System Engineering
papers.abstract: Deploying LLMs as reasoning assistants in safety-critical aerospace engineering requires stricter evaluation criteria than general scientific benchmarks. In hypersonic thermal protection system (TPS) design, inaccurate stagnation-point heat flux or boundary-layer calculations may cause catastrophic design margin violations. Models with numerically reasonable but physically invalid answers are more dangerous than those declining to respond. Current scientific benchmarks only test abstract math and basic physics, evaluate final answers solely, ignore engineering reasoning processes, and cannot detect such critical failures. We propose TPS-CalcBench, the first diagnostic benchmark for closed-form analytical calculations in hypersonic aerodynamics and high-temperature gas dynamics that experienced TPS engineers conduct without simulations. Our contributions include domain-oriented task taxonomy with 4 difficulty levels and 8 categories from Anderson's textbook, dual-track evaluation measuring result accuracy and reasoning quality via an 8-dimension rubric and calibrated judge with human audit to identify right answer wrong reasoning issues, human-AI data pipeline producing 420 high-confidence core items and 810 noise-controlled pre-gating items from 4560 raw data, noise-sensitivity analysis measuring data quality impacts on model ranking, and three diagnostic intervention methods: DFA-TPS fine-tuning, RAG-EQ retrieval grounding and PA-CoT process-aware prompting. Tests on 13 models from 7 groups show wide performance differences (KPI 12.6-87.9), hidden formula selection defects, data-driven rank changes and effective intervention improvements, establishing a complete diagnose-evaluate-intervene framework for safety-critical engineering LLM deployment assessment.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对高超声速热防护系统工程中LLM解析计算能力的诊断基准与评估框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 在安全关键的航空航天工程中部署LLM作为推理助手需要比通用科学基准更严格的评估标准，现有基准仅测试抽象数学和基础物理，只评估最终答案，忽略工程推理过程，无法检测数值合理但物理无效的危险回答。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对高超声速热防护系统（TPS）工程中封闭形式解析计算能力的诊断基准和评估框架，无法有效检测LLM在工程推理中的隐藏缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建了TPS-CalcBench基准，包含领域导向的任务分类（4个难度级别、8个类别）、双轨评估（结果准确性和推理质量，通过8维度评分标准和校准裁判进行人工审计）、人类-AI数据流水线（从4560原始数据生成420个高置信度核心项和810个噪声控制预筛选项）、噪声敏感性分析，以及三种诊断干预方法：DFA-TPS微调、RAG-EQ检索增强和PA-CoT过程感知提示。
contributions: 首个针对高超声速TPS工程解析计算诊断基准TPS-CalcBench
双轨评估框架，可识别正确答案但错误推理的问题
人类-AI数据流水线，生成高质量测试项
三种诊断干预方法（DFA-TPS、RAG-EQ、PA-CoT）
analysis.experiments: 在7个模型组的13个模型上测试，显示性能差异（KPI 12.6-87.9）、隐藏公式选择缺陷、数据驱动排名变化和有效干预改进。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖高超声速TPS工程中的解析计算，未涉及数值模拟或更广泛的航空航天任务
数据规模相对较小（420核心项+810预筛选项），可能限制泛化性
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对高超声速热防护系统工程中LLM解析计算能力的诊断基准与评估框架。

papers.title: MU-GeNeRF: Multi-view Uncertainty-guided Generalizable Neural Radiance Fields for Distractor-aware Scene
papers.abstract: Generalizable Neural Radiance Fields (GeNeRFs) enable high-quality scene reconstruction from sparse views and can generalize to unseen scenes. However, in real-world settings, transient distractors break cross-view structural consistency, corrupting supervision and degrading reconstruction quality. Existing distractor-free NeRF methods rely on per-scene optimization and estimate uncertainty from per-view reconstruction errors, which are not reliable for GeNeRFs and often misjudge inconsistent static structures as distractors. To this end, we propose MU-GeNeRF, a Multi-view Uncertainty-guided distractor-aware GeNeRF framework designed to alleviate GeNeRF's robust modeling challenges in the presence of transient distractions. We decompose distractor awareness into two complementary uncertainty components: Source-view Uncertainty, which captures structural discrepancies across source views caused by viewpoint changes or dynamic factors; and Target-view Uncertainty, which detects observation anomalies in the target image induced by transient distractors.These two uncertainties address distinct error sources and are combined through a heteroscedastic reconstruction loss, which guides the model to adaptively modulate supervision, enabling more robust distractor suppression and geometric modeling.Extensive experiments show that our method not only surpasses existing GeNeRFs but also achieves performance comparable to scene-specific distractor-free NeRFs.

analysis.tldr: 提出多视图不确定性引导的通用神经辐射场，通过源视图和目标视图不确定性分解，抑制瞬态干扰物，实现鲁棒的新视图合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实场景中瞬态干扰物破坏跨视图结构一致性，导致通用NeRF重建质量下降，而现有方法依赖逐场景优化且易误判静态结构为干扰物。
analysis.problem: 通用NeRF在存在瞬态干扰物时鲁棒建模困难，现有不确定性估计方法不可靠。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出瞬态干扰物破坏跨视图一致性，且现有基于逐视图重建误差的不确定性估计会误判不一致的静态结构为干扰物。
analysis.method: 提出MU-GeNeRF，分解为源视图不确定性（捕捉视角变化或动态因素导致的结构差异）和目标视图不确定性（检测瞬态干扰物引起的观测异常），通过异方差重建损失结合两者，自适应调节监督。
contributions: 提出多视图不确定性引导的通用NeRF框架，有效抑制瞬态干扰物。
将干扰物感知分解为互补的源视图和目标视图不确定性，并通过异方差损失联合优化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖多视图输入，极端稀疏视图下不确定性估计可能不稳定。
异方差损失的超参数调节可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多视图不确定性引导的通用神经辐射场，通过源视图和目标视图不确定性分解，抑制瞬态干扰物，实现鲁棒的新视图合成。

papers.title: DifFoundMAD: Foundation Models meet Differential Morphing Attack Detection
papers.abstract: In this work, we introduce DifFoundMAD, a parameter-efficient D-MAD framework that exploits the generalisation capabilities of vision foundation models (FM) to capture discrepancies between suspected morphs and live capture images. In contrast to conventional D-MAD systems that rely on face recognition embeddings or handcrafted feature differences, DifFoundMAD follows the standard differential paradigm while replacing the underlying representation space with embeddings extracted from FMs. By combining lightweight finetuning with class-balanced optimisation, the proposed method updates only a small subset of parameters while preserving the rich representational priors of the underlying FMs. Extensive cross-database evaluations on standard D-MAD benchmarks demonstrate that DifFoundMAD achieves consistent improvements over state-of-the-art systems, particularly at the strict security levels required in operational deployments such as border control: The error rates reported in the current state-of-the-art were reduced from 6.16% to 2.17% for high-security levels using DifFoundMAD.

analysis.tldr: 利用视觉基础模型进行参数高效的差分形变攻击检测，在严格安全级别下显著降低错误率。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统差分形变攻击检测（D-MAD）依赖人脸识别嵌入或手工特征差异，泛化能力有限，难以满足边境控制等场景的严格安全要求。
analysis.problem: 如何利用视觉基础模型的泛化能力，以参数高效的方式实现高精度的差分形变攻击检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DifFoundMAD框架，使用视觉基础模型提取嵌入替换传统表示空间，结合轻量级微调和类别平衡优化，仅更新少量参数。
contributions: 首次将视觉基础模型引入差分形变攻击检测，利用其泛化能力提升检测性能。
提出参数高效的微调方法，在保持基础模型先验的同时实现显著性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在标准D-MAD基准上进行跨数据库评估，在严格安全级别下将错误率从6.16%降至2.17%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定基础模型的选择，未探讨不同基础模型的影响。
仅针对差分场景，未涉及单图像形变检测。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用视觉基础模型进行参数高效的差分形变攻击检测，在严格安全级别下显著降低错误率。

papers.title: Chatting about Upper-Body Expressive Human Pose and Shape Estimation
papers.abstract: Expressive Human Pose and Shape Estimation (EHPS) plays a crucial role in various AR/VR applications and has witnessed significant progress in recent years. However, current state-of-the-art methods still struggle with accurate parameter estimation for facial and hand regions and exhibit limited generalization to wild images. To address these challenges, we present CoEvoer, a novel one-stage synergistic cross-dependency transformer framework tailored for upper-body EHPS. CoEvoer enables explicit feature-level interaction across different body parts, allowing for mutual enhancement through contextual information exchange. Specifically, larger and more easily estimated regions such as the torso provide global semantics and positional priors to guide the estimation of finer, more complex regions like the face and hands. Conversely, the localized details captured in facial and hand regions help refine and calibrate adjacent body parts. To the best of our knowledge, CoEvoer is the first framework designed specifically for upper-body EHPS, with the goal of capturing the strong coupling and semantic dependencies among the face, hands, and torso through joint parameter regression. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CoEvoer achieves state-of-the-art performance on upper-body benchmarks and exhibits strong generalization capability even on unseen wild images.

analysis.tldr: 提出CoEvoer，一种针对上半身人体姿态与形状估计的协同交叉依赖Transformer框架，通过显式特征交互提升面部和手部参数估计精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有EHPS方法在面部和手部参数估计上精度不足，且泛化到野生图像的能力有限，需要更有效的跨部位交互机制。
analysis.problem: 如何通过显式特征交互提升上半身EHPS中面部和手部等精细区域的参数估计精度和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CoEvoer，一种单阶段协同交叉依赖Transformer框架，通过显式特征级交互实现躯干、面部和手部之间的信息交换，利用躯干全局语义指导精细区域估计，同时利用面部和手部局部细节校准相邻部位。
contributions: 首次提出专门针对上半身EHPS的框架CoEvoer。
设计协同交叉依赖Transformer实现不同身体部位间的显式特征交互和相互增强。
analysis.experiments: 在上半身基准上达到SOTA性能，并在未见过的野生图像上展现强泛化能力。
limitations: 仅针对上半身，未覆盖全身EHPS。
可能依赖高质量的上半身标注数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CoEvoer，一种针对上半身人体姿态与形状估计的协同交叉依赖Transformer框架，通过显式特征交互提升面部和手部参数估计精度。

papers.title: CADMAS-CTX: Contextual Capability Calibration for Multi-Agent Delegation
papers.abstract: We revisit multi-agent delegation under a stronger and more realistic assumption: an agent's capability is not fixed at the skill level, but depends on task context. A coding agent may excel at short standalone edits yet fail on long-horizon debugging; a planner may perform well on shallow tasks yet degrade on chained dependencies. Static skill-level capability profiles therefore average over heterogeneous situations and can induce systematic misdelegation. We propose CADMAS-CTX, a framework for contextual capability calibration. For each agent, skill, and coarse context bucket, CADMAS-CTX maintains a Beta posterior that captures stable experience in that part of the task space. Delegation is then made by a risk-aware score that combines the posterior mean with an uncertainty penalty, so that agents delegate only when a peer appears better and that assessment is sufficiently well supported by evidence. This paper makes three contributions. First, a hierarchical contextual capability profile replaces static skill-level confidence with context-conditioned posteriors. Second, based on contextual bandit theory, we formally prove context-aware routing achieves lower cumulative regret than static routing under sufficient context heterogeneity, formalizing the bias-variance tradeoff. Third, we empirically validate our method on GAIA and SWE-bench benchmarks. On GAIA with GPT-4o agents, CADMAS-CTX achieves 0.442 accuracy, outperforming static baseline 0.381 and AutoGen 0.354 with non-overlapping 95% confidence intervals. On SWE-bench Lite, it improves resolve rate from 22.3% to 31.4%. Ablations show the uncertainty penalty improves robustness against context tagging noise. Our results demonstrate contextual calibration and risk-aware delegation significantly improve multi-agent teamwork compared with static global skill assignments.

analysis.tldr: 提出上下文能力校准框架CADMAS-CTX，通过Beta后验和风险感知评分实现多智能体动态委派，在GAIA和SWE-bench上显著优于静态基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多智能体委派假设智能体能力固定，但实际中能力随任务上下文变化，静态技能画像导致系统性误委派。
analysis.problem: 如何根据任务上下文动态校准智能体能力并实现风险感知的委派决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 编码智能体在短编辑任务中表现优异，但在长周期调试中失败；规划智能体在浅层任务上表现良好，但在链式依赖任务中退化。
analysis.method: 为每个智能体、技能和粗粒度上下文桶维护Beta后验分布，结合后验均值与不确定性惩罚计算风险感知分数进行委派。
contributions: 提出层次化上下文能力画像，用上下文条件后验替代静态技能置信度。
基于上下文赌博机理论，形式化证明上下文感知路由在上下文异质性足够时累积遗憾更低。
在GAIA和SWE-bench上验证方法有效性，准确率分别提升至0.442和31.4%。
analysis.experiments: 在GAIA（GPT-4o智能体）上准确率0.442，优于静态基线0.381和AutoGen 0.354；在SWE-bench Lite上解决率从22.3%提升至31.4%。消融实验表明不确定性惩罚提高了对上下文标签噪声的鲁棒性。
limitations: 上下文桶的粗粒度划分可能遗漏细粒度能力差异。
Beta后验假设可能不适用于复杂能力分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出上下文能力校准框架CADMAS-CTX，通过Beta后验和风险感知评分实现多智能体动态委派，在GAIA和SWE-bench上显著优于静态基线。

papers.title: ZSG-IAD: A Multimodal Framework for Zero-Shot Grounded Industrial Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Deep learning-based industrial anomaly detectors often behave as black boxes, making it hard to justify decisions with physically meaningful defect evidence. We propose ZSG-IAD, a multimodal vision-language framework for zero-shot grounded industrial anomaly detection. Given RGB images, sensor images, and 3D point clouds, ZSG-IAD generates structured anomaly reports and pixel-level anomaly masks. ZSG-IAD introduces a language-guided two-hop grounding module: (1) anomaly-related sentences select evidence-like latent slots distilled from multimodal features, yielding coarse spatial support; (2) selected slots modulate feature maps via channel-spatial gating and a lightweight decoder to produce fine-grained masks. To improve reliability, we further apply Executable-Rule GRPO with verifiable rewards to promote structured outputs, anomaly-region consistency, and reasoning-conclusion coherence. Experiments across multiple industrial anomaly benchmarks show strong zero-shot performance and more transparent, physically grounded explanations than prior methods. We will release code and annotations to support future research on trustworthy industrial anomaly detection systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出零样本多模态工业异常检测框架ZSG-IAD，通过语言引导的两跳定位模块和可执行规则GRPO生成结构化报告与像素级掩码。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习工业异常检测器常为黑箱，难以提供物理上有意义的缺陷证据，缺乏可解释性和透明度。
analysis.problem: 实现零样本、可解释的工业异常检测，生成结构化报告和像素级异常掩码。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 多模态视觉-语言框架，包含语言引导的两跳定位模块（先通过异常相关句子从多模态特征中提取证据性潜在槽，再通过通道-空间门控和轻量解码器生成细粒度掩码）和可执行规则GRPO（通过可验证奖励促进结构化输出、异常区域一致性和推理-结论连贯性）。
contributions: 提出首个零样本多模态工业异常检测框架ZSG-IAD，支持RGB、传感器图像和3D点云输入。
设计语言引导的两跳定位模块，实现从粗粒度空间支持到细粒度掩码的逐步定位。
引入可执行规则GRPO，利用可验证奖励提升输出结构性和推理一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个工业异常检测基准上展示了强零样本性能和更透明、物理可解释的检测结果。
limitations: 可能依赖多模态输入质量，传感器或点云数据缺失时性能下降。
零样本设置下对未见异常类型的泛化能力可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出零样本多模态工业异常检测框架ZSG-IAD，通过语言引导的两跳定位模块和可执行规则GRPO生成结构化报告与像素级掩码。

papers.title: RAVEN: Retrieval-Augmented Vulnerability Exploration Network for Memory Corruption Analysis in User Code and Binary Programs
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across various cybersecurity tasks, including vulnerability classification, detection, and patching. However, their potential in automated vulnerability report documentation and analysis remains underexplored. We present RAVEN (Retrieval Augmented Vulnerability Exploration Network), a framework leveraging LLM agents and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) to synthesize comprehensive vulnerability analysis reports. Given vulnerable source code, RAVEN generates reports following the Google Project Zero Root Cause Analysis template. The framework uses four modules: an Explorer agent for vulnerability identification, a RAG engine retrieving relevant knowledge from curated databases including Google Project Zero reports and CWE entries, an Analyst agent for impact and exploitation assessment, and a Reporter agent for structured report generation. To ensure quality, RAVEN includes a task specific LLM Judge evaluating reports across structural integrity, ground truth alignment, code reasoning quality, and remediation quality. We evaluate RAVEN on 105 vulnerable code samples covering 15 CWE types from the NIST-SARD dataset. Results show an average quality score of 54.21%, supporting the effectiveness of our approach for automated vulnerability documentation.

analysis.tldr: RAVEN 利用 LLM 代理和检索增强生成，自动生成内存损坏漏洞分析报告。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 在网络安全任务中表现出色，但自动生成漏洞分析报告的能力尚未充分探索，现有方法缺乏结构化、知识增强的报告生成。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成遵循 Google Project Zero 模板的全面漏洞分析报告。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: RAVEN 框架包含四个模块：Explorer 代理识别漏洞、RAG 引擎检索相关知识、Analyst 代理评估影响和利用、Reporter 代理生成结构化报告，并使用 LLM Judge 评估报告质量。
contributions: 提出 RAVEN 框架，结合 LLM 代理和 RAG 自动生成漏洞分析报告。
在 105 个样本上评估，平均质量得分 54.21%，验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在 NIST-SARD 数据集的 105 个漏洞代码样本上评估，覆盖 15 种 CWE 类型，平均质量得分 54.21%。
limitations: 质量得分仅 54.21%，仍有提升空间。
仅针对内存损坏漏洞，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RAVEN 利用 LLM 代理和检索增强生成，自动生成内存损坏漏洞分析报告。

papers.title: From Heads to Neurons: Causal Attribution and Steering in Multi-Task Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Recent work has increasingly explored neuron-level interpretation in vision-language models (VLMs) to identify neurons critical to final predictions. However, existing neuron analyses generally focus on single tasks, limiting the comparability of neuron importance across tasks. Moreover, ranking strategies tend to score neurons in isolation, overlooking how task-dependent information pathways shape the write-in effects of feed-forward network (FFN) neurons. This oversight can exacerbate neuron polysemanticity in multi-task settings, introducing noise into the identification and intervention of task-critical neurons. In this study, we propose HONES (Head-Oriented Neuron Explanation & Steering), a gradient-free framework for task-aware neuron attribution and steering in multi-task VLMs. HONES ranks FFN neurons by their causal write-in contributions conditioned on task-relevant attention heads, and further modulates salient neurons via lightweight scaling. Experiments on four diverse multimodal tasks and two popular VLMs show that HONES outperforms existing methods in identifying task-critical neurons and improves model performance after steering. Our source code is released at: https://github.com/petergit1/HONES.

analysis.tldr: 提出HONES框架，通过注意力头条件化归因实现多任务VLM中FFN神经元的因果归因与轻量干预。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM神经元分析局限于单任务，缺乏跨任务可比性，且归因策略孤立评分神经元，忽略任务依赖的信息通路，导致多任务场景下神经元多义性噪声干扰关键神经元识别与干预。
analysis.problem: 如何实现多任务VLM中任务感知的神经元归因与轻量干预，以准确识别并调控任务关键神经元。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法在多任务场景下因忽略任务依赖信息通路而加剧神经元多义性，引入噪声。
analysis.method: 提出HONES框架，基于梯度无关方式，通过任务相关注意力头条件化FFN神经元的因果写入贡献进行归因，并利用轻量缩放调控显著神经元。
contributions: 提出HONES，一种梯度无关的多任务VLM神经元归因与干预框架。
通过注意力头条件化归因，缓解多任务场景下神经元多义性问题。
在四个多模态任务和两个流行VLM上验证了HONES在识别任务关键神经元和调控后性能提升方面的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在四个多模态任务和两个流行VLM上进行实验，HONES在识别任务关键神经元和调控后模型性能上优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有注意力机制的VLM架构。
轻量缩放干预的效果可能受限于任务复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HONES框架，通过注意力头条件化归因实现多任务VLM中FFN神经元的因果归因与轻量干预。

papers.title: ContraPrompt: Contrastive Prompt Optimization via Dyadic Reasoning Trace Analysis
papers.abstract: Prompt optimization methods either analyze individual failures in isolation or compare prompt variants across examples, operating on single execution traces with no access to the reasoning process distinguishing success from failure on the same input. We introduce ContraPrompt, built on the observation that when a model fails but succeeds on a retry with feedback, the difference between its two chain-of-thought traces constitutes an optimization signal not captured by prior methods. Unlike prior contrastive methods, we compare complete intermediate reasoning processes: the two traces share model, input, and base prompt, so remaining differences reflect reasoning strategy and appended error feedback -- we call this dyadic reasoning trace analysis. The multi-attempt solving phase is an instrumented agentic retry loop that generates contrastive data automatically without human annotation. Extracted rules are organized into an input-aware decision tree routing instructions by observable input characteristics. On four reasoning and compliance benchmarks, ContraPrompt outperforms GEPA (Agrawal et al., 2026) on all four, with absolute gains of +8.29 pp on HotPotQA (+20.8% rel.), +2.21 pp on GDPR-Bench (+18.2% rel.), +7.14 pp on GPQA Diamond (+10.6% rel.), and +0.74 pp on BBH (+0.85% rel.). Ablations confirm dyadic trace contrastivity is the critical component, with a -16% relative average drop upon its removal. On 53 EvalSet black-box optimization problems, ContraPrompt beats GEPA on 11, ties on 41, and loses on 1 at equal budget. On FiNER-139 financial named entity recognition (Loukas et al., 2022), ContraPrompt achieves +7.77 pp over the unoptimized baseline (+11.6% rel.) and +1.94 pp over GEPA (+2.66% rel.), with branch conditions aligning with standard US GAAP financial-instrument categories.

analysis.tldr: 通过对比同一输入下成功与失败推理轨迹的差异，ContraPrompt 自动生成对比数据并优化提示，在多个推理和合规基准上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有提示优化方法要么孤立分析单个失败案例，要么跨示例比较提示变体，无法利用同一输入下成功与失败推理过程之间的差异信号。
analysis.problem: 如何从模型在同一输入上的成功与失败推理轨迹中提取对比信号，并自动生成优化规则以提升提示质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当模型在初始尝试失败但通过反馈重试成功时，两次思维链轨迹的差异反映了推理策略和错误反馈的影响，这种二元推理轨迹对比提供了未被先前方法捕获的优化信号。
analysis.method: ContraPrompt 通过仪器化的代理重试循环自动生成对比数据，提取规则并组织成输入感知的决策树，根据输入特征路由指令。
contributions: 提出二元推理轨迹分析，利用同一输入下成功与失败轨迹的差异作为优化信号。
实现无需人工标注的自动对比数据生成和规则提取，并在多个基准上取得显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在 HotPotQA、GDPR-Bench、GPQA Diamond、BBH 四个推理和合规基准上，ContraPrompt 全面超越 GEPA，绝对增益分别为 +8.29、+2.21、+7.14、+0.74 个百分点；消融实验证实二元轨迹对比是关键组件，移除后平均相对下降 16%；在 53 个 EvalSet 黑盒优化问题上，以相同预算击败 GEPA 11 次、平局 41 次、输 1 次；在 FiNER-139 金融命名实体识别上，相比未优化基线提升 +7.77 个百分点，相比 GEPA 提升 +1.94 个百分点。
limitations: 依赖模型在重试中成功的能力，若模型无法通过反馈纠正则无法生成对比数据。
决策树路由规则可能无法泛化到与训练分布差异较大的输入。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过对比同一输入下成功与失败推理轨迹的差异，ContraPrompt 自动生成对比数据并优化提示，在多个推理和合规基准上超越现有方法。

papers.title: How Much Cache Does Reasoning Need? Depth-Cache Tradeoffs in KV-Compressed Transformers
papers.abstract: The key-value (KV) cache is the dominant memory bottleneck during Transformer inference, yet little is known theoretically about how aggressively it can be compressed before multi-step reasoning degrades. We study this through $k$-hop pointer chasing on $n$ tokens under a shared KV cache of size $s$, attention dimension $m$, $H$ heads, $p$-bit precision, and a locality-respecting cache controller (satisfied by all standard KV-compression methods). We give three results. (1) Product depth lower bound (conjectured). We conjecture that any such Transformer ($n \geq 4k$, $s \leq \sqrt{n}/4$) requires depth $L = Ω(\lceil k/s \rceil \cdot \lceil \log_2 n/(Hmp) \rceil)$, and isolate the sole remaining gap as a probabilistic step on the joint distribution of cache trace and pointer chain. Unconditionally, we prove a matching upper bound $L = O(\min(k, \lceil k/s \rceil \log s) \cdot \log n/(mp))$ via windowed pointer doubling, and a max-bound $L = Ω(\max(\lceil k/s \rceil, \log n/(Hmp)))$. Closing the conjecture amounts to upgrading max to product. (2) Bandwidth barrier. The product bound binds only when $Hmp \lesssim \log n$. Any lower bound provable via per-window distinguishability counting -- including reachability, bandwidth, and combinations -- cannot exceed $\lceil k/s \rceil$ once $Hmp \geq \log_2 n$. Breaking this requires lifting unconditional communication-complexity bounds for pointer chasing to Cache-Transformer depth. (3) Adaptive vs oblivious error scaling. Under random cache over $T = \lceil \log_2 k \rceil$ doubling stages, oblivious caches give $\Pr[\mathcal{E}] \leq (s/(n-T))^T + 2T^3/n$ (exponential in $T$), while adaptive locality-respecting caches achieve $\Pr[\mathcal{E}] = s/n$ exactly, independent of $T$. The $Ω((n/s)^{T-1})$ separation explains why heavy-hitter eviction empirically dominates random eviction for multi-hop reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 理论分析表明，KV缓存压缩下推理深度与缓存大小存在乘积下界，且自适应缓存策略在错误率上指数级优于随机策略。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer推理中KV缓存是主要内存瓶颈，但缺乏理论指导如何在不损害多步推理能力的前提下进行激进压缩。
analysis.problem: 研究KV缓存压缩对Transformer多步推理（k跳指针追逐）所需深度的影响，并推导理论下界与上界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自适应缓存（如淘汰重击者）的错误率与缓存大小s和序列长度n相关，独立于推理步数T；而随机缓存的错误率随T指数增长，解释了实际中重击者淘汰策略优于随机淘汰。
analysis.method: 通过k跳指针追逐任务，在共享KV缓存大小s、注意力维度m、头数H、精度p和局部性感知缓存控制器下，推导深度下界（猜想）和上界，并分析带宽障碍和自适应与随机缓存的错误率缩放。
contributions: 提出并部分证明深度下界猜想：深度L = Ω(⌈k/s⌉ · ⌈log₂ n/(Hmp)⌉)，并给出匹配上界。
揭示带宽障碍：当Hmp ≥ log₂ n时，基于每窗口可区分性计数的下界无法超过⌈k/s⌉。
证明自适应缓存错误率精确为s/n，而随机缓存错误率指数级更差，解释了实际缓存策略的优劣。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 下界猜想尚未完全证明，存在概率步骤的缺口。
理论分析基于指针追逐任务，可能不直接推广到其他推理任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 理论分析表明，KV缓存压缩下推理深度与缓存大小存在乘积下界，且自适应缓存策略在错误率上指数级优于随机策略。

papers.title: LiteResearcher: A Scalable Agentic RL Training Framework for Deep Research Agent
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful training paradigm for LLM-based agents. However, scaling agentic RL for deep research remains constrained by two coupled challenges: hand-crafted synthetic data fails to elicit genuine real-world search capabilities, and real-world search dependency during RL training introduces instability and prohibitive cost, which limits the scalability of Agentic RL. LiteResearcher is a training framework that makes Agentic RL scalable: by constructing a lite virtual world that mirrors real-world search dynamics, we enable a continuously improving training recipe that empowers a tiny search agent to outperform large-scale open-source and commercial models (e.g., Tongyi DeepResearch and Claude-4.5 Sonnet). Specifically, on common benchmarks such as GAIA and Xbench, our LiteResearcher-4B achieves open-source state-of-the-art results of 71.3% and 78.0% respectively, demonstrating that scalable RL training is a key enabler for Deep Research Agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出LiteResearcher框架，通过轻量虚拟世界实现可扩展的强化学习训练，使4B小模型在深度研究任务上超越大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有强化学习训练深度研究Agent面临两大瓶颈：手工合成数据无法激发真实搜索能力，而依赖真实搜索的RL训练成本高且不稳定，限制了可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计可扩展的强化学习训练框架，使小模型在深度研究任务中通过RL获得超越大模型的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建一个轻量虚拟世界模拟真实搜索动态，在该环境中进行持续改进的强化学习训练。
contributions: 提出LiteResearcher框架，通过轻量虚拟世界实现可扩展的Agentic RL训练。
在GAIA和Xbench上，4B模型达到开源SOTA，超越Tongyi DeepResearch和Claude-4.5 Sonnet等大模型。
analysis.experiments: 在GAIA和Xbench基准上，LiteResearcher-4B分别达到71.3%和78.0%的准确率，实现开源SOTA。
limitations: 虚拟世界与真实搜索环境的差异可能影响泛化。
仅验证了4B规模，更大模型的效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LiteResearcher框架，通过轻量虚拟世界实现可扩展的强化学习训练，使4B小模型在深度研究任务上超越大模型。

papers.title: Heterogeneity in Formal Linguistic Competence of Language Models: Is Data the Real Bottleneck?
authors: H S V N S Kowndinya Renduchintala
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit a puzzling disparity in their formal linguistic competence: while they learn some linguistic phenomena with near-perfect mastery, they often perform below chance on others, even after training on trillions of tokens. In this work, we investigate whether these failures stem from inherent architectural limitations or simply the scarcity of these specific grammatical constructions in web-scale corpora. We pre-train simple GPT-2 Small (124M) models on a 100M-token random sample of the FineWeb corpus and intervene by injecting a minimal amount (1%) of synthetic data targeting specific linguistic phenomena. We find that this targeted intervention substantially improves model performance in 8 out of the 9 worst-performing BLiMP paradigms - notably the accuracy on a specific paradigm, only_npi_scope, surges from 20.9% to 69.4%. Furthermore, we observe that these interventions generally preserve or slightly improve aggregate performance. However, while we also identify a resistant phenomenon, principle_A_c_command, whose performance remains below chance even after our data augmentation, our findings do serve as an optimistic existence proof that even small language models can substantially improve on those linguistic phenomena on which models typically perform poorly, provided the pre-training data contains sufficient exposure to them. This suggests that efforts towards human-scale language modeling may benefit greatly by focusing on data composition. The code to reproduce our results is open-sourced at https://github.com/kowndinya-renduchintala/heterogeneity-in-formal-linguistic-competence.

analysis.tldr: 通过注入少量合成数据，显著提升LLM在特定语法现象上的表现，表明数据稀缺是主要瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在形式语言学能力上存在显著差异，部分语法现象表现极差，但原因不明，可能源于架构限制或数据稀缺，理解这一瓶颈对改进语言模型至关重要。
analysis.problem: 探究LLM在形式语言学能力上的异质性是否主要由预训练数据中特定语法结构的稀缺性导致。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在部分语法现象上表现完美，但在其他现象上甚至低于随机水平；通过注入1%的合成数据，8/9个最差BLiMP范式显著提升，但一个现象（principle_A_c_command）仍低于随机。
analysis.method: 在FineWeb的100M token随机样本上预训练GPT-2 Small模型，并注入1%的合成数据（针对特定语言现象）。
contributions: 证明数据稀缺是LLM形式语言学能力异质性的主要瓶颈，而非架构限制。
通过少量合成数据干预，在8/9个最差BLiMP范式上取得显著提升，且不损害整体性能。
analysis.experiments: 在BLiMP基准上评估9个最差范式，仅_npi_scope准确率从20.9%提升至69.4%；代码已开源。
limitations: 仅使用GPT-2 Small模型，结论可能不适用于更大模型。
存在一个抵抗现象（principle_A_c_command）未通过数据增强改善。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过注入少量合成数据，显著提升LLM在特定语法现象上的表现，表明数据稀缺是主要瓶颈。

papers.title: HEALing Entropy Collapse: Enhancing Exploration in Few-Shot RLVR via Hybrid-Domain Entropy Dynamics Alignment
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Reward (RLVR) has proven effective for training reasoning-oriented large language models, but existing methods largely assume high-resource settings with abundant training data. In low-resource scenarios, RLVR is prone to more severe entropy collapse, which substantially limits exploration and degrades reasoning performance. To address this issue, we propose Hybrid-domain Entropy dynamics ALignment (HEAL), a framework tailored for few-shot RLVR. HEAL first selectively incorporates high-value general-domain data to promote more diverse exploration. Then, we introduce Entropy Dynamics Alignment (EDA), a reward mechanism that aligns trajectory-level entropy dynamics between the target and general domains, capturing both entropy magnitude and fine-grained variation. Through this alignment, EDA not only further mitigates entropy collapse but also encourages the policy to acquire more diverse exploration behaviors from the general domain. Experiments across multiple domains show that HEAL consistently improves few-shot RLVR performance. Notably, using only 32 target-domain samples, HEAL matches or even surpasses full-shot RLVR trained with 1K target-domain samples.

analysis.tldr: 提出HEAL框架，通过混合域熵动态对齐缓解少样本RLVR中的熵塌陷，提升探索与推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RLVR方法依赖大量训练数据，在低资源场景下熵塌陷严重，限制探索并降低推理性能。
analysis.problem: 少样本RLVR中熵塌陷导致探索不足和推理性能下降的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 低资源场景下RLVR更易出现严重的熵塌陷，限制了策略的探索行为。
analysis.method: HEAL框架：先选择性引入高价值通用域数据促进探索，再通过熵动态对齐（EDA）奖励机制对齐目标域与通用域的轨迹级熵动态，缓解熵塌陷并鼓励多样化探索。
contributions: 提出HEAL框架，专门针对少样本RLVR场景。
引入熵动态对齐（EDA）机制，通过轨迹级熵动态对齐缓解熵塌陷并促进探索。
实验表明仅用32个目标域样本即可匹配或超越使用1000个样本的全量RLVR性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个领域进行实验，使用32个目标域样本的HEAL匹配或超越了使用1000个样本的全量RLVR。
limitations: 可能依赖通用域数据的选择质量。
熵动态对齐的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HEAL框架，通过混合域熵动态对齐缓解少样本RLVR中的熵塌陷，提升探索与推理性能。

papers.title: Brain-Inspired Capture: Evidence-Driven Neuromimetic Perceptual Simulation for Visual Decoding
papers.abstract: Visual decoding of neurophysiological signals is a critical challenge for brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) and computational neuroscience. However, current approaches are often constrained by the systematic and stochastic gaps between neural and visual modalities, largely neglecting the intrinsic computational mechanisms of the Human Visual System (HVS). To address this, we propose Brain-Inspired Capture (BI-Cap), a neuromimetic perceptual simulation paradigm that aligns these modalities by emulating HVS processing. Specifically, we construct a neuromimetic pipeline comprising four biologically plausible dynamic and static transformations, coupled with Mutual Information (MI)-guided dynamic blur regulation to simulate adaptive visual processing. Furthermore, to mitigate the inherent non-stationarity of neural activity, we introduce an evidence-driven latent space representation. This formulation explicitly models uncertainty, thereby ensuring robust neural embeddings. Extensive evaluations on zero-shot brain-to-image retrieval across two public benchmarks demonstrate that BI-Cap substantially outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving relative gains of 9.2\% and 8.0\%, respectively. We have released the source code on GitHub through the link https://github.com/flysnow1024/BI-Cap.

analysis.tldr: 提出受脑启发的神经模拟感知仿真范式BI-Cap，通过模拟人类视觉系统处理机制弥合神经与视觉模态差异，在零样本脑到图像检索任务上取得显著提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 脑机接口和计算神经科学中，从神经生理信号解码视觉信息面临系统性和随机性的模态差异，现有方法忽视了人类视觉系统的内在计算机制，导致性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何通过模拟人类视觉系统的处理机制，弥合神经信号与视觉图像之间的模态差异，实现鲁棒的视觉解码。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出神经活动存在固有的非平稳性，且神经与视觉模态之间存在系统性和随机性差距，现有方法未能有效利用HVS的计算原理。
analysis.method: 提出BI-Cap范式，构建包含四种生物合理动态/静态变换的神经模拟流水线，结合互信息引导的动态模糊调节模拟自适应视觉处理，并引入证据驱动的隐空间表示显式建模不确定性。
contributions: 提出神经模拟感知仿真范式BI-Cap，通过模拟HVS处理对齐神经与视觉模态。
引入互信息引导的动态模糊调节和证据驱动的隐空间表示，提升鲁棒性。
在零样本脑到图像检索任务上超越SOTA，相对提升9.2%和8.0%。
analysis.experiments: 在两个公开基准上评估零样本脑到图像检索，BI-Cap显著优于现有方法，相对提升9.2%和8.0%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定神经信号采集设备，泛化性待验证。
仅评估了图像检索任务，其他视觉解码任务未涉及。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出受脑启发的神经模拟感知仿真范式BI-Cap，通过模拟人类视觉系统处理机制弥合神经与视觉模态差异，在零样本脑到图像检索任务上取得显著提升。

papers.title: Prompting Foundation Models for Zero-Shot Ship Instance Segmentation in SAR Imagery
papers.abstract: Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) plays a critical role in maritime surveillance, yet deep learning for SAR analysis is limited by the lack of pixel-level annotations. This paper explores how general-purpose vision foundation models can enable zero-shot ship instance segmentation in SAR imagery, eliminating the need for pixel-level supervision. A YOLOv11-based detector trained on open SAR datasets localizes ships via bounding boxes, which then prompt the Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM2) to produce instance masks without any mask annotations. Unlike prior SAM-based SAR approaches that rely on fine tuning or adapters, our method demonstrates that spatial constraints from a SAR-trained detector alone can effectively regularize foundation model predictions. This design partially mitigates the optical-SAR domain gap and enables downstream applications such as vessel classification, size estimation, and wake analysis. Experiments on the SSDD benchmark achieve a mean IoU of 0.637 (89% of a fully supervised baseline) with an overall ship detection rate of 89.2%, confirming a scalable, annotation-efficient pathway toward foundation-model-driven SAR image understanding.

analysis.tldr: 利用YOLOv11检测器生成边界框，引导SAM2实现SAR图像舰船零样本实例分割，无需像素级标注。
analysis.research_motivation: SAR图像分析受限于像素级标注的缺乏，而通用视觉基础模型在光学图像上表现优异，但直接应用于SAR存在域差距，需要探索无需微调的零样本方法。
