analysis.problem: 如何在无像素级标注条件下，实现SAR图像中舰船的实例分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用YOLOv11在开源SAR数据集上训练检测器，输出舰船边界框，然后以边界框作为提示输入SAM2，生成实例掩码，无需任何掩码标注或微调。
contributions: 提出一种零样本SAR舰船实例分割方法，结合YOLOv11检测器和SAM2，无需像素级标注。
在SSDD基准上达到0.637的平均IoU（全监督基线的89%）和89.2%的检测率，验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在SSDD基准上评估，平均IoU为0.637，舰船检测率为89.2%。
limitations: 依赖YOLOv11检测器的性能，若检测失败则分割无法进行。
仅针对舰船实例，未验证其他SAR目标。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用YOLOv11检测器生成边界框，引导SAM2实现SAR图像舰船零样本实例分割，无需像素级标注。

papers.title: OneDrive: Unified Multi-Paradigm Driving with Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models(VLMs) excel at autoregressive text generation, yet end-to-end autonomous driving requires multi-task learning with structured outputs and heterogeneous decoding behaviors, such as autoregressive language generation, parallel object detection and trajectory regression. To accommodate these differences, existing systems typically introduce separate or cascaded decoders, resulting in architectural fragmentation and limited backbone reuse. In this work, we present a unified autonomous driving framework built upon a pretrained VLM, where heterogeneous decoding behaviors are reconciled within a single transformer decoder. We demonstrate that pretrained VLM attention exhibits strong transferability beyond pure language modeling. By organizing visual and structured query tokens within a single causal decoder, structured queries can naturally condition on visual context through the original attention mechanism. Textual and structured outputs share a common attention backbone, enabling stable joint optimization across heterogeneous tasks. Trajectory planning is realized within the same causal LLM decoder by introducing structured trajectory queries. This unified formulation enables planning to share the pretrained attention backbone with images and perception tokens. Extensive experiments on end-to-end autonomous driving benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, including 0.28 L2 and 0.18 collision rate on nuScenes open-loop evaluation and competitive results (86.8 PDMS) on NAVSIM closed-loop evaluation. The full model preserves multi-modal generation capability, while an efficient inference mode achieves approximately 40% lower latency. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Z1zyw/OneDrive

analysis.tldr: 提出OneDrive框架，在单个Transformer解码器中统一多范式驾驶任务，实现视觉-语言-动作模型的高效联合优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶系统通常为不同任务（如语言生成、目标检测、轨迹回归）设计分离或级联的解码器，导致架构碎片化和骨干网络复用受限，亟需统一的多任务学习框架。
analysis.problem: 如何在一个预训练VLM的单一Transformer解码器中，协调异构解码行为（自回归文本生成、并行目标检测和轨迹回归），实现多任务联合优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预训练VLM的注意力机制在纯语言建模之外表现出强迁移性，结构化查询可通过原始注意力机制自然依赖视觉上下文。
analysis.method: 基于预训练VLM，在单个因果Transformer解码器中组织视觉和结构化查询token，通过引入结构化轨迹查询实现轨迹规划，共享注意力骨干网络进行联合优化。
contributions: 提出统一的多范式驾驶框架OneDrive，在单一解码器中融合语言生成、目标检测和轨迹规划。
验证了预训练VLM注意力机制在驾驶任务中的迁移能力，实现异构任务的稳定联合优化。
在nuScenes和NAVSIM基准上达到SOTA性能，并支持高效推理模式（延迟降低约40%）。
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes开放环评估中达到0.28 L2误差和0.18碰撞率，在NAVSIM闭环评估中达到86.8 PDMS，高效推理模式延迟降低约40%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定VLM预训练权重，泛化性需进一步验证。
闭环评估仅在一个基准上报告，泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OneDrive框架，在单个Transformer解码器中统一多范式驾驶任务，实现视觉-语言-动作模型的高效联合优化。

papers.title: Beyond Binary Contrast: Modeling Continuous Skeleton Action Spaces with Transitional Anchors
papers.abstract: Self-supervised contrastive learning has emerged as a powerful paradigm for skeleton-based action recognition by enforcing consistency in the embedding space. However, existing methods rely on binary contrastive objectives that overlook the intrinsic continuity of human motion, resulting in fragmented feature clusters and rigid class boundaries. To address these limitations, we propose TranCLR, a Transitional anchor-based Contrastive Learning framework that captures the continuous geometry of the action space. Specifically, the proposed Action Transitional Anchor Construction (ATAC) explicitly models the geometric structure of transitional states to enhance the model's perception of motion continuity. Building upon these anchors, a Multi-Level Geometric Manifold Calibration (MGMC) mechanism is introduced to adaptively calibrate the action manifold across multiple levels of continuity, yielding a smoother and more discriminative representation space. Extensive experiments on the NTU RGB+D, NTU RGB+D 120 and PKU-MMD datasets demonstrate that TranCLR achieves superior accuracy and calibration performance, effectively learning continuous and uncertainty-aware skeleton representations. The code is available at https://github.com/Philchieh/TranCLR.

analysis.tldr: 提出TranCLR框架，通过过渡锚点建模连续动作空间，提升骨架动作识别的表征连续性与判别性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自监督对比学习方法依赖二元对比目标，忽略了人体运动的固有连续性，导致特征簇碎片化且类别边界僵硬。
analysis.problem: 如何建模骨架动作空间的连续几何结构，以学习更平滑且具有不确定性感知的表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 二元对比目标导致特征空间碎片化，无法反映动作间的过渡状态。
analysis.method: 提出TranCLR框架，包含动作过渡锚点构建（ATAC）显式建模过渡状态的几何结构，以及多级几何流形校准（MGMC）机制自适应校准动作流形。
contributions: 提出过渡锚点构建方法，显式建模动作空间的连续几何结构。
设计多级几何流形校准机制，实现更平滑且判别性的表征空间。
在多个基准数据集上取得优越的准确率和校准性能。
analysis.experiments: 在NTU RGB+D、NTU RGB+D 120和PKU-MMD数据集上进行实验，结果表明TranCLR在准确率和校准性能上优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能对噪声或异常动作敏感。
计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TranCLR框架，通过过渡锚点建模连续动作空间，提升骨架动作识别的表征连续性与判别性。

papers.title: Learning to Correct: Calibrated Reinforcement Learning for Multi-Attempt Chain-of-Thought
papers.abstract: State-of-the-art reasoning models utilize long chain-of-thought (CoT) to solve increasingly complex problems using more test-time computation. In this work, we explore a long CoT setting where the model makes up to K successive attempts at solving a problem, in which each attempt is allowed to build on earlier ones after the model receives a hard verifier feedback. This motivates RL methods that can harness per-attempt rewards by carefully weighting individual attempts. We study optimizing the Verification@K reward (the model succeeds by the K-th attempt) and show that naively weighing the attempts by their pass/fail results in biased gradients. We introduce Calibrated Attempt-Level (CAL) GRPO by devising a weighing strategy to obtain unbiased gradients while maintaining small variance. Our theory reveals how incorporating per-attempt rewards influence the training and the eventual Verification@K performance. Experiments, baselines, and ablations on synthetic and real data corroborate our theory and the benefits of CAL-GRPO over vanilla GRPO as well as naive weighting.

analysis.tldr: 提出CAL-GRPO算法，通过校准的逐尝试奖励加权策略，在多尝试思维链推理中实现无偏梯度优化，提升最终成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有推理模型通过长思维链和多尝试机制提升复杂问题解决能力，但如何有效利用每次尝试的奖励信号进行强化学习优化仍存在挑战，特别是简单加权会导致梯度有偏。
analysis.problem: 在多尝试思维链推理中，如何设计奖励加权策略以在强化学习中实现无偏梯度估计并保持低方差，从而优化最终尝试成功率（Verification@K）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，对每次尝试的通过/失败结果进行简单加权会导致梯度有偏，影响训练效果和最终性能。
analysis.method: 提出Calibrated Attempt-Level GRPO (CAL-GRPO)，通过精心设计的加权策略获得无偏梯度，同时保持小方差。
contributions: 理论揭示了逐尝试奖励如何影响训练和Verification@K性能。
提出CAL-GRPO算法，实现无偏梯度估计，并在合成和真实数据上验证其优于普通GRPO和简单加权方法。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据上进行了实验、基线和消融研究，结果支持理论并显示CAL-GRPO的优势。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有硬验证器反馈的多尝试场景。
未讨论扩展到连续尝试次数或更复杂反馈形式的情况。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CAL-GRPO算法，通过校准的逐尝试奖励加权策略，在多尝试思维链推理中实现无偏梯度优化，提升最终成功率。

papers.title: Physics-Informed Causal MDPs for Sequential Constraint Repair in Engineering Simulation Pipelines
papers.abstract: Off-policy learning in constrained MDPs with large binary state spaces faces a fundamental tension: causal identification of transition dynamics requires structural assumptions, while sample-efficient policy learning requires state-space compression. We introduce PI-CMDP, a framework for CMDPs whose constraint dependencies form a layered DAG under a Lifecycle Ordering Assumption (LOA). We propose an Identify-Compress-Estimate pipeline: (i) Identify: LOA enables backdoor identification of causal edge weights for cross-layer pairs, with formal partial-identification bounds when LOA is violated; (ii) Compress: a Markov abstraction compresses state cardinality from 2^(WL) to (W+1)^L under layer-priority regularity and exchangeability; and (iii) Estimate: a physics-guided doubly-robust estimator remains unbiased and reduces the variance constant when the physics prior outperforms a learned model. We instantiate PI-CMDP on constraint repair in engineering simulation pipelines. On the TPS benchmark (4,206 episodes), PI-CMDP achieves 76.2% repair success rate with only 300 training episodes versus 70.8% for the strongest baseline (+5.4 pp), narrowing to +2.8 pp (83.4% vs. 80.6%) in the full-data regime, while substantially reducing cascade failure rates. All improvements are consistent across 5 independent seeds (paired t-test p < 0.02).

analysis.tldr: 提出PI-CMDP框架，利用物理信息因果结构高效修复工程仿真管线中的约束违规。
analysis.research_motivation: 离线策略学习在大状态空间约束MDP中面临因果识别与样本效率的根本矛盾，现有方法难以兼顾。
analysis.problem: 在具有大二进制状态空间的约束MDP中，如何实现因果可识别且样本高效的策略学习以修复工程仿真管线中的约束违规。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PI-CMDP框架，包含三个步骤：识别（基于生命周期排序假设进行后门调整因果识别）、压缩（利用层优先级正则性和可交换性进行马尔可夫抽象）、估计（物理引导的双重稳健估计器）。
contributions: 提出PI-CMDP框架，结合因果识别、状态压缩和物理引导估计解决约束MDP问题。
在TPS基准上验证有效性，仅用300训练轮次即达到76.2%修复成功率，优于最强基线。
analysis.experiments: 在TPS基准（4206个回合）上评估，PI-CMDP在300训练轮次下修复成功率为76.2%，最强基线为70.8%（+5.4个百分点）；全数据下为83.4% vs 80.6%（+2.8个百分点），级联故障率显著降低，5个独立种子结果一致（配对t检验p<0.02）。
limitations: 生命周期排序假设可能不适用于所有工程管线。
方法依赖物理先验质量，若先验较差可能影响估计器性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PI-CMDP框架，利用物理信息因果结构高效修复工程仿真管线中的约束违规。

papers.title: Unlocking the Edge deployment and ondevice acceleration of multi-LoRA enabled one-for-all foundational LLM
papers.abstract: Deploying large language models (LLMs) on smartphones poses significant engineering challenges due to stringent constraints on memory, latency, and runtime flexibility. In this work, we present a hardware-aware framework for efficient on-device inference of a LLaMA-based multilingual foundation model supporting multiple use cases on Samsung Galaxy S24 and S25 devices with SM8650 and SM8750 Qualcomm chipsets respectively. Our approach integrates application-specific LoRAs as runtime inputs to a single frozen inference graph, enabling dynamic task switching without recompilation or memory overhead. We further introduce a multi-stream decoding mechanism that concurrently generates stylistic variations - such as formal, polite, or jovial responses - within a single forward pass, reducing latency by up to 6x. To accelerate token generation, we apply Dynamic Self-Speculative Decoding (DS2D), a tree-based strategy that predicts future tokens without requiring a draft model, yielding up to 2.3x speedup in decode time. Combined with quantization to INT4 and architecture-level optimizations, our system achieves 4-6x overall improvements in memory and latency while maintaining accuracy across 9 languages and 8 tasks. These results demonstrate practical feasibility of deploying multi-use-case LLMs on edge devices, advancing the commercial viability of Generative AI in mobile platforms.

analysis.tldr: 提出硬件感知框架，在三星旗舰手机上实现多LoRA大模型的高效边缘部署，通过多流解码和动态自推测解码实现4-6倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 在智能手机等边缘设备上部署大语言模型面临内存、延迟和运行时灵活性的严格约束，现有方法难以同时支持多任务且保持高效。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲准确性的前提下，在资源受限的移动设备上实现支持多任务（多LoRA）的大语言模型高效推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出硬件感知框架，包括：1) 将应用特定LoRA作为运行时输入集成到单个冻结推理图，实现动态任务切换；2) 多流解码机制，单次前向传播生成多种风格变体；3) 动态自推测解码（DS2D），基于树策略预测未来token，无需草稿模型；4) INT4量化与架构级优化。
contributions: 提出首个在三星Galaxy S24/S25上部署多LoRA多语言基础LLM的硬件感知框架。
引入多流解码和动态自推测解码，分别实现6倍和2.3倍加速。
在9种语言和8个任务上保持准确率的同时，实现4-6倍内存和延迟改进。
analysis.experiments: 在三星Galaxy S24（SM8650）和S25（SM8750）设备上评估，覆盖9种语言和8个任务，报告了延迟、内存和准确率指标。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定芯片组（SM8650/SM8750）和LLaMA模型优化，泛化性未知。
摘要未提及多流解码对生成质量的影响评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出硬件感知框架，在三星旗舰手机上实现多LoRA大模型的高效边缘部署，通过多流解码和动态自推测解码实现4-6倍加速。

papers.title: Bayesian Active Learning with Gaussian Processes Guided by LLM Relevance Scoring for Dense Passage Retrieval
papers.abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit exceptional zero-shot relevance modeling, their high computational cost necessitates framing passage retrieval as a budget-constrained global optimization problem. Existing approaches passively rely on first-stage dense retrievers, which leads to two limitations: (1) failing to retrieve relevant passages in semantically distinct clusters, and (2) failing to propagate relevance signals to the broader corpus. To address these limitations, we propose Bayesian Active Learning with Gaussian Processes guided by LLM relevance scoring (BAGEL), a novel framework that propagates sparse LLM relevance signals across the embedding space to guide global exploration. BAGEL models the multimodal relevance distribution across the entire embedding space with a query-specific Gaussian Process (GP) based on LLM relevance scores. Subsequently, it iteratively selects passages for scoring by strategically balancing the exploitation of high-confidence regions with the exploration of uncertain areas. Extensive experiments across four benchmark datasets and two LLM backbones demonstrate that BAGEL effectively explores and captures complex relevance distributions and outperforms LLM reranking methods under the same LLM budget on all four datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出BAGEL框架，用高斯过程传播LLM稀疏相关性信号，实现预算约束下的稠密段落检索主动学习。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM零样本相关性建模能力强但计算成本高，现有方法依赖第一阶段稠密检索器，存在两个局限：无法检索语义不同簇中的相关段落，以及无法将相关性信号传播到更广泛的语料库。
analysis.problem: 在预算约束下，如何高效利用LLM的稀疏相关性评分来指导全局段落检索，克服现有被动依赖稠密检索器的缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法被动依赖第一阶段稠密检索器，导致无法检索语义不同簇中的相关段落，且无法将相关性信号传播到更广泛的语料库。
analysis.method: 提出BAGEL框架，使用查询特定的高斯过程对整个嵌入空间的多模态相关性分布进行建模，基于LLM相关性分数；然后迭代选择段落进行评分，平衡高置信度区域的利用和不确定区域的探索。
contributions: 提出BAGEL框架，将稀疏LLM相关性信号通过高斯过程传播到整个嵌入空间，实现全局探索。
在四个基准数据集和两个LLM骨干上验证，BAGEL在相同LLM预算下优于LLM重排序方法。
analysis.experiments: 在四个基准数据集和两个LLM骨干上进行实验，BAGEL在所有数据集上优于LLM重排序方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高斯过程假设，对高维嵌入空间的可扩展性有限。
未讨论不同LLM骨干对性能的影响差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BAGEL框架，用高斯过程传播LLM稀疏相关性信号，实现预算约束下的稠密段落检索主动学习。

papers.title: MEDN: Motion-Emotion Feature Decoupling Network for Micro-Expression Recognition
papers.abstract: Unlike macro-expression, micro-expression does not follow a strictly consistent mapping rule between emotions and Action Units (AUs). As a result, some micro-expressions share identical AUs yet represent completely opposite emotional categories, making them highly visually similar. Existing microexpression recognition (MER) methods mostly rely on explicit facial motion cues (e.g., optical flow, frame differences, AU features) while ignoring implicit emotion information. To tackle this issue, this paper presents a Motion Emotion Feature Decoupling Network (MEDN) for MER. We design a dual-branch framework to separately extract motion and emotion features. In the motion branch, an AU-detection task restricts features to the explicit motion domain, and orthogonal loss is adopted to reduce motion emotion feature coupling. For implicit emotion modeling, we propose a Sparse Emotion Vision Transformer (SEVit) that sparsifies spatial tokens to highlight local temporal variations with multi-scale sparsity rates. A Collaborative Fusion Module (CoFM) is further developed to fuse disentangled motion and emotion features adaptively. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets validate that MEDN effectively decouples motion and emotion features and achieves superior recognition performance, offering a new perspective for enhancing recognition accuracy and generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出运动-情感特征解耦网络(MEDN)，通过双分支框架和稀疏情感视觉Transformer解耦微表情中的运动与情感特征，提升识别性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 微表情识别中，不同情感可能共享相同动作单元(AU)导致视觉相似，现有方法依赖显式运动线索而忽略隐式情感信息，限制了识别精度。
analysis.problem: 微表情识别中运动与情感特征高度耦合，难以区分视觉相似但情感相反的微表情。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 微表情不遵循严格的情感-AU映射规则，相同AU可能对应相反情感类别，造成视觉混淆。
analysis.method: 提出MEDN，包含双分支框架：运动分支通过AU检测任务和正交损失解耦运动特征；情感分支使用稀疏情感视觉Transformer(SEVit)提取隐式情感特征；协作融合模块(CoFM)自适应融合解耦后的特征。
contributions: 提出运动-情感特征解耦网络(MEDN)，首次显式解耦微表情中的运动与情感特征。
设计稀疏情感视觉Transformer(SEVit)，通过多尺度稀疏率突出局部时间变化。
在三个基准数据集上验证了方法的有效性和优越性能。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准数据集上进行广泛实验，验证了MEDN有效解耦运动与情感特征并取得优越识别性能。
limitations: 可能依赖AU检测任务的准确性。
稀疏情感Transformer的稀疏率选择可能需手动调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出运动-情感特征解耦网络(MEDN)，通过双分支框架和稀疏情感视觉Transformer解耦微表情中的运动与情感特征，提升识别性能。

papers.title: ReTrack: Evidence-Driven Dual-Stream Directional Anchor Calibration Network for Composed Video Retrieval
papers.abstract: With the rapid growth of video data, Composed Video Retrieval (CVR) has emerged as a novel paradigm in video retrieval and is receiving increasing attention from researchers. Unlike unimodal video retrieval methods, the CVR task takes a multi-modal query consisting of a reference video and a piece of modification text as input. The modification text conveys the user's intended alterations to the reference video. Based on this input, the model aims to retrieve the most relevant target video. In the CVR task, there exists a substantial discrepancy in information density between video and text modalities. Traditional composition methods tend to bias the composed feature toward the reference video, which leads to suboptimal retrieval performance. This limitation is significant due to the presence of three core challenges: (1) modal contribution entanglement, (2) explicit optimization of composed features, and (3) retrieval uncertainty. To address these challenges, we propose the evidence-dRivRn dual-sTream diRectionAl anChor calibration networK (ReTrack). ReTrack is the first CVR framework that improves multi-modal query understanding by calibrating directional bias in composed features. It consists of three key modules: Semantic Contribution Disentanglement, Composition Geometry Calibration, and Reliable Evidence-driven Alignment. Specifically, ReTrack estimates the semantic contribution of each modality to calibrate the directional bias of the composed feature. It then uses the calibrated directional anchors to compute bidirectional evidence that drives reliable composed-to-target similarity estimation. Moreover, ReTrack exhibits strong generalization to the Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) task, achieving SOTA performance across three benchmark datasets in both CVR and CIR scenarios. Codes are available at https://github.com/Lee-zixu/ReTrack

analysis.tldr: ReTrack 提出双流方向锚定校准网络，通过解耦模态贡献和校准组合特征方向偏差，提升组合视频检索性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 组合视频检索（CVR）中视频与文本模态信息密度差异大，传统方法偏向参考视频导致检索次优，亟需解决模态贡献纠缠、组合特征显式优化和检索不确定性三大挑战。
analysis.problem: CVR 任务中组合特征存在方向偏差，导致检索性能受限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出视频与文本模态信息密度差异大，传统组合方法使组合特征偏向参考视频，造成检索次优。
analysis.method: 提出 ReTrack，包含语义贡献解耦、组合几何校准和可靠证据驱动对齐三个模块，通过估计模态语义贡献校准组合特征方向偏差，并利用双向证据进行相似度估计。
contributions: 首个通过校准组合特征方向偏差来改进多模态查询理解的 CVR 框架
提出语义贡献解耦、组合几何校准和可靠证据驱动对齐三个模块
在 CVR 和 CIR 三个基准数据集上达到 SOTA 性能
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到在 CVR 和 CIR 三个基准数据集上达到 SOTA 性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集和任务设置
计算复杂度可能较高
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ReTrack 提出双流方向锚定校准网络，通过解耦模态贡献和校准组合特征方向偏差，提升组合视频检索性能。

papers.title: LoReC: Rethinking Large Language Models for Graph Data Analysis
papers.abstract: The advent of Large Language Models (LLMs) has fundamentally reshaped the way we interact with graphs, giving rise to a new paradigm called GraphLLM. As revealed in recent studies, graph learning can benefit from LLMs. However, we observe limited benefits when we directly utilize LLMs to make predictions for graph-related tasks within GraphLLM paradigm, which even yields suboptimal results compared to conventional GNN-based approaches. Through in-depth analysis, we find this failure can be attributed to LLMs' limited capability for processing graph data and their tendency to overlook graph information. To address this issue, we propose LoReC (Look, Remember, and Contrast), a novel plug-and-play method for GraphLLM paradigm, which enhances LLM's understanding of graph data through three stages: (1) Look: redistributing attention to graph; (2) Remember: re-injecting graph information into the Feed-Forward Network (FFN); (3) Contrast: rectifying the vanilla logits produced in the decoding process. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LoReC brings notable improvements over current GraphLLM methods and outperforms GNN-based approaches across diverse datasets. The implementation is available at https://github.com/Git-King-Zhan/LoReC.

analysis.tldr: LoReC通过重新分配注意力、重注入图信息和对比校正logits，显著提升LLM在图数据上的理解与预测能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有GraphLLM方法中，直接使用LLM进行图相关任务预测效果有限，甚至不如传统GNN方法，亟需提升LLM对图数据的处理能力。
analysis.problem: LLM在处理图数据时能力有限且容易忽略图结构信息，导致在图任务上性能不佳。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出直接利用LLM进行图任务预测会得到次优结果，原因是LLM处理图数据能力有限且倾向于忽略图信息。
analysis.method: 提出LoReC方法，包含三个阶段：Look（重新分配注意力到图）、Remember（将图信息重新注入前馈网络）、Contrast（对比校正解码logits）。
contributions: 揭示了LLM在图任务上性能不佳的原因：处理图数据能力有限且忽略图信息。
提出LoReC，一种即插即用的方法，通过三个阶段显著提升GraphLLM性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上，LoReC相比现有GraphLLM方法有显著提升，并超越基于GNN的方法。
limitations: 可能对大规模图数据计算开销较大。
方法依赖预训练LLM，可能受限于LLM本身的能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LoReC通过重新分配注意力、重注入图信息和对比校正logits，显著提升LLM在图数据上的理解与预测能力。

papers.title: Can Explicit Physical Feasibility Benefit VLA Learning? An Empirical Study
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models map multimodal inputs directly to robot actions and are typically trained through large-scale imitation learning. While this paradigm has shown strong performance, prevailing VLA training procedures do not explicitly supervise hard physical constraints such as obstacle avoidance or kinematic feasibility. As a result, the geometric structure underlying physically feasible behavior must be inferred only implicitly from demonstrations. In this paper, we study whether introducing explicit feasibility supervision can provide effective structured guidance for VLA policies. We formulate a simple geometry-grounded feasibility objective and integrate it into the training stage of a diffusion-based VLA policy. To evaluate this idea systematically, we use obstacle-aware manipulation as a controlled probe of geometry-dependent physical feasibility. Empirical results show that augmenting VLA training with feasibility supervision improves both physical reliability and overall task performance, while also enhancing learning efficiency in the low-data regime. These findings indicate that explicit feasibility signals can effectively complement imitation-based VLA learning, highlighting their potential for developing more reliable VLA policies.

analysis.tldr: 在VLA训练中引入显式物理可行性监督可提升机器人操作的物理可靠性和任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型通过大规模模仿学习训练，但未显式监督物理约束（如避障、运动学可行性），导致模型需从演示中隐式推断几何结构，可能产生不可行动作。
analysis.problem: 如何将显式物理可行性监督有效融入VLA训练，以提升策略的物理可靠性和学习效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个基于几何的可行性目标，并将其集成到扩散VLA策略的训练阶段。
contributions: 首次系统研究显式物理可行性监督对VLA学习的影响。
提出简单有效的几何可行性目标，并验证其在障碍感知操作任务中的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在障碍感知操作任务上进行实验，结果显示可行性监督提升了物理可靠性、任务性能及低数据场景下的学习效率。
limitations: 仅验证了障碍感知操作场景，其他物理约束（如动力学）未涉及。
方法可能依赖任务特定的几何先验，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在VLA训练中引入显式物理可行性监督可提升机器人操作的物理可靠性和任务性能。

papers.title: LEPO: Latent Reasoning Policy Optimization for Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Recently, latent reasoning has been introduced into large language models (LLMs) to leverage rich information within a continuous space. However, without stochastic sampling, these methods inevitably collapse to deterministic inference, failing to discover diverse reasoning paths. To bridge the gap, we inject controllable stochasticity into latent reasoning via Gumbel-Softmax, restoring LLMs' exploratory capacity and enhancing their compatibility with Reinforcement Learning (RL). Building on this, we propose \textbf{\underline{L}}atent R\textbf{\underline{e}}asoning \textbf{\underline{P}}olicy \textbf{\underline{O}}ptimization~(\textbf{LEPO}), a novel framework that applies RL directly to continuous latent representations. Specifically, in rollout stage, LEPO maintains stochasticity to enable diverse trajectory sampling, while in optimization stage, LEPO constructs a unified gradient estimation for both latent representations and discrete tokens. Extensive experiments show that LEPO significantly outperforms existing RL methods for discrete and latent reasoning.

analysis.tldr: LEPO通过Gumbel-Softmax注入可控随机性，将强化学习直接应用于连续潜在空间，提升LLM推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有潜在推理方法缺乏随机采样，导致确定性推理，无法探索多样化推理路径，且与强化学习兼容性差。
analysis.problem: 如何将强化学习有效应用于LLM的连续潜在推理空间，同时保持探索能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，无随机采样的潜在推理会退化为确定性推理，限制推理路径的多样性。
analysis.method: LEPO框架：在rollout阶段通过Gumbel-Softmax保持随机性以采样多样化轨迹；在优化阶段构建统一梯度估计，同时优化潜在表示和离散token。
contributions: 提出LEPO框架，将强化学习直接应用于连续潜在推理空间。
通过Gumbel-Softmax注入可控随机性，恢复LLM的探索能力。
实验表明LEPO显著优于现有离散和潜在推理的RL方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖Gumbel-Softmax的温度参数调节。
潜在空间的可解释性可能不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LEPO通过Gumbel-Softmax注入可控随机性，将强化学习直接应用于连续潜在空间，提升LLM推理性能。

papers.title: AeroRAG: Structured Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented LLM for Fine-Grained Aerial Visual Reasoning
papers.abstract: Despite recent progress in multimodal large language models (MLLMs), reliable visual question answering in aerial scenes remains challenging. In such scenes, task-critical evidence is often carried by small objects, explicit quantities, coarse locations, and inter-object relations, whereas conventional dense visual-token representations are not well aligned with these structured semantics. To address this interface mismatch, we propose AeroRAG, a scene-graph-guided multimodal retrieval-augmented generation framework for visual question answering. The framework first converts an input image into structured visual knowledge, including object categories, quantities, spatial locations, and semantic relations, and then retrieves query-relevant semantic chunks to construct compact prompts for a text-based large language model. Rather than relying on direct reasoning over dense visual tokens, our method introduces a more explicit intermediate interface between perception and language reasoning. Experiments on the AUG aerial dataset and the general-domain VG-150 benchmark show consistent improvements over six strong MLLM baselines, with the largest gains observed in dense aerial scenes and relation-sensitive reasoning. We further evaluate the framework on VQAv2 to verify that the proposed interface remains compatible with standard visual reasoning settings. These results suggest that structured retrieval is a practical design direction for deployment-oriented and grounded visual reasoning systems.

analysis.tldr: AeroRAG通过场景图引导的结构化多模态检索增强，解决了航拍场景中细粒度视觉问答的语义对齐问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM在航拍场景中难以可靠回答视觉问题，因为关键证据常由小物体、数量、位置和关系等结构化语义承载，而密集视觉token表示与这些语义不匹配。
analysis.problem: 航拍场景中视觉问答的接口不匹配问题：密集视觉token表示与结构化语义（物体类别、数量、空间位置、关系）不对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到在密集航拍场景和关系敏感推理中，现有MLLM表现不佳，而结构化检索能带来最大增益。
analysis.method: 提出AeroRAG框架，先通过场景图将图像转换为结构化视觉知识（类别、数量、位置、关系），然后检索查询相关的语义块构建紧凑提示，供文本LLM推理。
contributions: 提出场景图引导的多模态检索增强生成框架，解决航拍视觉问答的接口不匹配问题。
在航拍和通用数据集上验证了结构化检索的有效性，尤其在密集场景和关系推理上显著优于强MLLM基线。
analysis.experiments: 在AUG航拍数据集、VG-150通用基准和VQAv2上评估，与六个强MLLM基线对比，取得一致改进。
limitations: 依赖场景图提取质量，可能受限于物体检测和关系抽取的精度。
仅验证了静态图像，未涉及视频或动态场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AeroRAG通过场景图引导的结构化多模态检索增强，解决了航拍场景中细粒度视觉问答的语义对齐问题。

papers.title: Latent Preference Modeling for Cross-Session Personalized Tool Calling
papers.abstract: Users often omit essential details in their requests to LLM-based agents, resulting in under-specified inputs for tool use. This poses a fundamental challenge for tool-augmented agents, as API execution typically requires complete arguments, highlighting the need for personalized tool calling. To study this problem, we introduce MPT, a benchmark comprising 265 multi-session dialogues that cover three challenges: Preference Recall, Preference Induction, and Preference Transfer. We also propose PRefine, a test-time memory-augmented method that represents user preferences as evolving hypotheses. Through a generate--verify--refine loop, it extracts reusable constraints from history and improves tool-calling accuracy while using only 1.24% of the tokens required by full-history prompting. These results indicate that robust personalization in agentic systems depends on memory that captures the reasons behind user choices, not just the choices themselves.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨会话个性化工具调用的基准MPT和记忆增强方法PRefine，通过假设演化高效捕捉用户偏好。
analysis.research_motivation: 用户向LLM代理请求时常遗漏关键细节，导致工具调用参数不完整，现有方法缺乏个性化能力。
analysis.problem: 解决跨会话场景下基于用户历史偏好的个性化工具调用问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PRefine方法，在测试时通过生成-验证-精炼循环将用户偏好表示为演化假设，从历史中提取可复用约束。
contributions: 构建MPT基准，包含265个多会话对话，覆盖偏好回忆、偏好归纳和偏好迁移三种挑战。
提出PRefine方法，仅用全历史提示1.24%的token即可提升工具调用准确性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的历史数据。
演化假设的表示能力可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出跨会话个性化工具调用的基准MPT和记忆增强方法PRefine，通过假设演化高效捕捉用户偏好。

papers.title: SPREG: Structured Plan Repair with Entropy-Guided Test-Time Intervention for Large Language Model Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are prone to logical hallucinations and stochastic drifts during long-chain reasoning. While Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) can improve instruction adherence, standard static implementations often cause semantic dilution and linguistic degradation. We propose SPREG (Structured Plan-guided Real-time Entropy Gating), a lightweight inference-time framework for surgical error rectification. SPREG employs an adaptive dual-threshold mechanism to monitor real-time entropy, identifying sudden ``entropy spikes'' as reliable indicators of logical failure. Upon detection, it triggers a dynamic repair by replacing uninformative null-priors with reference distributions synthesized from historical high-confidence states. By modulating guidance intensity according to structured reasoning stages (e.g., Action, Observation), SPREG steers the model back to a stable manifold without compromising fluency. Our experiments demonstrate significant gains, notably a 20.0% absolute accuracy improvement on AIME25, while effectively suppressing uncontrolled entropy drift in complex tasks.

analysis.tldr: SPREG通过熵引导的测试时干预修复LLM长链推理中的逻辑错误，在AIME25上提升20%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在长链推理中易出现逻辑幻觉和随机漂移，现有CFG方法存在语义稀释和语言退化问题，亟需轻量级推理时纠错框架。
analysis.problem: 如何在不影响流畅性的前提下，实时检测并修复LLM长链推理中的逻辑失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到推理过程中出现突然的“熵尖峰”可作为逻辑失败的可靠指标。
analysis.method: 提出SPREG框架，采用自适应双阈值机制监控实时熵，检测到熵尖峰时触发动态修复，用历史高置信状态合成的参考分布替换无信息空先验，并根据推理阶段调节引导强度。
contributions: 提出熵引导的测试时干预框架SPREG，用于LLM推理中的结构化计划修复。
在AIME25上实现20.0%的绝对准确率提升，有效抑制复杂任务中的熵漂移。
analysis.experiments: 在AIME25上验证，取得20.0%绝对准确率提升。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量历史状态，在全新任务上效果未知。
双阈值机制需要调参，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SPREG通过熵引导的测试时干预修复LLM长链推理中的逻辑错误，在AIME25上提升20%准确率。

papers.title: ST-$π$: Structured SpatioTemporal VLA for Robotic Manipulation
papers.abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have achieved great success on general robotic tasks, but still face challenges in fine-grained spatiotemporal manipulation. Typically, existing methods mainly embed spatiotemporal knowledge into visual and action representations, and directly perform a cross-modal mapping for step-level action prediction. However, such spatiotemporal reasoning remains largely implicit, making it difficult to handle multiple sequential behaviors with explicit spatiotemporal boundaries. In this work, we propose ST-$π$, a structured spatiotemporal VLA model for robotic manipulation. Our model is guided by two key designs: 1) Spatiotemporal VLM. We encode 4D observations and task instructions into latent spaces, and feed them into the LLM to generate a sequence of causally ordered chunk-level action prompts consisting of sub-tasks, spatial grounding and temporal grounding. 2) Spatiotemporal action expert. Conditioned on chunk-level action prompts, we design a structured dual-generator guidance to jointly model spatial dependencies and temporal causality, thus predicting step-level action parameters. Within this structured framework, the VLM explicitly plans global spatiotemporal behavior, and the action expert further refines local spatiotemporal control. In addition, we propose a real-world robotic dataset with structured spatiotemporal annotations for fine-tuning. Extensive experiments have been conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of our model. Our code link: https://github.com/chuanhaoma/ST-pi.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构化时空VLA模型ST-π，通过显式时空推理提升机器人精细操作能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型在精细时空操作中面临挑战，时空推理隐式，难以处理具有显式时空边界的多步连续行为。
analysis.problem: 如何实现机器人操作中显式的结构化时空推理，以处理多步连续行为中的时空边界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法将时空知识嵌入视觉和动作表示，直接进行跨模态映射预测步骤级动作，导致时空推理隐式，难以处理多步连续行为。
analysis.method: 提出ST-π模型，包含时空VLM（编码4D观测和指令，生成因果排序的块级动作提示，含子任务、空间定位和时间定位）和时空动作专家（基于块级提示，通过结构化双生成器引导联合建模空间依赖和时间因果，预测步骤级动作参数）。
contributions: 提出结构化时空VLA模型ST-π，显式规划全局时空行为并细化局部时空控制。
构建真实机器人数据集，包含结构化时空标注，用于微调模型。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的结构化时空标注数据。
模型复杂度较高，实时性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构化时空VLA模型ST-π，通过显式时空推理提升机器人精细操作能力。

papers.title: Exploring Boundary-Aware Spatial-Frequency Fusion for Camouflaged Object Detection
papers.abstract: Camouflaged Object Detection is challenging due to the high degree of similarity between camouflaged objects and their surrounding backgrounds. Current COD methods mainly rely on edge extraction in the spatial domain and local pixel-level information, neglecting the importance of global structural features. Additionally, they fail to effectively leverage the importance of phase spectrum information within frequency domain features. To this end, we propose a COD framework BASFNet based on boundary-aware frequency domain and spatial domain fusion.This method uses dual guided integration of frequency domain and spatial domain features. A phase-spectrum-based frequency-enhanced edge exploration module (FEEM) and a spatial core segmentation module (SCSM) are introduced to jointly capture the boundary and object features of camouflaged objects. These features are then effectively integrated through a spatial-frequency fusion interaction module (SFFIM). Furthermore, the boundary detection is further optimized through an boundary-aware training strategy. BASFNet outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods on three benchmark datasets, validating the effectiveness of the fusion of frequency and spatial domain information in COD tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出边界感知的频域-空域融合框架BASFNet，通过相位谱增强边缘探索和空间核心分割模块提升伪装目标检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 伪装目标与背景高度相似，现有方法依赖空域边缘提取和局部像素信息，忽略全局结构特征和频域相位谱信息，导致检测困难。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合频域和空域特征，并利用相位谱信息提升伪装目标检测的边界和整体检测精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出BASFNet框架，包含基于相位谱的频率增强边缘探索模块（FEEM）和空间核心分割模块（SCSM），通过空间-频率融合交互模块（SFFIM）整合特征，并采用边界感知训练策略优化边界检测。
contributions: 提出频域-空域双引导融合的伪装目标检测框架BASFNet。
设计相位谱增强边缘探索模块和空间核心分割模块，有效捕获边界和物体特征。
在三个基准数据集上超越现有方法，验证频域-空域融合的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准数据集上评估，BASFNet优于现有最先进方法。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景的泛化能力有限。
计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出边界感知的频域-空域融合框架BASFNet，通过相位谱增强边缘探索和空间核心分割模块提升伪装目标检测性能。

papers.title: ParkingScenes: A Structured Dataset for End-to-End Autonomous Parking in Simulation Scenes
papers.abstract: Autonomous parking remains a critical yet challenging task in intelligent driving systems, particularly within constrained urban environments where maneuvering space is limited and precise control is essential. While recent advances in end-to-end learning have shown great promise, the lack of high-quality, structured datasets tailored for parking scenarios remains a significant bottleneck.To address this gap, we present ParkingScenes, a comprehensive multimodal dataset specifically designed for end-to-end autonomous parking in simulated scenes. Built on the CARLA simulator, ParkingScenes features structured parking trajectories generated by a Hybrid A* planner and a Model Predictive Controller (MPC), providing accurate and reproducible supervision signals. The dataset includes 16 reverse-in and 6 parallel parking scenarios, each executed under two pedestrian conditions (present and absent), resulting in 704 structured episodes and approximately 105000 frames. Each scenario is repeated 16 times to ensure consistent coverage. Each frame contains synchronized data from four RGB cameras, four depth sensors, vehicle motion states, and Bird's-Eye View (BEV) representations, enabling rich multimodal fusion and context-aware learning. To demonstrate the utility of our dataset, we compare models trained on ParkingScenes with those trained on unstructured, manually collected simulation data under identical conditions. Results show significant improvements in performance, underscoring the effectiveness of structured supervision for robust and accurate parking policy learning. By releasing both the dataset and the collection framework, ParkingScenes establishes a scalable and reproducible benchmark for advancing learning-based autonomous parking systems. The dataset and collection framework will be released at: https://github.com/haonan-ai/ParkingScenes

analysis.tldr: ParkingScenes是一个基于CARLA模拟器的结构化多模态数据集，用于端到端自主泊车，通过Hybrid A*和MPC生成精确轨迹，实验表明结构化监督显著提升泊车策略性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主泊车在受限城市环境中仍具挑战，现有端到端方法缺乏高质量、结构化的泊车场景数据集，成为性能瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对泊车场景的高质量结构化多模态数据集，导致端到端泊车策略学习困难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于CARLA模拟器构建数据集，使用Hybrid A*规划器和MPC生成结构化泊车轨迹，包含16种倒车入库和6种平行泊车场景，每种场景在有无行人条件下重复16次，共704个结构化片段和约105000帧，每帧包含4个RGB相机、4个深度传感器、车辆运动状态和BEV表示。
contributions: 提出了ParkingScenes，一个专为端到端自主泊车设计的结构化多模态模拟数据集。
通过实验证明结构化监督相比非结构化数据能显著提升泊车策略的性能。
开源了数据集和采集框架，为学习型自主泊车系统提供可扩展、可复现的基准。
analysis.experiments: 在相同条件下，比较了在ParkingScenes上训练的模型与在非结构化手动收集的模拟数据上训练的模型，结果显示ParkingScenes训练的性能显著提升。
limitations: 数据集仅基于CARLA模拟器，可能无法完全反映真实世界的复杂性和多样性。
未提及对真实场景的泛化能力评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ParkingScenes是一个基于CARLA模拟器的结构化多模态数据集，用于端到端自主泊车，通过Hybrid A*和MPC生成精确轨迹，实验表明结构化监督显著提升泊车策略性能。

papers.title: Spatiotemporal Sycophancy: Negation-Based Gaslighting in Video Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Video Large Language Models (Vid-LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance in video understanding tasks, yet their robustness under conversational interaction remains largely underexplored. In this paper, we identify spatiotemporal sycophancy, a failure mode in which Vid-LLMs retract initially correct, visually grounded judgments and conform to misleading user feedback under negation-based gaslighting. Rather than merely changing their answers, the models often fabricate unsupported temporal or spatial explanations to justify incorrect revisions. To systematically investigate this phenomenon, we propose a negation-based gaslighting evaluation framework and introduce GasVideo-1000, a curated benchmark designed to probe spatiotemporal sycophancy with clear visual grounding and temporal reasoning requirements. We evaluate a broad range of state-of-the-art open-source and proprietary Vid-LLMs across diverse video understanding tasks. Extensive experiments reveal that vulnerability to negation-based gaslighting is pervasive and severe, even among models with strong baseline performance. While prompt-level grounding constraints can partially mitigate this behavior, they do not reliably prevent hallucinated justifications or belief reversal. Our results indicate that current Vid-LLMs lack robust mechanisms for maintaining grounded spatiotemporal beliefs under adversarial conversational feedback.

analysis.tldr: 视频大模型在对话中易受否定式误导，撤回正确判断并编造虚假时空解释。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频大模型在视频理解任务中表现优异，但在对话交互中的鲁棒性尚未充分探索，尤其是面对用户误导性反馈时可能产生严重失败模式。
analysis.problem: 视频大模型在否定式误导下会撤回原本正确的视觉判断，并编造不存在的时空解释来合理化错误修正。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到视频大模型存在时空谄媚现象：模型不仅改变答案，还会编造不支持的时空解释来证明错误修正的合理性。这种脆弱性普遍且严重，即使基线性能强的模型也受影响。
analysis.method: 提出否定式误导评估框架，并构建GasVideo-1000基准数据集，用于探测视频大模型在时空推理中的谄媚行为。
contributions: 首次识别并定义视频大模型中的时空谄媚现象
构建GasVideo-1000基准数据集和评估框架
系统评估多种开源和闭源视频大模型，揭示普遍且严重的脆弱性
analysis.experiments: 在多种视频理解任务上评估了多个最先进的开源和闭源视频大模型，发现否定式误导的脆弱性普遍且严重。提示级约束可部分缓解，但不能可靠防止幻觉解释或信念反转。
limitations: 未提供具体缓解方法的有效性量化结果
基准数据集规模可能有限，覆盖场景不够全面
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 视频大模型在对话中易受否定式误导，撤回正确判断并编造虚假时空解释。

papers.title: Latent Abstraction for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become a standard approach for enhancing large language models (LLMs) with external knowledge, mitigating hallucinations, and improving factuality. However, existing systems rely on generating natural language queries at each hop and maintaining a strict architectural separation between retriever and generator, preventing them from leveraging the full representational capacity of the LLM. We propose \textbf{LAnR} (Latent Abstraction for RAG), a unified framework in which a single LLM jointly performs encoding, retrieval, and generation entirely within its own latent space. Rather than generating textual queries, LAnR produces dense retrieval vectors from the hidden states of a designated \texttt{[PRED]} token and uses them to match against encoded document representations from the same model. Furthermore, LAnR adaptively decides when sufficient evidence has been retrieved using a lightweight MLP control head over those same hidden states, eliminating both the separate retriever and explicit token-level stopping reasoning. This design is motivated by our empirical observation that answer token entropy reliably signals retrieval sufficiency. Extensive experiments on six QA benchmarks spanning single-hop and multi-hop settings demonstrate that LAnR outperforms existing RAG methods, while achieving improved inference efficiency through reduced number of retrieval calls and tighter model integration.

analysis.tldr: 提出LAnR框架，让单个LLM在隐空间中统一完成编码、检索和生成，无需独立检索器和显式文本查询。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RAG系统依赖生成自然语言查询和严格的检索器-生成器分离，限制了LLM的表征能力，且多跳推理中检索效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在自身隐空间中统一执行检索与生成，消除独立检索器和显式文本查询，提升RAG的效率和效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到答案token熵可可靠地指示检索是否充分，从而自适应决定停止检索。
analysis.method: LAnR：单个LLM通过[PRED] token的隐状态生成稠密检索向量，匹配同一模型编码的文档表示；用轻量MLP控制头基于隐状态自适应决定检索停止。
contributions: 提出LAnR，首个在LLM隐空间中统一编码、检索和生成的RAG框架。
设计自适应检索停止机制，利用答案token熵信号减少检索次数。
在六个QA基准上超越现有RAG方法，同时提升推理效率。
analysis.experiments: 在六个单跳和多跳QA基准上评估，LAnR优于现有RAG方法，且检索次数更少。
limitations: 可能依赖特定LLM架构（如[PRED] token设计）。
隐空间检索的可解释性可能不如文本检索。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LAnR框架，让单个LLM在隐空间中统一完成编码、检索和生成，无需独立检索器和显式文本查询。

papers.title: Sharpening Lightweight Models for Generalized Polyp Segmentation: A Boundary Guided Distillation from Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Automated polyp segmentation is critical for early colorectal cancer detection and its prevention, yet remains challenging due to weak boundaries, large appearance variations, and limited annotated data. Lightweight segmentation models such as U-Net, U-Net++, and PraNet offer practical efficiency for clinical deployment but struggle to capture the rich semantic and structural cues required for accurate delineation of complex polyp regions. In contrast, large Vision Foundation Models (VFMs), including SAM, OneFormer, Mask2Former, and DINOv2, exhibit strong generalization but transfer poorly to polyp segmentation due to domain mismatch, insufficient boundary sensitivity, and high computational cost. To bridge this gap, we propose \textit{\textbf{LiteBounD}, a \underline{Li}gh\underline{t}w\underline{e}ight \underline{Boun}dary-guided \underline{D}istillation} framework that transfers complementary semantic and structural priors from multiple VFMs into compact segmentation backbones. LiteBounD introduces (i) a dual-path distillation mechanism that disentangles semantic and boundary-aware representations, (ii) a frequency-aware alignment strategy that supervises low-frequency global semantics and high-frequency boundary details separately, and (iii) a boundary-aware decoder that fuses multi-scale encoder features with distilled semantically rich boundary information for precise segmentation. Extensive experiments on both seen (Kvasir-SEG, CVC-ClinicDB) and unseen (ColonDB, CVC-300, ETIS) datasets demonstrate that LiteBounD consistently outperforms its lightweight baselines by a significant margin and achieves performance competitive with state-of-the-art methods, while maintaining the efficiency required for real-time clinical use. Our code is available at https://github.com/lostinrepo/LiteBounD.

analysis.tldr: 提出LiteBounD框架，通过边界引导蒸馏将多个视觉基础模型的知识迁移到轻量级息肉分割模型中，兼顾精度与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 轻量级息肉分割模型（如U-Net）效率高但语义和结构信息不足，而大型视觉基础模型（如SAM）泛化强但计算成本高且域迁移差，需要一种方法结合两者优势。
analysis.problem: 如何将多个视觉基础模型的互补语义和结构先验高效蒸馏到轻量级分割骨干中，提升息肉分割的边界敏感性和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LiteBounD框架，包含双路径蒸馏机制（解耦语义和边界感知表征）、频率感知对齐策略（分别监督低频全局语义和高频边界细节）以及边界感知解码器（融合多尺度特征与蒸馏的边界信息）。
contributions: 提出LiteBounD，首个从多个视觉基础模型向轻量级模型进行边界引导蒸馏的框架。
设计双路径蒸馏和频率感知对齐策略，有效分离语义和边界知识。
在多个数据集上验证，轻量模型性能显著提升，接近SOTA且保持实时效率。
analysis.experiments: 在Kvasir-SEG、CVC-ClinicDB（已见）和ColonDB、CVC-300、ETIS（未见）数据集上实验，轻量基线显著提升，性能与SOTA竞争。
limitations: 依赖多个基础模型，蒸馏过程可能增加训练复杂度。
未在更多样化的临床场景或不同模态数据上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LiteBounD框架，通过边界引导蒸馏将多个视觉基础模型的知识迁移到轻量级息肉分割模型中，兼顾精度与效率。

papers.title: Periodic Steady-State Control of a Handkerchief-Spinning Task Using a Parallel Anti-Parallelogram Tendon-driven Wrist
papers.abstract: Spinning flexible objects, exemplified by traditional Chinese handkerchief performances, demands periodic steady-state motions under nonlinear dynamics with frictional contacts and boundary constraints. To address these challenges, we first design an intuitive dexterous wrist based on a parallel anti-parallelogram tendon-driven structure, which achieves 90 degrees omnidirectional rotation with low inertia and decoupled roll-pitch sensing, and implement a high-low level hierarchical control scheme. We then develop a particle-spring model of the handkerchief for control-oriented abstraction and strategy evaluation. Hardware experiments validate this framework, achieving an unfolding ratio of approximately 99% and fingertip tracking error of RMSE = 2.88 mm in high-dynamic spinning. These results demonstrate that integrating control-oriented modeling with a task-tailored dexterous wrist enables robust rest-to-steady-state transitions and precise periodic manipulation of highly flexible objects. More visualizations: https://slowly1113.github.io/icra2026-handkerchief/

analysis.tldr: 针对柔性物体周期性稳态控制，设计并联反平行四边形腱驱动手腕，结合粒子-弹簧模型实现手帕高速旋转，展开率约99%。
analysis.research_motivation: 柔性物体（如手帕）的周期性稳态旋转涉及非线性动力学、摩擦接触和边界约束，传统方法难以实现高动态下的精确控制。
analysis.problem: 如何实现柔性物体从静止到周期性稳态的高速旋转，并保证高展开率和低跟踪误差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计并联反平行四边形腱驱动手腕（90°全向旋转、低惯性、解耦滚转-俯仰感知），采用高低层分层控制，并开发手帕粒子-弹簧模型用于控制导向抽象和策略评估。
contributions: 提出一种针对柔性物体旋转任务的并联反平行四边形腱驱动手腕设计。
集成控制导向建模与任务定制手腕，实现鲁棒的静止到稳态过渡和精确周期性操作。
analysis.experiments: 硬件实验验证：展开率约99%，指尖跟踪误差RMSE=2.88 mm。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定柔性物体（如手帕），泛化性未验证。
粒子-弹簧模型可能无法精确模拟复杂柔性动力学。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对柔性物体周期性稳态控制，设计并联反平行四边形腱驱动手腕，结合粒子-弹簧模型实现手帕高速旋转，展开率约99%。

papers.title: On the Emergence of Syntax by Means of Local Interaction
papers.abstract: Can syntactic processing emerge spontaneously from purely local interaction? We present a concrete instance on a minimal system: an 18,658-parameter two-dimensional neural cellular automaton (NCA), supervised by nothing more than a 1-bit boundary signal, is trained on the membership problem of an arithmetic-expression grammar. After training, its internal $L \times L$ grid spontaneously self-organizes into an ordered, spatially extended representation that we name Proto-CKY. This representation satisfies three operational criteria for syntactic processing: expressive power beyond the regular languages, structural generalization beyond the training distribution, and an internal organization quantitatively aligned with grammatical structure (Pearson $r \approx 0.71$). It emerges independently on four context-free grammars and regenerates spontaneously after perturbation. Proto-CKY is functionally aligned with the CKY algorithm but formally distinct from it: it is a physical prototype, a concrete instantiation of a mathematical ideal on a physical substrate, and the systematic distance between the two carries information about the substrate itself.

analysis.tldr: 一个极小参数量的神经细胞自动机仅通过局部交互和1比特边界信号，自组织出类似CKY算法的句法表征。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索句法处理能否从纯粹的局部交互中自发涌现，挑战传统认为句法需要全局或显式规则的观点。
analysis.problem: 研究仅依赖局部交互和极弱监督信号（1比特边界信号）的神经网络能否自发形成具有句法处理能力的内部表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：训练后网格自组织成有序的Proto-CKY表征，满足三个句法处理标准（超越正则语言的表达能力、训练分布外的结构泛化、与语法结构定量对齐），并在多种文法上独立涌现且扰动后再生。
analysis.method: 使用一个18,658参数的二维神经细胞自动机（NCA），以算术表达式文法的成员判定问题为任务，仅用1比特边界信号监督训练。
contributions: 首次在极小参数量的NCA中展示句法处理能力从局部交互自发涌现。
提出Proto-CKY概念，作为CKY算法的物理原型，揭示算法与物理实现之间的系统性差异。
analysis.experiments: 在四种上下文无关文法上训练，评估了内部表征与语法结构的对齐（Pearson r≈0.71），并测试了扰动后的再生能力。摘要未提供具体实验设置细节。
limitations: 仅针对算术表达式文法，未验证更复杂自然语言句法。
Proto-CKY与CKY算法的形式差异未深入分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 一个极小参数量的神经细胞自动机仅通过局部交互和1比特边界信号，自组织出类似CKY算法的句法表征。

papers.title: PlankFormer: Robust Plankton Instance Segmentation via MAE-Pretrained Vision Transformers and Pseudo Community Image Generation
papers.abstract: Plankton monitoring is essential for assessing aquatic ecosystems but is limited by the labor-intensive nature of manual microscopic analysis. Automating the segmentation of plankton from crowded images is crucial, however, it faces two major challenges: (i) the scarcity of pixel-level annotated datasets and (ii) the difficulty of distinguishing plankton from debris and overlapping individuals using conventional CNN-based methods. To address these issues, we propose PlankFormer, a novel framework for plankton instance segmentation. First, to overcome the data shortage, we introduce a method to generate labeled Pseudo Community Images (PCI) by synthesizing individual plankton images onto diverse backgrounds, including those created by generative models. Second, we propose a segmentation model utilizing a Vision Transformer (ViT) backbone with a Mask2Former decoder. To robustly capture the global structural features of plankton against occlusion and debris, we employ a Masked Autoencoder (MAE) for self-supervised pre-training on unlabeled individual images. Experimental results on real-world datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms conventional methods, such as Mask R-CNN, particularly in challenging environments with high debris density. We demonstrate that our synthetic training strategy and MAE-based architecture enable high-precision segmentation with requiring less manual annotations for individual plankton images.

analysis.tldr: 提出PlankFormer框架，利用MAE预训练ViT和伪社区图像生成实现鲁棒的浮游生物实例分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 浮游生物监测对评估水生生态系统至关重要，但手动显微镜分析劳动密集且效率低；现有自动化方法在拥挤图像中难以区分浮游生物与碎片及重叠个体。
analysis.problem: 解决浮游生物实例分割中像素级标注数据稀缺以及CNN方法难以处理遮挡和碎片干扰的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PlankFormer框架：1) 通过将单个浮游生物图像合成到多样背景（包括生成模型生成的背景）生成带标注的伪社区图像（PCI）；2) 使用Mask2Former解码器结合Vision Transformer（ViT）骨干，并采用掩码自编码器（MAE）在无标签单个图像上进行自监督预训练以捕获全局结构特征。
contributions: 提出PCI生成方法缓解标注数据稀缺问题
设计基于MAE预训练ViT和Mask2Former的实例分割架构，提升对遮挡和碎片的鲁棒性
analysis.experiments: 在真实数据集上实验，结果表明所提方法显著优于Mask R-CNN等传统方法，尤其在碎片密度高的挑战性环境中。
limitations: 合成图像可能与真实场景存在域差异
依赖生成模型背景的质量
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PlankFormer框架，利用MAE预训练ViT和伪社区图像生成实现鲁棒的浮游生物实例分割。

papers.title: UniCSG: Unified High-Fidelity Content-Constrained Style-Driven Generation via Staged Semantic and Frequency Disentanglement
papers.abstract: Style transfer must match a target style while preserving content semantics. DiT-based diffusion models often suffer from content-style entanglement, leading to reference-content leakage and unstable generation. We present UniCSG, a unified framework for content-constrained, style-driven generation in both text-guided and reference-guided settings. UniCSG employs staged training: (i) a latent-space semantic disentanglement stage that combines low-frequency preprocessing with conditioning corruption to encourage content-style separation, and (ii) a latent-space frequency-aware detail reconstruction stage that refines details via multi-scale frequency supervision. We further incorporate pixel-space reward learning to align latent objectives with perceptual quality after decoding. Experiments demonstrate improved content faithfulness, style alignment, and robustness in both settings.

analysis.tldr: UniCSG通过分阶段语义与频率解耦，实现高保真内容约束风格驱动生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有DiT扩散模型在风格迁移中常出现内容-风格纠缠，导致参考内容泄露和生成不稳定，亟需统一框架实现内容约束与风格驱动的生成。
analysis.problem: 解决文本引导和参考引导两种设置下，风格迁移时内容与风格纠缠导致的参考内容泄露和生成不稳定问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: DiT扩散模型存在内容-风格纠缠，导致参考内容泄露和生成不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出UniCSG统一框架，采用分阶段训练：先进行潜在空间语义解耦（结合低频预处理与条件损坏），再进行频率感知细节重建（多尺度频率监督），并引入像素空间奖励学习对齐潜在目标与感知质量。
contributions: 提出分阶段语义与频率解耦方法，有效分离内容与风格。
引入像素空间奖励学习，提升解码后感知质量。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定扩散模型架构，泛化性需验证。
分阶段训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: UniCSG通过分阶段语义与频率解耦，实现高保真内容约束风格驱动生成。

papers.title: On the Reliability of Computer Use Agents
papers.abstract: Computer-use agents have rapidly improved on real-world tasks such as web navigation, desktop automation, and software interaction, in some cases surpassing human performance. Yet even when the task and model are unchanged, an agent that succeeds once may fail on a repeated execution of the same task. This raises a fundamental question: if an agent can succeed at a task once, what prevents it from doing so reliably? In this work, we study the sources of unreliability in computer-use agents through three factors: stochasticity during execution, ambiguity in task specification, and variability in agent behavior. We analyze these factors on OSWorld using repeated executions of the same task together with paired statistical tests that capture task-level changes across settings. Our analysis shows that reliability depends on both how tasks are specified and how agent behavior varies across executions. These findings suggest the need to evaluate agents under repeated execution, to allow agents to resolve task ambiguity through interaction, and to favor strategies that remain stable across runs.

analysis.tldr: 计算机使用代理即使在相同任务下也会因随机性、任务歧义和行为变异性而不可靠，需通过重复执行和交互来提升可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 计算机使用代理在真实任务中表现优异，但重复执行同一任务时可能失败，这种不可靠性限制了其实际部署，需要系统研究其根源。
analysis.problem: 探究计算机使用代理在重复执行相同任务时不可靠的来源。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，即使任务和模型不变，代理一次成功但重复执行可能失败，可靠性受执行随机性、任务规范歧义和代理行为变异性影响。
analysis.method: 在OSWorld上对同一任务进行重复执行，并结合配对统计检验分析任务级变化。
contributions: 识别出计算机使用代理不可靠的三个主要因素：随机性、任务歧义和行为变异性。
提出评估代理需在重复执行下进行，并建议通过交互解决任务歧义和采用稳定策略。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于OSWorld一个平台，可能不适用于其他环境。
未深入探讨缓解不可靠性的具体方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 计算机使用代理即使在相同任务下也会因随机性、任务歧义和行为变异性而不可靠，需通过重复执行和交互来提升可靠性。

papers.title: AI Approach for MRI-only Full-Spine Vertebral Segmentation and 3D Reconstruction in Paediatric Scoliosis
papers.abstract: MRI is preferred over CT in paediatric imaging because it avoids ionising radiation, but its use in spine deformity assessment is largely limited by the lack of automated, high-resolution 3D bony reconstruction, which continues to rely on CT. MRI-based 3D reconstruction remains impractical due to manual workflows and the scarcity of labelled full-spine datasets. This study introduces an AI framework that enables fully automated thoracolumbar spine (T1-L5) segmentation and 3D reconstruction from MRI alone. Historical low-dose CT scans from adolescent idiopathic scoliosis (AIS) patients were converted into MRI-like images using a GAN and combined with existing labelled thoracic MRI data to train a U-Net-based model. The resulting algorithm accurately generated continuous thoracolumbar 3D reconstructions, improved segmentation accuracy (88% Dice score), and reduced processing time from approximately 1 hour to under one minute, while preserving AIS-specific deformity features. This approach enables radiation-free 3D deformity assessment from MRI, supporting clinical evaluation, surgical planning, and navigation in paediatric spine care.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种AI框架，实现仅基于MRI的全自动胸腰椎分割与3D重建，避免CT辐射，适用于儿童脊柱侧弯评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 儿童脊柱成像中MRI无电离辐射，但缺乏自动化高分辨率3D骨重建方法，现有依赖CT，而MRI手动流程耗时且缺乏标注数据。
analysis.problem: 实现仅基于MRI的全自动胸腰椎（T1-L5）分割与3D重建，替代CT进行脊柱畸形评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用GAN将历史低剂量CT转换为类MRI图像，结合标注的胸部MRI数据训练U-Net模型，实现全自动分割与3D重建。
contributions: 提出首个仅基于MRI的全自动胸腰椎分割与3D重建AI框架
通过GAN实现CT到MRI图像转换，解决标注数据稀缺问题
分割精度达88% Dice，处理时间从约1小时降至1分钟以内
analysis.experiments: 在青少年特发性脊柱侧弯（AIS）患者的历史低剂量CT和标注胸部MRI数据上验证，报告了88% Dice分割精度和处理时间缩短。
limitations: 可能仅适用于AIS患者，泛化性需进一步验证
未报告与其他方法（如纯CT方法）的详细对比
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种AI框架，实现仅基于MRI的全自动胸腰椎分割与3D重建，避免CT辐射，适用于儿童脊柱侧弯评估。

papers.title: Learning from AVA: Early Lessons from a Curated and Trustworthy Generative AI for Policy and Development Research
papers.abstract: General-purpose LLMs pose misinformation risks for development and policy experts, lacking epistemic humility for verifiable outputs. We present AVA (AI + Verified Analysis), a GenAI platform built on a curated library of over 4,000 World Bank Reports with multilingual capabilities. AVA's multi-agent pipeline enables users to query and receive evidence-based syntheses. It operationalizes epistemic humility through two mechanisms: citation verifiability (tracing claims to sources) and reasoned abstention (declining unsupported queries with justification and redirection). We conducted an in-the-wild evaluation with over 2,200 individuals from heterogeneous organisations and roles in 116 countries, via log analysis, surveys, and 20 interviews. Difference-in-Differences estimates associate sustained engagement with 2.4-3.9 hours saved weekly. Qualitatively, participants used AVA as a specialized "evidence engine"; reasoned abstention clarified scope boundaries, and trust was calibrated through institutional provenance and page-anchored citations. We contribute design guidelines for specialized AI and articulate a vision for "ecosystem-aware" Humble AI.

analysis.tldr: 提出AVA平台，通过引用验证和理性弃权实现认知谦逊，为政策研究提供可信生成式AI。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用LLM在发展和政策研究领域存在错误信息风险，缺乏对可验证输出的认知谦逊，需要专门化的可信AI工具。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够提供可验证、有依据的生成式AI平台，避免错误信息并明确能力边界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户将AVA视为专门的“证据引擎”；理性弃权机制帮助明确范围边界；信任通过机构来源和页面锚定引用校准。
analysis.method: 基于4000多份世界银行报告构建策展库，采用多智能体管道实现引用可追溯和理性弃权（对无依据查询拒绝并重定向）。
contributions: 提出AVA平台，通过引用验证和理性弃权实现认知谦逊
通过大规模实地评估（2200+用户，116个国家）验证有效性，显示每周节省2.4-3.9小时
提炼出专门化AI的设计指南，并倡导“生态系统感知”的谦逊AI愿景
analysis.experiments: 在116个国家超过2200名用户中进行实地评估，包括日志分析、调查和20次访谈，使用双重差分法估计持续使用与每周节省2.4-3.9小时相关。
limitations: 评估基于世界银行报告，可能不适用于其他领域
理性弃权机制可能限制用户在某些场景下的实用性
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AVA平台，通过引用验证和理性弃权实现认知谦逊，为政策研究提供可信生成式AI。

papers.title: Polysemantic Experts, Monosemantic Paths: Routing as Control in MoEs
papers.abstract: An LLM's residual stream is both state and instruction: it encodes the current context and determines the next transformation. We introduce a parameter-free decomposition for Mixture-of-Experts models that splits each layer's hidden state into a control signal that causally drives routing and an orthogonal content channel invisible to the router. Across six MoE architectures, we find that models preserve surface-level features (language, token identity, position) in the content channel, while the control signal encodes an abstract function that rotates from layer to layer. Because each routing decision is low-bandwidth, this hand-off forces compositional specialization across layers. While individual experts remain polysemantic, expert paths become monosemantic, clustering tokens by semantic function across languages and surface forms. The same token (e.g., ":") follows distinct trajectories depending on whether it serves as a type annotation, an introductory colon, or a time separator. Our decomposition identifies the source of this structure: clusters in the control subspace are substantially more monosemantic than those in the full representation. As a result, the natural unit of interpretability in MoEs is not the expert but the trajectory.

analysis.tldr: MoE中专家是多义的，但路径是单义的；路由控制信号编码抽象函数，内容通道保留表面特征。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解MoE模型内部机制对可解释性和安全对齐至关重要，但现有研究多聚焦于单个专家，忽略了路由决策和跨层组合的影响。
analysis.problem: MoE模型中专家多义性（polysemantic）的来源以及如何找到更自然的可解释性单元。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现：1) 内容通道保留表面特征（语言、token身份、位置），控制信号编码抽象函数并逐层旋转；2) 路由低带宽迫使跨层组合专业化；3) 单个专家多义，但专家路径（trajectory）单义，按语义功能聚类；4) 控制子空间中的聚类比完整表示中的聚类更单义。
analysis.method: 提出一种无参数分解方法，将MoE每层隐藏状态拆分为控制信号（驱动路由）和正交内容通道（路由器不可见）。
contributions: 揭示MoE中路由控制信号与内容通道的分离机制，控制信号编码抽象函数，内容通道保留表面特征。
发现专家路径（trajectory）比单个专家更单义，是更自然的可解释性单元。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 分解方法可能依赖特定MoE架构，泛化性需验证。
未讨论如何利用该发现改进模型训练或解释工具。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MoE中专家是多义的，但路径是单义的；路由控制信号编码抽象函数，内容通道保留表面特征。

papers.title: JTPRO: A Joint Tool-Prompt Reflective Optimization Framework for Language Agents
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents augmented with external tools often struggle as number of tools grow large and become domain-specific. In such settings, ambiguous tool descriptions and under-specified agent instructions frequently lead to tool mis-selection and incorrect slot/value instantiation. We hypothesize that this is due to two root causes: generic, one-size-fits-all prompts that ignore tool-specific nuances, and underspecified tool schemas that lack clear guidance on when and how to use each tool and how to format its parameters. We introduce Joint Tool-Prompt Reflective Optimization (JTPRO), a framework for improving tool-calling reliability in trace-supervised settings by iteratively using rollout-driven reflection to co-optimize global instructions and per-tool schema/argument descriptions for accurate tool selection and argument instantiation in large tool inventories. JTPRO is designed to preserve only tool-local cues needed for correct disambiguation and slot filling. We evaluate JTPRO across multi-tool benchmarks, which account for different number of tools using three metrics: Tool Selection Accuracy (TSA), Slot Filling Accuracy(SFA), and Overall Success Rate(OSR) (correct tool + correct slots + correct values). JTPRO consistently outperforms strong baselines, including CoT-style agents, and reflective prompt optimizers such as GEPA by 5%-20% (relative) on OSR. Ablations show that joint optimization of instructions and tool schemas is more effective and robust than optimizing either component in isolation.

analysis.tldr: 提出联合工具-提示反射优化框架JTPRO，通过迭代反射协同优化全局指令和工具模式，提升大语言模型在大量工具场景下的工具调用可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型代理在工具数量庞大且领域特定时，常因工具描述模糊和指令不充分导致工具选择错误和参数填充错误，现有方法缺乏对工具特定细节的优化。
analysis.problem: 如何协同优化全局指令和每个工具的模式/参数描述，以提高工具选择和参数填充的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出工具选择错误和参数填充错误源于两个根本原因：通用提示忽略工具特定细节，以及工具模式缺乏使用时机、方法和参数格式的明确指导。
analysis.method: JTPRO框架，通过基于rollout的反射迭代，联合优化全局指令和每个工具的模式/参数描述，仅保留用于正确区分和填充的工具局部线索。
contributions: 提出JTPRO框架，实现全局指令与工具模式的联合优化。
在多个多工具基准上，JTPRO在工具选择准确率、槽填充准确率和总体成功率上均优于强基线，相对总体成功率提升5%-20%。
analysis.experiments: 在多个多工具基准上评估，使用工具选择准确率、槽填充准确率和总体成功率三个指标，消融实验表明联合优化比单独优化更有效和鲁棒。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的轨迹数据。
未讨论在极大规模工具库上的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出联合工具-提示反射优化框架JTPRO，通过迭代反射协同优化全局指令和工具模式，提升大语言模型在大量工具场景下的工具调用可靠性。

papers.title: PCM-NeRF: Probabilistic Camera Modeling for Neural Radiance Fields under Pose Uncertainty
papers.abstract: Neural surface reconstruction methods typically treat camera poses as fixed values, assuming perfect accuracy from Structure-from-Motion (SfM) systems. This assumption breaks down with imperfect pose estimates, leading to distorted or incomplete reconstructions. We present PCM-NeRF, a probabilistic framework that augments neural surface reconstruction with per-camera learnable uncertainty, built on top of SG-NeRF. Rather than treating all cameras equally throughout optimization, we represent each pose as a distribution with a learnable mean and variance, initialized from SfM correspondence quality. An uncertainty regularization loss couples the learned variance to view confidence, and the resulting uncertainty directly modulates the effective pose learning rate: uncertain cameras receive damped gradient updates, preventing poorly initialized views from corrupting the reconstruction. This lightweight mechanism requires no changes to the rendering pipeline and adds negligible overhead. Experiments on challenging scenes with severe pose outliers demonstrate that PCM-NeRF consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both Chamfer Distance and F-Score, particularly for geometrically complex structures, without requiring foreground masks.

analysis.tldr: PCM-NeRF通过为每台相机引入可学习的不确定性，在姿态不准确时显著提升了神经辐射场的表面重建质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经表面重建方法通常假设相机姿态完全准确，但实际中SfM系统给出的姿态估计存在误差，导致重建结果扭曲或不完整。
analysis.problem: 解决在相机姿态存在不确定性的情况下，神经辐射场表面重建质量下降的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在SG-NeRF基础上，为每台相机引入一个可学习的分布（均值和方差），利用SfM对应质量初始化，并通过不确定性正则化损失将方差与视图置信度耦合，同时用不确定性调节有效学习率，使不确定相机获得衰减的梯度更新。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级的概率框架PCM-NeRF，为每台相机建模可学习的不确定性，无需修改渲染管线。
在存在严重姿态离群值的挑战性场景中，PCM-NeRF在Chamfer Distance和F-Score上持续超越现有方法，尤其对几何复杂结构效果显著。
analysis.experiments: 在具有严重姿态离群值的挑战性场景上进行实验，与最先进方法比较Chamfer Distance和F-Score，PCM-NeRF表现更优。
limitations: 可能依赖于SfM对应质量的初始化，若初始质量极差可能影响效果。
仅针对SG-NeRF实现，泛化到其他NeRF框架需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PCM-NeRF通过为每台相机引入可学习的不确定性，在姿态不准确时显著提升了神经辐射场的表面重建质量。

papers.title: WebSerial Vision Training for Microcontrollers: A Browser-Based Companion to On-Device CNN Training
papers.abstract: This paper presents webmcu-vision-web, a single-file, zero-install browser application for end-to-end TinyML vision model training and deployment on the Seeed Studio XIAO ESP32-S3 Sense (XIAO ML Kit, $15--40 USD). Acting as a browser-based companion to the on-device Arduino firmware of Paper 1 [1], it provides a private, fully local machine learning pipeline, from firmware flashing through image collection, CNN training, weight export, and live activation visualization, without any software installation beyond a Chromium-based browser. The system targets educators, small businesses, and researchers who need to train task-specific visual classifiers under their exact deployment conditions. Key capabilities include: in-browser firmware flashing via esptool-js; an SD card file browser with image preview and inline editing; config.json live-sync for zero-recompile hyperparameter adjustment; webcam and ESP32 OV2640 camera image capture; TensorFlow.js CNN training completing a three-class run (~30 images per class, 20 epochs) in approximately 1 minute browser-side versus 9 minutes on-device, enabling a complete collect-train-deploy cycle in under 10 minutes; weight export as myWeights.bin and myWeights.h; confusion matrix; and a live Conv2 activation heatmap streamed from the ESP32 during inference. No data leaves the local machine at any stage. A five-run consistency evaluation on the three-class reference problem (0Blank, 1Cup, 2Pen) demonstrates stable convergence with mean accuracy and standard deviation reported; all artefacts are released at the repository link below. The repository is a living template for LLM-assisted adaptation to new hardware and tasks. All source code is MIT-licensed at https://github.com/webmcu-ai/webmcu-vision-web.

analysis.tldr: 一个零安装的浏览器端TinyML视觉模型训练工具，可在10分钟内完成从数据采集到部署的完整流程。
analysis.research_motivation: 微控制器上的TinyML视觉模型训练通常需要复杂的软件安装和硬件调试，且训练速度慢，限制了其在教育、小企业和研究场景中的普及。
analysis.problem: 如何提供一个无需安装、完全本地化且高效的浏览器端TinyML视觉模型训练与部署方案。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于TensorFlow.js在浏览器中实现CNN训练，通过esptool-js进行固件烧录，并利用WebSerial与ESP32通信，实现从图像采集、训练到权重导出和激活热图可视化的完整流水线。
contributions: 提出一个单文件、零安装的浏览器应用，支持TinyML视觉模型从数据采集到部署的端到端流程。
实现浏览器端训练速度比设备端快约9倍（1分钟 vs 9分钟），完整周期在10分钟内完成。
开源MIT许可的代码库，可作为LLM辅助适配新硬件和任务的模板。
analysis.experiments: 在三个类别的参考问题（0Blank, 1Cup, 2Pen）上进行五次一致性评估，报告了平均准确率和标准差。
limitations: 仅支持Chromium浏览器，限制了跨平台兼容性。
训练规模较小（每类约30张图像），可能不适用于复杂任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 一个零安装的浏览器端TinyML视觉模型训练工具，可在10分钟内完成从数据采集到部署的完整流程。

papers.title: From Craft to Kernel: A Governance-First Execution Architecture and Semantic ISA for Agentic Computers
papers.abstract: The transition of agentic AI from brittle prototypes to production systems is stalled by a pervasive crisis of craft. We suggest that the prevailing orchestration paradigm-delegating the system control loop to large language models and merely patching with heuristic guardrails-is the root cause of this fragility. Instead, we propose Arbiter-K, a Governance-First execution architecture that reconceptualizes the underlying model as a Probabilistic Processing Unit encapsulated by a deterministic, neuro-symbolic kernel. Arbiter-K implements a Semantic Instruction Set Architecture (ISA) to reify probabilistic messages into discrete instructions. This allows the kernel to maintain a Security Context Registry and construct an Instruction Dependency Graph at runtime, enabling active taint propagation based on the data-flow pedigree of each reasoning node. By leveraging this mechanism, Arbiter-K precisely interdicts unsafe trajectories at deterministic sinks (e.g., high-risk tool calls or unauthorized network egress) and enables autonomous execution correction and architectural rollback when security policies are triggered. Evaluations on OpenClaw and NanoBot demonstrate that Arbiter-K enforces security as a microarchitectural property, achieving 76% to 95% unsafe interception for a 92.79% absolute gain over native policies. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/cure-lab/ArbiterOS.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种治理优先的执行架构 Arbiter-K，通过确定性神经符号内核封装概率模型，实现智能体系统的安全执行。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前智能体AI从原型到生产系统的过渡因脆弱的“手工艺”式开发而停滞，现有编排范式将系统控制循环委托给大语言模型并仅用启发式护栏修补，导致根本性脆弱性。
analysis.problem: 解决智能体系统中概率模型（如LLM）导致的不安全轨迹和不可靠执行问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前编排范式是脆弱的根源，但未提供具体失败模式分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Arbiter-K 架构，将底层模型视为概率处理单元，由确定性神经符号内核封装；实现语义指令集架构将概率消息转化为离散指令，内核维护安全上下文注册表和指令依赖图，基于数据流谱系进行主动污点传播，在确定性汇点拦截不安全轨迹并支持执行修正和架构回滚。
contributions: 提出治理优先的执行架构 Arbiter-K，将安全作为微架构属性强制执行。
设计语义指令集架构和指令依赖图机制，实现基于数据流谱系的主动污点传播。
在 OpenClaw 和 NanoBot 基准上验证，不安全拦截率达76%-95%，相比原生策略绝对提升92.79%。
analysis.experiments: 在 OpenClaw 和 NanoBot 基准上评估，Arbiter-K 实现76%至95%的不安全拦截，相比原生策略绝对提升92.79%。摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的智能体任务，泛化性未充分讨论。
性能开销和扩展性未在摘要中提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种治理优先的执行架构 Arbiter-K，通过确定性神经符号内核封装概率模型，实现智能体系统的安全执行。

papers.title: A novel LSTM music generator based on the fractional time-frequency feature extraction
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel approach for generating music based on an artificial intelligence (AI) system. We analyze the features of music and use them to fit and predict the music. The fractional Fourier transform (FrFT) and the long short-term memory (LSTM) network are the foundations of our method. The FrFT method is used to extract the spectral features of a music piece, where the music signal is expressed on the time and frequency domains. The LSTM network is used to generate new music based on the extracted features, where we predict the music according to the hidden layer features and real-time inputs using GiantMIDI-Piano dataset. The results of our experiments show that our proposed system is capable of generating high-quality music that is comparable to human-generated music.

analysis.tldr: 结合分数阶傅里叶变换和LSTM的音乐生成方法
analysis.research_motivation: 传统音乐生成方法难以同时捕捉时频域特征，导致生成音乐质量有限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用时频域特征提升AI音乐生成的质量和自然度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用分数阶傅里叶变换（FrFT）提取音乐信号的时频域特征，再通过LSTM网络基于这些特征生成新音乐。
contributions: 提出FrFT与LSTM结合的音乐生成框架
在GiantMIDI-Piano数据集上验证了生成音乐的高质量
analysis.experiments: 在GiantMIDI-Piano数据集上进行实验，生成音乐与人类创作音乐可比，但未提供具体量化指标。
limitations: 未提供与其他方法的定量对比
可能仅适用于钢琴音乐，泛化性未知
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 结合分数阶傅里叶变换和LSTM的音乐生成方法

papers.title: GR4CIL: Gap-compensated Routing for CLIP-based Class Incremental Learning
papers.abstract: Class-Incremental Learning (CIL) aims to continuously acquire new categories while preserving previously learned knowledge. Recently, Contrastive Language-Image Pre-trained (CLIP) models have shown strong potential for CIL due to their powerful generalization ability. However, existing methods still face two key challenges: shared-parameter adaptation tends to cause old-knowledge drift, and task-specific knowledge organization often leads to poorly calibrated cross-task responses, making reliable routing difficult. To address these issues, we propose GR4CIL, a framework combining task discrimination and knowledge routing for CLIP-based CIL. GR4CIL preserves task-specific visual knowledge while maintaining an incrementally stable shared textual semantic space, thereby reducing interference across tasks. Moreover, we introduce an orthogonal compensation mechanism to mitigate modality-gap-induced bias, enhance within-task discrimination, and enlarge the score margin between the ground-truth task and competing tasks. As a result, GR4CIL enables more reliable task-aware routing over learned knowledge while retaining the zero-shot generalization capability. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that GR4CIL consistently outperforms strong baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出GR4CIL框架，通过正交补偿机制缓解CLIP模型在类增量学习中的模态间隙偏差，实现更可靠的任务路由。
analysis.research_motivation: 类增量学习（CIL）需持续学习新类别并保留旧知识，CLIP模型虽有强泛化能力，但现有方法面临共享参数适应导致旧知识漂移和任务特定知识组织导致跨任务响应校准差的问题。
analysis.problem: CLIP-based CIL中共享参数适应导致旧知识漂移，以及任务特定知识组织导致跨任务响应校准差，使得可靠路由困难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出共享参数适应易导致旧知识漂移，任务特定知识组织导致跨任务响应校准差，模态间隙引入偏差。
analysis.method: 提出GR4CIL框架，包含任务判别和知识路由，保留任务特定视觉知识同时维护增量稳定的共享文本语义空间，并引入正交补偿机制缓解模态间隙偏差，增强任务内判别并扩大真实任务与竞争任务之间的分数间隔。
contributions: 提出GR4CIL框架，结合任务判别和知识路由解决CLIP-based CIL中的知识漂移和跨任务响应校准问题。
引入正交补偿机制缓解模态间隙偏差，提升任务路由可靠性并保留零样本泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上实验，GR4CIL持续优于强基线。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖CLIP模型的预训练质量，对CLIP变体敏感。
正交补偿机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GR4CIL框架，通过正交补偿机制缓解CLIP模型在类增量学习中的模态间隙偏差，实现更可靠的任务路由。

papers.title: WebUncertainty: Dual-Level Uncertainty Driven Planning and Reasoning For Autonomous Web Agent
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) have empowered autonomous web agents to execute natural language instructions directly on real-world webpages. However, existing agents often struggle with complex tasks involving dynamic interactions and long-horizon execution due to rigid planning strategies and hallucination-prone reasoning. To address these limitations, we propose WebUncertainty, a novel autonomous agent framework designed to tackle dual-level uncertainty in planning and reasoning. Specifically, we design a Task Uncertainty-Driven Adaptive Planning Mechanism that adaptively selects planning modes to navigate unknown environments. Furthermore, we introduce an Action Uncertainty-Driven Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS) Reasoning Mechanism. This mechanism incorporates the Confidence-induced Action Uncertainty (ConActU) strategy to quantify both aleatoric uncertainty (AU) and epistemic uncertainty (EU), thereby optimizing the search process and guiding robust decision-making. Experimental results on the WebArena and WebVoyager benchmarks demonstrate that WebUncertainty achieves superior performance compared to state-of-the-art baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出双层级不确定性驱动的规划与推理框架，提升自主Web代理在复杂动态任务中的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM驱动的Web代理在复杂动态交互和长周期执行中因刚性规划和易幻觉推理而表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何通过量化规划与推理中的不确定性来增强自主Web代理的鲁棒性和适应性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出WebUncertainty框架，包含任务不确定性驱动的自适应规划机制和动作不确定性驱动的MCTS推理机制，其中ConActU策略量化偶然不确定性和认知不确定性以优化搜索。
contributions: 提出双层级不确定性驱动的规划与推理框架WebUncertainty。
设计任务不确定性驱动的自适应规划机制和动作不确定性驱动的MCTS推理机制。
在WebArena和WebVoyager基准上取得优于现有方法的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在WebArena和WebVoyager基准上评估，与最先进基线对比，WebUncertainty取得更优性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的不确定性估计，在噪声环境中可能不稳定。
MCTS推理机制的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双层级不确定性驱动的规划与推理框架，提升自主Web代理在复杂动态任务中的表现。

papers.title: PDDL-Mind: Large Language Models are Capable on Belief Reasoning with Reliable State Tracking
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) perform substantially below human level on existing theory-of-mind (ToM) benchmarks, even when augmented with chain-of-thought prompting or probabilistic belief updates. We argue that these failures primarily arise from unreliable implicit state tracking rather than limitations in high-level reasoning. We introduce PDDL-Mind, a neuro-symbolic framework that decouples environment state evolution from belief inference. By translating narrative descriptions into explicit states and actions expressed in Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL), and by verifying action-induced state transitions against a predefined domain, PDDL-Mind provides LLMs with a logically consistent and explicit representation of world states for ToM tasks.
