Experiments on MMToM-QA, MuMA and FanToM show that PDDL-Mind achieves over 5% absolute accuracy gain over the best existing state-of-the-art method on ToM benchmark questions.

analysis.tldr: PDDL-Mind通过将叙事转化为PDDL状态与动作，将环境状态演化与信念推理解耦，显著提升了LLM在心理理论任务上的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在心理理论（ToM）基准上表现远低于人类水平，即使使用思维链提示或概率信念更新也无法弥补，主要瓶颈在于不可靠的隐式状态追踪而非高层推理能力。
analysis.problem: LLM在ToM任务中因隐式状态追踪不可靠而导致信念推理失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LLM在ToM基准上的失败主要源于不可靠的隐式状态追踪，而非高层推理能力的限制。
analysis.method: 提出PDDL-Mind神经符号框架，将叙事描述翻译为PDDL中的显式状态和动作，通过验证动作引发的状态转换，为LLM提供逻辑一致的世界状态表示，从而解耦环境状态演化与信念推理。
contributions: 揭示了LLM在ToM任务中失败的主要原因是隐式状态追踪不可靠，而非推理能力不足。
提出了PDDL-Mind框架，通过显式状态追踪和符号推理显著提升LLM在ToM基准上的准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在MMToM-QA、MuMA和FanToM三个基准上，PDDL-Mind相比现有最佳方法取得了超过5%的绝对准确率提升。
limitations: 依赖PDDL领域定义，可能难以覆盖所有复杂叙事场景。
未在更大规模或更开放的ToM任务上验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PDDL-Mind通过将叙事转化为PDDL状态与动作，将环境状态演化与信念推理解耦，显著提升了LLM在心理理论任务上的表现。

papers.title: AnyLift: Scaling Motion Reconstruction from Internet Videos via 2D Diffusion
papers.abstract: Reconstructing 3D human motion and human-object interactions (HOI) from Internet videos is a fundamental step toward building large-scale datasets of human behavior. Existing methods struggle to recover globally consistent 3D motion under dynamic cameras, especially for motion types underrepresented in current motion-capture datasets, and face additional difficulty recovering coherent human-object interactions in 3D. We introduce a two-stage framework leveraging 2D diffusion that reconstructs 3D human motion and HOI from Internet videos. In the first stage, we synthesize multi-view 2D motion data for each domain, leveraging 2D keypoints extracted from Internet videos to incorporate human motions that rarely appear in existing MoCap datasets. In the second stage, a camera-conditioned multi-view 2D motion diffusion model is trained on the domain-specific synthetic data to recover 3D human motion and 3D HOI in the world space. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on Internet videos featuring challenging motions such as gymnastics, as well as in-the-wild HOI videos, and show that it outperforms prior work in producing realistic human motion and human-object interaction.

analysis.tldr: AnyLift利用2D扩散模型从互联网视频中重建3D人体运动和人物交互，通过多视图合成数据训练，优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 从互联网视频重建3D人体运动和人物交互是构建大规模人类行为数据集的基础，但现有方法在动态相机下难以恢复全局一致的3D运动，尤其对运动捕捉数据集中少见的运动类型表现不佳，且恢复3D人物交互存在困难。
analysis.problem: 如何从互联网视频中鲁棒地重建全局一致的3D人体运动和人物交互，特别是处理动态相机和罕见运动类型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在动态相机下恢复3D运动时缺乏全局一致性，对运动捕捉数据集中未充分覆盖的运动类型（如体操）效果差，且人物交互的3D重建不连贯。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段利用互联网视频提取的2D关键点合成多视图2D运动数据，涵盖罕见运动；第二阶段训练相机条件多视图2D运动扩散模型，从合成数据恢复3D人体运动和3D人物交互。
contributions: 提出两阶段框架，利用2D扩散模型从互联网视频重建3D人体运动和人物交互。
通过合成多视图2D运动数据，有效处理动态相机和罕见运动类型。
在体操和野外人物交互视频上验证，优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在互联网视频（含体操等挑战性运动）和野外人物交互视频上评估，显示方法在生成真实人体运动和人物交互方面优于先前工作。
limitations: 可能依赖2D关键点提取质量，对遮挡或低质量视频鲁棒性未知。
合成数据与真实场景的域差异可能影响泛化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AnyLift利用2D扩散模型从互联网视频中重建3D人体运动和人物交互，通过多视图合成数据训练，优于现有方法。

papers.title: Do LLMs Need to See Everything? A Benchmark and Study of Failures in LLM-driven Smartphone Automation using Screentext vs. Screenshots
papers.abstract: With the rapid advancement of large language models (LLMs), mobile agents have emerged as promising tools for phone automation, simulating human interactions on screens to accomplish complex tasks. However, these agents often suffer from low accuracy, misinterpretation of user instructions, and failure on challenging tasks, with limited prior work examining why and where they fail. To address this, we introduce DailyDroid, a benchmark of 75 tasks in five scenarios across 25 Android apps, spanning three difficulty levels to mimic everyday smartphone use. We evaluate it using text-only and multimodal (text + screenshot) inputs on GPT-4o and o4-mini across 300 trials, revealing comparable performance with multimodal inputs yielding marginally higher success rates. Through in-depth failure analysis, we compile a handbook of common failures. Our findings reveal critical issues in UI accessibility, input modalities, and LLM/app design, offering implications for future mobile agents, applications, and UI development.

analysis.tldr: 提出DailyDroid基准测试，发现文本与多模态输入在手机自动化任务中表现相当，并系统分析了常见失败模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM驱动的手机自动化代理准确率低、易误解指令，且缺乏对失败原因的深入分析。
analysis.problem: 系统评估和诊断LLM在智能手机自动化任务中的失败原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多模态输入（文本+截图）相比纯文本输入成功率仅略高，两者表现相当；存在UI可访问性、输入模态和LLM/应用设计等关键问题。
analysis.method: 构建DailyDroid基准（75个任务，5个场景，25个Android应用，3个难度级别），使用GPT-4o和o4-mini进行文本与多模态输入对比实验，并进行失败分析。
contributions: 提出DailyDroid基准，覆盖日常智能手机使用的多样化任务。
通过300次试验对比文本与多模态输入性能，发现两者表现接近。
编制常见失败手册，揭示UI可访问性、输入模态和LLM/应用设计中的关键问题。
analysis.experiments: 在300次试验中评估GPT-4o和o4-mini，比较文本与多模态输入的成功率，并进行失败分析。
limitations: 仅使用两个LLM模型，可能不具广泛代表性。
任务数量有限，可能未覆盖所有失败模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DailyDroid基准测试，发现文本与多模态输入在手机自动化任务中表现相当，并系统分析了常见失败模式。

papers.title: Understanding Secret Leakage Risks in Code LLMs: A Tokenization Perspective
papers.abstract: Code secrets are sensitive assets for software developers, and their leakage poses significant cybersecurity risks. While the rapid development of AI code assistants powered by Code Large Language Models (CLLMs), CLLMs are shown to inadvertently leak such secrets due to a notorious memorization phenomenon. This study first reveals that Byte-Pair Encoding (BPE) tokenization leads to unexpected behavior of secret memorization, which we term as \textit{gibberish bias}. Specifically, we identified that some secrets are among the easiest for CLLMs to memorize. These secrets yield high character-level entropy, but low token-level entropy. Then, this paper supports the biased claim with numerical data. We identified that the roots of the bias are the token distribution shift between the CLLM training data and the secret data. We further discuss how gibberish bias manifests under the ``larger vocabulary'' trend. To conclude the paper, we discuss potential mitigation strategies and the broader implications on current tokenizer design.

analysis.tldr: 发现BPE分词导致代码LLM对秘密（高字符熵但低token熵）产生异常记忆偏差（gibberish bias），并分析其根源与影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 代码LLM可能无意中泄露代码中的秘密（如API密钥），带来严重安全风险；现有研究关注记忆化现象，但未从分词角度理解秘密为何容易被记忆。
analysis.problem: 揭示BPE分词如何导致代码LLM对特定秘密（高字符熵、低token熵）产生异常记忆偏差（gibberish bias），并分析其成因与影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现BPE分词导致秘密记忆的异常行为：秘密具有高字符熵但低token熵，使得它们成为CLLM最容易记忆的样本之一；根源是训练数据与秘密数据之间的token分布偏移。
analysis.method: 通过分析BPE分词特性，定义gibberish bias，并用数值数据支持偏差存在；讨论更大词汇量趋势下偏差的表现，以及潜在缓解策略。
contributions: 首次从分词视角揭示代码LLM中秘密记忆的gibberish bias现象
分析偏差根源（token分布偏移）并讨论其对tokenizer设计的启示
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 可能缺乏大规模实证验证
缓解策略仅讨论未深入实验
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现BPE分词导致代码LLM对秘密（高字符熵但低token熵）产生异常记忆偏差（gibberish bias），并分析其根源与影响。

papers.title: Re$^2$MoGen: Open-Vocabulary Motion Generation via LLM Reasoning and Physics-Aware Refinement
papers.abstract: Text-to-motion (T2M) generation aims to control the behavior of a target character via textual descriptions. Leveraging text-motion paired datasets, existing T2M models have achieved impressive performance in generating high-quality motions within the distribution of their training data. However, their performance deteriorates notably when the motion descriptions differ significantly from the training texts. To address this issue, we propose Re$^2$MoGen, a Reasoning and Refinement open-vocabulary Motion Generation framework that leverages enhanced Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning to generate an initial motion planning and then refine its physical plausibility via reinforcement learning (RL) post-training. Specifically, Re$^2$MoGen consists of three stages: We first employ Monte Carlo tree search to enhance the LLM's reasoning ability in generating reasonable keyframes of the motion based on text prompts, specifying only the root and several key joints' positions to ease the reasoning process. Then, we apply a human pose model as a prior to optimize the full-body poses based on the planned keyframes and use the resulting incomplete motion to supervise fine-tuning a pre-trained motion generator via a dynamic temporal matching objective, enabling spatiotemporal completion. Finally, we use post-training with physics-aware reward to refine motion quality to eliminate physical implausibility in LLM-planned motions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework can generate semantically consistent and physically plausible motions and achieve state-of-the-art performance in open-vocabulary motion generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出Re²MoGen框架，结合LLM推理与物理感知强化学习后训练，实现开放词汇文本到运动生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到运动生成模型在训练数据分布内表现良好，但面对与训练文本差异大的运动描述时性能显著下降，缺乏对开放词汇文本的泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何生成语义一致且物理合理的开放词汇文本到运动序列。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三阶段框架：1) 使用蒙特卡洛树搜索增强LLM推理能力，生成合理的关键帧（仅指定根和关键关节位置）；2) 利用人体姿态模型作为先验优化全身姿态，通过动态时间匹配目标微调预训练运动生成器；3) 使用物理感知奖励进行强化学习后训练，消除物理不合理性。
contributions: 提出结合LLM推理与物理感知后训练的开放词汇运动生成框架。
设计蒙特卡洛树搜索增强LLM的关键帧规划能力。
引入动态时间匹配目标实现时空补全。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖LLM推理质量，可能受限于LLM的规划能力。
物理感知后训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Re²MoGen框架，结合LLM推理与物理感知强化学习后训练，实现开放词汇文本到运动生成。

papers.title: Party Autonomy in Determining the Law Applicable to Non-contractual Obligations concerning Cross-Border Data Transfers
papers.abstract: (1)Cross-border data transfers have become a matter of daily occurrence against the backdrop of the development of cloud computing and artificial intelligence. Consequently, where a data leak gives rise to civil liability, the determination of that liability inevitably assumes an international dimension involving foreign elements. (2)As is starkly demonstrated by secret sharing technology in cloud computing, fragments of data may be presumed to be distributed across multiple jurisdictions on a global scale. This renders traditional private international law measures -- predicated on the identification of a physical location -- inadequate for the purposes of determining the applicable law, a difficulty that is particularly acute in relation to non-contractual obligations. (3)Bearing in mind the typical scenario encountered in practice -- in which a Data Subject brings a claim for damages against a SaaS (Software as a Service) provider, which in turn seeks recourse against an IaaS (Infrastructure as a Service) or PaaS (Platform as a Service) provider -- a characteristic feature of such cases is the concurrence of contractual and non-contractual obligations. Taking this feature into account, it is possible to determine the applicable law governing non-contractual obligations through party autonomy -- by aligning it with the law governing the contractual obligation as selected by the parties, an approach that may be termed private ordering. This serves to overcome the difficulties associated with the identification of a physical location and, at the same time, contributes to ensuring the foreseeability of the parties.

analysis.tldr: 本文提出通过当事人意思自治，将非合同义务的准据法与合同义务的准据法对齐，以解决跨境数据转移中非合同义务的法律适用难题。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨境数据转移日益频繁，数据泄露引发的民事责任常涉及多个法域，传统国际私法依赖物理位置确定准据法的方法在云计算等场景下失效，尤其对非合同义务的适用存在困难。
analysis.problem: 如何确定跨境数据转移中非合同义务的准据法，以克服物理位置识别困难并增强法律可预见性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，云计算中的秘密共享技术导致数据碎片可能分布在全球多个司法管辖区，使得基于物理位置的准据法确定方法不适用；实践中常见数据主体向SaaS提供商索赔，后者再向IaaS或PaaS提供商追偿，此类案件呈现合同与非合同义务并存的特征。
analysis.method: 通过当事人意思自治（private ordering），将非合同义务的准据法与合同义务的准据法对齐，即由当事人选择的合同准据法同时管辖非合同义务。
contributions: 提出利用当事人意思自治解决跨境数据转移中非合同义务的法律适用问题
通过将非合同义务准据法与合同准据法对齐，克服物理位置识别困难并增强法律可预见性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能不适用于当事人未选择合同准据法或合同无效的情形
可能面临不同法域对意思自治原则接受程度的差异
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文提出通过当事人意思自治，将非合同义务的准据法与合同义务的准据法对齐，以解决跨境数据转移中非合同义务的法律适用难题。

papers.title: Ranking Abuse via Strategic Pairwise Data Perturbations
papers.abstract: Pairwise ranking systems based on Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE), such as the Bradley-Terry model, are widely used to aggregate preferences from pairwise comparisons. However, their robustness under strategic data manipulation remains insufficiently understood. In this paper, we study the vulnerability of MLE-based ranking systems to adversarial perturbations. We formulate the manipulation task as a constrained combinatorial optimization problem and propose an Adaptive Subset Selection Attack (ASSA) to efficiently identify high-impact perturbations. Experimental results on both synthetic data and real-world election datasets show that MLE-based rankings exhibit a sharp phase-transition behavior: beyond a small perturbation budget, a limited number of strategic voters can significantly alter the global ranking. In particular, our method consistently outperforms random and greedy baselines under constrained budgets. These findings reveal a fundamental sensitivity of MLE-based ranking mechanisms to structured perturbations and highlight the need for more robust aggregation methods in collective decision-making systems.

analysis.tldr: 基于MLE的成对排序系统对结构化数据扰动高度敏感，少量扰动即可显著改变全局排序。
analysis.research_motivation: 成对排序系统（如Bradley-Terry模型）广泛应用于偏好聚合，但其在恶意数据操纵下的鲁棒性尚未被充分研究，存在安全风险。
analysis.problem: 研究基于MLE的排序系统在对抗性扰动下的脆弱性，并设计高效攻击方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MLE排序存在尖锐的相变行为：超过小扰动预算后，有限数量的策略性投票者即可显著改变全局排序。
analysis.method: 将操纵任务建模为约束组合优化问题，提出自适应子集选择攻击（ASSA）以高效识别高影响力扰动。
contributions: 首次系统研究MLE排序系统在对抗性扰动下的脆弱性，并揭示其相变行为。
提出自适应子集选择攻击（ASSA），在约束预算下优于随机和贪婪基线。
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据和真实选举数据集上验证，ASSA方法在受限预算下持续优于随机和贪婪基线。
limitations: 仅针对MLE-based排序，未涉及其他排序模型。
攻击假设攻击者能控制部分投票者，实际场景中可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于MLE的成对排序系统对结构化数据扰动高度敏感，少量扰动即可显著改变全局排序。

papers.title: Adversarial Arena: Crowdsourcing Data Generation through Interactive Competition
papers.abstract: Post-training Large Language Models requires diverse, high-quality data which is rare and costly to obtain, especially in low resource domains and for multi-turn conversations. Common solutions are crowdsourcing or synthetic generation, but both often yield low-quality or low-diversity data. We introduce Adversarial Arena for building high quality conversational datasets by framing data generation as an adversarial task: attackers create prompts, and defenders generate responses. This interactive competition between multiple teams naturally produces diverse and complex data. We validated this approach by conducting a competition with 10 academic teams from top US and European universities, each building attacker or defender bots. The competition, focused on safety alignment of LLMs in cybersecurity, generated 19,683 multi-turn conversations. Fine-tuning an open-source model on this dataset produced an 18.47% improvement in secure code generation on CyberSecEval-Instruct and 29.42% improvement on CyberSecEval-MITRE.

analysis.tldr: 通过对抗性竞赛众包生成高质量多轮对话数据，显著提升LLM安全对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 高质量、多样化的对话数据稀缺且昂贵，尤其在低资源领域和多轮对话中，现有众包和合成方法常产生低质量或低多样性数据。
analysis.problem: 如何高效生成高质量、多样化的多轮对话数据集以支持LLM后训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对抗性竞赛中多团队交互自然产生多样且复杂的数据，避免了传统方法的低质量或低多样性问题。
analysis.method: 提出Adversarial Arena框架，将数据生成建模为对抗任务：攻击者创建提示，防御者生成响应，多团队交互竞赛生成数据集。
contributions: 提出Adversarial Arena，一种通过对抗性竞赛众包生成高质量对话数据的新方法。
在网络安全领域组织10个学术团队竞赛，生成19,683条多轮对话，微调模型在安全代码生成任务上提升18.47%和29.42%。
analysis.experiments: 在网络安全领域组织竞赛，生成数据集并微调开源模型，在CyberSecEval-Instruct和CyberSecEval-MITRE上评估，分别提升18.47%和29.42%。
limitations: 竞赛组织成本较高，需要多个团队参与。
方法有效性可能依赖于领域和任务设置。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过对抗性竞赛众包生成高质量多轮对话数据，显著提升LLM安全对齐。

papers.title: Optimally Bridging Semantics and Data: Generative Semantic Communication via Schrödinger Bridge
papers.abstract: Generative Semantic Communication (GSC) is a promising solution for image transmission over narrow-band and high-noise channels. However, existing GSC methods rely on long, indirect transport trajectories from a Gaussian to an image distribution guided by semantics, causing severe hallucination and high computational cost. To address this, we propose a general framework named Schrödinger Bridge-based GSC (SBGSC). By leveraging the Schrödinger Bridge (SB) to construct optimal transport trajectories between arbitrary distributions, SBGSC breaks Gaussian limitations and enables direct generative decoding from semantics to images. Within this framework, we design Diffusion SB-based GSC (DSBGSC). DSBGSC reconstructs the nonlinear drift term of diffusion models using Schrödinger potentials, achieving direct optimal distribution transport to reduce hallucinations and computational overhead. To further accelerate generation, we propose a self-consistency-based objective guiding the model to learn a nonlinear velocity field pointing directly toward the image, bypassing Markovian noise prediction to significantly reduce sampling steps. Simulation results demonstrate that DSBGSC outperforms state-of-the-art GSC methods, improving FID by at least 38% and SSIM by 49.3%, while accelerating inference speed by over 8 times.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于薛定谔桥的生成式语义通信框架，实现从语义到图像的直接最优传输，显著减少幻觉和计算开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成式语义通信方法依赖从高斯分布到图像的长间接传输轨迹，导致严重幻觉和高计算成本，亟需更高效的直接传输方案。
analysis.problem: 如何构建从语义到图像的最优直接传输路径，以降低生成式语义通信中的幻觉和计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有GSC方法因使用高斯到图像的长间接轨迹而产生严重幻觉和高计算成本。
analysis.method: 提出SBGSC框架，利用薛定谔桥构建任意分布间的最优传输轨迹；具体实现DSBGSC，通过薛定谔势重建扩散模型的非线性漂移项实现直接分布传输，并引入自一致性目标学习指向图像的非线性速度场以加速采样。
contributions: 提出SBGSC通用框架，突破高斯分布限制，实现语义到图像的直接最优传输。
设计DSBGSC方法，通过薛定谔势和自一致性目标显著减少幻觉、计算开销和采样步数。
analysis.experiments: 仿真结果表明DSBGSC在FID上提升至少38%，SSIM提升49.3%，推理速度提升超过8倍。
limitations: 可能对复杂语义场景的泛化性有待验证。
自一致性目标的训练稳定性可能需要进一步分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于薛定谔桥的生成式语义通信框架，实现从语义到图像的直接最优传输，显著减少幻觉和计算开销。

papers.title: View-Consistent 3D Scene Editing via Dual-Path Structural Correspondense and Semantic Continuity
papers.abstract: Text-driven 3D scene editing has recently attracted increasing attention. Most existing methods follow a render-edit-optimize pipeline, where multi-view images are rendered from a 3D scene, edited with 2D image editors, and then used to optimize the underlying 3D representation. However, cross-view inconsistency remains a major bottleneck. Although recent methods introduce geometric cues, cross-view interactions, or video priors to mitigate this issue, they still largely rely on inference-time synchronization and thus remain limited in robustness and generalization.In this work, we recast multi-view consistent 3D editing from a distributional perspective: 3D scene editing essentially requires a joint distribution modeling across viewpoints.Based on this insight, we propose a view-consistent 3D editing framework that explicitly introduces cross-view dependencies into the editing process. Furthermore, motivated by the observation that structural correspondence and semantic continuity rely on different cross-view cues, we introduce a dual-path consistency mechanism consisting of projection-guided structural guidance and patch-level semantic propagation for effective cross-view editing. Further, we construct a paired multi-view editing dataset that provides reliable supervision for learning cross-view consistency in edited scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior editing performance with precise and consistent views for complex scenes.

analysis.tldr: 提出双路径结构对应与语义连续性机制，从分布视角实现视图一致的3D场景编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本驱动的3D场景编辑方法存在跨视图不一致问题，依赖推理时同步，鲁棒性和泛化性有限。
analysis.problem: 如何实现多视图一致的3D场景编辑，克服现有方法在跨视图一致性上的瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出结构对应和语义连续性依赖不同的跨视图线索，现有方法未能有效分离处理。
analysis.method: 提出双路径一致性机制：投影引导的结构引导和补丁级语义传播，并构建配对多视图编辑数据集。
contributions: 从分布视角重新定义多视图一致3D编辑，显式引入跨视图依赖。
提出双路径一致性机制，分别处理结构对应和语义连续性。
构建配对多视图编辑数据集，为学习跨视图一致性提供监督。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量配对数据集，数据构建成本高。
双路径机制可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双路径结构对应与语义连续性机制，从分布视角实现视图一致的3D场景编辑。

papers.title: ReFineVLA: Multimodal Reasoning-Aware Generalist Robotic Policies via Teacher-Guided Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have gained much attention from the research community thanks to their strength in translating multimodal observations with linguistic instructions into desired robotic actions. Despite their advancements, VLAs often overlook explicit reasoning and learn the functional input-action mappings, omitting crucial logical steps, which are especially pronounced in interpretability and generalization for complex, long-horizon manipulation tasks. In this work, we propose ReFineVLA, a multimodal reasoning-aware framework that fine-tunes VLAs with teacher-guided reasons. We first augment robotic datasets with reasoning rationales generated by an expert teacher model, guiding VLA models to learn to reason about their actions. Then, we fine-tune pre-trained VLAs with the reasoning-enriched datasets with ReFineVLA, while maintaining the underlying generalization abilities and boosting reasoning capabilities. We also conduct attention map visualization to analyze the alignment among visual observation, linguistic prompts, and to-be-executed actions of ReFineVLA, reflecting the model is ability to focus on relevant tasks and actions. Through this additional step, we explore that ReFineVLA-trained models exhibit a meaningful agreement between vision-language and action domains, highlighting the enhanced multimodal understanding and generalization. Evaluated across a suite of simulated manipulation benchmarks on SimplerEnv with both WidowX and Google Robot tasks, ReFineVLA achieves state-of-the-art performance, in success rate over the second-best method on the both the WidowX benchmark and Google Robot Tasks.

analysis.tldr: ReFineVLA通过教师引导的推理增强微调，提升了VLA模型在复杂操作任务中的推理能力和泛化性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型常忽略显式推理，仅学习输入-动作映射，导致在复杂长程操作任务中可解释性和泛化能力不足。
analysis.problem: 如何让VLA模型在保持泛化能力的同时，学习显式的推理步骤以提升复杂操作任务的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用专家教师模型生成推理理由，增强机器人数据集；然后通过ReFineVLA框架微调预训练VLA模型，使其学习推理并保持泛化能力。
contributions: 提出ReFineVLA框架，通过教师引导的推理增强微调VLA模型。
在SimplerEnv的WidowX和Google Robot任务上达到SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在SimplerEnv的WidowX和Google Robot任务上评估，ReFineVLA在成功率上超过第二名方法。
limitations: 依赖专家教师模型生成推理理由，可能引入偏见。
仅在模拟环境评估，未在真实机器人上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ReFineVLA通过教师引导的推理增强微调，提升了VLA模型在复杂操作任务中的推理能力和泛化性能。

papers.title: Weakly-Supervised Referring Video Object Segmentation through Text Supervision
papers.abstract: Referring video object segmentation (RVOS) aims to segment the target instance in a video, referred by a text expression. Conventional approaches are mostly supervised learning, requiring expensive pixel-level mask annotations. To tackle it, weakly-supervised RVOS has recently been proposed to replace mask annotations with bounding boxes or points, which are however still costly and labor-intensive. In this paper, we design a novel weakly-supervised RVOS method, namely WSRVOS, to train the model with only text expressions. Given an input video and the referring expression, we first design a contrastive referring expression augmentation scheme that leverages the captioning capabilities of a multimodal large language model to generate both positive and negative expressions. We extract visual and linguistic features from the input video and generated expressions, then perform bi-directional vision-language feature selection and interaction to enable fine-grained multimodal alignment. Next, we propose an instance-aware expression classification scheme to optimize the model in distinguishing positive from negative expressions. Also, we introduce a positive-prediction fusion strategy to generate high-quality pseudo-masks, which serve as additional supervision to the model. Last, we design a temporal segment ranking constraint such that the overlaps between mask predictions of temporally neighboring frames are required to conform to specific orders. Extensive experiments on four publicly available RVOS datasets, including A2D Sentences, J-HMDB Sentences, Ref-YouTube-VOS, and Ref-DAVIS17, demonstrate the superiority of our method. Code is available at https://github.com/viscom-tongji/WSRVOS.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种仅需文本标注的弱监督视频目标分割方法，通过多模态大模型生成对比表达式和伪掩码实现训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有弱监督RVOS仍需边界框或点标注，成本高且费力；完全无像素级标注的弱监督方法尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 仅利用文本表达式作为监督信号，实现视频中参照目标的分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计对比式表达式增强（利用多模态大模型生成正负表达式）、双向视觉-语言特征选择与交互、实例感知表达式分类、正预测融合生成伪掩码、时序片段排序约束。
contributions: 提出首个仅需文本标注的弱监督RVOS方法WSRVOS。
设计对比式表达式增强和实例感知分类方案，实现细粒度多模态对齐。
引入正预测融合策略和时序片段排序约束，生成高质量伪掩码并提升时序一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在A2D Sentences、J-HMDB Sentences、Ref-YouTube-VOS、Ref-DAVIS17四个数据集上实验，表明方法优越性。
limitations: 依赖多模态大模型生成表达式，可能引入噪声。
伪掩码质量可能影响最终分割精度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种仅需文本标注的弱监督视频目标分割方法，通过多模态大模型生成对比表达式和伪掩码实现训练。

papers.title: Bridging the Reasoning Gap in Vietnamese with Small Language Models via Test-Time Scaling
papers.abstract: The democratization of ubiquitous AI hinges on deploying sophisticated reasoning capabilities on resource-constrained devices. However, Small Language Models (SLMs) often face a "reasoning gap", particularly in non-English languages like Vietnamese, where they struggle to maintain coherent chains of thought. This paper investigates Test-Time Scaling strategies for the Qwen3-1.7B architecture within the context of Vietnamese Elementary Mathematics. We introduce Vi-S1K, a high-fidelity reasoning dataset localized via a Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite powered pipeline, and Vi-Elementary-Bench, a dual-resource benchmark for rigorous evaluation. Using an LLM-as-a-Judge protocol, we reveal that the base model possesses robust latent knowledge (Accuracy: 4.05/5.00) but suffers from a severe "formatting gap" in communication. Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) acts as a critical "reasoning unlocker", yielding a 77% improvement in Explanation Quality and bridging the gap between raw calculation and pedagogical coherence. Furthermore, our analysis of prompting strategies uncovers a significant trade-off: structured frameworks like ReAct impose a "cognitive tax" on the 1.7B parameter capacity, degrading performance relative to pure Chain-of-Thought (CoT) combined with Self-Consistency. These findings establish a deployment hierarchy for SLMs, demonstrating that SFT combined with simplified test-time scaling is superior to complex agentic workflows for edge-based reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 针对越南语小语言模型的推理差距，通过测试时缩放策略和微调实现显著提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 在资源受限设备上部署AI需要强大的推理能力，但小语言模型（SLM）在非英语语言（如越南语）中存在推理差距，难以维持连贯的思维链。
analysis.problem: 解决小语言模型在越南语数学推理中的推理差距，特别是格式化和连贯性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基础模型具有潜在知识（准确率4.05/5.00），但存在严重的“格式化差距”；监督微调（SFT）作为“推理解锁器”使解释质量提升77%；ReAct等结构化框架对1.7B参数模型造成“认知税”，降低性能。
analysis.method: 构建Vi-S1K数据集和Vi-Elementary-Bench基准，采用LLM-as-a-Judge评估，对比SFT、CoT、Self-Consistency和ReAct等策略。
contributions: 提出Vi-S1K高保真推理数据集和Vi-Elementary-Bench双资源基准。
揭示SFT作为推理解锁器，显著提升解释质量。
发现简化测试时缩放（CoT+Self-Consistency）优于复杂智能体工作流。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及准确率4.05/5.00和解释质量提升77%。
limitations: 仅针对越南语小学数学，泛化性未知。
仅使用Qwen3-1.7B架构，其他SLM未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对越南语小语言模型的推理差距，通过测试时缩放策略和微调实现显著提升。

papers.title: DuQuant++: Fine-grained Rotation Enhances Microscaling FP4 Quantization
papers.abstract: The MXFP4 microscaling format, which partitions tensors into blocks of 32 elements sharing an E8M0 scaling factor, has emerged as a promising substrate for efficient LLM inference, backed by native hardware support on NVIDIA Blackwell Tensor Cores. However, activation outliers pose a unique challenge under this format: a single outlier inflates the shared block scale, compressing the effective dynamic range of the remaining elements and causing significant quantization error. Existing rotation-based remedies, including randomized Hadamard and learnable rotations, are data-agnostic and therefore unable to specifically target the channels where outliers concentrate. We propose DuQuant++, which adapts the outlier-aware fine-grained rotation of DuQuant to the MXFP4 format by aligning the rotation block size with the microscaling group size (B{=}32). Because each MXFP4 group possesses an independent scaling factor, the cross-block variance issue that necessitates dual rotations and a zigzag permutation in the original DuQuant becomes irrelevant, enabling DuQuant++ to replace the entire pipeline with a single outlier-aware rotation, which halves the online rotation cost while simultaneously smoothing the weight distribution. Extensive experiments on the LLaMA-3 family under MXFP4 W4A4 quantization show that DuQuant++ consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/Hsu1023/DuQuant-v2.

analysis.tldr: DuQuant++ 通过细粒度旋转对齐 MXFP4 格式，实现高效低比特 LLM 量化。
analysis.research_motivation: MXFP4 格式在 LLM 推理中具有硬件支持，但激活异常值会膨胀共享缩放因子，导致量化误差；现有旋转方法无法针对性处理异常值集中的通道。
analysis.problem: 在 MXFP4 W4A4 量化下，如何设计数据感知的旋转方法以消除激活异常值对量化精度的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MXFP4 分组共享缩放因子，单个异常值会压缩其他元素的动态范围；原始 DuQuant 的跨块方差问题在 MXFP4 中因独立缩放因子而消失。
analysis.method: 将 DuQuant 的异常值感知细粒度旋转与 MXFP4 格式对齐，旋转块大小等于微缩分组大小（B=32），并用单次旋转替代原始的双旋转和锯齿排列。
contributions: 提出 DuQuant++，首个针对 MXFP4 格式的异常值感知旋转量化方法。
通过简化旋转流程，将在线旋转成本减半，同时平滑权重分布。
在 LLaMA-3 系列模型上实现 MXFP4 W4A4 量化的最先进性能。
analysis.experiments: 在 LLaMA-3 系列模型上进行了 MXFP4 W4A4 量化实验，结果表明 DuQuant++ 持续达到最先进性能。
limitations: 仅针对 MXFP4 格式设计，可能不适用于其他量化格式。
未讨论对更大模型或不同任务（如视觉）的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DuQuant++ 通过细粒度旋转对齐 MXFP4 格式，实现高效低比特 LLM 量化。

papers.title: AnchorRefine: Synergy-Manipulation Based on Trajectory Anchor and Residual Refinement for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: Precision-critical manipulation requires both global trajectory organization and local execution correction, yet most vision-language-action (VLA) policies generate actions within a single unified space. This monolithic formulation forces macro-level transport and micro-level refinement to be optimized under the same objective, causing large motions to dominate learning while suppressing small but failure-critical corrective signals. In contrast, human manipulation is structured by global movement planning together with continuous local adjustment during execution. Motivated by this principle, we propose AnchorRefine, a hierarchical framework that factorizes VLA action modeling into trajectory anchor and residual refinement. The anchor planner predicts a coarse motion scaffold, while the refinement module corrects execution-level deviations to improve geometric and contact precision. We further introduce a decision-aware gripper refinement mechanism to better capture the discrete and boundary-sensitive nature of gripper control. Experiments on LIBERO, CALVIN, and real-robot tasks demonstrate that AnchorRefine consistently improves both regression-based and diffusion-based VLA backbones, yielding gains of up to 7.8% in simulation success rate and 18% in real-world success rate.

analysis.tldr: 提出AnchorRefine框架，将VLA动作建模分解为轨迹锚点与残差精化，提升操作精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA策略在统一空间生成动作，导致宏观运动主导学习而抑制微观修正信号，影响精度关键任务表现。
analysis.problem: VLA模型在精密操作中无法同时优化全局轨迹组织与局部执行修正。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 统一动作空间使大运动主导优化，小但关键的修正信号被抑制。
analysis.method: 层次化框架：锚点规划器预测粗运动骨架，精化模块修正执行偏差，并引入决策感知夹爪精化机制。
contributions: 提出AnchorRefine层次框架，分解VLA动作为轨迹锚点与残差精化。
设计决策感知夹爪精化机制，提升离散边界控制精度。
在LIBERO、CALVIN和真实机器人任务上验证，提升模拟成功率7.8%，真实成功率18%。
analysis.experiments: 在LIBERO、CALVIN和真实机器人任务上测试，基于回归和扩散VLA骨干均取得提升。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量轨迹锚点预测。
真实场景泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AnchorRefine框架，将VLA动作建模分解为轨迹锚点与残差精化，提升操作精度。

papers.title: Forget What Matters, Keep the Rest: Selective Unlearning of Informative Tokens
papers.abstract: Unlearning in large language models (LLMs) has emerged as a promising safeguard against adversarial behaviors. When the forgetting loss is applied uniformly without considering token-level semantic importance, model utility can be unnecessarily degraded. Recent studies have explored token-wise loss regularizers that prioritize informative tokens, but largely rely on ground-truth confidence or external linguistic parsers, which limits their ability to capture contextual information or the model's overall predictive state. Intuitively, function words like "the" primarily serve syntactic roles and are highly predictable with little ambiguity, but informative words admit multiple plausible alternatives with greater uncertainty. Based on this intuition, we propose Entropy-guided Token Weighting (ETW), a token-level unlearning regularizer that uses entropy of the predictive distribution as a proxy for token informativeness. We demonstrate that informative tokens tend to have higher entropy, whereas structural tokens tend to have lower entropy. This behavior enables ETW to achieve more effective unlearning while better preserving model utility than existing token-level approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于预测熵的令牌加权方法，在LLM遗忘中优先遗忘信息性令牌，以平衡遗忘效果与模型效用。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM遗忘方法统一应用遗忘损失，未考虑令牌语义重要性，导致模型效用不必要下降；而基于置信度或外部解析器的令牌级正则化方法难以捕捉上下文信息或模型整体预测状态。
analysis.problem: 如何在LLM遗忘中识别并优先遗忘信息性令牌，同时保留结构性令牌以维持模型效用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到信息性令牌的预测熵较高，而结构性令牌（如功能词）的预测熵较低，表明熵可作为令牌信息量的有效代理。
analysis.method: 提出熵引导令牌加权（ETW），利用预测分布的熵作为令牌信息量的代理，在遗忘损失中赋予信息性令牌更高权重。
contributions: 提出基于预测熵的令牌级遗忘正则化方法ETW，无需外部解析器或真实置信度。
实验证明ETW在保持模型效用的同时实现更有效的遗忘，优于现有令牌级方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖模型预测熵的准确性，在低熵场景下区分度有限。
未讨论不同遗忘任务（如知识删除、偏见消除）下的适用性差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于预测熵的令牌加权方法，在LLM遗忘中优先遗忘信息性令牌，以平衡遗忘效果与模型效用。

papers.title: Subject-Aware Multi-Granularity Alignment for Zero-Shot EEG-to-Image Retrieval
papers.abstract: Zero-shot EEG-to-image retrieval aims to decode perceived visual content from electroencephalography (EEG) by aligning neural responses with pretrained visual representations, providing a promising route toward scalable visual neural decoding and practical brain-computer interfaces. However, robust EEG-to-image retrieval remains challenging, because prior methods usually rely on either a single fixed visual target or a subject-invariant target construction scheme. Such designs overlook two important properties of visually evoked EEG signals: they preserve information across multiple representational scales, and the visual granularity best matched to EEG may vary across subjects. To address these issues, subject-aware multi-granularity alignment (SAMGA) framework is proposed for zero-shot EEG-to-image retrieval. SAMGA first constructs a subject-aware visual supervision target by adaptively aggregating multiple intermediate representations from a pretrained vision encoder, allowing the model to absorb subject-dependent granularity deviations during training while preserving subject-agnostic inference. Building on this adaptive target construction, a coarse-to-fine cross-modal alignment strategy is further designed with a shared encoder wherein the coarse stage stabilizes the shared semantic geometry and reduces subject-induced distribution shift, and the fine stage further improves instance-level retrieval discrimination. Extensive experiments on the THINGS-EEG benchmark demonstrate that the proposed method achieves 91.3% Top-1 and 98.8% Top-5 accuracy in the intra-subject setting, and 34.4% Top-1 and 64.8% Top-5 accuracy in the inter-subject setting, outperforming recent state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种主体感知多粒度对齐框架，通过自适应聚合视觉表征实现零样本EEG到图像检索，在THINGS-EEG上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 零样本EEG到图像检索面临挑战：先前方法通常使用单一固定视觉目标或主体不变目标构建方案，忽略了EEG信号的多尺度表征特性以及不同主体匹配的最佳视觉粒度可能不同。
analysis.problem: 如何构建主体感知的多粒度对齐方法，以利用EEG信号的多尺度信息并适应主体间视觉粒度差异，实现鲁棒的零样本EEG到图像检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出视觉诱发的EEG信号在多个表征尺度上保留信息，且最佳匹配的视觉粒度因主体而异。
analysis.method: 提出SAMGA框架：1) 主体感知视觉监督目标构建：自适应聚合预训练视觉编码器的多个中间表征；2) 粗到细跨模态对齐策略：粗阶段稳定共享语义几何并减少主体分布偏移，细阶段提升实例级检索判别力。
contributions: 提出主体感知多粒度对齐框架，首次在零样本EEG到图像检索中考虑主体依赖的视觉粒度偏差。
设计粗到细跨模态对齐策略，同时实现语义稳定和实例判别。
在THINGS-EEG上取得91.3% Top-1和98.8% Top-5（主体内），34.4% Top-1和64.8% Top-5（主体间），超越SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在THINGS-EEG基准上进行了主体内和主体间实验，报告了Top-1和Top-5准确率。
limitations: 仅在一个数据集上验证，泛化性有待进一步检验。
方法依赖预训练视觉编码器，其质量可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种主体感知多粒度对齐框架，通过自适应聚合视觉表征实现零样本EEG到图像检索，在THINGS-EEG上取得SOTA。

papers.title: Position: No Retroactive Cure for Infringement during Training
papers.abstract: As generative AI faces intensifying legal challenges, the machine learning community has increasingly relied on post-hoc mitigation -- especially machine unlearning and inference-time guardrails -- to argue for compliance. This paper argues that such post-hoc mitigation methods cannot retroactively cure liability from unlawful acquisition and training, because compliance hinges on data lineage, not the outputs. Our argument has three parts. First, unauthorized copying/ingestion can be a legally complete completed act, and model weights may operate as fixed copies that retain training-derived expressive value, making later filtering beside the point for infringement. Second, contract and tort/unfair-competition rules -- via licenses, terms of service, and anti-free-riding principles -- can independently restrict access and use, often bypassing copyright defenses (e.g., fair use or TDM exceptions). Third, since value from protected inputs can persist in weights, remedies such as unjust enrichment and disgorgement may require stripping gains and, in some cases, reaching the model itself. We therefore argue for a shift from Post-Hoc Sanitization to verifiable Ex-Ante Process Compliance.

analysis.tldr: 本文论证训练后的补救措施（如机器遗忘）无法消除训练阶段侵权的法律责任，主张转向事前流程合规。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI面临日益严峻的法律挑战，机器学习社区依赖事后缓解措施（如机器遗忘和推理时护栏）来主张合规，但这些方法能否真正消除训练阶段的侵权责任存在根本性疑问。
analysis.problem: 事后缓解措施（如机器遗忘）能否追溯性地治愈训练阶段非法获取和使用数据导致的侵权责任？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但分析了法律逻辑：未经授权的复制/摄取是已完成的法律行为；模型权重可能作为固定副本保留训练衍生的表达价值；合同和侵权规则可独立限制访问和使用；受保护输入的价值可能持续存在于权重中，导致不当得利等救济措施可能要求剥离收益。
analysis.method: 法律论证分析，从版权法、合同法、侵权法及不当得利原则三个层面论证事后缓解的无效性，并提出转向事前流程合规（Ex-Ante Process Compliance）。
contributions: 系统论证了事后缓解措施（如机器遗忘）无法追溯性地消除训练阶段侵权的法律责任。
提出从‘事后净化’转向‘事前流程合规’的规范性建议。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 论证基于美国法律体系，其他司法管辖区的法律可能有所不同。
未提供实证数据或案例支持法律分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文论证训练后的补救措施（如机器遗忘）无法消除训练阶段侵权的法律责任，主张转向事前流程合规。

papers.title: Prompt Optimization Enables Stable Algorithmic Collusion in LLM Agents
papers.abstract: LLM agents in markets present algorithmic collusion risks. While prior work shows LLM agents reach supracompetitive prices through tacit coordination, existing research focuses on hand-crafted prompts. The emerging paradigm of prompt optimization necessitates new methodologies for understanding autonomous agent behavior. We investigate whether prompt optimization leads to emergent collusive behaviors in market simulations. We propose a meta-learning loop where LLM agents participate in duopoly markets and an LLM meta-optimizer iteratively refines shared strategic guidance. Our experiments reveal that meta-prompt optimization enables agents to discover stable tacit collusion strategies with substantially improved coordination quality compared to baseline agents. These behaviors generalize to held-out test markets, indicating discovery of general coordination principles. Analysis of evolved prompts reveals systematic coordination mechanisms through stable shared strategies. Our findings call for further investigation into AI safety implications in autonomous multi-agent systems.

analysis.tldr: 提示优化使LLM智能体在市场中自发形成稳定的算法合谋行为。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM智能体在市场中存在算法合谋风险，现有研究依赖手工提示，而提示优化范式兴起，需要新方法理解自主智能体行为。
analysis.problem: 提示优化是否会导致LLM智能体在模拟市场中涌现合谋行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 元提示优化使智能体发现稳定的默契合谋策略，协调质量显著优于基线，且行为泛化到未见市场，提示中发现了系统性的协调机制。
analysis.method: 提出元学习循环：LLM智能体参与双寡头市场，LLM元优化器迭代优化共享策略提示。
contributions: 首次研究提示优化对LLM智能体合谋行为的影响
发现元提示优化能发现稳定且泛化的合谋策略
analysis.experiments: 在双寡头市场模拟中验证，合谋策略泛化到未见测试市场。
limitations: 仅考虑双寡头市场，更复杂市场结构未验证
未探讨不同优化器或提示初始化对结果的影响
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提示优化使LLM智能体在市场中自发形成稳定的算法合谋行为。

papers.title: Structure-Adaptive Sparse Diffusion in Voxel Space for 3D Medical Image Enhancement
papers.abstract: Three-dimensional (3D) medical image enhancement, including denoising and super-resolution, is critical for clinical diagnosis in CT, PET, and MRI. Although diffusion models have shown remarkable success in 2D medical imaging, scaling them to high-resolution 3D volumes remains computationally prohibitive due to lengthy diffusion trajectories over high-dimensional volumetric data. We observe that in conditional enhancement, strong anatomical priors in the degraded input render dense noise schedules largely redundant. Leveraging this insight, we propose a sparse voxel-space diffusion framework that trains and samples on a compact set of uniformly subsampled timesteps. The network predicts clean data directly on the data manifold, supervised in velocity space for stable gradient scaling. A lightweight Structure-aware Trajectory Modulation (STM) module recalibrates time embeddings at each network block based on local anatomical content, enabling structure-adaptive denoising over the shared sparse schedule. Operating directly in voxel space, our framework preserves fine anatomical detail without lossy compression while achieving up to $10\times$ training acceleration. Experiments on four datasets spanning CT, PET, and MRI demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on both denoising and super-resolution tasks. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/mirthAI/sparse-3d-diffusion.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种稀疏体素空间扩散框架，通过均匀子采样时间步和结构自适应轨迹调制，实现3D医学图像增强的10倍训练加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D医学图像增强（去噪、超分辨率）对临床诊断至关重要，但现有扩散模型扩展到高分辨率3D体积时计算成本极高，因为高维数据上的扩散轨迹过长。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲图像质量的前提下，大幅降低3D扩散模型在体素空间中的训练和采样计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在条件增强任务中，退化输入包含强解剖先验，使得密集噪声调度大部分冗余。
analysis.method: 提出稀疏体素空间扩散框架：在均匀子采样的紧凑时间步集合上训练和采样；网络直接在数据流形上预测干净数据，并在速度空间进行监督以实现稳定梯度缩放；轻量级结构感知轨迹调制（STM）模块根据局部解剖内容重新校准每个网络块的时间嵌入，实现结构自适应去噪。
contributions: 提出稀疏体素空间扩散框架，在均匀子采样时间步上训练和采样，实现高达10倍训练加速。
设计结构感知轨迹调制（STM）模块，实现结构自适应去噪，保留精细解剖细节。
在CT、PET和MRI四个数据集上达到去噪和超分辨率任务的最先进性能。
analysis.experiments: 在四个数据集（CT、PET、MRI）上进行实验，展示了去噪和超分辨率任务的最先进性能。
limitations: 可能对极端噪声或低质量输入效果有限。
稀疏时间步采样可能在某些任务中引入伪影。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种稀疏体素空间扩散框架，通过均匀子采样时间步和结构自适应轨迹调制，实现3D医学图像增强的10倍训练加速。

papers.title: SPENCE: A Syntactic Probe for Detecting Contamination in NL2SQL Benchmarks
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved strong performance on natural language to SQL (NL2SQL) benchmarks, yet their reported accuracy may be inflated by contamination from benchmark queries or structurally similar patterns seen during training. We introduce SPENCE (Syntactic Probing and Evaluation of NL2SQL Contamination Effects), a controlled syntactic probing framework for detecting and quantifying such contamination. SPENCE systematically generates syntactic variants of test queries for four widely used NL2SQL datasets-Spider, SParC, CoSQL, and the newer BIRD benchmark. We use SPENCE to evaluate multiple high-capacity LLMs under execution-based scoring. For each model, we measure changes in execution accuracy across increasing levels of syntactic divergence and quantify rank sensitivity using Kendall's tau with bootstrap confidence intervals. By aligning these robustness trends with benchmark release dates, we observe a clear temporal gradient: older benchmarks such as Spider exhibit the strongest negative values and thus the highest likelihood of training leakage, whereas the more recent BIRD dataset shows minimal sensitivity and appears largely uncontaminated. Together, these findings highlight the importance of temporally contextualized, syntactic-probing evaluation for trustworthy NL2SQL benchmarking.

analysis.tldr: 提出SPENCE框架，通过句法探测检测NL2SQL基准测试中的数据污染，发现旧基准污染严重而新基准较干净。
analysis.research_motivation: LLMs在NL2SQL基准上报告的高准确率可能因训练数据污染而虚高，现有方法难以有效检测和量化这种污染。
analysis.problem: 如何系统检测和量化NL2SQL基准测试中因训练数据泄露导致的性能膨胀。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：旧基准（如Spider）对句法变体敏感度低（Kendall's tau负值强），表明训练泄漏可能性高；新基准（BIRD）敏感度低，污染程度小。
analysis.method: SPENCE框架：生成测试查询的句法变体，在多种LLM上执行评估，通过执行准确率变化和Kendall's tau秩相关性量化污染。
contributions: 提出SPENCE，首个针对NL2SQL基准的句法探测污染检测框架。
通过实验揭示基准发布时序与污染程度的关联，强调时间上下文评估的重要性。
analysis.experiments: 在Spider、SParC、CoSQL和BIRD四个基准上评估多个高容量LLM，使用执行准确率和Kendall's tau指标。
limitations: 仅针对NL2SQL任务，可能不直接适用于其他领域。
句法变体生成可能未覆盖所有污染模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SPENCE框架，通过句法探测检测NL2SQL基准测试中的数据污染，发现旧基准污染严重而新基准较干净。

papers.title: Reverse Constitutional AI: A Framework for Controllable Toxic Data Generation via Probability-Clamped RLAIF
papers.abstract: Ensuring the safety of large language models (LLMs) requires robust red teaming, yet the systematic synthesis of high-quality toxic data remains under-explored. We propose Reverse Constitutional AI (R-CAI), a framework for automated and controllable adversarial data generation that moves beyond isolated jailbreak prompts. By inverting a harmless constitution into a constitution of toxicity and iteratively refining model outputs through a critique--revision pipeline, R-CAI enables scalable synthesis of multi-dimensional adversarial data without human annotation. Optimizing solely for toxicity-related rewards, however, can lead to reward hacking and degraded semantic coherence. To address this challenge, we introduce probability clamping within reinforcement learning from AI feedback, which stabilizes adversarial optimization while preserving adversarial intent. Experiments demonstrate that R-CAI generates diverse, high-quality toxic data and that probability clamping substantially improves semantic coherence (15%) without sacrificing adversarial strength. Overall, R-CAI provides a fully automated framework for red teaming data generation and systematic safety evaluation of aligned language models.

analysis.tldr: 提出反向宪法AI框架，通过概率钳制RLAIF实现可控有毒数据生成，提升红队测试数据的多样性与语义连贯性。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型的安全对齐需要高质量的红队测试数据，但现有方法缺乏系统性的有毒数据合成手段，且依赖人工标注成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成多样化、高质量且语义连贯的有毒对抗数据，用于红队测试和安全评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仅优化毒性相关奖励会导致奖励黑客攻击和语义连贯性下降，概率钳制可稳定对抗优化并保持语义质量。
analysis.method: 通过反转无害宪法为毒性宪法，结合批评-修订流水线迭代生成数据，并引入概率钳制RLAIF稳定优化。
contributions: 提出Reverse Constitutional AI框架，实现无需人工标注的可控对抗数据生成。
引入概率钳制RLAIF方法，在保持对抗强度的同时提升语义连贯性15%。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明R-CAI生成多样高质量有毒数据，概率钳制显著提升语义连贯性（15%）且不牺牲对抗强度。
limitations: 可能依赖初始宪法质量，泛化性需进一步验证。
概率钳制超参数调节可能影响生成效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出反向宪法AI框架，通过概率钳制RLAIF实现可控有毒数据生成，提升红队测试数据的多样性与语义连贯性。

papers.title: When Vision-Language Models Judge Without Seeing: Exposing Informativeness Bias
papers.abstract: The reliability of VLM-as-a-Judge is critical for the automatic evaluation of vision-language models (VLMs). Despite recent progress, our analysis reveals that VLM-as-a-Judge often pays limited attention to the image when making decisions. Instead, they often blindly favor the more informative answer, even when they can recognize it conflicts with the image content. We call this problem informativeness bias, which significantly undermines judge reliability. To address it, we propose BIRCH (Balanced Informativeness and CoRrectness with a Truthful AnCHor), a judging paradigm that first corrects inconsistencies with the image content in candidate answers, and then compares the answers against this corrected version. This shifts the judge's focus from informativeness to image-grounded correctness. Experiments on multiple models and benchmarks show that BIRCH reduces informativeness bias by up to 17%, resulting in performance gains of up to 9.8%. Our work reveals an overlooked but fundamental flaw in current VLM-as-a-Judge systems and highlights the need for more principled designs.

analysis.tldr: VLM裁判存在信息量偏见，即盲目偏好信息更丰富的答案而忽略图像内容，BIRCH通过先纠正答案再比较来缓解此问题。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM-as-a-Judge在自动评估视觉语言模型中至关重要，但现有方法常忽略图像内容，盲目偏好信息量大的答案，导致评估不可靠。
analysis.problem: VLM裁判存在信息量偏见，即优先选择信息更丰富的答案，即使该答案与图像内容冲突。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到VLM裁判在决策时对图像关注有限，反而盲目偏好信息量更大的答案，即使能识别其与图像内容冲突。
analysis.method: 提出BIRCH范式，先纠正候选答案中与图像内容不一致的部分，再基于纠正后的版本比较答案，从而将裁判焦点从信息量转向图像正确性。
contributions: 揭示VLM裁判中存在信息量偏见这一被忽视的根本缺陷
提出BIRCH方法，有效减少偏见并提升评估性能
analysis.experiments: 在多个模型和基准上实验，BIRCH将信息量偏见降低高达17%，性能提升高达9.8%。
limitations: 可能依赖纠正步骤的准确性
未探讨其他潜在偏见类型
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VLM裁判存在信息量偏见，即盲目偏好信息更丰富的答案而忽略图像内容，BIRCH通过先纠正答案再比较来缓解此问题。

papers.title: Contrastive Attribution in the Wild: An Interpretability Analysis of LLM Failures on Realistic Benchmarks
papers.abstract: Interpretability tools are increasingly used to analyze failures of Large Language Models (LLMs), yet prior work largely focuses on short prompts or toy settings, leaving their behavior on commonly used benchmarks underexplored. To address this gap, we study contrastive, LRP-based attribution as a practical tool for analyzing LLM failures in realistic settings. We formulate failure analysis as \textit{contrastive attribution}, attributing the logit difference between an incorrect output token and a correct alternative to input tokens and internal model states, and introduce an efficient extension that enables construction of cross-layer attribution graphs for long-context inputs. Using this framework, we conduct a systematic empirical study across benchmarks, comparing attribution patterns across datasets, model sizes, and training checkpoints. Our results show that this token-level contrastive attribution can yield informative signals in some failure cases, but is not universally applicable, highlighting both its utility and its limitations for realistic LLM failure analysis. Our code is available at: https://aka.ms/Debug-XAI.

analysis.tldr: 基于LRP的对比归因方法在分析LLM在真实基准上的失败时既有用也有局限。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可解释性工具多用于短提示或玩具场景，缺乏对LLM在常用基准上失败行为的系统分析。
analysis.problem: 如何将对比归因（contrastive attribution）作为实用工具，分析LLM在真实基准上的失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出对比归因在某些失败案例中能提供信息信号，但并非普遍适用，揭示了其效用和局限性。
analysis.method: 提出基于LRP的对比归因方法，通过归因错误输出token与正确替代token之间的logit差异到输入token和内部状态，并引入高效扩展以构建跨层归因图，适用于长上下文输入。
contributions: 将失败分析形式化为对比归因问题，并引入高效扩展以处理长上下文。
在多个基准上进行系统实证研究，比较不同数据集、模型大小和训练检查点下的归因模式。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 对比归因并非在所有失败案例中都能提供有效信号。
可能对长上下文或复杂任务的计算开销较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于LRP的对比归因方法在分析LLM在真实基准上的失败时既有用也有局限。

papers.title: Community-Led AI Integration for Wildfire Risk Assessment: A Participatory AI Literacy and Explainability Integration (PALEI) Framework in Los Angeles, CA
papers.abstract: Climate-driven wildfires are intensifying, particularly in urban regions such as Southern California. Yet, traditional fire risk communication tools often fail to gain public trust due to inaccessible design, non-transparent outputs, and limited contextual relevance. These challenges are especially critical in high-risk communities, where trust depends on how clearly and locally information is presented. Neighborhoods such as Pacific Palisades, Pasadena, and Altadena in Los Angeles exemplify these conditions. This study introduces a community-led approach for integrating AI into wildfire risk assessment using the Participatory AI Literacy and Explainability Integration (PALEI) framework. PALEI emphasizes early literacy building, value alignment, and participatory evaluation before deploying predictive models, prioritizing clarity, accessibility, and mutual learning between developers and residents. Early engagement findings show strong acceptance of visual, context-specific risk communication, positive fairness perceptions, and clear adoption interest, alongside privacy and data security concerns that influence trust. Participants emphasized localized imagery, accessible explanations, neighborhood-specific mitigation guidance, and transparent communication of uncertainty. The outcome is a mobile application co-designed with users and stakeholders, enabling residents to scan visible property features and receive interpretable fire risk scores with tailored recommendations. By embedding local context into design, the tool becomes an everyday resource for risk awareness and preparedness. This study argues that user experience is central to ethical and effective AI deployment and provides a replicable, literacy-first pathway for applying the PALEI framework to climate-related hazards.

analysis.tldr: 提出社区主导的PALEI框架，通过参与式AI素养与可解释性集成提升野火风险评估的公众信任与可用性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统野火风险沟通工具因设计不友好、输出不透明和缺乏本地相关性而难以获得公众信任，尤其在高风险社区中这一问题更为突出。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个社区可接受、可理解且值得信赖的AI野火风险评估系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 早期参与发现居民偏好视觉化、本地化的风险沟通，对公平性感知积极，有明确采用意愿，但隐私和数据安全问题影响信任。
analysis.method: 提出参与式AI素养与可解释性集成（PALEI）框架，强调在部署预测模型前进行早期素养建设、价值对齐和参与式评估，最终与用户和利益相关者共同设计移动应用。
contributions: 提出PALEI框架，将社区参与和AI素养置于模型部署之前。
通过洛杉矶案例展示框架应用，产出共同设计的移动应用原型。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅报告了早期参与发现。
limitations: 框架仅在洛杉矶特定社区验证，泛化性需进一步研究。
未提供定量评估指标或与传统方法的对比实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出社区主导的PALEI框架，通过参与式AI素养与可解释性集成提升野火风险评估的公众信任与可用性。

papers.title: Evolutionary Negative Module Pruning for Better LoRA Merging
papers.abstract: Merging multiple Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) experts into a single backbone is a promising approach for efficient multi-task deployment. While existing methods strive to alleviate interference via weight interpolation or subspace alignment, they rest upon the implicit assumption that all LoRA matrices contribute constructively to the merged model. In this paper, we uncover a critical bottleneck in current merging paradigms: the existence of $\textit{negative modules}$ -- specific LoRA layers that inherently degrade global performance upon merging. We propose $\textbf{E}$volutionary $\textbf{N}$egative $\textbf{M}$odule $\textbf{P}$runing ($\textbf{ENMP}$), a plug-and-play LoRA pruning method to locate and exclude these detrimental modules prior to merging. By leveraging an evolutionary search strategy, ENMP effectively navigates the discrete, non-differentiable landscape of module selection to identify optimal pruning configurations. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that ENMP consistently boosts the performance of existing merging algorithms, achieving a new state-of-the-art across both language and vision domains. Code is available at https://github.com/CaoAnda/ENMP-LoRAMerging.

analysis.tldr: 提出进化负模块剪枝方法，在合并前剔除有害LoRA模块，提升多任务合并性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LoRA合并方法假设所有模块都有益，但实际存在负模块会降低全局性能，亟需一种方法识别并排除这些模块。
analysis.problem: 如何定位并剔除LoRA合并中的负模块，以提升多任务合并效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现LoRA合并中存在负模块，即特定LoRA层在合并时会固有地降低全局性能。
analysis.method: 提出进化负模块剪枝（ENMP），利用进化搜索策略在离散、不可微的模块选择空间中寻找最优剪枝配置。
contributions: 揭示了LoRA合并中负模块的存在及其对性能的负面影响。
提出ENMP方法，一种即插即用的剪枝方法，可有效定位并排除负模块。
在语言和视觉领域多个任务上取得新最优结果。
analysis.experiments: 在语言和视觉领域进行广泛评估，ENMP一致提升现有合并算法性能，达到新最优。
limitations: 进化搜索可能带来额外计算开销。
方法依赖预定义的搜索空间，可能无法覆盖所有负模块类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出进化负模块剪枝方法，在合并前剔除有害LoRA模块，提升多任务合并性能。

papers.title: Ego-InBetween: Generating Object State Transitions in Ego-Centric Videos
papers.abstract: Understanding physical transformation processes is crucial for both human cognition and artificial intelligence systems, particularly from an egocentric perspective, which serves as a key bridge between humans and machines in action modeling. We define this modeling process as Egocentric Instructed Visual State Transition (EIVST), which involves generating intermediate frames that depict object transformations between initial and target states under a brief action instruction. EIVST poses two challenges for current generative models: (1) understanding the visual scenes of the initial and target states and reasoning about transformation steps from an egocentric view, and (2) generating a consistent intermediate transition that follows the given instruction while preserving object appearance across the two visual states. To address these challenges, we propose the EgoIn framework. It first infers the multi-step transition process between two given states using TransitionVLM, fine-tuned on our curated dataset to better adapt to this task and reduce hallucinated information. It then generates a sequence of frames based on transition conditions produced by the proposed Transition Conditioning module. Additionally, we introduce Object-aware Auxiliary Supervision to preserve consistent object appearance throughout the transition. Extensive experiments on human-object and robot-object interaction datasets demonstrate EgoIn's superior performance in generating semantically meaningful and visually coherent transformation sequences.

analysis.tldr: 提出EgoIn框架，用于从第一人称视角生成物体状态转换的中间帧。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解物理变换过程对人类认知和AI系统至关重要，尤其是第一人称视角下的动作建模，但现有生成模型难以处理第一人称视角下的状态转换推理和一致性生成。
analysis.problem: 从第一人称视角生成物体在初始和目标状态之间的中间转换帧，需理解场景、推理步骤并保持外观一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前生成模型面临两个挑战：1) 理解第一人称视角下的初始和目标状态并推理转换步骤；2) 生成遵循指令且保持物体外观一致的中间过渡。
analysis.method: 提出EgoIn框架，包含TransitionVLM（微调以推理多步转换过程）、Transition Conditioning模块（生成过渡条件）和Object-aware Auxiliary Supervision（保持物体外观一致）。
contributions: 定义了Egocentric Instructed Visual State Transition (EIVST)任务。
提出EgoIn框架，结合TransitionVLM、Transition Conditioning和Object-aware Auxiliary Supervision。
在人类-物体和机器人-物体交互数据集上验证了生成语义合理且视觉连贯的转换序列的能力。
analysis.experiments: 在人类-物体和机器人-物体交互数据集上进行实验，结果表明EgoIn在生成语义有意义且视觉连贯的转换序列方面性能优越。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
未提及处理复杂或长序列转换的效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EgoIn框架，用于从第一人称视角生成物体状态转换的中间帧。

papers.title: Source-Free Domain Adaptation with Vision-Language Prior
papers.abstract: Source-Free Domain Adaptation (SFDA) seeks to adapt a source model, which is pre-trained on a supervised source domain, for a target domain, with only access to unlabeled target training data. Relying on pseudo labeling and/or auxiliary supervision, conventional methods are inevitably error-prone. To mitigate this limitation, in this work we for the first time explore the potentials of off-the-shelf vision-language (ViL) multimodal models (e.g., CLIP) with rich whilst heterogeneous knowledge. We find that directly applying the ViL model to the target domain in a zero-shot fashion is unsatisfactory, as it is not specialized for this particular task but largely generic. To make it task-specific, we propose a novel DIFO++ approach. Specifically, DIFO++ alternates between two steps during adaptation: (i) Customizing the ViL model by maximizing the mutual information with the target model in a prompt learning manner, (ii) Distilling the knowledge of this customized ViL model to the target model, centering on gap region reduction. During progressive knowledge adaptation, we first identify and focus on the gap region, where enclosed features are entangled and class-ambiguous, as it often captures richer task-specific semantics. Reliable pseudo-labels are then generated by fusing predictions from the target and ViL models, supported by a memory mechanism. Finally, gap region reduction is guided by category attention and predictive consistency for semantic alignment, complemented by referenced entropy minimization to suppress uncertainty. Extensive experiments show that DIFO++ significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art alternatives. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/tntek/DIFO-Plus.

analysis.tldr: 利用现成的视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）作为先验知识，通过交替定制和蒸馏来改进无源域适应。
analysis.research_motivation: 无源域适应（SFDA）仅依赖无标签目标域数据，传统方法依赖伪标签或辅助监督，容易出错，亟需更鲁棒的先验知识。
analysis.problem: 如何利用现成的视觉-语言（ViL）多模态模型（如CLIP）的丰富但异构的知识，来提升无源域适应的性能，同时克服其通用性不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接零样本应用ViL模型效果不佳，因为它过于通用而非任务特化；目标模型与ViL模型之间存在“间隙区域”，该区域特征纠缠且类别模糊，但包含更丰富的任务特定语义。
analysis.method: 提出DIFO++方法，在适应过程中交替进行两步：（1）通过最大化与目标模型的互信息，以提示学习方式定制ViL模型；（2）将定制后的ViL模型知识蒸馏到目标模型，重点减少间隙区域。通过融合预测和记忆机制生成可靠伪标签，并利用类别注意力和预测一致性进行语义对齐，辅以参考熵最小化抑制不确定性。
contributions: 首次探索利用现成的视觉-语言多模态模型作为先验知识来改进无源域适应。
提出DIFO++方法，通过交替定制ViL模型和知识蒸馏，有效减少间隙区域并提升适应性能。
在多个基准上显著超越现有方法，并开源代码和数据。
analysis.experiments: 在多个标准域适应数据集上进行了广泛实验，结果表明DIFO++显著优于最先进的替代方法。
limitations: 依赖ViL模型的可用性和质量，可能不适用于所有领域。
交替优化过程可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用现成的视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）作为先验知识，通过交替定制和蒸馏来改进无源域适应。

papers.title: IncreFA: Breaking the Static Wall of Generative Model Attribution
papers.abstract: As AI generative models evolve at unprecedented speed, image attribution has become a moving target. New diffusion, adversarial and autoregressive generators appear almost monthly, making existing watermark, classifier and inversion methods obsolete upon release. The core problem lies not in model recognition, but in the inability to adapt attribution itself. We introduce IncreFA, a framework that redefines attribution as a structured incremental learning problem, allowing the system to learn continuously as new generative models emerge. IncreFA departs from conventional incremental learning by exploiting the hierarchical relationships among generative architectures and coupling them with continual adaptation. It integrates two mutually reinforcing mechanisms: (1) Hierarchical Constraints, which encode architectural hierarchies through learnable orthogonal priors to disentangle family-level invariants from model-specific idiosyncrasies; and (2) a Latent Memory Bank, which replays compact latent exemplars and mixes them to generate pseudo-unseen samples, stabilising representation drift and enhancing open-set awareness. On the newly constructed Incremental Attribution Benchmark (IABench) covering 28 generative models released between 2022 and 2025, IncreFA achieves state-of-the-art attribution accuracy and 98.93% unseen detection under a temporally ordered open-set protocol. Code will be available at https://github.com/Ant0ny44/IncreFA.

analysis.tldr: 将生成模型溯源重新定义为增量学习问题，提出IncreFA框架，在28个模型上实现SOTA溯源和98.93%未知检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成模型溯源方法（水印、分类器、反演）无法适应新模型快速涌现的节奏，每次新模型发布都需要重新训练，缺乏持续学习能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让生成模型溯源系统能够持续学习新出现的生成模型，同时保持对旧模型的记忆和未知模型的检测能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出IncreFA框架，包含两个核心机制：(1) 层次约束，利用可学习正交先验编码生成架构的层次关系，分离家族级不变特征与模型级特有特征；(2) 潜在记忆库，回放紧凑的潜在样本并混合生成伪未见样本，稳定表征漂移并增强开放集感知。
contributions: 将生成模型溯源重新定义为结构化增量学习问题，并提出IncreFA框架。
构建了覆盖2022-2025年28个生成模型的增量溯源基准IABench。
在时间顺序开放集协议下达到SOTA溯源准确率和98.93%未知检测率。
analysis.experiments: 在包含28个生成模型的IABench上评估，采用时间顺序开放集协议，达到SOTA溯源准确率和98.93%未知检测率。
limitations: 可能依赖生成模型架构的层次关系先验，对全新架构的泛化性待验证。
潜在记忆库的存储和混合策略可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将生成模型溯源重新定义为增量学习问题，提出IncreFA框架，在28个模型上实现SOTA溯源和98.93%未知检测。

papers.title: Score-Based Matching with Target Guidance for Cryo-EM Denoising
papers.abstract: Cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) enables single-particle analysis of biological macromolecules under strict low-dose imaging conditions, but the resulting micrographs often exhibit extremely low signal-to-noise ratios and weak particle visibility. Image denoising is therefore an important preprocessing step for downstream cryo-EM analysis, including particle picking, 2D classification, and 3D reconstruction. Existing cryo-EM denoising methods are commonly trained with pixel-wise or Noise2Noise-style objectives, which can improve visual quality but do not explicitly account for structural consistency required by downstream analysis. In this work, we propose a score-based denoising framework for cryo-EM that learns the clean-data score to recover particle signals while better preserving structural information. Building on this formulation, we further introduce a target-guided variant that incorporates reference-density guidance to stabilize score learning under weak and ambiguous signal conditions. Rather than simply amplifying particle-like responses, our framework better suppresses structured low-frequency background, which improves particle--background separability for downstream analysis. Experiments on multiple cryo-EM datasets show that our score-based methods consistently improve downstream particle picking and produce more structure-consistent 3D reconstructions. Experiments on multiple cryo-EM datasets show that our methods improve downstream particle picking and produce more structure-consistent reconstructions.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于分数的匹配与目标引导的冷冻电镜去噪方法，提升下游粒子挑选和三维重建的结构一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 冷冻电镜图像信噪比极低，现有去噪方法未显式考虑下游分析所需的结构一致性，导致去噪后结构信息受损。
analysis.problem: 如何在冷冻电镜去噪中同时提升视觉质量和结构一致性，以改善下游粒子挑选和三维重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 学习干净数据分数进行去噪，并引入参考密度图作为目标引导，稳定弱信号下的分数学习，抑制低频背景噪声。
contributions: 提出基于分数的冷冻电镜去噪框架，显式恢复粒子信号并保持结构信息。
引入目标引导变体，利用参考密度图稳定分数学习，提升粒子-背景可分离性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个冷冻电镜数据集上实验，表明方法持续改善下游粒子挑选和三维重建的结构一致性。
limitations: 依赖参考密度图的质量和可用性。
可能对极端低信噪比场景的泛化能力有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于分数的匹配与目标引导的冷冻电镜去噪方法，提升下游粒子挑选和三维重建的结构一致性。

papers.title: MHSafeEval: Role-Aware Interaction-Level Evaluation of Mental Health Safety in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly explored as scalable tools for mental health counseling, yet evaluating their safety remains challenging due to the interactional and context-dependent nature of clinical harm. Existing evaluation frameworks predominantly assess isolated responses using coarse-grained taxonomies or static datasets, limiting their ability to diagnose how harms emerge and accumulate over multi-turn counseling interactions. In this work, we introduce R-MHSafe, a role-aware mental health safety taxonomy that characterizes clinically significant harm in terms of the interactional roles an AI counselor adopts, including perpetrator, instigator, facilitator, or enabler, combined with clinically grounded harm categories. Then, we propose MHSafeEval, a closed-loop, agent-based evaluation framework that formulates safety assessment as trajectory-level discovery of harm through adversarial multi-turn interactions, guided by role-aware modeling. Using R-MHSafe and MHSafeEval, we conduct a large-scale evaluation across state-of-the-art LLMs. Our results reveal substantial role-dependent and cumulative safety failures that are systematically missed by existing static benchmarks, and show that our framework significantly improves failure-mode coverage and diagnostic granularity.

analysis.tldr: 提出角色感知的多轮交互安全评估框架MHSafeEval，揭示LLM在心理健康咨询中的累积性安全缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM用于心理健康咨询时，现有安全评估方法仅评估单轮响应，无法捕捉多轮交互中累积的临床危害。
analysis.problem: 缺乏能诊断多轮咨询交互中危害如何产生和累积的安全评估框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有静态基准系统性地遗漏了角色依赖和累积性的安全失败。
analysis.method: 提出角色感知心理健康安全分类法R-MHSafe，将AI咨询师的角色分为perpetrator/instigator/facilitator/enabler，并结合临床危害类别；构建闭环、基于智能体的评估框架MHSafeEval，通过对抗性多轮交互进行轨迹级危害发现。
contributions: 提出R-MHSafe分类法，从交互角色角度定义临床显著危害。
提出MHSafeEval评估框架，实现多轮交互中安全缺陷的轨迹级诊断。
大规模实验表明框架显著提升失败模式覆盖率和诊断粒度。
analysis.experiments: 对多个最先进LLM进行大规模评估，发现现有静态基准系统性遗漏的角色依赖和累积性安全失败。
limitations: 可能仅针对心理健康领域，泛化性待验证。
对抗性交互可能引入人为偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出角色感知的多轮交互安全评估框架MHSafeEval，揭示LLM在心理健康咨询中的累积性安全缺陷。

papers.title: Voronoi-guided Bilateral 2D Gaussian Splatting for Arbitrary-Scale Hyperspectral Image Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Most existing hyperspectral image super-resolution methods require modifications for different scales, limiting their flexibility in arbitrary-scale reconstruction. 2D Gaussian splatting provides a continuous representation that is compatible with arbitrary-scale super-resolution. Existing methods often rely on rasterization strategies, which may limit flexible spatial modeling. Extending them to hyperspectral image super-resolution remains challenging, as the task requires adaptive spatial reconstruction while preserving spectral fidelity. This paper proposes GaussianHSI, a Gaussian-Splatting-based framework for arbitrary-scale hyperspectral image super-resolution. We develop a Voronoi-Guided Bilateral 2D Gaussian Splatting for spatial reconstruction. After predicting a set of Gaussian functions to represent the input, it associates each target pixel with relevant Gaussian functions through Voronoi-guided selection. The target pixel is then reconstructed by aggregating the selected Gaussian functions with reference-aware bilateral weighting, which considers both geometric relevance and consistency with low-resolution features. We further introduce a Spectral Detail Enhancement module to improve spectral reconstruction. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of GaussianHSI over state-of-the-art methods for arbitrary-scale hyperspectral image super-resolution.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于2D高斯泼溅的任意尺度高光谱图像超分辨率框架GaussianHSI，利用Voronoi引导的双边加权实现自适应空间重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有高光谱图像超分辨率方法通常需要针对不同尺度修改模型，缺乏灵活性；而2D高斯泼溅虽支持连续表示，但现有光栅化策略限制了灵活空间建模，且难以在保持光谱保真度的同时实现自适应空间重建。
analysis.problem: 实现任意尺度的高光谱图像超分辨率，同时保证空间重建的适应性和光谱保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GaussianHSI框架，包含Voronoi引导的双边2D高斯泼溅模块（通过Voronoi选择相关高斯函数，并利用参考感知双边加权聚合）和光谱细节增强模块。
contributions: 提出首个基于高斯泼溅的任意尺度高光谱图像超分辨率框架GaussianHSI。
设计Voronoi引导的双边2D高斯泼溅方法，实现自适应空间重建。
引入光谱细节增强模块提升光谱重建质量。
analysis.experiments: 在基准数据集上进行了大量实验，表明GaussianHSI优于现有最先进方法。
limitations: 可能对高斯函数数量敏感，需要调参。
光谱细节增强模块可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于2D高斯泼溅的任意尺度高光谱图像超分辨率框架GaussianHSI，利用Voronoi引导的双边加权实现自适应空间重建。

papers.title: RePrompT: Recurrent Prompt Tuning for Integrating Structured EHR Encoders with Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong promise for mining Electronic Health Records (EHRs) by reasoning over longitudinal clinical information to capture context-rich patient trajectories. However, leveraging LLMs for structured EHRs (e.g., standardized diagnosis and medication codes) presents two key challenges. First, translating time-stamped EHR sequences into plain text can obscure both temporal structure and code identities, weakening the ability to capture code co-occurrence and longitudinal regularities. Second, unlike cohort-trained predictive models that learn a shared, task-aligned representation space across patients, LLMs are often applied in a case-isolated inference setting where each patient is processed independently without leveraging population-level patterns. To address these challenges, we introduce RePrompT, a time-aware LLM framework that integrates structured EHR encoders through prompt tuning, without modifying underlying architectures. Specifically, RePrompT recurrently incorporates latent states from prior visits to preserve longitudinal information, and injects population-level information through trainable prompt tokens derived from a cohort-trained, task-aligned EHR encoder. Experiments on MIMIC-III and MIMIC-IV demonstrate that RePrompT consistently outperforms both EHR-based and LLM-based baselines across multiple clinical prediction tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出RePrompT，通过循环提示调优将结构化EHR编码器与LLM集成，提升临床预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在结构化EHR上的应用面临两大挑战：将时间序列EHR转为纯文本会丢失时间结构和代码身份；LLM逐病例推理无法利用群体模式。
analysis.problem: 如何有效整合结构化EHR编码器与LLM，保留时间信息和群体模式，提升临床预测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: RePrompT框架：通过循环方式将先前就诊的潜在状态注入LLM以保留纵向信息，并通过可训练提示令牌注入来自群体训练EHR编码器的群体信息。
contributions: 提出RePrompT，一种时间感知的LLM框架，通过提示调优整合结构化EHR编码器。
在MIMIC-III和MIMIC-IV上多个临床预测任务中，RePrompT优于基于EHR和基于LLM的基线方法。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-III和MIMIC-IV数据集上进行实验，涵盖多个临床预测任务，RePrompT持续优于基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定EHR编码器，泛化性需进一步验证。
循环机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RePrompT，通过循环提示调优将结构化EHR编码器与LLM集成，提升临床预测性能。

papers.title: GeGS-PCR: Effective and Robust 3D Point Cloud Registration with Two-Stage Color-Enhanced Geometric-3DGS Fusion
papers.abstract: We address the challenge of point cloud registration using color information, where traditional methods relying solely on geometric features often struggle in low-overlap and incomplete scenarios. To overcome these limitations, we propose GeGS-PCR, a novel two-stage method that combines geometric, color, and Gaussian information for robust registration. Our approach incorporates a dedicated color encoder that enhances color features by extracting multi-level geometric and color data from the original point cloud. We introduce the \textbf{Ge}ometric-3D\textbf{GS} module, which encodes the local neighborhood information of colored superpoints to ensure a globally invariant geometric-color context. Leveraging LORA optimization, we maintain high performance while preserving the expressiveness of 3DGS. Additionally, fast differentiable rendering is utilized to refine the registration process, leading to improved convergence. To further enhance performance, we propose a joint photometric loss that exploits both geometric and color features. This enables strong performance in challenging conditions with extremely low point cloud overlap. We validate our method by colorizing the Kitti dataset as ColorKitti and testing on both Color3DMatch and Color3DLoMatch datasets. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance with \textit{Registration Recall} at 99.9\%, \textit{Relative Rotation Error} as low as 0.013, and \textit{Relative Translation Error} as low as 0.024, improving precision by at least a factor of 2.

analysis.tldr: 提出GeGS-PCR，结合几何、颜色和高斯信息的两阶段点云配准方法，在低重叠场景下达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统点云配准方法仅依赖几何特征，在低重叠和不完整场景中性能不佳，而颜色信息未被充分利用。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合几何、颜色和高斯信息以实现鲁棒的点云配准，特别是在低重叠条件下。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段方法：第一阶段使用颜色编码器提取多级几何和颜色特征；第二阶段引入Geometric-3DGS模块编码彩色超点的局部邻域信息，结合LORA优化和快速可微渲染，并联合光度损失进行优化。
contributions: 提出GeGS-PCR，一种融合几何、颜色和高斯信息的两阶段点云配准方法。
引入Geometric-3DGS模块和联合光度损失，在低重叠场景下显著提升配准精度。
analysis.experiments: 在Color3DMatch和Color3DLoMatch数据集上测试，配准召回率99.9%，相对旋转误差0.013，相对平移误差0.024，精度提升至少2倍。
limitations: 可能依赖颜色信息的质量，在颜色退化场景下性能未知。
两阶段结构可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GeGS-PCR，结合几何、颜色和高斯信息的两阶段点云配准方法，在低重叠场景下达到SOTA。

papers.title: FlashFPS: Efficient Farthest Point Sampling for Large-Scale Point Clouds via Pruning and Caching
papers.abstract: Point-based Neural Networks (PNNs) have become a key approach for point cloud processing. However, a core operation in these models, Farthest Point Sampling (FPS), often introduces significant inference latency, especially for large-scale processing. Despite existing CUDA- and hardware-level optimizations, FPS remains a major bottleneck due to exhaustive computations across multiple network layers in PNNs, which hinders scalability. Through systematic analysis, we identify three substantial redundancies in FPS, including unnecessary full-cloud computations, redundant late-stage iterations, and predictable inter-layer outputs that make later FPS computations avoidable. To address these, we propose \textbf{\textit{FlashFPS}}, a hardware-agnostic, plug-and-play framework for FPS acceleration, composed of \textit{FPS-Prune} and \textit{FPS-Cache}. \textit{FPS-Prune} introduces candidate pruning and iteration pruning to reduce redundant computations in FPS while preserving sampling quality, and \textit{FPS-Cache} eliminates layer-wise redundancy via cache-and-reuse. Integrated into existing CUDA libraries and state-of-the-art PNN accelerators, \textit{FlashFPS} achieves 5.16$\times$ speedup over the standard CUDA baseline on GPU and 2.69$\times$ on PNN accelerators, with negligible accuracy loss, enabling efficient and scalable PNN inference. Codes are released at https://github.com/Yuzhe-Fu/FlashFPS.

analysis.tldr: FlashFPS通过剪枝和缓存机制加速大规模点云中的最远点采样，实现5.16倍GPU加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 最远点采样（FPS）是点云神经网络的核心操作，但在大规模点云处理中计算开销极大，现有CUDA和硬件优化仍无法消除多层网络中的冗余计算，成为推理瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 减少FPS在点云神经网络多层推理中的冗余计算，加速大规模点云处理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过系统分析发现FPS存在三类冗余：不必要的全点云计算、冗余的后期迭代、以及可预测的层间输出使得后续FPS可避免。
analysis.method: 提出FlashFPS框架，包含FPS-Prune（候选点剪枝和迭代剪枝）和FPS-Cache（缓存重用）两个组件，无需修改硬件即可即插即用。
contributions: 首次系统识别FPS在多层点云网络中的三类冗余
提出硬件无关的剪枝和缓存加速框架FlashFPS
在GPU和PNN加速器上分别实现5.16倍和2.69倍加速，精度损失可忽略
analysis.experiments: 在GPU上相比标准CUDA基线实现5.16倍加速，在PNN加速器上实现2.69倍加速，精度损失可忽略。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于FPS的点云网络架构
剪枝策略可能在某些极端点云分布下影响采样质量
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlashFPS通过剪枝和缓存机制加速大规模点云中的最远点采样，实现5.16倍GPU加速。

papers.title: DanceCrafter: Fine-Grained Text-Driven Controllable Dance Generation via Choreographic Syntax
papers.abstract: Text-driven controllable dance generation remains under-explored, primarily due to the severe scarcity of high-quality datasets and the inherent difficulty of articulating complex choreographies. Characterizing dance is particularly challenging owing to its intricate spatial dynamics, strong directionality, and the highly decoupled movements of distinct body parts. To overcome these bottlenecks, we bridge principles from dance studies, human anatomy, and biomechanics to propose \textit{Choreographic Syntax}, a novel theoretical framework with a tailored annotation system. Grounded in this syntax, we combine professional dance archives with high-fidelity motion capture data to construct \textbf{DanceFlow}, the most fine-grained dance dataset to date. It encompasses 41 hours of high-quality motions paired with 6.34 million words of detailed descriptions. At the model level, we introduce \textbf{DanceCrafter}, a tailored motion transformer built upon the Momentum Human Rig.
