To circumvent optimization instabilities, we construct a continuous manifold motion representation paired with a hybrid normalization strategy. Furthermore, we design an anatomy-aware loss to explicitly regulate the decoupled nature of body parts. Together, these adaptations empower DanceCrafter to achieve the high-fidelity and stable generation of complex dance sequences. Extensive evaluations and user studies demonstrate our state-of-the-art performance in motion quality, fine-grained controllability, and generation naturalness.

analysis.tldr: 提出舞蹈编排语法和细粒度数据集DanceFlow，构建DanceCrafter模型实现文本驱动的可控舞蹈生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本驱动的可控舞蹈生成因高质量数据集稀缺和复杂编舞描述困难而进展缓慢，现有方法难以处理舞蹈的空间动态、强方向性和身体部位解耦运动。
analysis.problem: 如何实现细粒度、高保真且稳定的文本驱动舞蹈生成，克服数据不足和编舞描述复杂性的挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 舞蹈生成面临空间动态复杂、方向性强、身体部位运动高度解耦等难点，现有数据集和模型难以支持精细控制。
analysis.method: 提出Choreographic Syntax理论框架和标注系统，构建细粒度数据集DanceFlow；设计基于Momentum Human Rig的运动Transformer DanceCrafter，采用连续流形运动表示和混合归一化策略，并引入解剖感知损失。
contributions: 提出Choreographic Syntax理论框架和标注系统，用于细粒度舞蹈描述。
构建DanceFlow数据集，包含41小时高质量运动和634万词详细描述。
提出DanceCrafter模型，实现高保真、稳定的复杂舞蹈序列生成。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及广泛评估和用户研究显示在运动质量、细粒度可控性和生成自然性上达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖特定舞蹈类型或风格，泛化性需验证。
数据集构建成本高，可能难以扩展到其他运动领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出舞蹈编排语法和细粒度数据集DanceFlow，构建DanceCrafter模型实现文本驱动的可控舞蹈生成。

papers.title: Concurrent Criterion Validation of a Validity Screen for LLM Confidence Signals via Selective Prediction
papers.abstract: The validity screen (Cacioli, 2026d, 2026e) classifies LLM confidence signals as Valid, Indeterminate, or Invalid. We test whether these classifications predict selective prediction performance. Twenty frontier LLMs from seven families were evaluated on 524 items across six cognitive tracks. Valid models show mean Type 2 AUROC = .624 (SD = .048). Invalid models show mean AUROC = .357 (SD = .231). Cohen's d = 2.81, p = .002. The tiers order monotonically: Invalid (.357) < Indeterminate (.554) < Valid (.624). Split-half cross-validation yields median d = 1.77, P(d > 0) = 1.0 across 1,000 splits. The three-tier classification accounts for 47% of the variance in AUROC. DeepSeek-R1 drops from 85.3% accuracy at full coverage to 11.3% at 10% coverage. The screen predicts the criterion. For selective prediction, the screen matters.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种有效性筛查方法，用于预测LLM置信度信号的选择性预测性能，实验验证其与AUROC的强关联。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM的置信度信号常不可靠，需要一种筛查方法来评估其有效性，以提升选择性预测的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何分类和预测LLM置信度信号在选择性预测任务中的有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同有效性等级的模型在AUROC上呈现单调排序：Invalid < Indeterminate < Valid，且DeepSeek-R1在低覆盖率下准确率急剧下降。
analysis.method: 提出一种三分类有效性筛查（Valid, Indeterminate, Invalid），基于置信度信号特征对模型进行分类，并验证其与选择性预测性能（AUROC）的关联。
contributions: 提出并验证了一种LLM置信度信号有效性筛查方法，能预测选择性预测性能。
在20个前沿LLM上展示了筛查分类与AUROC的强相关性（Cohen's d=2.81，解释47%方差）。
analysis.experiments: 在20个前沿LLM（来自7个家族）上，使用524个条目（6个认知轨道）评估，报告了AUROC均值、Cohen's d、交叉验证结果及DeepSeek-R1的覆盖率-准确率曲线。
limitations: 筛查分类的泛化性可能受限于特定认知轨道和条目集。
未探讨筛查方法在不同任务或领域上的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种有效性筛查方法，用于预测LLM置信度信号的选择性预测性能，实验验证其与AUROC的强关联。

papers.title: Screen Before You Interpret: A Portable Validity Protocol for Benchmark-Based LLM Confidence Signals
papers.abstract: LLM confidence signals are used for abstention, routing, and safety-critical decisions. No standard practice exists for checking whether a confidence signal carries item-level information before building on it. We transfer the validity screening principle from clinical personality assessment (PAI, MMPI-3) as a portable protocol for benchmark-based LLM confidence data. The protocol specifies three core indices (L, Fp, RBS), a structural indicator (TRIN), and an item-sensitivity statistic, computed from a single 2x2 contingency table. A three-tier classification system (Invalid, Indeterminate, Valid) draws on four clinical traditions. Validated on 20 frontier LLMs across 524 items, four models are classified Invalid, two Indeterminate. Valid-profile models show mean r = .18 (15/16 significant). Invalid-profile models show mean r = -.20 (d = 2.48). Cross-benchmark validation on 18 models using MMLU with verbalized confidence and on external data from Yang et al. (2024) confirms the screen transfers across benchmarks and probe formats. All data and code: https://github.com/synthiumjp/validity-scaling-llm

analysis.tldr: 借鉴临床人格评估的效度筛查协议，为基于基准的LLM置信度信号提供便携式有效性检查方法。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM置信度信号用于弃权、路由和安全关键决策，但缺乏标准实践来检查置信度信号是否携带项目级信息，直接构建于不可靠信号上可能导致风险。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地筛查基于基准的LLM置信度信号的有效性，确保其具有项目级区分能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从临床人格评估（PAI, MMPI-3）迁移效度筛查原则，定义三个核心指数（L, Fp, RBS）、一个结构指标（TRIN）和一个项目敏感度统计量，基于单个2x2列联表计算，并采用三级分类系统（无效、不确定、有效）。
contributions: 提出一种便携式效度筛查协议，用于基于基准的LLM置信度信号。
在20个前沿LLM上验证，发现4个模型被分类为无效，2个为不确定，有效模型平均r=0.18，无效模型平均r=-0.20（效应量d=2.48）。
跨基准验证（MMLU口头置信度及外部数据）表明协议可迁移。
analysis.experiments: 在20个前沿LLM的524个项目上验证，并在18个模型上使用MMLU口头置信度及Yang et al. (2024)外部数据进行跨基准验证。
limitations: 协议依赖基准测试的项目设计，可能不适用于所有置信度信号形式。
临床评估的阈值可能不完全适配LLM置信度分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 借鉴临床人格评估的效度筛查协议，为基于基准的LLM置信度信号提供便携式有效性检查方法。

papers.title: Dynamic Visual-semantic Alignment for Zero-shot Learning with Ambiguous Labels
papers.abstract: Zero-shot learning (ZSL) aims to recognize unseen classes without visual instances. However, existing methods usually assume clean labels, overlooking real-world label noise and ambiguity, which degrades performance. To bridge this gap, we propose the Dynamic Visual-semantic Alignment (DVSA), a robust ZSL framework for learning from ambiguous labels. DVSA uses a bidirectional visual-semantic alignment module with attention to mutually calibrate visual features and attribute prototypes, and a contrastive optimization grounded in Mutual Information (MI) at the attribute level to strengthen discriminative, semantically consistent attributes. In addition, a dynamic label disambiguation mechanism iteratively corrects noisy supervision while preserving semantic consistency, narrowing the instance-label gap, and improving generalization. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks verify that DVSA achieves stronger performance under ambiguous supervision.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态视觉-语义对齐框架DVSA，解决零样本学习中的标签模糊问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实世界中的标签噪声和模糊性会严重损害零样本学习性能，而现有方法通常假设干净标签，缺乏鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何在存在标签模糊和噪声的情况下，实现鲁棒的零样本学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DVSA框架，包含双向视觉-语义对齐模块（利用注意力机制相互校准视觉特征和属性原型）、基于互信息的属性级对比优化，以及动态标签去歧义机制（迭代纠正噪声监督并保持语义一致性）。
contributions: 提出DVSA框架，首次在零样本学习中系统处理标签模糊问题。
设计双向视觉-语义对齐和互信息对比优化，增强判别性和语义一致性。
引入动态标签去歧义机制，迭代修正噪声标签并提升泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准数据集上进行了大量实验，验证了DVSA在模糊监督下的优越性能。
limitations: 可能对极端噪声比例敏感。
动态去歧义机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态视觉-语义对齐框架DVSA，解决零样本学习中的标签模糊问题。

papers.title: Co-evolving Agent Architectures and Interpretable Reasoning for Automated Optimization
papers.abstract: Automating operations research (OR) with large language models (LLMs) remains limited by hand-crafted reasoning--execution workflows. Complex OR tasks require adaptive coordination among problem interpretation, mathematical formulation, solver selection, code generation, and iterative debugging. To address this limitation, we propose EvoOR-Agent, a co-evolutionary framework for automated optimization. The framework represents agent workflows as activity-on-edge (AOE)-style networks, making workflow topology, execution dependencies, and alternative reasoning paths explicit. On this representation, the framework maintains an architecture graph and evolves a population of reasoning individuals through graph-mediated path-conditioned recombination, multi-granularity semantic mutation, and elitist population update. A knowledge-base-assisted experience-acquisition module further injects reusable OR practices into initialization and semantic variation. Empirical results on heterogeneous OR benchmarks show that the proposed framework consistently improves over zero-shot LLMs, fixed-pipeline OR agents, and representative evolutionary agent frameworks. Case studies and ablation analyses further indicate that explicit architecture evolution and graph-supported reasoning-trajectory search contribute to both performance improvement and structural interpretability. These results suggest that treating agent architectures and reasoning trajectories as evolvable objects provides an effective route toward adaptive and interpretable automated optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出EvoOR-Agent框架，通过共进化代理架构与可解释推理实现自动化运筹优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于LLM的运筹优化自动化受限于手工设计的推理-执行流程，复杂任务需要问题解释、数学建模、求解器选择、代码生成和迭代调试的适应性协调。
analysis.problem: 如何自动演化代理架构和推理轨迹，以实现自适应且可解释的运筹优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EvoOR-Agent共进化框架，将代理工作流表示为AOE网络，维护架构图并通过图介导的路径条件重组、多粒度语义变异和精英种群更新进化推理个体，结合知识库辅助的经验获取模块注入可复用的OR实践。
contributions: 提出将代理架构和推理轨迹作为可进化对象的共进化框架EvoOR-Agent。
在异构OR基准上一致优于零样本LLM、固定流水线OR代理和代表性进化代理框架。
analysis.experiments: 在异构OR基准上进行了实验，包括案例研究和消融分析，表明显式架构进化和图支持的推理轨迹搜索有助于性能提升和结构可解释性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量初始知识库。
进化过程计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EvoOR-Agent框架，通过共进化代理架构与可解释推理实现自动化运筹优化。

papers.title: Before You Interpret the Profile: Validity Scaling for LLM Metacognitive Self-Report
papers.abstract: Clinical personality assessment screens response validity before interpreting substantive scales. LLM evaluation does not. We apply the validity scaling framework from the PAI and MMPI-3 to metacognitive probe data from 20 frontier models across 524 items. Six validity indices are operationalised: L (maintaining confidence on errors), K (betting on errors), F (withdrawing consensus-endorsed items), Fp (withdrawing correct answers), RBS (inverted monitoring), and TRIN (fixed responding). A tiered classification system identifies four models as construct-level invalid and two as elevated. Valid-profile models produce item-sensitive confidence (mean r = .18, 14 of 16 significant). Invalid-profile models do not (mean r = -.20, d = 2.17, p = .001). Chain-of-thought training produces two opposite response distortions. Two latent dimensions account for 94.6% of index variance. Companion papers extract a portable screening protocol (Cacioli, 2026e) and validate it against selective prediction (Cacioli, 2026f). All data and code: https://github.com/synthiumjp/validity-scaling-llm

analysis.tldr: 将临床人格评估中的效度量表框架迁移至LLM元认知探测，发现多数模型存在响应失真，链式思维训练会引发两种相反的失真模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床人格评估在解释量表前会筛查响应效度，但LLM评估缺乏类似机制，导致对模型元认知能力的解读可能被响应偏差污染。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估LLM在元认知自我报告中的响应效度，并识别哪些模型的元认知指标可信。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：有效轮廓模型产生项目敏感的置信度（平均r=0.18，16个中14个显著），无效轮廓模型则无（平均r=-0.20，d=2.17，p=0.001）；链式思维训练产生两种相反的响应失真；两个潜在维度解释了94.6%的指数方差。
analysis.method: 从PAI和MMPI-3借鉴效度量表框架，对20个前沿模型在524个项目上的元认知探测数据，操作化六个效度指标（L、K、F、Fp、RBS、TRIN），并采用分层分类系统识别无效轮廓。
contributions: 首次将临床效度量表框架系统应用于LLM元认知评估，提出六个效度指标的操作化方案。
实证发现多数前沿模型存在响应失真，链式思维训练会引发两种相反的失真模式，并揭示两个潜在维度解释大部分指数方差。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅报告了有效与无效轮廓模型的置信度相关性对比及效应量。
limitations: 效度指标的操作化可能依赖特定探测项目集，泛化性需进一步验证。
仅分析了20个模型，样本量有限，且未涉及不同训练数据或架构的模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将临床人格评估中的效度量表框架迁移至LLM元认知探测，发现多数模型存在响应失真，链式思维训练会引发两种相反的失真模式。

papers.title: WISV: Wireless-Informed Semantic Verification for Distributed Speculative Decoding in Device-Edge LLM Inference
papers.abstract: While distributed device-edge speculative decoding enhances resource utilization across heterogeneous nodes, its performance is often bottlenecked by conventional token-level verification strategies. Such rigid alignment leads to excessive rejections, significantly diminishing the accepted sequence length and increasing interaction rounds under fluctuating wireless conditions. In this paper, we propose WISV (Wireless-Informed Semantic Verification), a novel distributed speculative decoding framework that goes beyond strict token-level matching via a channel-aware semantic acceptance policy. WISV integrates a lightweight decision head into the edge-side target LLM to dynamically evaluate speculative tokens by synthesizing high-dimensional hidden representations with instantaneous channel state information (CSI). To optimize the trade-off between verification fidelity and communication overhead, we further design two tailored communication protocols: full-hidden upload and mismatch-first selective-hidden upload. Extensive simulations using a 1B drafter and an 8B target model demonstrate that WISV achieves up to a 60.8% increase in accepted length, a 37.3% reduction in interaction rounds, and a 31.4% improvement in end-to-end latency compared to vanilla speculative decoding across tested settings, while maintaining a negligible task accuracy drop (<1%). Finally, we validate WISV on a hardware testbed comprising an NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin and an A40-equipped server, confirming its real-world efficacy in accelerating edge-deployed LLM inference.

analysis.tldr: WISV通过无线感知语义验证策略，在设备-边缘分布式推测解码中显著提升接受长度并降低交互轮次。
analysis.research_motivation: 分布式设备-边缘推测解码在异构节点间提升资源利用率，但传统token级验证策略在无线波动条件下导致过多拒绝，降低接受序列长度并增加交互轮次，亟需更高效的验证机制。
analysis.problem: 解决分布式推测解码中传统token级验证策略因严格对齐导致的接受长度短、交互轮次多的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统token级验证策略在无线波动条件下导致过多拒绝，显著降低接受序列长度并增加交互轮次。
analysis.method: 提出WISV框架，集成轻量级决策头到边缘侧目标LLM，通过融合高维隐藏表示和瞬时信道状态信息动态评估推测token，并设计全隐藏上传和错配优先选择性隐藏上传两种通信协议。
contributions: 提出无线感知语义验证策略，超越严格token级匹配，动态评估推测token。
设计两种通信协议优化验证保真度与通信开销的权衡。
在仿真和硬件测试平台上验证了WISV在加速边缘LLM推理中的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 使用1B草稿模型和8B目标模型进行仿真，WISV相比标准推测解码在多种设置下实现接受长度提升60.8%、交互轮次减少37.3%、端到端延迟改善31.4%，任务精度下降可忽略（<1%）。在NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin和A40服务器组成的硬件测试平台上验证了实际效果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定硬件平台，泛化性需进一步验证。
语义验证策略在极端无线条件下可能仍存在性能下降。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: WISV通过无线感知语义验证策略，在设备-边缘分布式推测解码中显著提升接受长度并降低交互轮次。

papers.title: Stratagem: Learning Transferable Reasoning via Trajectory-Modulated Game Self-Play
papers.abstract: Games offer a compelling paradigm for developing general reasoning capabilities in language models, as they naturally demand strategic planning, probabilistic inference, and adaptive decision-making. However, existing self-play approaches rely solely on terminal game outcomes, providing no mechanism to distinguish transferable reasoning patterns from game-specific heuristics. We present STRATAGEM, which addresses two fundamental barriers to reasoning transfer: domain specificity, where learned patterns remain anchored in game semantics, and contextual stasis, where static game contexts fail to cultivate progressive reasoning. STRATAGEM selectively reinforces trajectories exhibiting abstract, domain-agnostic reasoning through a Reasoning Transferability Coefficient, while incentivizing adaptive reasoning development via a Reasoning Evolution Reward. Experiments across mathematical reasoning, general reasoning, and code generation benchmarks demonstrate substantial improvements, with particularly strong gains on competition-level mathematics where multi-step reasoning is critical. Ablation studies and human evaluation confirm that both components contribute to transferable reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 通过轨迹调制的游戏自博弈学习可迁移推理策略
analysis.research_motivation: 游戏为语言模型推理能力训练提供自然场景，但现有自博弈方法仅依赖终端结果，无法区分可迁移推理模式与游戏特定启发式，导致学到的策略固着于游戏语义且缺乏渐进发展。
analysis.problem: 如何从游戏自博弈中提取可迁移的推理模式，克服领域特异性和上下文停滞两大障碍。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出STRATAGEM框架，通过推理可迁移性系数选择性强化抽象、领域无关的轨迹，并利用推理进化奖励激励自适应推理发展。
contributions: 提出推理可迁移性系数和推理进化奖励两种机制，分别解决领域特异性和上下文停滞问题。
在数学推理、通用推理和代码生成基准上取得显著提升，尤其在竞赛级数学任务上表现突出。
analysis.experiments: 在数学推理、通用推理和代码生成基准上进行实验，消融研究和人工评估验证了两个组件的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖游戏环境的多样性，迁移效果受限于游戏设计。
推理可迁移性系数的计算可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过轨迹调制的游戏自博弈学习可迁移推理策略

papers.title: COSAC: Counterfactual Credit Assignment in Sequential Cooperative Teams
papers.abstract: In cooperative teams where agents act in a fixed order and share a single team-level reward (multi-agent language systems, sequential robotic tasks), per-agent credit assignment is under-determined. Critic-based approaches scale poorly as the number of agents grows owing to the costly maintenance of joint/factored critic(s), whereas the existing critic-free alternatives have other issues: common credit across agents that couples every agent's signal to teammate noise, importance-sampling corrections for upstream-update staleness that incur variance exponential in team size, or per-agent counterfactual replay that isolates each agent's effect at the price of extra environment or reward calls. We propose COSAC, a critic-free per-agent policy gradient for sequential cooperative teams. COSAC fits an additive per-agent decomposition of the team reward by a single ridge regression on the rollout batch (giving each agent a learning signal decoupled from teammate noise), and computes each agent's counterfactual advantage from fictitious continuations of the current policy (policy forward passes that replace both importance-sampling reweighting and per-agent environment replay, at no extra environment or reward cost). The estimator instantiates the Sequential Aristocrat Utility (SeqAU), our extension of Wolpert and Tumer's (2001) aristocrat utility to sequential teams. We prove bias and variance bounds on SeqAU credits that stay controlled as the team grows. Our controlled study on sequential bandits demonstrates that COSAC attains the lowest advantage MSE and consistently low learning regret across team sizes up to $K = 16$. On the AI2 Reasoning Challenge (ARC) task, where four Qwen3-0.6B agents reason in turn about a grade-school science question, COSAC attains faster convergence than the other critic-free baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无评论家的顺序合作团队信用分配方法COSAC，通过岭回归和反事实优势估计实现解耦的逐智能体策略梯度。
analysis.research_motivation: 在顺序合作团队中，智能体共享团队奖励，但每个智能体的贡献难以分离。现有方法要么依赖评论家（扩展性差），要么存在信用耦合、方差大或额外环境调用成本高等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用评论家且不增加额外环境交互成本的情况下，为顺序合作团队中的每个智能体分配准确的信用信号。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: COSAC：通过单次岭回归拟合团队奖励的加性逐智能体分解，得到解耦的学习信号；利用当前策略的虚构延续（前向传播）计算每个智能体的反事实优势，替代重要性采样重加权和逐智能体环境重放。
contributions: 提出无评论家的逐智能体策略梯度方法COSAC，适用于顺序合作团队。
定义顺序合作团队的贵族效用（SeqAU），并证明其信用估计的偏差和方差界随团队规模保持可控。
analysis.experiments: 在顺序赌博机任务上，COSAC在团队规模K=16时取得最低优势MSE和一致的低学习遗憾；在AI2推理挑战（ARC）任务中，四个Qwen3-0.6B智能体轮流推理，COSAC收敛速度快于其他无评论家基线。
limitations: 方法假设团队奖励可加性分解，可能不适用于复杂非线性奖励结构。
实验仅在顺序赌博机和简单推理任务上验证，未涉及更复杂的多智能体语言系统或机器人任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无评论家的顺序合作团队信用分配方法COSAC，通过岭回归和反事实优势估计实现解耦的逐智能体策略梯度。

papers.title: SafeAnchor: Preventing Cumulative Safety Erosion in Continual Domain Adaptation of Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Safety alignment in large language models is remarkably shallow: it is concentrated in the first few output tokens and reversible by fine-tuning on as few as 100 adversarial examples. This fragility becomes critical in real-world deployment, where models undergo sequential adaptation across domains such as medicine, law, and code, causing safety guardrails to erode cumulatively. Yet all existing safety-preserving methods target only single-task fine-tuning, leaving the multi-domain sequential setting entirely unaddressed. We introduce SafeAnchor, a framework that anchors safety in place throughout continual adaptation. SafeAnchor first identifies low-rank safety subspaces in LoRA parameter space via Fisher Information eigendecomposition, then constrains domain-specific gradient updates to the orthogonal complement of these subspaces, and finally monitors for residual safety drift with threshold-triggered corrective replay. Evaluated on Llama-2-7B-Chat and Mistral-7B-Instruct across a three-domain pipeline and eight benchmarks, SafeAnchor retains 93.2% of original safety alignment, outperforming all baselines by 18-42 points, while matching unconstrained fine-tuning to within 1.5 points on domain tasks.

analysis.tldr: SafeAnchor通过Fisher信息特征分解识别低秩安全子空间，约束领域梯度更新并触发纠正回放，在多领域持续适应中保留93.2%的安全对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型的安全对齐非常脆弱，集中在初始输出token且易被少量对抗样本逆转；实际部署中模型需跨领域顺序适应，导致安全防护累积性侵蚀，而现有方法仅针对单任务微调。
analysis.problem: 解决大语言模型在多领域持续适应过程中安全对齐的累积性侵蚀问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 安全对齐集中在初始输出token，且通过少量对抗样本微调即可逆转；多领域顺序适应导致安全防护累积性下降。
analysis.method: SafeAnchor框架：1) 通过Fisher信息特征分解在LoRA参数空间中识别低秩安全子空间；2) 将领域特定梯度更新约束到这些子空间的正交补上；3) 监测残余安全漂移，触发阈值驱动的纠正回放。
contributions: 首次提出多领域持续适应中的安全对齐问题，并建立评估基准。
提出SafeAnchor框架，通过安全子空间约束和纠正回放有效防止安全累积性侵蚀。
在Llama-2-7B-Chat和Mistral-7B-Instruct上，跨三个领域和八个基准保留93.2%原始安全对齐，优于基线18-42个百分点，领域任务性能仅下降1.5个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 在Llama-2-7B-Chat和Mistral-7B-Instruct上，使用三个领域（医学、法律、代码）的持续适应管道和八个安全基准进行评估。
limitations: 可能依赖Fisher信息矩阵的近似质量，在极低资源场景下可能不稳定。
纠正回放机制需要额外存储和计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SafeAnchor通过Fisher信息特征分解识别低秩安全子空间，约束领域梯度更新并触发纠正回放，在多领域持续适应中保留93.2%的安全对齐。

papers.title: Dual-stream Spatio-Temporal GCN-Transformer Network for 3D Human Pose Estimation
papers.abstract: 3D human pose estimation is a classic and important research direction in the field of computer vision. In recent years, Transformer-based methods have made significant progress in lifting 2D to 3D human pose estimation. However, these methods primarily focus on modeling global temporal and spatial relationships, neglecting local skeletal relationships and the information interaction between different channels. Therefore, we have proposed a novel method,the Dual-stream Spatio-temporal GCN-Transformer Network (MixTGFormer). This method models the spatial and temporal relationships of human skeletons simultaneously through two parallel channels, achieving effective fusion of global and local features. The core of MixTGFormer is composed of stacked Mixformers. Specifically, the Mixformer includes the Mixformer Block and the Squeeze-and-Excitation Layer ( SE Layer). It first extracts and fuses various information of human skeletons through two parallel Mixformer Blocks with different modes. Then, it further supplements the fused information through the SE Layer. The Mixformer Block integrates Graph Convolutional Networks (GCN) into the Transformer, enhancing both local and global information utilization. Additionally, we further implement its temporal and spatial forms to extract both spatial and temporal relationships. We extensively evaluated our model on two benchmark datasets (Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP). The experimental results showed that, compared to other methods, our MixTGFormer achieved state-of-the-art results, with P1 errors of 37.6mm and 15.7mm on these datasets, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出双流时空GCN-Transformer网络MixTGFormer，通过并行通道融合全局与局部特征，在3D人体姿态估计中达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于Transformer的2D到3D姿态提升方法主要建模全局时空关系，忽略了局部骨骼关系与不同通道间的信息交互，导致特征利用不充分。
analysis.problem: 如何同时有效建模人体骨骼的全局时空关系和局部骨骼关系，并促进不同通道间的信息融合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MixTGFormer，核心为堆叠的Mixformer模块，包含两个并行Mixformer Block（集成GCN到Transformer）和Squeeze-and-Excitation层，分别提取时空关系并融合特征。
contributions: 提出双流时空GCN-Transformer网络，并行建模全局与局部特征。
设计Mixformer模块，将GCN集成到Transformer中增强局部和全局信息利用。
在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP上达到SOTA，P1误差分别为37.6mm和15.7mm。
analysis.experiments: 在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP两个基准数据集上评估，与其它方法相比取得SOTA结果。
limitations: 可能对复杂遮挡或快速运动场景鲁棒性不足。
计算复杂度可能较高，实时性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双流时空GCN-Transformer网络MixTGFormer，通过并行通道融合全局与局部特征，在3D人体姿态估计中达到SOTA。

papers.title: Putting HUMANS first: Efficient LAM Evaluation with Human Preference Alignment
papers.abstract: The rapid proliferation of large audio models (LAMs) demands efficient approaches for model comparison, yet comprehensive benchmarks are costly. To fill this gap, we investigate whether minimal subsets can reliably evaluate LAMs while reducing costs and data redundancy. Analyzing 10 subset selection methods with 18 audio models across 40 tasks covering major LAM evaluation dimensions, we show that subsets of just 50 examples (0.3% of data) can achieve over 0.93 Pearson correlation with full benchmark scores. To understand how well these scores align with what practitioners ultimately care about, user satisfaction, we collect 776 human preference ratings from realistic voice assistant conversations, finding that both subsets and full benchmark achieve only 0.85 correlation with human. To better predict preferences, we trained regression models on these selected subsets, achieving 0.98 correlation -- outperforming regression models trained on both random subsets and the full benchmark. This demonstrates that in regression modeling, well-curated subsets outpredict the full benchmark, showing quality over quantity. We open-source these regression-weighted subsets as the HUMANS benchmark, an efficient proxy for LAM evaluation that captures both benchmark performance and user preferences.

analysis.tldr: 通过极小数据子集（0.3%）即可高效评估大音频模型，且回归加权子集比完整基准更贴近人类偏好。
analysis.research_motivation: 大音频模型（LAM）数量激增，但全面基准评估成本高昂，亟需低成本、高效率的模型比较方法。
analysis.problem: 如何用最小数据子集可靠评估LAM，同时降低成本和数据冗余，并使其与人类偏好对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 50样本子集（0.3%数据）与完整基准的Pearson相关性超过0.93；但子集和完整基准与人类偏好的相关性均仅为0.85，表明基准分数与用户满意度存在差距。
analysis.method: 分析10种子集选择方法，在18个音频模型、40个任务上验证；收集776个人类偏好评分，训练回归模型预测偏好，并开源回归加权子集作为HUMANS基准。
contributions: 证明极小数据子集（0.3%）可高效评估LAM，与完整基准高度相关。
发现基准分数与人类偏好存在差距，提出回归加权子集（HUMANS基准）实现0.98相关性，优于完整基准。
analysis.experiments: 在18个音频模型、40个任务上评估10种子集选择方法；收集776个人类偏好评分进行回归建模。
limitations: 子集选择方法可能依赖特定任务分布，泛化性需进一步验证。
人类偏好数据仅来自语音助手对话场景，其他应用场景可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过极小数据子集（0.3%）即可高效评估大音频模型，且回归加权子集比完整基准更贴近人类偏好。

papers.title: Semantic Entanglement in Vector-Based Retrieval: A Formal Framework and Context-Conditioned Disentanglement Pipeline for Agentic RAG Systems
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems depend on the geometric properties of vector representations to retrieve contextually appropriate evidence. When source documents interleave multiple topics within contiguous text, standard vectorization produces embedding spaces in which semantically distinct content occupies overlapping neighborhoods. We term this condition semantic entanglement. We formalize entanglement as a model-relative measure of cross-topic overlap in embedding space and define an Entanglement Index (EI) as a quantitative proxy. We argue that higher EI constrains attainable Top-K retrieval precision under cosine similarity retrieval. To address this, we introduce the Semantic Disentanglement Pipeline (SDP), a four-stage preprocessing framework that restructures documents prior to embedding. We further propose context-conditioned preprocessing, in which document structure is shaped by patterns of operational use, and a continuous feedback mechanism that adapts document structure based on agent performance. We evaluate SDP on a real-world enterprise healthcare knowledge base comprising over 2,000 documents across approximately 25 sub-domains. Top-K retrieval precision improves from approximately 32% under fixed-token chunking to approximately 82% under SDP, while mean EI decreases from 0.71 to 0.14. We do not claim that entanglement fully explains RAG failure, but that it captures a distinct preprocessing failure mode that downstream optimization cannot reliably correct once encoded into the vector space.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义纠缠形式化框架和上下文条件化解缠管道，显著提升RAG检索精度。
analysis.research_motivation: RAG系统依赖向量检索，但文档中多主题交织导致嵌入空间语义重叠，降低检索精度，现有方法无法在编码后纠正。
analysis.problem: 向量检索中语义纠缠（semantic entanglement）导致Top-K检索精度受限，需要预处理阶段解缠。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出语义纠缠是预处理失败模式，下游优化无法可靠纠正。
analysis.method: 提出语义解缠管道（SDP），包含四阶段预处理框架，结合上下文条件化预处理和基于Agent性能的连续反馈机制。
contributions: 形式化定义语义纠缠并引入纠缠指数（EI）作为定量度量
提出SDP管道，在嵌入前重构文档结构，显著提升检索精度
analysis.experiments: 在包含2000+文档、约25个子领域的企业医疗知识库上评估，Top-K检索精度从32%提升至82%，平均EI从0.71降至0.14。
limitations: 仅在单一医疗领域评估，泛化性未知
未与更多预处理方法对比
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义纠缠形式化框架和上下文条件化解缠管道，显著提升RAG检索精度。

papers.title: Towards Intelligent Legal Document Analysis: CNN-Driven Classification of Case Law Texts
papers.abstract: Legal practitioners and judicial institutions face an ever-growing volume of case-law documents characterised by formalised language, lengthy sentence structures, and highly specialised terminology, making manual triage both time-consuming and error-prone. This work presents a lightweight yet high-accuracy framework for citation-treatment classification that pairs lemmatisation-based preprocessing with subword-aware FastText embeddings and a multi-kernel one-dimensional Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). Evaluated on a publicly available corpus of 25,000 annotated legal documents with a 75/25 training-test partition, the proposed system achieves 97.26% classification accuracy and a macro F1-score of 96.82%, surpassing established baselines including fine-tuned BERT, Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) with FastText, CNN with random embeddings, and a Term Frequency-Inverse Document Frequency (TF-IDF) k-Nearest Neighbour (KNN) classifier. The model also attains the highest Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic (AUC-ROC) curve of 97.83% among all compared systems while operating with only 5.1 million parameters and an inference latency of 0.31 ms per document - more than 13 times faster than BERT. Ablation experiments confirm the individual contribution of each pipeline component, and the confusion matrix reveals that residual errors are confined to semantically adjacent citation categories. These findings indicate that carefully designed convolutional architectures represent a scalable, resource-efficient alternative to heavyweight transformers for intelligent legal document analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级CNN框架用于法律文书引用分类，以97.26%准确率超越BERT，速度快13倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 法律文书数量激增，人工分类耗时且易错，现有深度模型（如BERT）计算成本高，需要高效轻量的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 法律案例文书的引用处理分类任务，要求高精度且低延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用词形还原预处理、子词感知FastText嵌入和多核一维CNN的轻量级框架。
contributions: 提出结合词形还原、FastText嵌入和多核CNN的轻量级法律文书分类框架。
在25000份标注法律文书上达到97.26%准确率，参数仅5.1M，推理速度比BERT快13倍以上。
analysis.experiments: 在公开法律文书数据集（25000份，75/25划分）上评估，与BERT、LSTM+FastText、CNN+随机嵌入、TF-IDF+KNN对比，取得最高AUC-ROC（97.83%），并进行了消融实验。
limitations: 仅在单一法律文书数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
错误集中在语义相近的引用类别，可能需更细粒度特征。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级CNN框架用于法律文书引用分类，以97.26%准确率超越BERT，速度快13倍。
